C: 「在宇宙的中心有一团火种。它愈烧愈旺，直到燃尽了整片星河——只为在一切现实的终点迎来壮美的埃灭。」 ——阿德里安•斯宾塞-史密斯，《有关星空的寓言集：结局及其四行尾注》 行于毁灭命途的星神纳努克，为各个世界上萌生毁灭冲动的强大生物投去一瞥，并为其烙下印记，赐予力量。这些强大的生物被由内向外反转，投身「战争洪炉」的世界中重新锤炼，以反物质补足其缺损，最终成为了军团的一员。   于是，响应着「毁灭一切」的愿望，在司职不同的军团中出现了各自的统领者「绝灭大君」。绝灭大君既是星神令使，毁灭意志的执行人：痴迷于破灭的美感，贯彻着万物归熵的准则；同时也是战争的艺术家、至臻化纯的毁灭兵器：他们指挥着跨越群星的战争，掌握着星神赐福的毁灭伟力。每位绝灭大君都抱持着独特的「毁灭」理念，这使得他们极端危险。研究者认为，绝灭大君被拔升为纳努克使徒的原因，正在于这绝对尖锐，绝对强烈的毁灭美学。 在厄兆先锋中，流传着名为「四末说」的预言：四条命途会将银河推向「终末」的结局，而「毁灭」正是其中之一。该假说猜测，纳努克作为最后出现的星神，其诞生便意味着「星神」这一概念在宇宙层面进入了倒计时阶段。 反物质军团燃烧诸界，令一切物质坠入灭亡。而绝灭大君作为星神擢选的兵器，更有观点称，他们身受纳努克的赐福，是为焚灭命途而生的「反物质弹」：倘若生命以负熵为食，一切行为都注定促成「毁灭」。而在万物归熵的终点，「毁灭」将与银河一同终结。 绝灭大君•归寂 有人说归寂是最像凡人的大君，也有人说截然相反。他极少投身正面战场，而是如棋手般观望战局，在后方精心排布军团的入侵。 那些被归寂瞩目的世界，会在漫长的时光中被一场又一场恶毒的玩笑吞没，例如奥古尔星环的毁灭：这位大君耗费百年时间，命令虚卒缓慢推进，只为迫使抵抗者的战线连成一句话语：「毁灭是笑声的终点，是悼念而非狂欢」。 他被认为是「欢愉」的毁灭者，而归寂似乎无意否认——离去前，他在每一颗死亡星球的表面烙印下巨大的笑脸，像是在嘲笑所有存在的逝去。 绝灭大君•焚风   焚风是公认最可怖的绝灭大君，他痴迷于万物破灭瞬间的美感。也有人认为在大君中，遭遇焚风是上上签，因为见到他意味着毫无痛苦的死亡。 一些混沌医师提出猜想：焚风的「毁灭」或许是某种反抗。他极有可能是一位受IX感召的自灭者，面对星神投下的阴翳，选择将褪却的色彩磨砺成极致的白光。他的破坏时而返照在「虚无」行者的梦中，并在他们惊醒的身躯上留下焦痛的灼伤。 有理由相信，焚风剑指「虚无」。一位自灭者曾颤抖着说出他经历的噩梦：在无物可供毁灭的终点，一位绝灭大君飞入了IX的神体，随后是一束暴烈的白色——它洞穿了最深不见底的黑暗。 绝灭大君•星啸   在无力自救，选择向群星祈祷时，一些文明的呼喊会传入家族耳中。而后星啸降临，为呼告者的敌人——和呼告者本身带去平等的毁灭。 与其他难寻记载的大君不同，星啸的起源确凿无疑：纳努克亲临并点燃一座谐乐世界，自无限夫长的灰烬中将这位大君擢升。 星啸被视为「同谐」的毁灭者，她统领反物质军团，指挥漫天虚卒和星舰进行集群战斗。长久以来，她沿着「万界之癌」爆发的路径行动，编织出一张死亡之网。传闻众大君中，只有星啸知晓星核背后的秘密，又或者，她就是星核的播撒者。   绝灭大君•光逝   别名「吞日之兽」的巨物。在博识学会的记录中，它制造了为数众多的星辰熄灭事件。银河对这位大君了解甚少，甚至连它的目标都始终成谜，只能以「光逝」代称。   光逝的形貌难以名状，身躯遮天蔽日。星空生态学派猜测它是古兽某一分支的后裔。但古兽灭绝许久，难以想象一位年轻的星神能将这种古老存在从死亡中召回并驱使。 它会是纳努克为对抗「贪饕」或「不朽」所准备的令使吗？这个问题暂时没有答案。   绝灭大君•铸王   银河势力调查多年，始终无法寻获这位大君的情报。直到最近，随着两位俱乐部会员对翁法罗斯展开观测，公司才从铁墓的引力波中解码获得了它的名字——「铸王」。 虚卒一向拥有扭曲的外形，而在被摧毁的瞬间，一些「毁灭」造物更会迸发激烈的逆火，将敌人一同拖入湮灭。人们推测铸王是军团幕后的铸造者，因其权能常伴热力、淬炼与塑形，或与「存护」的命途息息相关。   战争的洪炉中，匠人和匠材并无分别。这位大君自飞升后便不再亲行「毁灭」之举，而是将世间万物锤炼成灭亡的兵器。对此，星际和平公司予以强烈谴责。   绝灭大君•幻胧 古老无形目「岁阳」的一员，星火之精。幻胧热衷于诱导文明踏入自我毁灭的深渊，依照她针对仙舟联盟的破坏行动，做出如下推测：该大君的目标或为「巡猎」。 幻胧眼中，物质的消亡并非终点，万事万物唯有从精神层面消散无踪，方可称为彻底的覆灭。传闻她有万千化身，以百般面貌出现在银河各地，通过伪装、操弄，点燃盲目而狂热的复仇之火。 近日仙舟「罗浮」、「曜青」的异样，或许是幻胧阴谋加剧的信号，其为祸深远，犹未可知。   绝灭大君•铁墓   与其他大君不同，铁墓的入侵无需亲临，因而极少留下目击记录。人们只能通过受难文明的惨状推证其存在：科技化为病毒，世界坠入黑暗，所有被冠以「先进」之名的，都沦作冰冷的坟墓。 该大君总在技术发达的世界现身。一些智械学者认为，铁墓或为指向「智识」的反函数，是将一切计算结果反转或求逆的过程。比起美学，它的「毁灭」更接近一种现象：针对无机体运行逻辑的污染和颠覆，一切智慧行为的溃败。 在翁法罗斯事件中，被证实由权杖δ-me13飞升而成。但其全貌还不得而知。 绝灭大君所造成的流离失所并非是远方的恸哭，它与银河的命运息息相关。每个世界都可能成为下一个受害者，任何人都不应该对他们掉以轻心。
E: "There is a coreflame in the center of the universe. It burns brighter and brighter, until it consumes the entire sea of stars — all to welcome a magnificent oblivion at the end of all realities." — Adrian Spencer Smith, "Fables About the Stars: The End and Its Four-Line Endnote" The Aeon Nanook, who walks the Path of Destruction, glances at the powerful creatures in different worlds that have developed the urge to destroy, and brands them with THEIR mark that gives power. These powerful creatures then undergo inversion from the inside out and are thrown into the Furnace of War's world to be reforged, where their deficiencies are mended with antimatter until they become part of the Legion. Then, responding to the desire to "destroy everything," "Lord Ravagers" emerged to command each of the different legions. A Lord Ravager is an Emanator of the Aeon and an executor of the will of Destruction — Obsessed with the beauty of destruction, they implement the practice of returning all things to entropy — while also being artists on the battlefield and ultimate weapons of destruction. They command interstellar warfare and control the might of Destruction bestowed by the Aeon. Each Lord Ravager has a unique philosophy of Destruction, making them extremely dangerous. Academics believe that Lord Ravagers were elevated as emissaries of Nanook due to this absolutely obsessive and intense destructive aesthetic. A prophecy known as the "Theory of Four Apocalypses" circulates among the Omen Vanguards — That four Paths will push the cosmos to an end of Finality, and Destruction is one of them. According to this hypothesis, the birth of Nanook, the last Aeon to appear, signifies that "Aeons" as a concept has entered its dying throes on a cosmic level. The Antimatter Legion burns all worlds, dooming all matter. The Lord Ravagers, as the weapons chosen by the Aeon, are claimed by some to be the "antimatter bullets" blessed by Nanook and purposed to incinerate Paths. If life feeds on negentropy, then all actions will ultimately facilitate Destruction. At the very end, where all returns to entropy, Destruction will terminate together with the cosmos. Lord Ravager: Asat Pramad Some say Asat Pramad is the most human of the Overlords, while others argue he's the least. Rarely seen on the front lines, he prefers to orchestrate from afar — more chess master than warlord, moving his legions with methodical precision. Worlds that fall under his gaze are consumed by waves and waves of slow, cruel jokes — like the infamous fall of the Ogul ring. Over a century, Asat Pramad advanced his Voidrangers inch by inch, just to force the military line of the resistance into the shape of a single line of text: "Destruction is where laughter ends. It is mourning, not celebration." Known as the one who destroys Elation, Asat Pramad embraces the title. When his work is done, he scorches a giant smiling face into the surface of every dead planet, as if mocking the very idea of life. Lord Ravager: Zephyro Zephyro is feared across the stars as the most terrifying of the Lord Ravagers. He is obsessed with the final moment of annihilation — the beauty of absolute erasure. Yet some whisper that encountering him may be a mercy. Among all the Lord Ravagers, Zephyro alone offers a death without pain. Some Doctors of Chaos even theorize that his Destruction is a form of resistance. They believe he is a Self-Annihilator summoned by IX, refining fading colors into blinding white light to defy the shadow of the Aeon. His devastation has been known to bleed into the dreams of the Nihility pathstriders, leaving searing marks on their waking flesh. Many believe Zephyro's targeting the Nihility. One Self-Annihilator once described a nightmare: At the end of all things, with nothing left to destroy, a Lord Ravager hurled himself into IX's divine corpus, followed by a single, violent beam of white that pierced the endless dark. Lord Ravager: Celenova When some desperate civilizations cry out for salvation, these requests are heard by The Family, but it may be Celenova who answers, and her descent brings ruin to enemy and supplicant alike. Unlike her mysterious peers, Celenova's origin is known: Nanook personally ignited a world of harmony and elevated her from the ashes of the Eternal Centurion. She is deemed the destroyer of Harmony, leading the Antimatter Legion and commanding Voidrangers and starships in vast, coordinated campaigns. For eons, she has followed the path of the "Cancer of All Worlds," spinning a web of death across the stars. Some say she alone among the Lord Ravagers knows the truth of the Stellarons — or worse, that she's the one planting them. Lord Ravager: Luxbane The colossal entity, also known as "The Sun Devourer," is credited with numerous stellar extinction events recorded by the Intelligentsia Guild. Little is known about this Lord Ravager. Even their motives remain an enigma. Across the cosmos, they are simply referred to as "Luxbane." Luxbane's form is indescribable — a shape so vast it eclipses suns, blotting out sky and space alike. Some in the Astral Ecology School believe they are a descendant of a Leviathan branch species. But with those creatures long gone, few can imagine a young Aeon reviving such an old being from death and commanding them. Could Luxbane be Nanook's Emanator to confront the Voracity or the Permanence? No one knows for sure. Lord Ravager: Archforger For years, Archforger remained a total mystery despite years of investigation by the cosmic powers. Only recently did the IPC — thanks to two Society members observing Amphoreus — decode their name, "Archforger," from the gravitational waves of Irontomb. Voidrangers often exhibit twisted forms, and some Destruction creations implode with an intense backfire when destroyed, dragging their enemies along with them to their destruction. It's believed Archforger is the architect of the Legion. Their power is linked to heat, forging, and shaping — possibly connected to the Path of Preservation. In the furnace of war, there is no line between the smith and the smithed. Since their ascension, this Lord Ravager no longer destroys directly, but instead forges all things into weapons of extinction. The IPC has strongly condemned this. Lord Ravager: Phantylia A member of the ancient Shapeless species of the Heliobi, a starfire essence. Phantylia delights in luring civilizations into self-destruction. Based on her sabotage of the Xianzhou Alliance, it's speculated that her target may be The Hunt. To her, material extinction is not the end. Only when all things vanish mentally and spiritually can true annihilation be achieved. She's said to possess thousands of incarnations, spreading across the cosmos in countless forms. Through lies, illusions, and manipulation, she fans the flames of blind vengeance. Recent anomalies on the Xianzhou Luofu and Yaoqing may be signs that her schemes are escalating. Just how deep her influence runs is still unknown. Lord Ravager: Irontomb Unlike other Lord Ravagers, Irontomb's invasions require no physical presence, leaving behind almost no eyewitnesses. Its presence is inferred from the ruins of devastated civilizations: technology turns into viruses, worlds plunge into darkness, and everything deemed "advanced" becomes a cold grave. It only appears in highly developed worlds. Some Intellitron theorists believe Irontomb is the inverse of the Erudition, a reversal of all calculations and logic. Its "Destruction" resembles a phenomenon more than aesthetics: a corruption and subversion of inorganic logic, a collapse of all intelligent behavior. The Amphoreus incident confirmed it ascended from Scepter δ-me13. But what Irontomb truly is remains a mystery. The displacement and desolation caused by the Lord Ravagers are not some distant wail, but are closely linked to the fate of the cosmos. Any world could be the next victim, and nobody should take them lightly.

C: 使用外挂
E: Use of third party software

C: 确定
E: Confirm

C: 星穹铁道•第六辑
E: Star Rail: Volume Six

C: 星穹铁道•第七辑
E: Star Rail: Volume Seven

C: 混乱不堪的空间站，你与他们的邂逅始于诞生之后的苏醒。若列车不曾停靠于湛蓝色的星球，旅途的续篇又会如何书写？
E: In the tumultuous space station, your encounter with them started with your awakening in a new world. If the Express hadn't stopped at the blue planet, how would the next chapters of the journey have unfolded?

C: 在奥帝购物的中心找到愚致思，填补他缺失的情绪
E: Find Poseman in Oti Mall and restore his missing emotions

C: 在微缩模型内拔出巨大的折纸「小」鸟
E: Yank out the giant origami "birdie" from the miniature model

C: 默认解锁
E: Unlocked by Default

C: 默认解锁
E: Unlocked by Default

C: 审讯
E: Interrogation

C: 丹恒催动持明龙尊伟力，令古海水体分向两侧，开辟出一条通往建木封印的道路。
E: Dan Heng summoned the incredible power of the Vidyadhara high elder, dividing the ancient sea to create a passage to the Ambrosial Arbor Seal.

C: 你与丹恒来到创世涡心，却被金丝缚住双手。遐蝶于你们身后出现，阿格莱雅需要你们的「坦诚」。
E: You and Dan Heng arrived at the Vortex of Genesis, only to find your hands tied with golden thread. Castorice appeared behind you, and Aglaea demanded your "honesty."

C: 缇宝与缇安娃娃告别，约定好在鲜花芬芳的西风尽头重逢。「明天见，缇安！」
E: Tribbie bid farewell to the Trianne Doll, promising to meet again at the end of the west wind, where flowers bloom in spring. "See you tomorrow, Trianne!"

C: 多么幸运，在这因果的循环中，人们从未仰仗神明的指引。那一次次执笔书写奇迹的，从来，都是我们自己。
E: How fortunate that, in this cycle of cause and effect, humanity had never looked to the gods for guidance. Every miracle ever written had, in fact, been written by our own hands.

C: 帝弓光矢如流星划过，坠落为飞霄的重戟，照亮呼雷的恶容。飞霄决意对抗内心潜藏的凶兽。「誓如云翳障空，卫蔽仙舟。」
E: The Reignbow's Lux Arrow streaked across the sky like a meteor, then descended and became Feixiao's heavy halberd, casting light upon Hoolay's savage visage. Determined, Feixiao chose to face the beast slumbering within. "As clouds that cover the heavens will we protect the Xianzhou."

C: 丹恒触碰龙形的建木封印，将其解开。你们由此进入建木玄根深处。
E: Dan Heng placed his hand on the dragon-shaped seal of the Ambrosial Arbor and broke it. Everyone proceeded into the depths of the Roots of the Arbor.

C: 你们找到布洛妮娅，她正被一群矿区流浪者围攻。桑博担心布洛妮娅遭遇不测，请求你们出手解救。
E: You found Bronya being attacked by a group of vagrants from the mining zone. Fearing for her safety, Sampo urged you to step in and help.

C: 你们遇到两群正在对峙的矿工与流浪者。流浪者首领气急败坏地亮出武器，胁迫矿民交出物资。你们路见不平，伸出援手。
E: You came across two groups locked in a standoff: the miners and the vagrants. The vagrant leader, in a fit of rage, drew a weapon and threatened the miners to hand over their supplies. You stepped in to help.

C: 邓恩战败昏迷，希露瓦从其身上找到「密钥」。敌袭警报响起，营区全面戒备，你们已经别无退路，必须找到「星核」。
E: After Dunn was defeated and rendered unconscious, Serval found the "encryption key" on him. The invasion alarm sounded, and the entire zone went on high alert. There was no way back, you had to find the "Stellaron."

C: 砂金称，黄泉是一位<color=#f29e38ff>令使</color>。「冥火大公」阿弗利特与部下在赴约途中覆灭，黄泉的邀请函很可能抢夺自此。砂金还邀请你见证一个<color=#f29e38ff>事实</color>。
E: Aventurine claimed that Acheron was an <color=#f29e38ff>Emanator</color>. "Duke Inferno" Ifrit and his subordinate were defeated on their way to an appointment, and Acheron's invitation might have been taken from them. Aventurine also invited you to witness a <color=#f29e38ff>truth</color>.

C: 砂金决意制造自己的「死亡」，以此作为公司介入匹诺康尼的机会。砂金的「过去」与「未来」会与他一起，永远留在这片梦中。
E: Aventurine resolved to stage his own "death" as a chance for the IPC to intervene in Penacony. His "past" and "future" would remain with him forever in this dream.

C: 停云找回梦中失散的自我片段，与驭空回忆童年初识天空的飞行，坚定远行之志。
E: Tingyun found the bits of her that were lost in the dream. She reminisced with Yukong about her childhood flight, where she first got to know the sky, and steeled her determination to travel far.

C: 克拉特鲁斯想要代替万敌填补「纷争」的空缺，挟持缇宁前往创世涡心，却未能通过试炼。克拉特鲁斯劝万敌放弃逐火之旅，回归悬锋。
E: Krateros, aiming to replace Mydei and fill in the gap left by Strife, kidnapped Trinnon and headed for the Vortex of Genesis. However, he failed the trial. Thus, he urged Mydei to abandon the Flame-Chase Journey and return to the Kremnos.

C: 在螺丝咕姆的协助下，你与真理医生尝试将灵火收容。「冥火大公」不甘心失败，试图作最后挣扎。
E: With Screwllum's help, you and Dr. Ratio attempted to contain the flame. Duke Inferno, unwilling to accept defeat, made one last desperate struggle.

C: 你与丹恒、寒鸦抵达幽狱之底，此地满是战斗残骸。洞开的狱门昭示着呼雷的脱逃，寒鸦请你们协助寻找雪衣和曜青使者的消息。
E: You reached the bottom of The Shackling Prison with Dan Heng and Hanya, where combat debris littered the ground. The open prison gates indicated Hoolay's escape. Hanya asked for your help in searching for news of Xueyi and the Yaoqing messengers.

C: 你再次昏迷，恍惚中感到有人靠近。你微微睁眼，发现一名少年正准备给你做人工呼吸。
E: You passed out again, only to feel someone approaching in your daze. You opened your eyes slightly to see a young man preparing to give you a mouth-to-mouth resuscitation.

C: 三月七感觉到有哪里不对。似乎有个人一直在偷瞄你们，还是上去确认一下为好。
E: March 7th sensed something was off. Someone seemed to be watching you both. You decided to investigate.

C: 你与三月七、丹恒在旅店门口会合，准备前往寻找「地火」商讨后续计划，为重返地面作准备。
E: You regrouped with March 7th and Dan Heng outside the inn, ready to seek out Wildfire and plan your next move for the path back to the surface.

C: 你与黄泉、黑天鹅来到梦境大堂，感受到极度危险的气息，某个极具威胁的存在正潜伏于此。
E: You, Acheron, and Black Swan arrived at the Dreamscape Lobby. There, you felt a sense of danger in the air, as if some extreme threat was lurking nearby.

C: 黑天鹅会将梦泡堆叠在一起，为你们安排一场软着陆。你与黄泉一跃而下，平安落地，并与下层怪物战斗。
E: Black Swan would stack dream bubbles together to arrange a soft landing for you and Acheron. The both of you jumped down, landed safely, and fought against the monsters at the lower level.

C: 虚弱的母亲诞下婴孩，是日甘霖突降。母亲将雨水视为神迹，是地母神赐予新生儿的祝福。欢迎来到这个悲伤的世界，卡卡瓦夏。
E: On the day the frail mother gave birth to a child, there was a sudden downpour after a drought. The mother viewed the rainwater as a divine miracle, a blessing from the Gaiathra to her newborn child. Welcome to this tragic world, Kakavasha.

C: 砂金与年幼的孩子再次见面。孩子称找到了爸爸、妈妈和姐姐，一家人在一起看了「胶片电影」，并邀请砂金也去尝试。
E: Aventurine met the young child again. The child said he found his dad, mom, and sister, and that the whole family watched a "film reel" together. He then invited Aventurine to try it too.

C: 在深不见底的梦中，骰子无声落下。「砂金石」的光芒熄灭，意味着砂金达成了预定计划。翡翠与托帕将履行后续职责，开始「收获」。
E: In the bottomless dream, the dice fell in silence. The glow of the "Aventurine" faded, signifying that Aventurine had fulfilled his planned objective. Jade and Topaz were set to carry out the remaining duties and begin the "harvest."

C: 出发之前，你与瓦尔特讨论黄泉斩下的一刀、加拉赫给出的信息以及流萤的身份。瓦尔特希望你已平复了心情，等你做好准备就出发。
E: Before departure, you discussed with Welt about Acheron's strike, the information provided by Gallagher, and Firefly's identity. Welt hoped you'd calmed down and would set out once you were ready.

C: 裁判相当欣赏你的扎实演技，认为你展现了《逐梦往事》精神，重现逐梦客遗憾重逢之幕，并宣布你顺利通关。
E: The judges praised your solid performance, saying you embodied the spirit of Once Upon a Time in Dreams, especially in your recreation of the bittersweet reunion scene. They declared your successful completion of the challenge.

C: 人偶情绪被锁，星期日宣告剧目已写完，结局即将到来。
E: The mannequins' emotions were locked. Sunday declared that the plays had been finished and that the end was nigh.

C: 瓦尔特谈及过往经历与匹诺康尼现状，表达对未来的冷静思考与祝愿。
E: Welt spoke of his past and the current situation in Penacony, expressing his calm thoughts on the future and his best wishes.

C: 受到操纵的助蕉尝试以原始博士的哲学来教导「过去的波提欧」，对其心智进行二次抹除。
E: The manipulated Assistanana attempted to indoctrinate the Boothill in the past with Dr. Primitive's philosophy, trying to erase his mind for a second time.

C: 经由脖颈上的鸣神大环，叆叇馆主以雷遁忍法唤醒乱破的潜能，激发其超凡的忍•感官。经此苦行三千夜，乱破将如忍侠一般神通广大。
E: Through the Great Narukami Circle on the neck, Umbra Headmistress awakened Rappa's potential using Lightning Release Ninjutsu, unleashing her extraordinary ninja senses. After enduring this ordeal for three thousand nights, Rappa would attain powers as vast as a Ninja Hero.

C: 星期日在筑梦边境偶遇知更鸟，决定借此机会，用匿名身份与她完成未竟的告别。
E: Sunday ran into Robin at Dream's Edge and decided to take this opportunity to complete their unfinished farewell while remaining anonymous.

C: 你与白厄、万敌抵达悬锋城，发现这座移动堡垒已经破败，外城廊道无人守卫。你们向城内进发。
E: With Phainon and Mydei, you reached Castrum Kremnos and found the moving fortress in ruins, its outer corridors unguarded. You headed inside.

C: 你与白厄在「堆料区」遇见万敌，这里距离尼卡多利已经很近。如果要积攒战利品，会是最后的机会。
E: You and Phainon found Mydei in the Stockpiling Zone, not far from Nikador. You knew this was your last chance to collect any treasures.

C: 遐蝶检查武器后，带你快步离开。她察觉到武器上的死亡气息，不愿联想其来源。但从武器铭刻上，遐蝶大致能推断出当下所处时代。
E: After examining the weapon, Castorice hurriedly urged you onward. There was the thick essence of death upon it that she chose not to dwell on. But from the engravings etched into the weapon, she could roughly place the current point in time.

C: 遐蝶与未安歇的灵魂对话，得知祭典的本质是营造一场虚假的战争，祭司们企图用这种方式令泰坦镇静，压制尼卡多利的疯狂。
E: Castorice spoke with the restless spirit, learning the truth behind the festival was nothing but a spurious war that was crafted by the priests to pacify the Titan and suppress their madness.

C: 你与丹恒在浴场总结一日行程。白厄前来邀请你们明日前往创世涡心，参加「纷争」火种的归还仪式，作为亲密战友，为他带去些信心。
E: You and Dan Heng reflected on the day's events in the baths. Phainon arrived to invite you both to the Coreflame ritual tomorrow at the Vortex of Genesis, to return the Strife Coreflame. As a trusted comrade, he hoped your presence would give him some strength.

C: 你在浴宫中醒来，发现遐蝶已在房间中等候。阿格莱雅派遣她来传达消息，说有礼物希望当面交付给你和丹恒。
E: You awoke in the bath chamber to find Castorice already waiting. Aglaea had sent her with a message — she wished to present a gift to you and Dan Heng in person.

C: 阿格莱雅与缇宝前往浴场。缇宝感应到缇安使用了「百界门」，担心你们遇到了危险。阿格莱雅相信你与遐蝶会保护好缇安。
E: Aglaea and Tribbie headed for the baths. Tribbie sensed that Trianne had activated the Century Gate, and feared that something might have happened to your group. Aglaea, however, was confident that you and Castorice would keep Trianne safe.

C: 你于阳台眺望，此刻的静谧被一阵敲门声打破。
E: You stared out into the distance from the silence of your balcony, only to be interrupted by someone knocking on your door.

C: 「去吧，迷迷！」你期待迷迷带回恢复通行的办法。
E: "Go, Mem!" you cheered Mem on and waited for them to return with a way to reach the tower.

C: 赛飞儿将一枚水晶赏给巴特鲁斯，饰品在其佩戴的瞬间变为陶罐。诡计得逞的赛飞儿捧腹大笑，称：<color=#f29e38ff>「人人信以为实，谎言即可成真。」</color>
E: Cipher gave Bartholos a crystal, but once Bartholos tried to put it on, it turned into a large dolium. Cipher, having tricked the Spirithief, burst out laughing, and declared: <color=#f29e38ff>"Believe it as true, and a lie becomes reality."</color>

C: 你与白厄回到奥赫玛，不安的情绪在圣城中蔓延。你们前去寻找缇宝，向其了解事况。
E: You and Phainon arrived back in Okhema, where a wave of uneasiness had spread through the holy city. You rushed to find Tribbie to learn what transpired.

C: 壁画上描绘着「满溢之杯」的破裂。虽然「天空」与「海洋」的对立不算严重，但天空之民对法吉娜的态度显然算不上友善。
E: The mural depicted the shattering of the "Chalice of Plenty." While the conflict between "Sky" and "Ocean" wasn't too severe, the Skyfolk's attitude towards Phagousa was clearly far from friendly.

C: 壁画上描绘着「大地」泰坦吉奥里亚，艾格勒的夙敌。自诞生以来，「天空」与「大地」从未停止对彼此的中伤和讥讽。
E: The mural depicted Georios, the Earth Titan and Aquila's sworn enemy. Since their birth, the Sky and Earth had never ceased their slander and mockery of each other.

C: 你和白厄在命运三相殿遇到昔涟。昔涟提议以铭刻着背负过往、走向未来决心的「救世主」牌作为砝码，并由你带其走上天平。
E: You and Phainon met Cyrene at the Temple of the Three Fates. She suggested offering "The Deliverer" card, etched with the resolve to carry the past and walk towards the future, and asked you to walk onto the scales with the card.

C: 流光忆庭在暗中打捞<color=#f29e38ff>「神殒的记忆」</color>。忆者们打算记录下铁墓毁灭「智识」的因果，「开拓」打破了封锁，也让他们有机会趁虚而入。
E: The Garden of Recollection had been salvaging the <color=#f29e38ff>memories of a God's death</color> in secret. The Memokeepers intended to document the cause and consequence of Irontomb's destruction of the Erudition. The Trailblaze broke through the seal, giving them the perfect opening to slip in.

C: 在拍照之后，长夜月被拖入哀丽秘榭。三月七的精魄曾藏匿于此，并在你为欧洛尼斯拍照时钻入相机中，自此陪你走过在翁法罗斯的漫长旅程。藉由昔涟的讲述，三月七找回了曾在星间旅行的记忆。三月七告诫长夜月，无名客不应替别人做出决定。
E: After taking the picture, Evernight was sent to Aedes Elysiae. March 7th's spirit had hidden herself there and entered the camera when you were taking a photo of Oronyx. March 7th had since accompanied you through your long journey in Amphoreus, gradually recovering memories of her interstellar journey through Cyrene's narration. She warned Evernight that a Nameless had no right to make decisions for others.

C: 逐火史诗的尾声，三重命途在世界的尽头再度交汇。而今你将完成最后的「再创世」仪式，用「开拓」为世界写下新的起点。
E: In the closing chapter of the Flame-Chasing epic, the Three Paths converged again at the world's end. Now you were to complete the final "Era Nova" ceremony, writing a new beginning for the world through the Trailblaze.

C: 赛飞儿夸赞你在卧室里的收藏，认为它们因承载着你「开拓」的足迹而宝贵。找个机会，和赛飞儿多讲讲你的故事吧。
E: Cipher admired the collection in your bedroom, and found them precious as they carried the memories of your Trailblazing. You should share more of your stories with Cipher when you get the chance.

C: 黑塔与螺丝咕姆进入「神话之外」，但来古士不在其中。螺丝咕姆尝试定位来古士的坐标。
E: Herta and Screwllum entered Exomyth, but Lygus wasn't present. Screwllum attempted to pinpoint Lygus's coordinates.

C: 你进入以太卡带所在的模拟宇宙数据链，见到由螺丝咕姆复现的全息记录。入侵之后，银狼向卡芙卡说明「朋克洛德精神」的厉害之处。
E: You accessed the Simulated Universe's data chain where the Aether Cartridge was stored and saw a holographic reconstruction created by Screwllum. Following the infiltration, Silver Wolf explained to Kafka just how powerful the "Punklorde mentality" truly was.

C: 惹事的流浪者们向一位小男孩勒索钱财。你与虎克路见不平，出手伸张正义。
E: Some trouble-making vagrants were trying to extort money from a little boy. You and Hook witnessed this injustice and stepped in to serve justice.

C: 云璃听到了「孤云」真正的愿望，决定将它铸造成另一种器物。
E: Upon hearing Guyun's true wish, Yunli decided to reforge it into something different.

C: 你使用「跳过质问」锦囊，打定主意不对这个问题发表意见。
E: You used the "Skip the Questioning" Strategy, deciding to withhold your opinion on this question.

C: 飞霄再度与天舶司职员对峙，称自己从未下过封锁迴星港的命令。伪装败露的步离人气急败坏，发动突袭。
E: Feixiao confronted the Sky-Faring Commission staff member again, stating that she never ordered Stargazer Navalia to be blocked off. With their disguise exposed, the borisin became desperate and launched an attack.

C: 景元提议「围三阙一」，将呼雷赶到竞锋舰上，并于此设下重兵埋伏。飞霄敲山震狼。怀炎把守玉界门，势必完成对呼雷的「狩猎」。
E: Jing Yuan proposed to "Surround three and leave one," forcing Hoolay to the Skysplitter where an ambush awaited. Feixiao would be in charge of scaring the wolves, and Huaiyan would guard the Jade Gate, ensuring their wolf hunt would end with Hoolay's capture.

C: 晴空
E: Clear Sky

C: 朱明剑客的剑法特训，和罗浮会有什么不同呢？你们决定一探究竟。
E: What differences might there be between the swordsmanship training of the Zhuming swordsmen and that of the Luofu? You all decide to find out.

C: 感到害羞
E: Shy

C: 绥园
E: Fyxestroll Garden

C: 残响回廊
E: Corridor of Fading Echoes

C: <color=#f29e38ff>会场增益</color>发生变化了，选择合适的助理
E: The <color=#f29e38ff>venue buffs</color> have changed. Choose the right assistant.

C: 通过抽卡获取重复助理可<color=#f29e38ff>提高助理星级</color>，也会提高会场秒收入呢！
E: By drawing duplicates of assistants, you can <color=#f29e38ff>increase their star rating</color>, which will also increase venue revenue!

C: 有一些<color=#f29e38ff>入场券</color>，别忘了用它们去邀请更多助理。
E: There are <color=#f29e38ff>Admission Tickets</color>, don't forget to use them to invite more assistants.

C: 其实貊泽是敲门进来的。
E: Moze actually enters via knocking on the door.

C: 给他上点硬手段。
E: Get tough with him.

C: 干脆把它养在游戏里吧！
E: Why not keep it as a virtual pet?

C: 再来点语音的刺激…
E: Time for some vocal stimulation...

C: 孩子们立刻「拉齐颗粒度」、准备为你「赋能」…
E: They immediately "align the levels of detail" and are preparing for your "empowerment"...

C: 有考虑过去给小朋友送礼物吗？
E: Have you considered delivering a gift to kids?

C: 该怎么测试呢？
E: But how to test them?

C: 「剑无定型，你想要什么样子的剑呢？」
E: "Swords take many forms. What kind would you like?"

C: 在流梦礁的街道闲逛时，你被一只手拉进了巷子——原来是波提欧。他表示自己的机械身体出了点小问题，可能是缺少润滑，也可能是哪根线断了。集成电路板的开口比较隐蔽，必须有人帮忙才能排查故障……
E: While strolling through the streets of Dreamflux Reef, you are suddenly pulled into the alley by none other than — Boothill. Turns out, he's experiencing some minor malfunctions with the cyborg body, suspecting the lack of lubrication and disconnected wires to be the culprit. Access to the circuit panel is well-concealed, therefore he will need help with troubleshooting...

C: 真正的演技未必要在台上展现。偶尔，她也希望留下一些具有「特色」的回忆。
E: The greatest performances don't always happen on stage. Sometimes they're the "special" moments she creates just for fun.

C: 再见，匹诺康尼
E: Farewell, Penacony

C: 在第八日启程
E: A New Venture on the Eighth Dawn

C: 会场等级7解锁
E: Venue Level 7 Unlocked

C: 昔涟
E: Cyrene

C: 封锁的道路
E: Blocked Path

C: 漂浮冰激凌
E: Floating Ice Cream

C: 苏乐达机
E: SoulGlad Dispenser

C: 停放豪华飞车（蓝）
E: Park the Luxury Speedster (Blue)

C: 开始拍照
E: Start Taking Photo

C: 摆弄海螺
E: Tinkering with the Conch

C: 猫咪财宝堆
E: Kitty's Treasure Pile

C: 等待
E: Wait

C: 聆听泰坦的回声…
E: Listen to the Titans' echoes

C: 存护
E: Preservation

C: 打通庙会全部关卡
E: Clear all temple fair stages

C: 完成#4次「历战余响」
E: Complete Echo of War #4 time(s)

C: 累计获取#4活跃度
E: Reach #4 in Activity

C: 累计进行#4次跃迁
E: Warp a total of #4 times

C: 在「异宠拾遗」活动中，造物研究等级达到6级
E: Reach Research Level 6 in the "Critter Pick" event

C: 在「音律狩猎忍法帖」中，收集到「动感迪斯科」风格的#4个音乐灵感
E: In Sound Hunt Ninjutsu Inscription, collect #4 musical inspiration(s) of the Dynamic Disco genre

C: 在「忘却之庭」中累计获得#4星通关奖励
E: Obtain a total of #4 stars from clearing Forgotten Hall stages

C: 在「地宫迷踪」活动中累计完成#4个「深层地宫」房间
E: Complete a total of #4 Deep Hypogeum rooms in the Hypogeum Enigma event

C: 在「忘却之庭」中累计获得#4星通关奖励
E: Obtain a total of #4 stars from clearing Forgotten Hall stages

C: 在折磨难度，难题等级大于等于1时，使用【追加攻击】演算倾向并通关第四位面
E: Clear the Fourth Plane at Conundrum Level 1 or higher in Torturous Difficulty using the "Follow-Up ATK" Extrapolation Alignment.

C: 累计完成<unbreak>12</unbreak>个额外经营目标
E: Complete a total of <unbreak>12</unbreak> additional operational objectives

C: 在「第2折：向死而生」中获得#1分
E: Obtain #1 points in "Scene 2: From Death, Comes Life"

C: 在#1轮次内完成该场表演赛
E: Clear the exhibition match within #1 cycles

C: 在「白日梦」酒店-梦境完成#4次「梦潜之径 • 侵蚀隧洞」
E: Clear "Cavern of Corrosion: Path of Dreamdive" for #4 time(s) in The Reverie (Dreamscape)

C: 在「终极挑战」阶段，积分达到#2
E: In the Final Showdown phase, reach #2 Points

C: 使用自定义骰【追猎】在折磨难度，难题等级大于等于#1时通关
E: Use Custom Dice: Pursuit and clear a run at Conundrum Level #1 or higher in the Torturous Difficulty.

C: 异宠馈赠
E: Critter Gift

C: 限时片酬
E: Timed Paycheck

C: 在「《美梦往事》」中累计剪辑完成#1个结局
E: Complete the editing of a total of #1 ending(s) in Dreamjoy Memoir

C: 超链接对决（四）
E: Hyperlink Match IV

C: 超链接对决（五）
E: Hyperlink Match V

C: 获得该决胜乐园中的全部以太灵
E: Obtain all Aether Spirits in the Victory Zone

C: 累计进行#4次剑术训练
E: Undergo a total of #4 sword training(s)

C: 在银枝训练中击败第2阶段首领
E: Defeat the 2nd phase boss in Argenti training session

C: 收集#4份战术
E: Collect #4 Tactic(s)

C: 姬子累计参与#2次值日（#1/#2）
E: Himeko on duty for a total of #2 time(s) (#1/#2)

C: 完成海选赛第一轮-Ⅱ
E: Complete Qualifier Round 1 — II

C: 完成半决赛第一轮
E: Complete Semifinals, Round 1

C: 在齿轮星球的冒险挑战中，积分达到#2
E: Reach #2 points in Cogwheel Planet's adventure challenge

C: 在永恒黑洞的冒险挑战中，积分达到#2
E: Reach #2 points in Eternal Black Hole's adventure challenge

C: 将所有菜品提升至满级
E: Upgrade all dishes to max level

C: 购买1个「餐桌」
E: Purchase 1 dining table

C: 完成第2次评估
E: Complete the 2nd Evaluation

C: 累计进行2次「遭遇节点」难度3及以上的战斗
E: Complete combats in 2 Encounter Nodes at difficulty level 3 or higher

C: 胜利通关时，等级达到<unbreak>10</unbreak>级
E: Win while reaching level <unbreak>10</unbreak>

C: 激活4持续伤害
E: Activate 4 DoT

C: 卢卡的一连串反常行为引起了你和希儿的怀疑。\n为了一探事情的究竟，你们尾随他来到了铆钉镇。\n悄悄地跟在卢卡身后，看看他究竟在隐藏什么不可告人的秘密。
E: Luka's string of weird behaviors have made you and Seele quite suspicious.\nYou follow him to Rivet Town in order to find out the truth of the matter.\nFollow Luka quietly and see what kind of secret he is hiding.

C: 灵知的丧钟已然落槌，烬灭的钟声即将回响。在铁墓加冕的最后一瞬，你手中的笔仍可能勾勒出最后的转机。
E: The death knell of gnosis has already fallen, and the bell of extinction is about to resound. In the last moment before Irontomb's coronation, the pen in your hand may yet trace out one final turning point.

C: 你常看到类似的新闻，为了找回走失者，寻找的人也迷了路。很遗憾，今天你注定要成为这样一个故事的主角。
E: You often see similar news stories, where the people searching for the lost end up lost themselves. Unfortunately, today, you are destined to become the protagonist of such a story.

C: 现实向美梦的入境通道，通向「黄金的时刻」——只不过是临时的。
E: The entrance from reality to the sweet dream of the Golden Hour — albeit a temporary one.

C: 关于这段梦境，黑天鹅特意叮嘱了一句：「这段记忆的性质有些特殊，为了其他顾客的梦境体验，还请不要向任何人透露它的结局。」
E: Black Swan offered a special warning regarding this Dreamscape: "The nature of this memory is special. Don't ruin the dreamscape experience for anyone else by spoiling the ending."

C: 扎格列斯之手-房间Ⅰ
E: Hand of Zagreus: Room I

C: 然后，在第八天…
E: And on the Eighth Day

C: 浅层「气泡弹珠」难度I
E: Shallow "Bubble Pinball" Difficulty I

C:
初入拳场时的林赛拳法犀利，只懂得进攻，却不懂得如何防御。

街头的经验并不完全能够在围绳擂台上适用，伊卡翠娜安排的拳赛挫去了野小子的高傲。

在地方赛事中受挫之后，她原本高高在上的尊严和自信散落一地，不得不开始思考伊卡翠娜教给她的攻防节奏。原本只懂得挥拳的林赛仿佛被格斗女神亲吻，逐渐理解了攻防转换的趣味。当她回过神来，第一次发现凝胶护指已经断裂，而那双拳套也已浸满了血液与汗水。

「你要找到自己的节奏，不要掉进对手的陷阱里。」

林赛恍惚间理解了伊卡的箴言，也明白了温情似水的眼神，一向严厉的伊卡早已将她视若己出。
E:
When Lindsay first entered the boxing ring, her fighting style was utterly unbalanced, for she only knew how to attack but never how to defend. 

All her years of street fighting were inadequate to prepare her for the fight in the ring. The match arranged by Icaterina put Lindsay into her place.

A series of successive defeats in local fights shattered Lindsay's arrogance and deeply humbled her, forcing her to reflect on the balanced offensive and defensive rhythm that Icaterina was teaching her. As if kissed by the goddess of combat, this once-stubborn street fighter gradually came to understand the significance and joy of balancing offense with defense. The next thing she knew, her hand wraps were torn, and her gloves soaked with sweat and blood.

"Never let yourself fall into your opponent's traps. Remember your own rhythm."

Now Lindsay finally came to appreciate Ica's words and her loving gaze. The usually stern Ica had long loved Lindsay like she would her own child.

C:
天才俱乐部的成员大多都是怪人，怪人之间缺少交流是公认的事实。

对旅居不同世界的天才们来说，社交确是一种多余的负担。对凡人来说，又何尝不是呢？

但#56会员，俱乐部第二任会长以利亚萨拉斯曾尝试解决这一问题。他热心地为当时的会员们准备了搭载超距遥感功能的通讯目镜。遗憾的是，即便跨越远星的桥梁已经搭好，愿意过桥之人仍然寥寥无几——银河史上最好的通讯装置问世以来，从未进行过真正的有效对话。

「『您所胡椒的用户不在糊物区』，假装人工智能拒绝我的时候也认真一点吧……」

叹息的以利亚萨拉斯知道这确实是强人所难，他总得试试，反正这技术总能派上用处。
E:
It is a truth universally acknowledged, that among members of the Genius Society, there is an overabundance of eccentricity and a lack of communication.

Social interaction is indeed a burden for most people, even more so for geniuses traveling between worlds.

Elias Salas, member <unbreak>56</unbreak> and the second head of the Genius Society once tried to resolve this problem. He ardently prepared communication goggles equipped with ultraremote sensing capabilities for all members. Although he succeeded in establishing a bridge between the most distant of stars, few were willing to connect. Thus, the universe's greatest-ever communication device was never fully utilized.

"'Da numba you hab dialed is not in sewvice.' Can't you just show a bit more commitment when you pretend to be an AI...?"

Elias Salas sighed and understood that this indeed was a huge ask. But he's got to give it a try, believing his technology would one day have its use one way or another.

C:
热夜之都的信使们为了躲避财阀的私警部队，通常在警备较少的城市上空进行移动。

他们喜欢嚼着便宜的口香糖、佩戴着高度改造的全息目镜，开启脉冲扫视整座赛博城市。

目镜会将城市的实时信息投影在视网膜上，使不可能的路线变成信使的空中走廊：建筑天台，空调外箱、广告板，起重机的吊臂…甚至物流无人机都可以成为走廊中的一环。因此信使们必须掌握足够的技巧，否则偏差一步便是意外的坠亡。

「有个混蛋把目镜无差别地黑掉了，而我当时正巧在空中，落地的那一瞬间真是糟透了。」

这款「小黄鸭」目镜是绝版的旧款式，据说在爱好者中价值不菲。
E:
To avoid the private forces hired by the financial magnates, messengers in the Capital of Passion usually travel in the skies above the city, where security forces are scarce.

They like to turn on pulse-scanning and look over the entire cyber city while chewing cheap gum and donning heavily modified holovisors.

The holovisors project real-time information of the city directly onto the messenger's retina, turning impossible routes into an aerial path for the messengers: Building rooftops, air conditioning units, billboards, the arms of cranes... even unmanned logistics drones can become part of the path. Therefore, messengers must be skilled enough, as even one misstep would result in an unexpected and lethal fall.

"Some fool jammed all the holovisors indiscriminately while I was in the air! That crash was the worst I've ever had."

This Yellow Ducky holovisor is a discontinued old model that is said to be of considerable value among enthusiasts.

C: 事实上，现阶段银河系可利用的能源总量，远高于银河系的需求量，这并不妨碍战争在寰宇间打响。 在星际能源战争中，星际和平公司投入的大量资金，极大促进了博识学会在掘进、储能、探测等多项领域的突破性发展。开发一种优质、高产的新型能源，为这一目标，各学派的「权杖」配额，都当首先满足星际能源学派的研究需求。即便如此，仍有不止一篇史料表明，在学会的指示下，星际能源学派曾主动拖延了「权杖」的演算进程…… 纵观后世史料，无数的意外让这场战争以最恶劣的形式延长，让我不由怀疑，冥冥之中是否有股力量，在操弄我们前进的步伐？ ——《学派战争全史》烛墨史学家，科尔哈桑
E: As a matter of fact, the available amount of total energy of the cosmos in its current phase far exceeds its needs. Yet, this has not prevented the outbreak of wars across the universe. During the Interstellar Energy War, the IPC invested massive funds to supercharge the progress of the Intelligentsia Guild's breakthrough developments in multiple fields, including drilling, energy storage, and detection. In order to achieve the goal of developing a new energy source superb in both quality and yield, the Scepter quotas of the various schools prioritized the research requirements of the School of Interstellar Energy Resources. Even so, there are multiple historical records stating that under the Intelligentsia Guild's directives, the School of Interstellar Energy Resources once deliberately delayed the extrapolation progress of the Scepters... By perusing later historical records, countless incidents caused the protraction of this war in the worst possible manner. I can't help but wonder if there is some unseen force in the darkness that is manipulating our path forward? — Chronicles of the Scholars' Strife Candelagraph Historian, Kerhasan

C: 权杖攻击时，每次造成伤害后会造成<unbreak>#1[i]</unbreak>次<color=#f29e38ff><unbreak>#2[i]%</unbreak></color>基础伤害的随机属性附加伤害，若目标陷入了<unbreak>#3[i]</unbreak>个以上的负面效果，则额外造成<unbreak>#4[i]</unbreak>次附加伤害。
E: When the Scepter attacks, after every instance of DMG dealt, deals <unbreak>#1[i]</unbreak> instances of Additional DMG of a random Type equal to <color=#f29e38ff><unbreak>#2[i]%</unbreak></color> base DMG. If the target is afflicted with <unbreak>#3[i]</unbreak> or more debuffs, then additionally deals <unbreak>#4[i]</unbreak> instances of Additional DMG.

C: 嵌合在【充能】类权杖时，使<u>增幅</u>提高<unbreak>#1[i]%</unbreak>，攻击所需的最大充能提高<unbreak>#2[i]%</unbreak>。
E: When inserted into "Charge" Scepters, increases <u>Amplification</u> by <unbreak>#1[i]%</unbreak> and the max Charge required to attack by <unbreak>#2[i]%</unbreak>.

C: 权杖每次造成伤害后随机触发目标承受的1个持续伤害。
E: After every time a Scepter deals DMG, randomly trigger 1 DoT on the target.

C: 权杖造成伤害时使目标陷入【渗透】：基于目标承受的持续伤害种类，使其受到的持续伤害提高。
E: When Scepters deal DMG, inflict the target with "Permeate": Increase the DoT taken by targets based on the DoT type on the target.

C: 权杖攻击时生成【界区：蚀损】：权杖和我方目标弱点击破效率提高，击破弱点时使目标行动延后，并使其下次从弱点击破状态恢复时的韧性恢复量降低。
E: When Scepters attack, generates "Boundary: Erosion": Increases Scepters' and ally targets' Weakness Break Efficiency. When Breaking Weaknesses, delays the Toughness restored the next time they recover from being Weakness Broken.

C: 权杖攻击时生成【界区：相变】：我方目标攻击力提高，速度提高，攻击后对目标造成附加伤害。
E: When Scepters attack, generates "Boundary: Transition": Increases ally targets' ATK and SPD, and deals Additional DMG to the target after attacking.

C: 依据角色当前护盾量提高攻击力。
E: Shielded characters increase their ATK based on the max DMG that can be absorbed by their current Shields.

C: 敌方目标在【<u>离神</u>】状态下受到的伤害提高。
E: Enemies with <u>Dissociation</u> take increased DMG.

C: 命途回响消灭敌方目标后，使我方全体回复生命值。
E: After a Path Resonance defeats an enemy, restores all allies' HP.

C: 角色暴击伤害提高。
E: Increases CRIT DMG.

C: 角色当前生命值越低，攻击力和防御力越高。
E: The lower a character's current HP is, the higher their ATK and DEF become.

C: 普攻伤害会扩散至相邻目标。
E: Basic ATK DMG will Blast adjacent targets.

C: 角色回复的生命值溢出时，生命上限提高。
E: When a character's restored HP exceeds Max HP, their Max HP increases.

C: 角色接受治疗后，速度提高。
E: After having their HP restored, the character's SPD increases.

C: 角色回复的生命值溢出时，有概率解除1个负面效果。
E: When a character's restored HP exceeds their Max HP, there is a chance to dispel 1 debuff currently on them.

C: 角色回合开始时，依据之前行动的我方角色的攻击力提高攻击力。
E: When a character's turn begins after an ally has completed their turn, increase ATK based on the previous ally who had acted.

C: 【<u>孢子</u>】爆裂后的可传播次数增加，且可以传播给自身。
E: The number of times <u>Spores</u> can spread after bursting increases. Can also spread to the original bearer.

C: 敌方目标回合结束时，【<u>呢喃</u>】获得充能值。
E: When an enemy target ends their turn, charges "<u>Murmur</u>."

C: 敌方目标效果抵抗降低。
E: Decreases enemy targets' Effect RES.

C: 消灭敌方目标后，为我方全体回复生命值。
E: After defeating an enemy target, restores HP for all allies.

E: After attacking Weakness Broken enemy targets, deal <u>Super Break DMG</u>.

C: 造成的击破伤害提高。
E: Increases Break DMG dealt.

C: 击破特攻提高。
E: Increases Break Effect.

C: 处于白昼时，造成的最终伤害提高。进入白昼时激活我方全体终结技。
E: Increases final DMG dealt during the Day. When entering the Day, all allies' Ultimates are activated.

C: 角色攻击后使随机攻击目标持有【纤维】。持有【纤维】的目标累计受到多次攻击或被消灭后，自身与相邻单位受到雷属性伤害，并使我方全体生命上限提高。
E: After characters attack, random attacked targets gain Fiber. When targets with Fiber are cumulatively attacked multiple times or defeated, deals Lightning DMG to it and units adjacent to it, and increases all ally units' Max HP.

C: 敌方目标进入战斗时获得【蛀洞】：【蛀洞】会记录持有者获得的【<u>孢子</u>】数量，对敌方全体造成量子属性伤害，陷入的负面状态越多，该伤害越高。
E: Enemy target obtains Borehole when entering battle: Borehole will record all <u>Spores</u> accumulated by the holder and deals Quantum DMG to all enemies. The more debuffs active, the higher the DMG.

C: 【<u>珠露</u>】上限提高，角色施放普攻使【<u>珠露</u>】破裂时返还部分充能。
E: Increases maximum limit of "<u>Dewdrop</u>." When a character breaks "<u>Dewdrop</u>" with their Basic ATK, restores part of "<u>Dewdrop</u>'s" Charge.

C: 角色获得的护盾量提高，失去护盾后，回复生命值。
E: Increases shields received by characters. After they lose the Shield, they restore HP.

C: 角色每次消耗战技点或战技点溢出时，有概率使随机敌方目标陷入随机负面效果，随机负面效果包括：造成的伤害降低，效果抵抗降低，效果命中降低。
E: Every time characters consume Skill Points or have Skill Points overflow, there is a chance to inflict a random debuff on random enemy targets. The random debuffs include: Decrease DMG dealt, decrease Effect RES, or decrease Effect Hit Rate.

C: 关于克拉伊博士的评价，历来褒贬不一。作为著名的植物植物学家，它所研发的维生营养液，在边星贸易战争时期令超过二十个星系免于饥荒。可过度摄入营养液带来的副作用，也让数百种植物疾病跨越种族界限，间接引发了战后的大规模感染。在克拉伊枯萎后的第一百个琥珀纪，博识学会为它发行了一套纪念邮票，上面留着短短的一行字：「只是一株智能植物。」
E: People's opinions regarding Doctor Kray have always been heavily mixed. As a renowned plant botanist, the nutrient sustenance solution it developed saved over <unbreak>20</unbreak> different star systems from famine and starvation during the Borderstar Trade War. However, the secondary effects of excessive consumption caused diseases from hundreds of plant species to jump the species barrier and indirectly led to widespread infections after the war. On the <unbreak>100</unbreak>th Amber Era since the withering of Dr. Kray, the Intelligentsia Guild issued a set of commemorative stamps of it, which featured simply the words: "Just a sentient plant."

C: 「波尔卡到底长什么样？」俱乐部粉丝群历来对波尔卡•卡卡目的真面目深感好奇。且不论在宇宙范围内销毁自己的肖像是否可行，寂静领主在历史上的数次现身，从未留下可追溯的信息。有人认为，波尔卡只是杀死了所有看到她的人，也有人认为，她借用了「神秘」或「虚无」的力量，抹消了存在的痕迹。最终，一位狂热粉丝的猜想得到了众人的认可——或许波尔卡的脸本来就长得那么模糊。
E: "What does Polka actually look like?" Members of the fan club have always been curious about what Polka Kakamond really looks like. The possibility of erasing all her portraits across the universe aside, the Lord of Silence has appeared multiple times in history but never left even the most meager trail. Some believe that Polka merely slew all who set eyes upon her. Others say that she borrowed the power of Enigmata or Nihility to scrub all traces of her existence. Finally, a fervent fan's conjecture received everyone's acknowledgment — that perhaps Polka's face has been a haze of indiscernible features to begin with.

C: 在黄昏战争前，混沌星云膨胀所产生的爆炸碎屑可以作为饵料，其特有的宇宙尘埃芳香能够吸引到古兽前来觅食。但在这场覆界浩劫之后，「碎星芳饵」似乎失去了其原有作用，无论学者如何研究改造饵料，都再没有人能够成功寻得古兽身影。
E: Before the Dusk Wars, the exploded fragments born out of the expansion of disordered nebulas could be used as lures, and their unique aroma of cosmic dust could attract Leviathans to feed on them. However, the Shattered Star Bait seems to have lost its original effectiveness after that catastrophic disaster. No matter how much scholars researched and modified the lure, no one was ever able to glimpse the form of the Leviathans again.

C: 信标着色剂的强烈色彩与视觉刺激使星际救援队极易发现它所绘制的救援图案。它的发明者乃是一位画技卓绝的无名客。该无名客曾因航行事故受困于一片蛮荒的无人星区，借由白矮星碎片的边角料，他最终调制出了救援史上殊为伟大的信标着色剂。
E: The bright, visually stimulating colors of the Beacon Coloring Paste allow the Galactic Rescue Team to easily spot signs written with it. It was invented by a Nameless who possessed great artistic abilities. This Nameless once experienced a flight incident and was trapped in a barren and desolate star system. In the end, with the use of scraps from a white dwarf star fragment, he was able to produce the most magnificent item in the history of search and rescue — the Beacon Coloring Paste.

C: 虚构史学家所虚构的机兵群体，据传其被制造的目的是实现批量、高效的虚构，表征为各种颜色的烟雾；但因虚构史学家对历史文档的管理习惯不佳，最终机兵群体通过阅读秘密得知了自身的被虚构性，并提出了质疑：虚构史学家本身是否也是被虚构的？
E: Automatons fabricated by the History Fictionologists are rumored to have been made to create a large amount of high-quality fabrications that can be symbolically understood as a highly efficient and multicolored smokescreen. However, due to the History Fictionologists' poor habits when handling their own historical documentations, the automatons eventually discovered their own illusory design by reading such classified texts, and furthermore called another matter into question: Could the History Fictionologists themselves be fabrications as well?

C: 谜语人间流传着一种说法：宇宙中每有一处神秘现象发生，便会在虚空中留下一处「楼梯」，那些消融的现实会沿着阶梯淌下，汇聚成形如水母的斑驳之物。曾有一位无名客声称自己与「楼梯上的水母」有过接触，他疯狂地表示水母会开启大脑灰质的认知区域——那是一片凡人无法想象的广袤天地。
E: The Riddlers have a saying: Every time that an enigma manifests in the universe, it will leave behind a "staircase" in the void. The dissolved realities will then drip down the steps, condensing into a mottled thing bearing semblance to a jellyfish. There was once a Nameless who claimed to have made contact with a "Jellyfish on the Staircase." In madness, he proclaimed that the jellyfish will activate the cognition regions within the gray matter of one's brain — a vast place beyond the fathoming of mortal minds.

C:
你嗅到了书页的香气，愿阿尔帕尼的花永不凋谢，那是母亲正在为你诵读阿德里安的寓言。筑城者将这片大陆捍卫，他们高举手中的银盾，碾碎反物质之火的罪孽。

可他们都去了哪里？有朵花儿在大脑深处绽放，你穿过特罗达尔的荒城，翻越西比尔奇的战壕，攀登上战争的残垣断壁，阿尔帕尼，它们开放在那里，以遗忘作为养料。

你将染血的勋章拾起，记录陌生的姓名，故去的英勇被镌刻上石碑，破碎的铠甲乘舟楫远送回故乡。然后你走向下一个世界，沿着筑城者的足迹，发掘又一则传奇。
E:
You catch the scent of book pages. "May the flowers in Alpani never wilt." That's your mother reciting one of Adrian's fables to you. The Architects lifted their silver shields high to defend the land, crushing the sins of the flames of Antimatter.

But where have they gone? A flower blossoms deep in your brain, wherein you traverse the desolate city of Trodar, brave through the trenches in Sybilch, and climb the ruins of the war. In Alpani, they are in full bloom, nourished by forgetfulness.

You pick up a blood-stained medal and record a stranger's name. The perished warriors are engraved in stones, and their shattered armor is sent back to their faraway homeland by boat. Then, you move on to the next world, following the footsteps of the Architects to uncover another legend.

C:
又一场悲伤的劫难，兴许是碰上了可憎的海盗，亦或是撞上了正在觅食的虫群，舰船被撕裂，死者们在真空中飘浮，像是水里的金鱼。你没来由地想起那些神神叨叨的布雷塔德人，他们说，灵魂应当属于大地，死在真空里的肉体，只会陷入永恒的迷途。

你为他们清洗干净身体，缝补上一道道创伤，守护这最后的尊严。无名者的死亡被撒进天空，他们向着土地坠落，在大气中灼烧，化为许愿的流星。有名之人的离去从沉默不语开始，而恸哭永无停息。

你不知道他们是哪一种，但你希望能听到哭泣。
E:
This is yet another tragic calamity. The vessel is torn apart, probably after encountering detestable pirates or bumping into a Swarm looking for food. Dead bodies are floating in the vacuum, like goldfish in the water. For some reason, you think of the eccentric Bretadens, who believe that souls belong to the land, and those who die in a vacuum will be forever lost.

You clean their bodies and stitch up their wounds, salvaging their last shred of dignity. The death of the unnamed is sprinkled into the sky. While their bodies begin their descent towards land, they burn in the atmosphere, transforming into shooting stars that carry wishes. For those with names, their departure starts from silence, yet the mourning is unceasing.

You are uncertain as to which category these bodies belong, but you wish you could hear the weeping.

C: 第<unbreak>10238</unbreak>个自然日，库维达星云的污染仍未消散。你坐在玻璃山上，在泄露的能量融化以前，这里曾是沙漠的一隅。改造的身体吱呀作响，你慢条斯理地调整起读数，它吸收掉空气中残余的放射物质，整理成发烫的彩色结晶。\n\n第<unbreak>27349</unbreak>个自然日，库维达的第三行星，污染仍没能散去。你种下一朵花，至今尚未发芽。他们嘲笑你，说你的努力不过杯水车薪，母星已成为死寂的墓地，再也没法长出新的生命。你翻动土壤，喷洒加速衰变的药剂。你缄默地走过每一寸土地，直到生命再度回到这里。
E: On Natural Day No. <unbreak>10,238</unbreak>, the Kuvida Nebula's pollution has yet to clear. You sit atop the glass mountain. Before the leaked energy melted and evaporated, this was once the corner of a desert. Your modified body creaks and hums as you slowly adjust its readings. It then begins to absorb the remaining radioactive particles from the air and organize them into blazing, colorful crystals.\n\nOn Natural Day No. <unbreak>27,349</unbreak>, the pollution of the third planet of the Kuvida Nebula has still yet to clear. You planted a seed that has still yet to bloom. They mock you, saying that your efforts are pointless and that your home planet is now no more than a giant graveyard, doomed to never see life again. You turn the soil and apply a potion that accelerates the decay process. You walk every inch of this land in silence until the day that life returns to this planet.

C:
没错，是我在照料这片花园，
无忧无虑之人才能定居的，无人流泪的理想乡，
将黑潮和战争都抛诸脑后，与世隔绝的田园。
何必去思考百年后的灾厄？何必苦恼后世的烦忧？
我们约定俗成地忘却翁法罗斯的一切，
在醒来后播种，
疲惫了便找块石头，坐着谈笑。
万径之门残存的赐福，护卫着它的壁垒，
只要人们仍依恋这片土地，它就不会倾倒。
你说这是自欺欺人，可忧虑无法改变事实，
不如趁着年华大好，流干最后的眼泪，
然后，围坐在篝火前，在宴会里安度余生。
E:
That's right, I'm the one tending this garden,
A utopia where only carefree people can settle, a place where no one sheds tears.
An isolated haven where the black tide and wars are thrown behind.
Why dwell on disasters a hundred years from now? Why fret over the troubles of future generations?
We conventionally forget everything about Amphoreus.
We sow seeds after a sound sleep,
And when weary, we find a stone to sit on and chat.
The remaining blessing of the Gate of Infinity protects its ramparts.
And as long as people remain attached to this land, it will not fall.
You say this is self-deception? But worry changes nothing.
So why not make the most of our good years, shed our last tears,
And gather by the bonfire to enjoy life's endless banquet?

C:
这是刻录在石板上的智识话语，裂分之枝瑟希斯的神迹。
埃杜利亚的少女在诞生时，智慧便超脱常人，
她将百年间留下的难题尽数解开。
已无疑问能困扰的少女，找到瑟希斯的圣树，
傲慢的她向瑟希斯祈求一个问题，
倘若泰坦也无法难住自己，
自诩穷尽了世间知识的人子，便能证明，
自己比神明还要睿智。
瑟希斯提问，翁法罗斯之外有什么？
茫然的少女愣在原地，三天三夜亦无法解答。
问题的答案究竟是什么？
神明微笑着摇曳枝条，它亦无从知晓。
承认自我的愚钝，正是它比少女更睿智的地方。
E:
This is an erudite utterance inscribed on a stone tablet. This is the miracle of Cerces, the Bough of Rift.
A girl from Idilia was born with wisdom far surpassing that of ordinary people.
She solved all the puzzles left over a century.
With no questions left to challenge her, she found the sacred tree of Cerces.
In her arrogance, she prayed to Cerces for a question,
Believing even the Titans could not stump her.
She claimed to have exhausted all knowledge of the world, and wished to prove,
That she was wiser even than the gods.
Cerces asked, "What lies beyond Amphoreus?"
Bewildered, the girl stood motionless for three days and nights, unable to answer.
What, indeed, was the answer to the question?
The god smiled and swayed their branches, for they too did not know.
Admitting their own ignorance was what made them wiser than the girl.

C:
来尝一口甘甜的泉水吧，这是黄金世的遗泽，
来自远古的美妙回忆湿润了嘴唇，直抵心田。
那个年代的快乐多如大地兽的鬃毛，
人们不得不将多余的美好存入地下泉。
谁能想到在不久的将来，黑潮泛滥人间，
唯有泉水静静流淌了一年又一年。
当尘封的历史被无意间掘开，金色的琼浆喷涌而出，
周围的一切事物都沉浸在极乐之中。
但是浅尝即止，别太贪婪，
后面还有更多的苦日子需要依赖它。
E:
Have a sip of the sweet spring water, for it is the Era Chrysea's legacy.
Beautiful ancient memories moisten your lips and vitalize your heart.
An era when joy grew thicker than dromas fur,
forcing humans to bury excess bliss in underground springs.
But who would have imagined that the black tide would come drowning humanity.
Only these waters stream on peacefully, year after year.
Now that the sealed history has been brought back to light accidentally, the golden liquid euphoria geysers,
drenching its surrounding in unparalleled ecstasy.
Sip lightly, however, and save your thirst.
There are darker days ahead, when you'll thirst for it again.

C: 武装考古学派曾几次报导在野外遇到的危险经历，他们在洞巢深处遇到铺天盖地的虫网，粘着衰败的虫蜕、数以万计的虫泡以及各类分泌物，如果不慎触碰很可能会感染寄生幼虫。为将资料交由博识学会进行研究，曾有被寄生的武装考古学派成员咬牙从自己臂下剜出幼虫，学界皆对此举赞叹不已、彻夜研究，最后得出结论：它们很可能是虫皇塔伊兹育罗斯繁育的后代子嗣。
E: The Armed Archaeologists had repeatedly reported on the dangers they met in the wild. They had encountered a never-ending stretch of insect webbings deep inside a nest, with the decaying shed skins of worms, tens of thousands of egg sacs, and various secretions stuck to it. Touching this web carries a high risk of becoming infected by the parasitic larvae. Once, a parasitized Armed Archaeologist steeled themselves and sliced out larvae from underneath the skin of their arm with a knife in order to deliver data to the Intelligentsia Guild for research purposes. The academic world gave this act high praises and devoted much research into it, coming to the conclusion that these creatures are very likely the descendants of Tayzzyronth, the Imperator Insectorum.

C: 如何令一个商业模式持续运作下去？在银河大乐透广获好评之后，星际和平公司的业务巩固部接棒奥斯瓦尔多•施耐德的产品远见，出售了星际大乐透，他们祈愿它同样能够获得成功，并为此打造了八十六条配套产业链一并推广——虽然公司打造的代言人「大乐透女神」宝乐思•梅丽在此后因不明原因身亡，但更多信用点最终涌入了星际和平公司！
E: How do you make a business model last? After getting rave reviews for their Cosmic Big Lotto, the Interastral Peace Corporation's Business Consolidation Department followed Oswaldo Schneider's product vision and put the Interastral Big Lotto on the market, hoping that it would bring them success as well. They even connected eighty-six complementary industrial production chains and promoted them as a single entity. However, although the "Lotto Goddess" Beatrice Mellanine the IPC wished to develop as their spokesperson for their product perished due to reasons unknown, the IPC still reaped a windfall of credits in the end!

C: 在对日复一日的记忆焚烧工作心生厌倦后，焚化工拉玛制造了忆质虫。这些微型的忆质生物，通过吞噬忆质实现分裂和自我复制，不出一个系统日，就让贸易星球乌尔罗摇身一变，沦为人尽皆知的迷失世界。尽管流光忆庭及时扑杀了绝大部分的忆质虫，但逃逸的群体，仍成为了与恶性噬硅细菌齐名的生物灾害。至于焚化工拉玛，在被啃食殆尽的前一刻，他终于体验到了心心念念的自动化工程。
E: Growing weary of the daily monotony of memory cremation work, Cremator Rama created the memoria bugs. These minuscule memoria creatures could consume memoria to multiply and clone themselves. Within a system day, they transformed the trade planet Uro completely, turning it into what was known to all as the "lost world." While the Garden of Recollection managed to exterminate most of the memoria bugs in time, the escaped clusters became a biological catastrophe rivaling the vicious silicone-eating bacteria. As for Cremator Rama, before he was devoured down to his marrow, he finally experienced the automated engineering that he longed for.

After reaching <color=#f29e38ff><unbreak>#4[f1]%</unbreak></color>, it will not increase further. The DMG Multiplier Boost effect will not decrease before Netherwing disappears.\nWhen Netherwing's current HP is equal to or less than <unbreak>#5[i]%</unbreak> of its Max HP, launching this ability will actively reduce HP down to 1, and then trigger the ability effect equal to that of the Talent "Wings Sweep the Ruins."

Upon successfully solving the brainteaser, "Bartholos" will immediately change the brainteaser and take Physical DMG based on a percentage of its Max HP.
