C: 「各位好，我是水晶日报记者布鲁海尔•波桑，我现在所处的位置是行政区的喷泉广场。我身边站着一位自称『深蓝骗局受害者互助协会』的成员，现在我将对他进行一段简短的采访。」 「先生您好，您能跟我和观众们讲述一下自己的受骗经历吗？」 「啊…可气死我了！那个蓝头发的，我要他不得好死！」 「先生，我们正在电台直播…您消消气。」 「咳…行吧。水晶日报，是吧？这就对了，多来报道报道受苦受难的群众，少关注那些筑城者的破事八卦……」 「…我和你说，那个蓝毛小贼又流窜到行政区来了！就昨天，他从我家店里摸走了三斤黑面包香料！三斤啊！你知道这够那些达官贵人用多久么？下一步他怕不是就要去洗劫香料厂了！」 「冷静，先生！我们非常同情您的遭遇。您刚才提到了贝洛伯格的香料厂，对吗？」 「呃…我是提了一嘴，对。重点在这儿吗？」 「这座工厂，您能具体讲讲它的位置吗？」 「呃…为啥？」 「您瞧，作为媒体，我们希望能为社会公义出一份力——您只有把工厂的具体位置告诉我们，才能动员银鬃铁卫和富有正义感的公民、防止盗窃事件发生，您说对吧？」 「唔…有点道理。那你们听好了，工厂的地址是……」
E: "Hello everyone! This is Brughel Poisson from the Crystal Daily, and I'm here at Fountain Plaza in the Administrative District. Standing next to me is someone who calls themselves a member of the Dark-Blue Scam Victims' Association, and I am about to conduct a short interview with him." "Hello there, sir. Could you please tell me and the audience about your experience of getting scammed?" "Oh... I'm so utterly enraged! That blue-haired punk... I hope he dies!" "Sir, we're live right now... please calm down." "Ahem... Fine. The Crystal Daily, right? That's it. You should report more on the suffering of everyday people and pay less attention to gossip about the Architects..." "I'm telling you, that blue-haired punk has slipped off into the Administrative District again! Yesterday he pinched three catties of rye bread spices from my store — three whole catties! Do you know how long those will last for the dignitaries? Next thing, he'll be robbing a spice factory!" "Please calm down, sir! We sympathize deeply with your plight. Now then, you just mentioned the Belobog spice factory, didn't you?" "Err... Sure, I mentioned it. Was that important?" "This factory... are you able to tell me its exact location?" "Err... Why?" "Well you see, as journalists, we want to contribute to social justice causes — and only by knowing the exact location can our Silvermane Guards and righteous citizens reduce burglaries. Wouldn't you agree?" "Err... That makes sense. Then listen up, the address of the factory is..."

C:
太卜司的普通卜者，在「忙里偷闲」这件事上绝不偷闲。
顺应父母的期望考入太卜司，却发现本以为清闲的铁饭碗是高强度的职场苦海。
经过数年历练，青雀终于磨砺了一身本领——无论部门流转，她仍旧是最低职级的卜者。
没事翻翻书，玩玩古代牌戏…人生如此，夫复何求？
E:
An ordinary diviner at the Divination Commission. She would never slack off in slacking off.
Following her parents' wishes, Qingque qualified for the Divination Commission, but the relaxing post she was expecting was in fact a brutal, high-intensity workplace.
After several years of work, Qingque has honed her skills — no matter which department she's transferred to, she's still the lowest-leveled diviner.
She would browse books and play ancient tile games to wile away the hours... What more could one ask for than a life like this?

C:
无光的幽暗中，他仿佛回到持明卵中，在波涛与幻梦里辗转来去。

他梦见自己抵达战场，如神明亲临。悬于云端，军阵似蝼蚁般渺小，云车和星槎如注定要赴火的飞萤。这就是凡人的生命…这就是龙的视角吗？一丝骄慢涌起，令他心意冰冷。他忙将目光投向那些与他一同厮杀、一同欢饮的人们：

疾驰而过的飞行士丝毫不在意队列齐整，随兴射击，任由装填炽火的弩箭落在奔突的步离甲士间；

在星槎所指的方向上，有位白发剑士当先一人，随锋刃舞蹈，在剑光中穿梭，其锋芒太盛，连她的同僚也不敢与之同列，只是殿后策援；

平日与他谈笑的那位云骑骁卫则收起一身闲散，手持阵刀，与所部军士们抵抗着侧翼袭来的步离战卒；

本阵后方，随军的匠作们调试着巨大的金人，也许那名狷狂的匠人此刻正挥汗如雨——这些数十米高的军械是应对器兽的杀手锏；

随后他瞧见了彼时的将军腾骁，他如同帝弓的化身笼罩在金色雷霆中，与自己的幻影犁过敌人的战兽军阵……

溃不成军的步离人开始逃窜。他明白，该是执行自己被交付的使命了。他放任心智消融于风暴和冰雹里，由雷霆代他咆哮，由海啸替他愤怒。他悬于云端，看着被渊薮吞没的敌人，也看着身后的土地，许多人类、持明与狐族，他们永远留在战场上，无法再看一眼故乡。

龙心告诉他，那不过是世上又拂去了些许微尘。战争伴随代价，生命终会再生——龙裔也绝非仅有持明一支。但人心悸痛着，为那些与他战友一样，有着温暖血肉的同袍，为那些也许能活更久，如今却无法再返其乡的凡人而疼痛。
E:
In the dim abyss devoid of light, he seemed to have returned to the insides of a Vidyadhara egg, being ceaselessly churned in tumultuous waves and elusive dreams.

He dreamed he arrived at the battlefield like the descent of a god. He hovered with the clouds — the military formations below him were tiny as ants, and the airborne chariots and starskiffs were moths destined to die in a flame. Such were the lives of mortals... Was this the viewpoint of a dragon? A sliver of hubris rose up and plunged his heart into emotionless and icy detachment, and he hurriedly cast his gaze toward those with whom he had fought and shared liquor:

The pilot who zoomed past did not care whether the formation was orderly. She shot at will, letting the arrows filled with blazing fire fall on the storming borisin foot soldiers...

Along the direction pointed out by the starskiffs, a white-haired swordswoman spearheaded into the fray ahead of the entire army, dancing with her sharp blade. She dashed between flashes of metallic light, her actions too sharp to even let her allies come near, reducing them to merely supporting her from behind...

On the other hand, the Cloud Knight Lieutenant who used to chat and laugh with the dragon contained his languid indolence, holding his devastator glaive in hand as he stood with his men to repel the borisin pawns attacking from the battlefield's wings...

And behind the main host, the military engineers who marched with the army were adjusting and testing giant aurumatons... perhaps that exceedingly arrogant craftsman was now working at full speed, for these machines hundreds of feet tall are specialized weapons designed to counter the mechabeasts...

Then, he saw the general of yesteryear, Teng Xiao. He was enveloped in golden lightning like the avatar of the Reignbow, plowing through the enemies' rows of war beasts with his divine mirage...

The devastated borisin began to flee. He knew it was time to carry out the duty entrusted to him. So he let go — letting his consciousness disappear in storms and hails, letting thunder roar for him, letting tsunamis rage for him. He floated on top of clouds, watching the enemies getting swallowed by the watery abyss, and watching the land behind him. Many humans, Vidyadhara, and foxians were eternally left there, unable to lay their eyes upon their home ever again.

The dragon heart told him that it was but a small speck of dust brushed away from the world. Wars come with a price, but life will always thrive once more — the Vidyadhara are not the only branch of Long's Scions. However, his human heart ached for those comrades who, like him, had warm flesh and blood, and for those mortals who might have lived longer but now could return home nevermore.

C: 仙舟「朱明」的猎剑士，备受「烛渊将军」怀炎宠爱的孙女，性格直率。\n从小跟随怀炎学习剑艺与锻艺，乃「焰轮八叶」中次年幼的天才剑士。\n对朱明流出的魔剑深恶痛绝，立誓要「搜猎魔剑，尽数断绝」。
E: A sword hunter from the Xianzhou Zhuming and "the Flaming Heart" General Huaiyan's darling granddaughter. Frank and straightforward.\nShe has learned swordplay and forging from Huaiyan since she was young, and thus is the second-youngest prodigy swordmaster of the Flamewheel Octet.\nFueled by an intense loathing for the cursed swords that emerged from the Zhuming, she vowed to "hunt down and wipe out all cursed swords."

C:
在被博识尊瞥视后，她离开了家乡，从此过上隐士的生活。

无人知晓她向祂发问了什么，但在此之后，她的性情愈发寡淡，也对研究愈发沉浸——她只研究「生命」的本质。

更多样的「生命」在她的拟造下出现了。
一些「燃烧」的生命变成流动的火，在她脚下匍匐、穿梭；有时她感到她即是火本身。
一些「流动」的生命化作液体的光芒，在她纤细的手腕旁流转；有时她感到她即是光本身。
部分「知识」拟造的生命试图发展出自己的思维、意识与情感，它们有时聒噪地哭泣、欢笑或哀嚎，这些都融入了她的躯体。

但她无法感受它们。
生命存在的时间终究短暂，它们扑朔着转瞬即逝，唯有她的实验一直在继续。

有时，她随手的「研究」总会撼动生物学体系。她的「研究」改变了诸多星球，飞鲸、游鹿，惊惶的花朵，庞大的植物根系，她的创造已超越有机生命尺度的经验与想象。

她一直在突破自己对「生命」的理解，只为了接近祂——祂的一瞥令人难忘。

「星神」…是种怎样的存在？那亦是一种生命吗？

当这些「震撼」美名贯穿银河学界时，总有人试图打破她隐士般的生活。
她转头看向了桌上那封来自「天才俱乐部」的联络函——接着，又一次，随手把它扔进了垃圾桶。
E:
After receiving the gaze of Nous, she left her home and began a reclusive life.

No one knew what she asked Nous, but after that incident, she became even more apathetic and impassive, and even more immersed in her research — She would only study the fundamental nature of "life."

A greater variety of "lifeforms" came into existence through her concoction.
Some "burning" lifeforms became flowing flames that crept and weaved under her feet. Sometimes, she felt like she was fire itself.
Some "fluid" beings turned into liquid light that slithered around her slender wrists. Sometimes, she felt like she was light itself.
Some living things concocted from "knowledge" attempted to develop their own thoughts, sentience, and emotions. They sometimes rambunctiously cry, guffaw, or wail — all these have been fused into her body.

Yet, she could not feel them.
Life only exists for such a short time, after all. They fleetingly pass from birth to death, and her research is the only constant.

Occasionally, her casual "research" would shake the schools of biology. Her "research" transformed many planets. Flying whales, swimming deer, fearful flowers, and trees with a vast root system... Her creations have already went beyond the scope of experience and imaginations comprehensible to organic life.

She kept pushing herself for a more in-depth understanding of "life," just to bring herself closer to Nous — and THEIR unforgettable glance.

Aeons... What kind of beings are they? Are they also a form of life?

As her "groundbreaking" studies rose to fame within the cosmic academic community, people always tried to disrupt her life as a recluse.
She turned to look at the letter from the Genius Society on the desk and, once again, dumped it into the trashcan.

C: 他走入走廊最深处的房间，他还记得上一次来这里的时候，自己还是个面目可憎的囚犯。现在，他站在这里，面向立于部门顶点的人们。 他听金发的女性念着冗长无趣的报告，那些冰冷的数字既无法传达他行走在生死边缘的惊险，亦无法告诉他们过程中他失去了多少，又得到了多少。他只好奇她是人类，还是智械？ 而那颗象征权力与未来的「砂金石」即将被正式交予他手中——豁出性命拿到手的东西，在得到的一刹那，对他而言就失去了诱惑与价值。 「『砂金』，你还有什么问题吗？」会议的最后，翡翠——在场的人里，他只认识她——开口问道。 「茨冈尼亚的埃维金人…他们后来怎么样了？」 「很遗憾，茨冈尼亚已经没有埃维金人了。你是最后的幸运儿。」 「那在██星球上帮助过我的那些人呢？我想，现在我可以回报他们了。」 「他们也都不在了。」 …… 他木然地回到自己的办公室。桌上，那颗砂金石闪动着奇异的光，仿佛在恭喜他，又仿佛在嘲弄他。 「在与命运搏斗的时候，你真的是幸运的那方吗？」
E: He walks into the room at the furthest end of the corridor, remembering how he was still a grotesque prisoner the last time he came here. Now, he stands with his back straight and faces those who sit at the very top of the department. He listens to the blond woman as she reads out the lengthy and boring report. Those cold, unfeeling numbers cannot convey the dangers that accompanied him as he walked on the thin line between life and death, nor can they communicate how much he had lost and gained during the journey. He is simply curious whether she is human or an Intellitron. The aventurine, that symbol of power and of the future, is about to be officially handed to him — Yet it would have no more allure or value in his eyes as soon he obtains it, even though he had sought it by putting his life on the line. "Do you have any more questions, Aventurine?" Jade, the only person he knows among the presently gathered, asks at the end of the meeting. "The Avgins in Sigonia... what happened to them afterward?" "Unfortunately, there are no more Avgins in Sigonia. You're the last lucky dog." "What about those people who helped me on planet ██? Now I can finally repay their kindness." "They are no more, either." ... He returns to his office in a daze. The aventurine stone emits a peculiar glow on his desk, seemingly congratulating and mocking him at the same time. "Was luck truly on your side when you wrestled with fate?"

C: 时光荏苒，她设计的服饰已如星空那般浩繁。 不知为何，那华美广大的衣橱内，却保存着许多褴褛不堪的旧衣布片。 充斥纷争的大地上，年轻的将士们穿着鲜亮的衣裳出征，归来时战服已成殓衣，甚至只能带回衣裳的一角。无人认领的时候，只有她会将这些布片收集起来。 她也曾在愤怒中毁去华服，那些腐朽堕落、养尊处优的贵族不配穿上她织就的衣裳招摇过市——即使她自己也曾是这番模样。 还有…那一件又一件小小的衣装。 在过往的时光里，她们伴她成长，同她诉说往日与未来的歌谣 ——见证诸多丑恶之后，她才明白，那些稚嫩话语中的分量。 「身为奥赫玛的改衣师，墨涅塔的祭司，我与你们有着相同的职责。」 「但救世要付出的代价……」 「…就像你们一样？」 「就像*我们*一样。」 最显眼的地方，悬挂着朴素简洁的祭司长裙。她时常拿出清洗扫尘，只为不忘自己向那神明许下的诺言。 「请原谅我，为了人世间最美的作品……」 很久以前，握住火种的那一刻，她突然在黑暗中「看见」了一幅从未见过的美丽景象—— 在那黄金般的未来里，再也没有纷争，也再没有死亡。
E: As time swept by, the garments she designed multiply, as vast as the starry heavens. Yet, curiously, within that grand and ornate wardrobe, many tattered old fabric scraps are carefully preserved. On lands rife with conflict, young warriors set out clad in vibrant attire, only to return with their uniform as shrouds — sometimes only scraps of their garb remain. When no one claimed these remnants, she alone collects them. In her fury, she once destroyed lavish garments. The corrupt, pampered nobles did not deserve to parade in the clothing she crafted — even though she herself had once walked among them. And then... there are those little garments, one after another... Throughout the years, they grow up alongside her, sharing songs of past times and dreams of the future — Only after witnessing so much ugliness does she understand the true weight of those innocent words. "As a dressmaster of Okhema and priest of Mnestia, my duties align with yours." "But the price of salvation..." "...is it like yours?" "Just like ours." In the most visible spot, a simple, unadorned priest's robe hangs. She frequently takes it out to clean and dust, always reminding herself of the vow she made to the deity. "Please forgive me, for the sake of the most beautiful creation in the world..." Long ago, at the moment she took hold of the Coreflame, she suddenly "saw" in the darkness a breathtaking vista she had never before encountered — In that golden future, there is no more strife, no more death.

C: 「在沿海城邦古老的传说里，冥海曾诞育下堪比神明的生灵。据往来渔船所说，正有这样的『海王』以幼童的相貌出没于波涛之中，面目凶恶，红颜青唇，以侵肌蚀骨的冥海之水沐浴，与凶恶残暴的冥海之兽肉搏，渴饮鲜血，生啖骨肉。 据说它每一次沉入海底，不消多时便会自冥海重生。在约莫九年的时间中，重塑己身不下一万次，最终撕裂巨妖，鲜血染红千里海面，却无有噬肉的海兽敢来接近。 传说那海王尾巴一甩，便可将众多鱼虾卷上沙滩。曾有落难的渔民向天求救，被海王率领水兵救起。传闻愈来愈超凡神妙，久而久之，甚至有渔民为海王绘制画像，贴在船上以求出海平安。 近来又有传言兴起，说那所谓海王其实是王储迈德漠斯的怨灵作祟，先王恐惧他背负的预言，在他出生后便将其掷入冥海，夭折的孩子死不瞑目，誓要猎尽冥海。但笔者认为这只不过是狡猾的悬锋人想为自己脸上贴金，理由有三： 第一，就算悬锋人素来有父子争斗、胜者为王的传统，但怎会一出生将贵为王储的人子扔下海中？ 第二，就算悬锋王欧利庞年老昏聩，听信预言将子嗣扔进海中祭祀，一个幼儿怎么可能有堪比神明的力量与巨妖搏斗？ 第三，就算有这样的幼儿存在，他也绝不可能是悬锋人。悬锋人一个比一个自私粗野，又怎会帮助遭逢海难的渔民？ 诸位读者，接下来我将为你们揭晓真相：其实所谓的海王 ——自然就是海洋的化身！」 ——选段自歌耳巴尼帕耳图书馆藏 「威力海王传考据」 「强。」 ——男人的字迹
E: "In the ancient legends of the coastal city-states, the Sea of Souls is said to have birthed beings as mighty as gods. Fishermen speak of a king of the seas who appears among the waves as a young child, with a fierce countenance and bluish lips, bathing in the bone-chilling waters of the Sea of Souls, wrestling with its savage beasts, thirsting for blood, and devouring flesh and bone. It is said that each time they sink to the seabed, they soon resurrect from the Sea of Souls. Over approximately nine years, they reforged themselves no less than ten thousand times, ultimately tearing apart a giant monster, staining the sea red for miles, yet no flesh-eating sea creature dared approach. Legends speak of how that the king of the seas could sweep countless fish and shrimp onto the shore with a flick of the tail. Once, shipwrecked fishermen praying for salvation were rescued by the king alongside his crew. As the tales grew more fantastical over time, fishermen started painting the king on their boats, in the hope it will grant them safe voyages. Rumors have emerged claiming that this so-called king of the seas is the vengeful spirit of the crown prince Mydeimos. Terrified by the prophecy he carried, his father, the former king, cast him into the Sea of Souls at birth. His life cut short, the child died with his grievances unredressed, vowing to scour the Sea of Souls. However, the writer believes this is merely the cunning Kremnoans trying to glorify themselves, for three reasons: First, though the Kremnoans traditionally engage in father-son struggles where the victor becomes king, why would they throw a newborn crown prince into the sea? Second, even if King Eurypon of Kremnos, grown old and senile, believed the prophecy and sacrificed his heir to the sea, how could an infant possess the divine strength to battle giant monsters? Third, even if such a child existed, he could hardly be Kremnoan. Why would a Kremnoan, known for their selfish and brutal nature as they are, assist fishermen struck by disaster? Dear readers, I will now reveal the truth: the so-called king of the seas — Naturally, he is the embodiment of the ocean itself!" — Excerpt from "Inquiry into the Legend of the Mighty Sea King" archived in the Garbaniphoro Library collection "Strong." — A man's handwriting

C: 永冻幻土的悲鸣
E: Cry of the Frozen Fantasy Land

C: 开拓者：开拓记事
E: Trailblazer: Trailblaze Chronicle

C: 翡翠：甘露与鸩毒
E: Jade: Poison and Nectar

C: 你乘上了神奇的星穹列车，今后，这里就是你的家了。\n新的冒险就要开始了，准备跃迁前往新世界吧！
E: You boarded the amazing Astral Express. From now on, this will be your home.\nA new adventure is about to start. Prepare to warp jump to a new world!

C:
为了逃脱追捕，你们冲进了裂界。可你们怎会突然沦落至此？三月七也无法解释，因为她的人设只是一位单纯可爱的少女。
不过，你们迅速达成共识：当务之急是找到裂界的出口，其他事项等离开这片险地再作商议。
你是当之无愧的铁门克星…被你打开的两道铁门一定会为你作证的。
裂界的出口已经近在眼前，你们就要安全了…暂时。
E:
You rush into the Fragmentum to avoid getting caught. How come things went downhill so quickly? March 7th has no clue — she's written as an innocent and sweet teenage girl after all.
Despite the initial shock, you quickly agree on the course of action: Find the way out of the Fragmentum first. Everything else can wait.
You are the bane of all gates... The two you've opened would agree.
The Fragmentum exit is right in front of you. Safety is within reach... for the time being.

C: 虎克将你和三月七带至拳馆入口处。你隔墙听到馆中如怒涛般的欢呼时一浪接着一浪，又联想到虎克所说的内容，这使你不寒而栗。\n眼前这破旧的建筑物中究竟潜藏着何等程度的黑暗？恐怕只有亲自进去调查一番才能得知真相了。\n你甚至觉得自己可能真能在这里找到丹恒——毕竟你一直觉得他会是那种背负着黑暗过去的人…不过这番话可别真让他听见啊。
E: Hook brings you and March 7th to the entrance of the boxing gym. As you hear the waves of raging cheers through the walls, you are reminded of what Hook said and a chill runs down your spine.\nWhat kind of darkness dwells in this shabby building in front of you? It seems the only way to find out is to personally conduct an investigation.\nYou truly believe that it is possible to find Dan Heng here — after all, you've always thought of him as someone who's had a dark past... But make sure he doesn't know you think that.

C: 你们发现洗劫物资的罪魁祸首是一名年纪尚浅的小扒手埃里克。尽管希儿认为此人难以信任，但宽容的布洛妮娅还是决定以交易的方式将物资换到手。\n埃里克为了回报布洛妮娅的善意，将孤儿院的相关情报告知众人。但这是否代表他会痛改前非？答案目前无从得知——不过，你将来或许会有机会亲自见证。\n眼下，你们的首要目标则是前往孤儿院，继续搜寻物资。
E: You discover that the culprit who robbed the supplies is a young thief named Eric. Bronya's generosity has compelled her to make the decision of trading with the thief for the supplies, even though Seele finds him to be untrustworthy.\nIn return for Bronya's friendliness, Eric shares relevant intel regarding the orphanage with everyone. But does this mean that he will change his ways? The answer is unknown — however, maybe you will have the opportunity to witness it sometime in the future.\nRight now, your primary objective is to head to the orphanage and continue your search for the supplies.

C: 「列车组的各位就是新的『变量』，我们的存在将颠覆史瓦罗的计算结果。」你以这条有力论据彻底说服了克拉拉，取得了她的信任，也唤起了她的勇气和捍卫世界的决心。\n因此，克拉拉向各位承诺，她会将你们带到史瓦罗面前。\n跟随克拉拉回到机械聚落，打开通向史瓦罗基地的大门吧。
E: "The members of the crew are the new variants. Our existence will topple Svarog's calculations." And with that, you've completely convinced Clara and earned her trust, as well as awakened her courage and conviction to protect the world.\nAnd so Clara makes the promise to bring you to Svarog.\nFollow Clara back to the Robot Settlement and open the gate that leads to Svarog's base.

C: 告别风雪转霁的贝洛伯格，列车再次驶向星穹深处。\n按照阿基维利立下的传统，「无名客的道路当由无名客自己选择」。\n在决定去往下一个世界前，列车乘客齐聚一堂，为决定下一站投出神圣一票。
E: The Express gallops into the depths of the interstellar sea after bidding farewell to Belobog, where snow had given way to sunshine.\nThe rules set by Akivili dictate that "the road of the Nameless must be chosen by the Nameless themselves."\nThe passengers on the Express gather together to decide on the next world they will visit, casting their hallowed vote for the destination.

C: 在引路人青雀的带领下，你们抵达了仙舟负责演算与信息的太卜司。此间飞阁连云，悬圃冲霄，颇有神秘气氛。\n更神秘的是，太卜司门关紧锁，毫无待客迎门的意思，连自己人青雀也被拒之门外。
E: Led by the messenger, Qingque, you arrive at the Divination Commission, which is responsible for calculation and information management in Xianzhou. The eaves of this building build upon each other like raising mountain peaks and exude an aura of mystique.\nMore mysterious still is the fact that the Commission's doors are shut and show no signs of being prepared for guests, and even Qingque is shut out despite being a staff member.

C: 在与幻胧的那场大战结束后，符玄唤来星槎，将你们送回长乐天。\n但关于建木升起，以及此次仙舟之行的来去始末，你们仍觉得自己身处迷局之中。为此你们来到神策府探问情况。
E: After the end of the grand battle against Phantylia, Fu Xuan called for starskiffs and sent everyone back to Exalting Sanctum.\nHowever, all of you still struggle to see the full picture behind the rise of the Ambrosial Arbor and the details concerning your time spent on the Xianzhou. Therefore, you all head to the Seat of Divine Foresight to ask for answers.

C: 受符玄之托，你们要前往天舶司将「停云」留下的扇子送交驭空。无论幻胧究竟是幻化伪装停云，抑或是操控了她，这其中都潜藏着某种危险的可能性——那位停云也许遭遇了不测。\n驭空司舵在悲伤中撑持，力主举办一场「仪式」，来安抚所有人内心的伤痛。司辰宫中，你们与岩明一同整理了停云所留的物品，其中有些竟是尚未送出的礼物……
E: Fu Xuan had entrusted you to head to the Sky-Faring Commission and give to Yukong the fan "Tingyun" left behind. Whether Phantylia was disguised as Tingyun or mind-controlled her — both spell out dangerous possibilities. The real Tingyun might have suffered a lethal accident.\nBarely holding herself up in her immense sorrow, Helm Master Yukong insists on holding a "soul-soothing ceremony" to appease the pain everyone must be feeling. You and Yanming work through the items Tingyun left behind in the Palace of Astrum, only to discover that some were in fact gifts yet to be sent out...

C: 猎犬家系的治安官为你们解了围，你这才了解到自己救下的少女是鸢尾花家系的艺者「流萤」。\n为了报答你的恩情，她决定担任你的一日导游，不妨跟着她一起深入了解这座美梦吧。
E: The Bloodhound Family Security Officer explains that the young girl you just rescued was Firefly, an artist of the Iris Family.\nTo thank you saving her, she has decided to be your tour guide for the day. Why not follow her and take a deep-dive into this beautiful dream?

C: 流萤带领你在城中各处知名景点打卡。你们来到了格拉克斯大道的中心，拜访了坐落在这里的吉祥物雕像「钟表小子」。在此处驻足时，你发现钟表小子的眼睫毛对于一尊雕像来说可能有些过于生动了。\n说真的，任谁都会想把那撮抖动不已的睫毛拽下来的。此外，你拜托了流萤帮你拍照留念，现在可以找她看看效果。
E: Firefly leads you through some of the famous sightseeing spots in the area. As you arrive in the central Glaux Avenue, you visit a statue of a mascot located here known as "Clockie." As you linger in this place, you notice that the eyelashes on Clockie are a little too lifelike for a statue.\nHonestly, anyone that lays eyes on those trembling lashes would feel the urge to pull on them. Also, you asked Firefly to take a classic tourist picture. Why not ask her to see it?

C: 流萤继续带领你在城中各处知名景点打卡——你们来到了「艾迪恩公园」内部，跟着她四处转转吧。
E: Firefly continues to lead you through the various tourist hotspots in the area — You have arrived at Aideen Park. Take a wander around with her.

C: 离开诊所后，映入眼帘的是一座由垃圾桶构成的巨大王国。一名名为莎塔娜的垃圾桶找到了你，请求你帮助垃圾桶们从烦忧中解脱，带领众垃圾桶获得解放——前提是取得三个「信任的证明」。\n你找到了阿圾米德，他委托你帮忙清点最后三个垃圾桶——桶里究竟藏着什么呢？
E: As you leave the clinic, what lies before your eyes is a giant kingdom formed of trashcans. A trashcan by the name of Shatana finds you and asks for your help in freeing the trashcans from their worries and leading them to liberation — The prerequisite is that you acquire three Proofs of Trust.\nYou have found Trashiemedes, who tasks you with checking the final three trashcans. What could be concealed inside?

C: 流萤向你解释了此处是为何地：黄金时刻的边境，梦境的更深处，家族的建设改造地（换句话说，梦中的工地），她还补充说，自己的「秘密据点」就在深处…只是「家族」眼线密布，两人得偷偷溜进去才行。\n通向深处的道路扑朔迷离，恐怕你得开动脑筋，活用梦境的性质才能继续前进。
E: Firefly explains this place to you: It is the edge of the Golden Hour, the inner depths of the Dreamscape, and The Family's construction and remodeling zone (in other words, a construction site within the dream). She adds that her "secret stronghold" is further on... The only problem is that "The Family" has eyes everywhere, and you will have to sneak in to get inside.\nThe path into the depths is complicated and confusing. You may have to think outside of the box and creatively utilize the characteristics of the Dreamscape to continue onwards.

C: 返回现实果然没有你想象中的那么简单——你和流萤甫一抵达黄金的时刻，就遭到了桑博的袭击。在你失去意识之前，你看到桑博似乎幻化成一女人的身形…如果不是他惯于女装，那袭击你们的一定另有其人。\n你在神秘的空间里找到了流萤——看来陌生人也没有放过她。现在，你们可以一起寻找离开这里的出路。
E: As expected, returning to reality isn't as simple as you expected — Firefly and you are attacked by Sampo as soon as you arrive at the Golden Hour. Before you lose consciousness, you see Sampo shift into what appears to be the figure of a woman... Either he has always had a petite feminine build, or your assailant is actually someone else.\nYou find Firefly in the mysterious space — It seems the stranger didn't leave her alone, either. Now, you can look for the way out together.

C: 黑天鹅表示你们应当尽快撤离。而在撤离的途中，如果你们足够幸运，还可以找到流萤留下的痕迹，甚至揭开这场突如其来的死亡的真相。\n你们终于抵达了黑天鹅所说的区域。接下来，忆者为你们复现了出与流萤相关的记忆——试着从中梳理出凶案的真相吧。
E: Black Swan tells you that you should evacuate as quickly as possible. But, as you are evacuating, you may be fortunate enough to find some traces left by Firefly that could help unravel the truth behind this sudden demise.\nYou finally reach the area that Black Swan was talking about. From there, the Memokeeper reproduces the memories related to Firefly — Try to iron out the truth behind this murder.

C: 筑梦拼图在匹诺康尼无处不在。通常来说，看到筑梦拼图就等于看到了一扇大门…不知是有意还是无意，这种诡异的设计在匹诺康尼简直泛滥成灾，让你深感家族是不是没有新活可以整了。\n无论如何，还是按照流程集齐筑梦碎片吧，你知道教授朋友向来没什么耐心。
E: Dream Jigsaws are ubiquitous in Penacony. Generally speaking, seeing a Dream Jigsaw is the same as seeing a door... Intentional or not, this creepy design is so common in Penacony that it makes you wonder whether The Family has run out of creative ideas.\nAnyway, you might as well go through the procedure and collect all the jigsaw fragments. You know how your professor friend isn't known for his patience.

C: 你已抵达自己的结局。\n最后的时光，同████好好道别吧。尽量让自己……\n…死而无憾。
E: You have reached your final end.\nBid your farewells to █████████ in your final moments. Try your best to...\n...Die without regrets.

C: 即便砂金以生命为代价向众人揭示了家族在匹诺康尼的黑暗秘密，但经由万众一心的家族运作，谐乐大典的倒计时仍未中止。与此同时，星穹列车似乎迎来了一位不速之客……
E: Despite Aventurine revealing The Family's dark secrets in Penacony to all at the cost of his own life, the countdown to the Charmony Festival continues thanks to the operations of The Family's united efforts. At the same time, the Astral Express seems to have welcomed an uninvited guest...

C:
……

驻足的旅者：「旅者，你们好。我是先于你来到此处的另一名旅者。」
驻足的旅者：「在不久之前，此处还是一个逼仄的囚牢。但如今，我与此处的囚徒们，想要让它变成一个尘世乐园。」

驻足的旅者：「请继续向前走吧，旅者。在旅途的尽头，我有事想请求你们的协助。」
驻足的旅者：「希望你能喜欢这片焦土之上的…『美梦之地』。」

……
E:
...

Halted Traveler: "Greetings, travelers. I am another traveler who arrived here before you."
Halted Traveler: "This place has been a crowded and confined prison till very recently, but now I and the other prisoners want to make it into a paradise."

Halted Traveler: "Please keep walking forward, traveler. I have some things I would like to have your help with at the end of the journey."
Halted Traveler: "I hope you will like this... "Land of Dreams," built atop the scorched barren earth."

...

C:
……

将军：「如若没有一位君王，谁庇护孱弱者，谁对抗横暴者？」
宰相：「我们必当为庇护孱弱者而互助，正如我们必当为对抗横暴者而互助。」

弄臣：「如若没有一位君王，谁能使星辰流转、潮汐涨落、万物生长？」
宰相：「在君王出现前，它们各行其是；在君王离开后，它们依旧各行其是。」

大臣：「可送别君王后，谁来做新的君王呢？」
宰相：「我们不再需要一位君王。我们本是超绝万物的君王。」

……
E:
...

General: "Without a ruler, who would protect the weak and fight back against the tyrants?"
Chancellor: "We must assist each other in protecting the weak, just as we must assist each other in opposing the tyrannical."

Jester: "Without a ruler, who will make the stars follow their paths, the tides rise and fall, and allow life to grow?"
Chancellor: "These things did as they will long before the ruler appeared, just as they will continue to do with rulers gone."

Minister: "However, now that we have bid farewell to our ruler. Who shall take their place?"
Chancellor: "We no longer require a ruler, for we were originally all rulers who stand above all things."

...

C: 公司决定与家族携手共建匹诺康尼，全宇宙的学者们也将不遗余力地提供帮助…好一派皆大欢喜的热闹景象。至此，「梦想之地」匹诺康尼之旅也便告一段落。\n是时候踏上新的旅途了。
E: The IPC decides to develop Penacony alongside The Family, and scholars from all over the universe will assist in every way they can... It is a lively scene where all's well that ends well. With this, your journey to Penacony, the "Land of the Dreams" has come to an end.\nIt's time to embark on a new adventure.

C: 抱着九分怀疑和一分缥缈的侥幸，流萤登上了「晖长石号」。\n她来这里是为了寻找传闻中的「慈玉典押」，听说那是一家能实现任何人心愿的典当行。\n典当行的老板娘「慈玉女士」认为流萤对于实现愿望的代价一无所知，她希望流萤能靠自己的耳目理解何为「典当」。
E: Mostly harboring suspicion but with a sliver of hope, Firefly boards the Radiant Feldspar. \nShe's here to find the rumored Bonajade Exchange, which is said to be a pawn shop that can grant anybody's wishes.\nThe owner of the pawn shop, Lady Bonajade, believes Firefly to know nothing of the cost for wishes to come true. She hopes Firefly can learn with her own eyes and ears what the act of "pawning" truly means.

C: 谐乐大典开幕在即，而「晖长石号」也基本被你扫荡一空……\n什么，你说没有参与感？好吧，距离开幕式其实还有一段时间，你不妨再到处转转，累了再找个座位等待典礼开幕吧。
E: The Charmony Festival is about to begin, and you've pretty much completely cleared out the Radiant Feldspar...\nWhat, you said you wanted a sense of participation? Well then, there's still a while before the opening ceremony commences. You may as well take a stroll around. Find a seat if you're tired and hold tight for the opening ceremony.

C: 考试结束，课程还未开始，现在是最令人欣喜的学院游览时间。一般来说，一段浪漫的邂逅、一场奇妙的冒险、一次世界毁灭的过程都是从学生在学校闲逛开始的。\n在校庆的创意集市逛逛吧，不保证有趣，但一定比上课轻松。
E: The test has concluded, and classes have yet to start. Now is the ideal time to explore the academy. Typically, a romantic encounter, a thrilling adventure, or the prelude to world destruction often begins with a leisurely stroll through the campus.\nEnjoy yourself in the anniversary's Creator's Market. While excitement is not guaranteed, it promises a more relaxed atmosphere than the classroom.

C: 阿格莱雅对奥赫玛的掌控程度远超我们想象，此前的风波已然传到她的耳中。这位黄金裔的领袖展现出她铁血冷酷的一面，以极端手段再度确认我们的来意。历经如此险境，我们需要重新思索翁法罗斯之旅的可行性。
E: Aglaea's control over Okhema runs far deeper than we anticipated, and the previous incident has already reached her ears. This leader of the Chrysos Heirs revealed a cold and unyielding side, going to great lengths to reassess our intentions. After such perilous moments, we must reconsider the viability of our expedition in Amphoreus.

C: 跟随白厄了解黄金裔的救世苦旅后，我们最终还是决定留在翁法罗斯。经过一番休整，众黄金裔再度集结，准备向尼卡多利所在的悬锋城发起讨伐，夺取「天谴之矛」的火种。
E: After understanding from Phainon the Chrysos Heirs' arduous journey to save the world, we ultimately decided to remain in Amphoreus. After a period of rest and recovery, the Chrysos Heirs reconvened, readying themselves for an attack against Castrum Kremnos, where Nikador was, with the goal of seizing the Coreflame of the Lance of Fury.

C: 据{NICKNAME}所说，欧洛尼斯让{F#她}{M#他}看到了星核猎手…那是一段理应不存在，却无比鲜明的记忆。
E: According to {NICKNAME}, Oronyx showed {F#her}{M#him} the Stellaron Hunters... It was a memory that should not exist, yet it seems so vivid and realistic.

C: 为尽可能安全地推行计划，遐蝶与{NICKNAME}决定融入祭典，与一名沉默的斗士组成三人小组，向悬锋城深处进发。
E: To execute their plan as safely as possible, Castorice and {NICKNAME} decided to blend into the festival celebration, forming a trio with a silent warrior and venturing deeper into Castrum Kremnos.

C: 昔日流思遍地的树庭，如今却陷入诡异的静默。{NICKNAME}一行人设法进入树庭，发现内部似乎情况不对……
E: The Grove, once filled with scholarly discourse, has now fallen into an eerie silence. {NICKNAME}'s group manages to enter, only to find that something seems amiss inside...

C: 克拉特鲁斯向我传达了阿格莱雅的死讯，而随后衣匠发来的短信也证明了他所言非虚，我相当震惊。摆脱「清洗者」的纠缠，我立即赶回奥赫玛，和{NICKNAME}汇合后，向同伴们了解情况…
E: Krateros brought word of Aglaea's death, and the Garmentmaker's message that followed confirmed it, I was stunned. After shaking off the "Cleaners," I returned to Okhema at once. Upon reuniting with {NICKNAME}, I sought out our companions to learn what had happened...

C: 圣城陷入永夜，混乱令人不安，而距火种尽数归还也仅剩一步，危机下，完成「再创世」恐怕是我们唯一的选择。取回刻法勒的火种后，我们将立刻赶往创世涡心。
E: Evernight has descended upon the holy city, bringing disturbing chaos in its wake. With just one final Coreflame to return, completing the "Era Nova" may be our only choice in this crisis. After retrieving Kephale's Coreflame, we will immediately head to the Vortex of Genesis.

C: 阿格莱雅的留言让白厄下定了决心，他号召众人，意图控制住混乱的局面，安抚民众。事实证明，他是一位优秀的演说家。
E: Aglaea's final words gave Phainon resolve. He gathered everyone, determined to bring order to the chaos and calm the people. And indeed, he proved to be a gifted speaker.

C: {NICKNAME}的思绪被拉回了创世涡心，回到了再创世的前一刻，与白厄一同，直面最后的来客——那位燃尽的救世之人，与它所践行的意志。
E: {NICKNAME}'s thoughts are pulled back to the Vortex of Genesis, to the moment before the Era Nova, to when they are standing beside Phainon and facing the final visitor: The one who burned to nothingness for salvation and the will they are carrying out.

C:
你还记得她们吗，无缘黎明的卡厄斯兰那？
英雄撕裂天空，圣女飞落悬崖，棋手扬起初火，以负世神谕之名。
多么可敬！然而，命运从来慷慨，赴死的若虫必得赴死的结局。
你啊，救世主，看她们无光的死灰！难道还要妄想留住？
那推石攀升的，必遭大地倾覆；搅扰岁月的，也只能徒增一副零落的甲壳。
听我说，你与她们无异：正如那欢唱的也嘶声，明眸的也盲目。
去！尽管独自向前——
狂欢，起舞，投入不倦的火，永不停歇！
E:
Do you still remember them, Khaslana, the one who won't reach the dawn?
The hero tore through the sky, the Holy Maiden fell from the cliff, and the chessmaster ignited the first Flame, all in the name of prophecy of Worldbearer.
What noble deeds! And yet fate, ever generous, ensures that the death-bound nymphs shall find their death nevertheless.
O Deliverer, behold the lifeless ash they've become! Do you still futilely dream of saving them?
Those who push the boulder upward will see the earth swallow them whole. Those who meddle with time earn nothing but a shattered shell.
Hear me. You're no different from them: The singers still scream, and the bright-eyed still go blind.
Go, then! March on alone —
Revel, dance, throw yourself into the tireless flame, and never stop!

C: 对，就是这样，我喜欢主动探索场景的演员。
E: Yes, that's cool, I like actors who actively explore the scene.

C: 人们说，这是一个金血晕染鲜血的残酷时代，这是一个海啸山崩下衰颓的灾难时代，这是一个昏君践踏律法的暴虐时代，这是一个神与信徒都被屠戮的黑暗时代。这就是第一次逐火之旅的时代，这个时代有一颗灼热的太阳，燃烧着令人目盲的光。\n而你要直视它，请它把你要的火点亮。
E: People say this is a cruel era stained with golden blood and crimson, an era of catastrophe where tsunamis rage and mountains crumble, an era of tyranny where corrupt rulers trample the law, a dark era where both gods and their faithful are slaughtered. This is the era of the First Flame-Chase Journey, an era with a scorching sun that burns with blinding light.\nAnd you must gaze directly into it, asking it to illuminate the fire you seek.

C:
奥赫玛，最后的城，有着好多好多神话。
她曾像一位天真的宁芙，受着律法的庇护，穿着浪漫的华服，沐浴天空的曙光，在大地上起舞，听海洋的歌声，受着理性的教导，避开追求者的诡计，远离纷争和死亡，在一扇扇漂亮的门径间穿行，背负世界的拥护……
直至岁月带走了她的快乐、容貌、生命和更多。一具骸骨静静躺在石棺中。而在像白玉雕的肋骨下，心还没有枯萎。
扫却美丽心脏的灰，去听，听为你留存的心跳。
E:
Okhema, the last city, was a cradle of countless myths.
Once, she was like an innocent nymph, sheltered by law, draped in flowing finery, basking in sky's dawning light. She danced across the earth, listened to the ocean's songs, followed reason's teachings, slipped past suitors' trickery, untouched by strife or death. Through ever more beautiful passages she wandered, and people supported her in her worldbearing...
Until time took her joy, her beauty, her life, and more. A skeleton lies quietly in a stone coffin. Yet beneath ribs carved like white jade, her heart hasn't withered.
Wipe away the dust from that beautiful heart, and listen... listen to the heartbeat preserved for you.

C:
船呵，波涛又把你推向海上，
怎么办？毅然停住吧，进港！
难道你没有看见，舷边已没有划桨，桅柱已被强劲的西南风折断，帆杆在嗟怨悲鸣，没有缆绳，船体怎经受得住风浪的猛烈冲击？
风帆已经破碎，神像也已失去。
——你要千万当心呵，不要作风暴的玩具。
E:
O ship, the waves are pushing you back to sea.
What now? Firmly stop. Turn toward the harbor!
Can't you see? The oars are gone from your sides. The mast has snapped in the fierce southwest wind. The rigging groans with sorrow. No ropes remain. How will your hull survive the crashing waves?
The sails are torn, and the divine statue has vanished.
— Beware. Do not let the storm toy with you.

C: 烈阳焚毁了神悟树庭之下的祭坛，那是「大地」的封印。在我到达神悟树庭之后，这里俨然已受到了「记忆」的影响，「毁灭」既是偶然也是必然，我必须继续前进，深入迷雾之中。\n海瑟音揭露了事实，那神秘的山之民并非是真正的荒笛。
E: The Blazing Sun ravaged the altar beneath the Grove of Epiphany, which was the seal of "Earth." By the time I arrived, the Grove was already warped by the Remembrance. Destruction is accidental, yet inevitable. I must press on, deeper into the mist.\nHysilens revealed the truth that the mysterious Mountain Dweller was not the real Terravox.

C: 在这永恒的居所，昔涟保护着银河众生的记忆，却也几乎散尽了自我。我必须与她一同铭记被铁墓抹消的银河众生，踏上记忆的命途，为故事写下不同的结局。
E: In this eternal dwelling, Cyrene guards the memories of all cosmic beings, yet has almost lost herself in the process. I must join her in remembering those erased by the Irontomb, embark on the Path of Remembrance, and write a different ending to the story.

C: 近日，地概科的年轻科员洛奇陷入了重重心事。原来，他一直与暗恋对象保持着通讯，但这一次，对方却没有如期回信。\n考虑到二人一度相谈甚欢，以及他「刚刚表白」这一特殊时间节点，心急如焚的他请求你调查双方联络中断的因由。
E: A young researcher named Rocky from the Department of Cosmic Geography seems to have a lot on his mind lately. As it turns out, he's been keeping in contact with his crush. However, this time, the expected letter of reply from his crush never came.\nThe two never run out of things to talk about, and seeing that he had just confessed his love, he is urgently asking for you to investigate why their communications have abruptly ended.

C: 年迈的以斯帖授权你前去回收记录着奇景秘闻的录像带。至于为什么是你？\n因为这位密卷科员虔信，秘密一向会主动挑选它们的见证者。
E: The elderly Esther authorizes you to retrieve the videotapes of wonders and secrets. But why you?\nThat's because this researcher from the Department of Insight believes that secrets choose their own witnesses.

C: 年迈的以斯帖授权你前去回收记录着奇景秘闻的录像带。至于为什么是你？\n因为这位密卷科员虔信，秘密一向会主动挑选它们的见证者。
E: The elderly Esther authorizes you to retrieve the videotapes of wonders and secrets. But why you?\nThat's because this researcher from the Department of Insight believes that secrets choose their own witnesses.

C: 一艘飞船…与星穹列车发生了追尾？似乎还有两个神秘来客找上门来了！\n去试探一下，看看来者到底是什么样的人吧…
E: A spaceship... has somehow rear-ended the Astral Express!? And a couple of mysterious visitors seem to be approaching the cabin!\nSend out some feelers to figure out what kind of people these visitors are...

C: 根据辛克尔的推荐你决定拜访阿德勒，但似乎有其他人也在找他
E: Due to Hinkel's recommendations, you decide to visit Adler. However, others seem to be looking for him too.

C: 阿德勒的见解让你终于回想起黑塔委托的全貌，再次确认一下委托的内容吧
E: Adler's insights finally made you recall the entirety of Herta's commission. Let's double-check the content of that commission again.

C: 空间站竟然有隐藏的秘密舱段？！这恐怕是很多科员都不曾知晓的事情。你单独前去调查，里面似乎盛放着许多不可思议的东西……
E: The space station has a secret zone? This might just be something not even most the researchers know about. You investigate alone, and find the space filled with many incredible objects...

C: 矿车工老师傅为你准备了眼前的「矿车难题」——三下五除二地解决掉吧。
E: The senior mine cart operator prepared the Mine Cart Puzzle in front of you. Solve it promptly.

C: 按照藏宝图的指引，你挖到了「宝藏」，你想起桑博信誓旦旦向你承诺的样子，这不禁令你大为恼火。说好的交情与诚信在此刻不翼而飞，看来在地底，拳头才是最值得信赖的东西。总之，该会去找桑博算账了……
E: Using the treasure map, you find the treasure. Thinking of Sampo's promise, you get really annoyed. As a dishonest man, he is not a friend of yours. Perhaps the most trustworthy entity in the underground is the fist. Anyway, it's time to settle this matter with Sampo...

C: 你的名声似乎在下层区传播开来，街头巷尾都在议论着你这位「外来者」格斗家。\n如果想要在擂台上与人切磋切磋，不妨去找掘掘博士安排参加比赛吧。
E: Your name is now well-known in the underworld. Everyone is talking about you, an "outsider" fighter.\nIf you want to hone your skills in the arena, you can go to Dr. Dig, who will arrange for you to participate in fighting matches.

C: 你一路摧枯拉朽，直冲天梯榜排名第二，目前距离拿下赛季总冠军只有一步之遥。\n坐镇天梯榜第一的是何人物？若是对此感到好奇，就去找掘掘博士安排参加本赛季的最后一战吧。
E: You're invincible! Now you're 2nd on the ranking list, only one step away from becoming the season champion.\nBut who is at the top? If you're curious, you can go to Dr. Dig, who will arrange for you to participate in the final match of the season.

C: 还差一点，你们没有拍下了地髓探针，但是礼物还是要送的，现在先去问问娜塔莎的建议吧。\n娜塔莎见多识广，也很了解费斯曼老爹，也许会有一些好建议？
E: You fail to get the Geomarrow Probe, but you still need to prepare a present. You ask for Natasha's advice.\nShe is well-informed and knows Fersman well. Maybe she will give you some great suggestions.

C: 娜塔莎与她住在上层区的养父母重新建立了沟通，希望能藉由他们在医界的人脉为下层区的病患谋取资源。\n你挑选好了花束，回去找娜塔莎聊聊吧——希望她能对你的选择感到满意。
E: Natasha has reconnected with her adoptive parents living in the Overworld, hoping that their network in the medical community could help the patients in the Underworld obtain more medical resources.\nYou have chosen a flower bouquet. Go back and talk to Natasha again. Hopefully, she will be satisfied.

C: 真是没想到，丹枢竟然是药王秘传的一员。也许你无法轻易接受这个事实，也许你早就看穿了她的真面目…无论如何，你都要早些找到她，避免她做出更糟糕的事情。
E: Surprise, surprise. Dan Shu is a Disciple of Sanctus Medicus. You might not be able to accept that fact easily, but you have seen through her... No matter what, time is of the essence. You need to find her before she does something worse.

C: 陶德极力邀请你成为他的学生，并向你透露了他利用你获取持明族长生秘密的消息。他重返青春的躯壳证实了这一点，并向你透露了一个秘密计划…但你在几经抉择之后，最终还是做出了自己的决定……
E: Todd tries his best to invite you to be his student and reveals to you that he used you to obtain the secret of the Vidyadhara's long life. His youthful body confirms this, and he reveals a secret plan to you... But after thinking through the choices, you ultimately make your own decision...

C: 无论如何，你们此行的目的是完成与半夏的「交易」，要让白露帮她治好心上人的疾病。去找找那位心上人吧。\n他也许是害怕魔阴身怪物而离开，但这会让他后悔一辈子。
E: No matter what, the goal of your trip is to complete your deal with Banxia — having Bailu cure Banxia's lover. Go look for him.\nHe might have left because he was scared of the Mara-struck monsters, but this will cause him lifelong regret.

C: 铖杰师傅的热情肉眼可见地消退，甚至向青雀打听如何摆烂…当初高谈阔论梦想的铖杰到底怎么了，还是去看看他吧。\n你知道人不可能永远靠着热情与梦想工作，但是铖杰师傅消耗得也太快了。
E: Chengjie's enthusiasm has visibly faded, to the point that he even asks Qingque for tips to slack off... What happened to the Chengjie who was shooting for the stars? Let's pay him a visit.\nYou know it is nearly impossible to sustain a career with passion and dreams alone, but Chengjie's excitement seems to have died down a little too quickly.

C: 你就像是在路边捡到垃圾一样，捡到了金人标准零件，去把它交给铖杰吧。\n它本应该是向工造司申请需求的生产材料…不过，现在就先别计较了。
E: It is as if you picked up trash by the side of the road. You pick up some standard aurumaton parts, so go ahead and hand it over to Chengjie.\nIt was supposed to be a production material requested from the Artisanship Commission... but let's not worry about that now.

C: 按照钟珊的指挥修理好这些机兵吧。但说真的，这种「机械生物」能让那群大善人买账吗？
E: Follow Zhongshan's direction to repair these automatons. But seriously, can you really sell these "mechanical creatures" to the Benevolent Ones?

C: 按照钟珊的指挥修理好这些机兵吧。但说真的，这种「机械生物」能让那群大善人买账吗？
E: Follow Zhongshan's direction to repair these automatons. But seriously, can you really sell these "mechanical creatures" to the Benevolent Ones?

C: 另一边厢，神策府中，曜青将军飞霄召见列车团的成员，询问建木灾异的始末。\n没有想象中咄咄逼人的气势，这位将军抵达罗浮的目标，或许从一开始便不在此处——她想要的，是确认景元的忠诚从未改变。
E: Within the Seat of Divine Foresight, the Yaoqing's general Feixiao summons the Express crew to inquire about the whole story surrounding the Ambrosial Arbor Crisis.\nThere's none of the terseness that one might expect. The general's objective upon arrival on the Luofu might not have been here in the first place — all she wants to ensure is that Jing Yuan's loyalty has not changed.

C: 按照飞霄的要求，你们踏入幽囚狱留下证词。而她派出的曜青信使将自罗浮仙舟接走关押在此许久的步离人首领，呼雷。
E: In light of Feixiao's request, you stepped into the Shackling Prison and left your statements. The Yaoqing messenger that she dispatched whisked away the long-detained borisin leader, Hoolay, who was being held on the Xianzhou Luofu.

C: 按照飞霄的要求，你们踏入幽囚狱留下证词。而她派出的曜青信使将自罗浮仙舟接走关押在此许久的步离人首领，呼雷。
E: In light of Feixiao's request, you stepped into the Shackling Prison and left your statements. The Yaoqing messenger that she dispatched whisked away the long-detained borisin leader, Hoolay, who was being held on the Xianzhou Luofu.

C: 你来到了<unbreak>1007</unbreak>号房间，然而莱斯利•迪恩并不在房内。\n四下找找，看看有没有什么和他相关的线索。
E: You arrive at room <unbreak>1007</unbreak>, only to discover that Lesley Dean is not present.\nSearch around for any clues that might provide insight.

C: 你帮助莱斯利•迪恩解放了创造出他的人们，他现在再无遗憾。\n和他聊聊，给这段心灵奇旅画上句号。
E: You have helped Lesley Dean in freeing the people who created him, and now he has no regrets.\nTalk to him and conclude this bizarre journey.

C: 失去挚友的罗伯特陷入了绝望，开始徒劳地追逐莱斯利•迪恩的影子。\n必须让他意识到自己生命中最宝贵的明星究竟是谁——为他和哈里拍摄一张合影吧。
E: Faced with the loss of his dearest friend, Robert succumbed to despair and fruitlessly pursued the shadow of Lesley Dean.\nIt is crucial to remind him of the true superstar in his life. Take a photo of him and Harry together.

C: 店长柯柯娜似乎缺少了某种重要的情绪，试着和钟表小子一起将其修补完整吧。
E: The shopkeeper Cocona appears to be lacking a crucial mood. Try to restore it to its completion together with Clockie.

C: 你低下头，看了看自己，仿佛正在以柯柯娜的样子经历她的回忆。那里有一架柯柯娜曾经使用过的钢琴，试着弹奏它，也许会发生一些奇妙的事情。
E: You lower your head and look at yourself. It's as if you are experiencing her memories in her form. The piano she used to play stands there. Try to play it, and you may witness something miraculous.

C: 竟然有刺客想要刺王杀驾！这太离奇了，怎么会有人对这样一位善良的好人图谋不轨？\n快抓住刺客，保护皇帝陛下的安全吧。
E: Assassins are after the Emperor! Unbelievable, who would do such a thing to such a kind soul?\nFind the assassins quickly and protect Her Majesty.

C: 我知道他们后来是怎么评价我的——荒诞无稽、杀人为乐…他们说错了。\n掌权后，我再也没有快乐过，甚至再也没能睡过一整个晚上。恐惧像深海中涌出的巨型乌贼，将我的心死死缠住，试图将它拖进黑暗的深渊。\n除了不断地清除掉那些恐惧的源头…灰骑士，我又能怎么办呢？我又该怎么办呢？
E: I know what they said about me later — outrageous, murdering for pleasure... But they were wrong. \nAfter gaining power, I've never been happy, neither have I gotten a peaceful night's sleep — the fear surges forth like a giant squid from the abyssal depths, entwining its tentacles around my heart, attempting to pull me back into the black abyss.\nApart from severing the origins of these fears... Gray Knight, what can I do? What do I do?

C: 现在，你已经是白日梦酒店的临时大堂经理了。\n万事俱备，开工吧！
E: You are now the interim lobby manager of the Reverie.\nNow that everything is ready, it is time to work!

C: 找到「防盗门怪谈」的亲历者，并向对方打听这则「怪谈」背后的真相。或者凭借自己对空间站的认识，直接寻找这扇不得了的防盗门。
E: Track down the one who experienced the Security Door Anecdote and find out the truth from them. Alternatively, find the security door in question based on your knowledge of the space station.

C: 鼹鼠党的尤利安在这里东张西望，似乎在盘算着什么…该不该和他搭话呢？
E: Julian of the Moles is looking around here, as if planning something... Should you talk to him?

C: 为了「鼹鼠党振兴计划」，尤利安打算继续秘密配送「地火」留下的快递。\n这件快递包裹上署的名是矿工匹克，去大矿区找到他吧。
E: For the Moles' Reinvigoration Plan, Julian plans to keep secretly delivering the packages Wildfire had left behind.\nThis package should be sent to Peak the miner. Find him in the Great Mine.

C: 老吉尔伯特希望你能把他推迟退役的消息转达给女儿莉拉。\n在那之前，他希望你能去花店为他的女儿选一束花——至于要选什么种类的花，决定权在你。
E: Old Gilbert wants you to tell his daughter Lila that his retirement will be delayed.\nBefore that, he wants you to buy a bouquet for his daughter at the florist's — It's up to you to decide what kind of flower to buy.

C: 丹鼎司洞天重开之后，鱼龙混杂。仅仅依靠护珠人在海滩巡逻是不够的，他们向善良勇敢的志愿者发出了邀请。\n护珠人跃渊希望你能参与海滩巡逻…真是的，守护这片沙滩的人到底是谁呢？
E: After the Alchemy Commission delve reopened, people honest and crooked walked betwixt each other. As such, the Pearlkeepers alone are no longer enough to patrol the beach. They have offered invitations to brave and noble volunteers for the task at hand.\nYueyuan the Pearlkeeper hopes that you can help patrol the beach... Seriously, though, who's the one that actually protects this place?

C: 金人巷的客流量持续增长，光顾杜氏茶庄的客人也日益增多。杜老板对自家茶庄多年来的招牌单品「烈焰浓茶」十分满意，但近期却不断收到客人的意见……\n杜老板决心迎合客人们的口味，为茶庄研发一些新品。不过，在新品上市前，他还需要听听你的意见……
E: As Aurum Alley's clientele continues to grow, so too do those visiting Du's Teahouse. Boss Du is specially proud of his tea shop's signature Flaming Potent Tea, but in recent days, he keeps getting negative feedback from his customers...\nBoss Du is determined to meet the customer's tastes and develop some new teas for his business. However, before he can release these new drinks to the public, he still wants to hear your opinion...

C: 你还真在列车里发现了奇怪的东西——一面镜子。\n为什么别人都对这面镜子熟视无睹呢？
E: You actually did discover something weird aboard the Express — a mirror.\nWhy is everyone turning a blind eye to this mirror?

C: 翁法罗斯的世界残留着一些常理难以解释的遗存，所谓「黄金替罪羊」就是其中之一。一时兴起，你试图破解其中的奥秘，然而它似乎很快就变成了某种闹剧……
E: The world of Amphoreus left behind a number of relics that seem to defy common sense — "The Golden Scapegoat" being one of them. Curious, you attempted to unravel its secret, but it seems this has quickly become a whole separate issue...

C: 黑塔要求你以「开拓」的身份进入天才俱乐部制作的「模拟宇宙」，试着从虚拟星神口中套出星神与命途的奥秘。
E: Herta asks you to enter the Simulated Universe created by the Genius Society while pretending to be the Aeon of Trailblaze, and try to glean the secret of Aeons and Paths from the simulated Aeons.

C: 铁卫技术部发明了名为照雪灯炉的辅助作战装置。\n捡起地上的热能核心，然后再看看下一步该怎么做。
E: The Silvermane Guard Technology Division invented a combat support device called the Snowshine Lamp.\nPick up the thermic core on the ground and figure out what the next step is.

C: 滴答！快，拨动指针，滴答——！\n人们的内心正待你去探索，为他们寻回真正的自我吧！
E: Tick... tock! Quick, Adjust the hands... Tick, tock!\nPeople's minds await your exploration. Help them regain their true selves!

C: 小贩依旧不肯承认长矛和盾牌都是赝品。没办法，先用普通的武器来检验下盾牌的质量吧。
E: The merchants still refuse to acknowledge that the lance and shield are both fakes. Left with no other option, you decide to test the shield's quality using a regular weapon.

C: 在刻法勒的神像后找到一个隐蔽的藏身处，完成你的扮演！
E: Find a well-hidden spot behind the Kephale statue and pull off your performance!

C: 阿波罗尼此行的终点似乎就是雅努斯迷津…他想用这台装置得知些什么？
E: The destination of Apollonius's trip seemed to be the Janus' Maze... What was he trying to learn through this device?

C: 你收到了来自卡芙卡的消息，她声称自己遭遇了危机，需要你的帮助。你愿意帮助她吗？…或者，你真的相信她吗？
E: You received a message from Kafka claiming that she is in trouble and requires your help. Do you go to her rescue? ...Or rather, do you believe her?

C: 原来刃还在仙舟，并且仍在通缉之中。卡芙卡计划使用「言灵术」压制刃的魔阴身，为此，她希望你在施术时保护她。
E: So Blade is still aboard the Xianzhou and is still wanted. Kafka plans to use her Spirit Whisper to suppress Blade's mara-struck condition, hoping that you would protect her while she uses her ability.

C: 银狼引起的风波终于告一段落，但伦纳德依旧忧心忡忡。\n为了空间站的网络安全，也为了保住这份工作，他请求你协助进行一项测试……
E: The troubles caused by Silver Wolf have abated, but Leonard still looks concerned.\nHe's asking for your help to carry out a task that will improve the space station's cybersecurity and help him keep his job...

C: 贝洛伯格历史文化博物馆开展在即。为了展览顺利举行，于尔丹正在收集合适的藏品。\n博物馆的展品修复员鲍里斯似乎正在犯难——前往修理间帮帮他吧。
E: Belobog's History and Culture Museum will be opening soon. Uldan is collecting appropriate exhibits to ensure a successful opening.\nBoris, the restorer of the museum, seems to be troubled. Go and find him at the restoration room.

C: 贝洛伯格历史文化博物馆开展在即。为了展览顺利举行，于尔丹正在收集合适的藏品。\n这一次，于尔丹希望你前往城郊雪原为冰封的反物质军团虚卒拍摄照片，以便博物馆制作复制品。
E: Belobog's History and Culture Museum will be opening soon. Uldan is collecting appropriate exhibits to ensure a successful opening.\nThis time, Uldan needs your help to take a picture of a frozen Antimatter Legion Voidranger at the Outlying Snow Plains to help the museum make a replica.

C: 贝洛伯格历史文化博物馆开展在即。为了展览顺利举行，于尔丹正在收集合适的藏品。\n这一次，鲍里斯希望你为他演示如何使用棒球棍作战，以便他制作对应的复制品。
E: Belobog's History and Culture Museum will be opening soon. Uldan is collecting appropriate exhibits to ensure a successful opening.\nThis time, Boris hopes that you could show him how you wield the baseball bat in combat to help him make a replica.

C: 贝洛伯格历史文化博物馆开展在即，导览工作却出现大量职缺。为了迅速填补缺口、提高观众游览体验，佩拉与艾丽斯向贝洛伯格全体公众发出了职位邀请。\n这一次，她们似乎看中了地火的干部希儿。代她们前往大矿区，了解希儿是否有入职意愿吧。
E: The Belobog History and Culture Museum is about to open, but there is a great lack of guides. To rapidly fill up these positions and improve the visitor experience, Pela and Eris are inviting all Belobog citizens to apply for these positions.\nThis time they have their eye on Seele, senior member of Wildfire. Head to the Great Mine in their stead, and see whether Seele is interested in the position.

C: 拍摄完绘影图形之后，需要和素裳讨论一下「商业宣传」的方向，并决定下一处拍摄主题。\n你当然可以相信素裳的商业直觉，不过，有没有一种可能，直接问问小秘书会更有效率？
E: After shooting the visiograph, you need to discuss with Sushang about what direction the "business promotion" is supposed to take, and decide the theme for the next promo.\nYou can definitely choose to trust Sushang's business instincts, but might it be wiser and more efficient to directly ask Miss Secretary Mingxi?

C: 为了重振金人巷，商会希望充分利用码头物流，与金人巷的商户们建立紧密的合作。\n商会派你来劝说杜氏茶庄和商会建立合作关系。但杜老板此时却碰上了一些麻烦……
E: In order to revitalize Aurum Alley, the merchant guild aims to fully utilize the docks' logistics capacity and establish close collaborations with the stores in the alley.\nThe guild has sent you to persuade Du's Teahouse to establish a partnership with the guild. However, its proprietor Boss Du has encountered some troubles at the moment...

C: 你们已经完成了「残响回廊决胜乐园」的全部挑战，这是迈向冠军的第一步。现在，是时候回去养精蓄锐了。
E: You've already finished all the challenges in the Corridor of Fading Echoes Victory Zone. This is the first step toward the championship. Now is the time to go back and rest your strength.

C: 一切尘埃落定，该是你们例行在「罗浮杂俎」上发布帖子的时候了。
E: Regardless, the incident has been resolved. It is time to post on Ghostly Grove, as per usual.

C: 铁皮人希望向你展示它理想中的酒吧，就去看看究竟是什么模样吧。\n淑女怎么变成了铁皮人的夫人？不知道怎么回事，先去问问情况。
E: Tin Man wants to show you its dream lounge. Go and take a look at the lounge.\nHow did Lady turn into a Tin Lady? You have no idea what happened. Go and ask about the situation.

C: 自称克劳克影业客服的神秘人向你发出了邀请，希望你能去体验《小小哈努行动》的结局故事……\n小小哈努兄弟的故事的背后藏着怎样的秘密？
E: Someone mysterious claiming to be from the Clock Studios Customer Service has invited you to experience the end story of Hanu's Adventure...\nWhat kind of a secret is hidden behind that little Brother Hanu's story?

C: 第一次选择！你和流萤来到了「戏梦奇战•动作派挑战」的舞台。根据引导员的说法，你们将在这里接受「动作」的考验……\n你可太熟悉「动作」了——但在这样一个人人都无法欢跳的世界里，你真的能够施展真正的「动作」吗？
E: The first choice! Firefly and you arrive at the stage for Dreamplay Fantasia: Action Challenge. According to the guide, you'll face the trial of "action" here...\nYou can't possibly be more familiar with "action" — However, in a world where no one can jump, can you really perform real "action"?

C: 能让人消失其中的录像带，触碰它会发生什么呢？
E: A videotape that can make someone disappear. What might happen if one touches it?

C: 你收到了一封来自家族的邀请函——鸢尾花家系的缇娜诚邀你去测试一款名为「折纸小鸟对对碰」的三消对战游戏。\n看起来倒不像是诈骗…那么，去看看也没什么损失吧？
E: You have received an invitation from The Family — Tinah of the Iris Family invites you to test a match-3 puzzle battle game called "Origami Bird Clash."\nIt doesn't seem like a scam... So, go take a look? There's nothing to lose.

C: 你收到了一封来自家族的邀请函——鸢尾花家系的缇娜诚邀你去测试一款名为「折纸小鸟对对碰」的三消对战游戏。\n看起来倒不像是诈骗…那么，去看看也没什么损失吧？

C:
「明知注定失败的比赛，我也要参加到底吗？」
「那老子问你：注定失败的人生，就不活了吗？」
「可如果这注定是一场徒劳的悲剧，又何必看到结尾呢？」
「因为你是个战士啊，蠢材。」
E:
"Should I still participate in a tournament till the end when I know I'll definitely lose?"
"Then let me ask you: Will you stop living if you know you'll life is doomed to fail?"
"But why should I see the end of this story when it's fated to be a tragedy that I can't change?"
"Because you're a fighter, idiot."

C: 她以前挺好的。
E: She used to be nice.

C: 好啦好啦，小三月就是这样的，我们都习惯啦。

C: 不知道耶。老实讲，航线会议的性质大概就跟你常挂在嘴边的团建是一回事吧。参不参加都无所谓，当然姬子姐总是希望大家都来的。
E: I guess. To be honest, warp navigation meetings are basically just like that "teambuilding" you're always going on about. You don't have to show up, but Himeko might be upset if you don't.

C: 瓦尔特先生这次会一起来吗？
E: You coming with us this time?

C: 虽然我俩没有亲身参与这次「开拓之旅」，但光从结果就能看出大家有多努力。恭喜各位——尤其是{NICKNAME}——大家对你的首秀评价很高。
E: *chuckles* Although Welt and I didn't get the chance to go with you, I can tell you worked hard to bring things back to normal. Well done, everybody. And especially you, {NICKNAME}. I heard a lot of good things about you.

C: 同伴就该相互照应，我们「无名客」更是如此。也请时刻记得，哪怕肉身相隔千万里，列车永远是你最坚实的后盾。
E: Friends look after each other, the same goes for us Nameless. Please remember, no matter where you are in the universe, the Express will always be behind you.

C: …不过，倒是足够让这个星球上的人们喘口气了。
E: But this brief window should allow the people on this planet to heal and rebuild.

C: 你似乎有话想问。尽管开口，我也正想找人谈谈心…健谈如姬子，也快跟我把话题耗尽了。
E: It seems you have something on your mind. Let's hear it. I'd like to hear a fresh perspective myself... Hehe, as talkative as Himeko is, we've pretty much run out of topics.

C: 你不能通过！
E: You cannot pass!

C: 「欢迎来到『黑塔』。」广告机的女声慵懒地说道，你感觉不到欢迎的意思。
E: "Welcome to Herta Space Station." You don't pick up any sense of welcome from the lazy and careless female voice coming out of the advertising bot.

C: 当你有机会做出选择的时候，不要让自己后悔……
E: When you have a chance to make a choice, make one that you know you won't regret...

C: 唉，话一出口我就觉得大事不妙……
E: Oof, probably shouldn't have said that... Might bring bad luck.

C: 「光锥」是流光忆庭的发明，这群「{RUBY_B#浮黎}记忆{RUBY_E#}」星神的追随者通过提炼记忆片段，制成「光锥」，让记忆得以留存。
E: Light Cones were created by the Garden of Recollection. These followers of the Aeon of {RUBY_B#Fuli}Remembrance{RUBY_E#} refined memory fragments to create Light Cones, which preserve memories.

C: 珍惜每一片「光锥」吧。它们对于原主人来说，是非常重要的记忆。
E: You should cherish every Light Cone. They are all precious memories of their original owners.

C: 亚伯拉罕跟他关系不错，我还不知道怎么跟他说这件事…哎。
E: Abraham was close to him. I don't know how to tell him about it...

C: 别逞英雄。
E: Don't be a hero.

C: 莱斯莉！师傅，我得出去，我得去给莱斯莉发消息！
E: Lesley! Sir, I need to go. I need to go find Lesley.

C: 「奇物编号<unbreak>148</unbreak>：螺中笑声。」
E: "Item number <unbreak>148</unbreak>: Crackup Conch."

C: 定分枪的眼睛看着昔涟：「<unbreak>0.336</unbreak>分…<unbreak>0.337</unbreak>分…<unbreak>0.999</unbreak>分…1分——」
E: The Rating Pistol gazes at Cyrene: "<unbreak>0.336</unbreak> points... <unbreak>0.337</unbreak> points... <unbreak>0.999</unbreak> points... 1 point—"

C: 看见月台了，好耶！
E: Aww yeah, it's the platform!

C: 各个世界的「裂界」彼此相通，因此怪物会通过「裂界」来到空间站内。但没东西从你身体里钻出来，所以……
E: All existing Fragmentums are connected, so monsters will be able to enter the space station through the Fragmentum here. But it shouldn't allow anything to exit your body, so...

C: 当然要呀，为什么不呢？
E: Of course you should! Why wouldn't you?

C: 加入我们，{NICKNAME}，这个问题马上就能解决。
E: Join us, {NICKNAME}. Then it wouldn't be a problem anymore.

C: 每个来到列车的人，都是这里的乘客。
E: Everyone on the Express is a passenger.

C: 你自己去看吧，我不清楚你对「好玩」的定义。
E: Go look them up yourself. I don't know your definition of "fun."

C: 这是？
E: What's this?

C: 妙哉，求知就是科学的基础。而现在，我们不仅仅「想」，更要「行动」。我想给你个机会参与这个项目，我们一起行动。
E: Great. Curiosity is the foundation of science. Now, we can't just think about it. We should also act. I want to give you the chance to participate in this project. Let's work together.

C: …四十二？
E: ...<unbreak>42</unbreak>?

C: 关于「模拟宇宙」项目…
E: About the Simulated Universe project...

C: 我还有别的问题…
E: I still have some questions...

C: 使者已经把情况告诉我了。做得很好，杰帕德，你也可以退下了。
E: The messenger informed me. Well done, Gepard. You may leave.

C: 那当然啦，跟你们冒险这么久，我的观察力被打磨得，嘿，那可不是一般的凌厉～
E: Uhh, yeah, of course — this isn't my first expedition y'know. My powers of perception are sharper than the sharpest blade~

C: 成语接龙？
E: I guess we are a strange trio...

C: 离这儿远一点吧，我们还在执行公务，被人看见闲聊就不好了。
E: Please keep a safe distance, this is a live situation. Plus, we need to look busy.

C: 我相信你们的经历，这么曲折离奇，自己可编不出来，何况还有这位希儿小姐现身作证。「星核」…呵，我知道布洛妮娅为什么要你们找我了。
E: I believe you, there's no way you could have invented all those twists and turns. What's more, we have Miss Seele here as living proof. As for the Stellaron... heh, I know why Bronya got you to find me.

C: 糟、糟了！我忘了老弟说今天会来……
E: D—Darn it! I forgot my brother said he'd be around today...

C: 怎么说呢…厉害的人，果然不管做什么都很厉害啊。
E: Well... Smart people are just good at everything.

C: 咦，佩拉小姐不在这里吗？
E: Oh, Miss Pela isn't here?

C: 你怎么记得这么清楚…
E: How do you remember that so clearly...

C: 收到了收到了——带好行李和纪念品，我们回家！
E: Yeah, yeah. Well, pack your souvenirs and stuff. Back home we go!

C: …接下来，就该去歌德宾馆好好睡上一觉了！
E: ...Time to head back to the Goethe Hotel for a good night's sleep!

C: 歌德先生，麻烦再加一碟曲奇——
E: Mr. Goethe, one plate of cookies, please...

C: （那么，该向谁请教好呢……）
E: (Hmm, who's the best one to ask...?)

C: 不过嘛，天天跟我一起混…她会对这类发明产生兴趣也是再正常不过。
E: Still, we hung out every day, it's only natural that my love for inventing would rub off on her.

C: 我没记错的话…这是你写的曲子吧？
E: ...That's one of yours, right?

C: 在飞舞的传言中，「你」的形象逐渐清晰…
E: Amidst the dancing whispers, the image of "you" gradually became more clear...

C: 你轻轻一触，信封失去了平衡，消失在邮筒的漆黑深处。你感到自己的善恶值——如果世界上有这种东西的话——提升了。
E: You touch the letter lightly. It tips over immediately and disappears into the dark of the mailbox. You feel like your karma (if that even exists in this world) just improved.

C: 没错。椰子壳不会腐烂，没有毒性，也不能进行回收利用，它是干垃圾！
E: Correct. Coconut shell doesn't rot, and it's not toxic. You can't recycle it either, so it belongs to the dry garbage!

C: 这就是你放任他们几个在地底乱跑的理由？
E: Which is why you've set them loose in the underground?

C: 好啊，不要勉强自己哦？要是哪里不舒服，赶紧回来告诉我。
E: Sure, but don't push yourself. If you start feeling unwell, come straight back and tell me.

C: 在筑城者的号召下，人们进入地底，开凿矿脉建立矿区。至少在上下层封闭之前，在地下生活是一种荣誉。
E: The people answered the call of the Architects and descended, excavating ore veins and establishing mines. Before we were sealed off, it was an honor to work underground.

C: 什么都干。维持秩序，主持正义，争取资源，分配物资……
E: Everything. They keep the peace, uphold justice, fight for resources, distribute goods...

C: 是！是！丹恒…兄弟深明大义。
E: Exactly! My boy Cold Dragon Young — uh... young master Dan Heng speaks with reason.

C: 喔…挺好心的嘛。
E: Oh... that's quite nice of you.

C: 能号令机器人的…「人类守护者」？我从没听说过这种事……
E: ...A "guardian of humanity" that can... command robots? I've never heard of anything like...

C: 安东尼娜，你能带着矿队返回入口，与娜塔莎会合吗？
E: Antonia, can you take the mining team back through the entrance to meet up with Natasha?

C: 嘿，喽啰揍腻了，总算上了道硬菜——我就好好陪你玩玩！
E: *sigh* I was getting bored of those minions — time for a real fight. Come at me!

C: 说回正题吧，我刚才想到的「人」，就是史瓦罗。
E: Let's get back to the main topic. The name that came to my mind, was Svarog.

C: 当时局势那么危急，哪有琢磨的时间，手头有什么就扔什么咯。
E: Maybe you've forgotten, but we were in a tight spot my friend — there was no time to think. I had to use whatever I could.

C: 我认得那边的姑娘，是第一矿队的伊蕾恩！快，快上去看看她伤势如何。
E: I recognize that woman — that's Elaine from First Mining Team! Quick, let's get up there and see if she's wounded.

C: 记得在拳馆击败的机器人吗？
E: You remember the robots we defeated in the boxing gym?

C: 感觉是个好人。
E: I think he's a good person.

C: 希儿她从小就是这个性格，好强，冲动，对陌生人来说有些难以接近……
E: Seele has been like this since she was little — impulsive and eager to be the best. For people who don't know her, they might find her... difficult...

C: 你们回来啦？听「地火」说，你们帮忙解决了史瓦罗那边的麻烦，可真了不起！
E: You're back! I've heard from Wildfire that you helped resolve that whole situation with Svarog. Amazing!

C: 虎克还没说是什么事呢！不过你干劲很足嘛，不愧是我看中的荣誉队员！
E: Haha, I haven't even mentioned what this is about! But that's the spirit. You truly are an honorary member of The Moles!

C: …虎克知道！我只是…不想惹她生气！
E: ...I'm aware of that! I just... didn't want to upset her!

C: 我对我手下那帮人的状况门儿清，能有什么事。
E: I know my men. What could go wrong?

C: 别在我耳边叽叽歪歪了，听着烦死了。
E: All that whining is hard on the ears.

C: 呃…说不上专门来看他，但听说他挺有看头，呃，怎么说呢。
E: Errrr, not specifically, but I heard he's quite something... Errr... I don't know.

C: 说起来…「怪物盔甲」后天还有几场比赛来着？怎么这票价越来越高了……
E: By the way... How many matches are there for Monster Armor after this? Why is the price getting higher and higher...

C: 我是特意来看望你的。
E: I came here to see you.

C: （科鲁泽好像不在这里，和周围的人打听下他的下落吧。）
E: (Kluzer doesn't seem to be here. I'll ask the people around here about his whereabouts.)

C: 是哪位选手如此倒霉，竟然碰上如此恐怖的对手？没错，正是那位近期在俱乐部天梯榜上高歌猛进的新秀！掌声有请，不带感情的「异界拳王」——{NICKNAME}！
E: And who's the unlucky one to be facing such a fearful opponent? That's right. It's the rookie who has made great strides on the club Leaderboard recently! Give it up for the emotionless Limbo Champion— {NICKNAME}!

C: 谢谢你们。该先去找谁就请各位决定吧，其余的交给地火就好。
E: Thank you. Choose whoever you like. Wildfire will take care of the rest.

C: 快，人工呼吸——
E: Quick, mouth-to-mouth resuscitation...

C: 我连遗嘱都还没立！
E: I haven't even written my will yet!

C: 呜…呜哇！这、这是…好大、好蓝的屋顶呀！
E: Whoaaaa...! Look at the big blue ceiling!

C: 哎，好想带着应急食物去魔法与剑的世界里大冒险啊……
E: Oh, how I wish I could go on an epic adventure in a fantasy world of magic and swords, with my very own emergency food!

C: 你在哪里找到的后记？
E: Where did you find the postscript?

C: 路灯，它在昏暗的地下扮演太阳的角色。
E: A street lamp, it plays the part of a zeitgeber in the dim underground.

C: 行，我收回我的要求。
E: Sure, I will take back my insistence.

C: 不了！
E: I quit!

C: 晚上好。
E: Good evening.

C: 盛会之星「匹诺康尼」宣布将邀请知名歌者知更鸟小姐为「谐乐大典」献声演唱。
E: Penacony, the Planet of Festivities, announced that it will invite renowned singer, Robin, to perform at the Charmony Festival.

C: 星际和平公司骄傲地宣布：公司技术研发部已与混沌医师「慕榕」建立长期友好合作关系，将为陷入精神疾病危机的世界提供医疗救助。
E: The Interastral Peace Corporation is delighted to announce our Technology Department has established a long-term partnership with Murong from the Doctors of Chaos, aimed at providing medical assistance to worlds engulfed in mental health crises.

C: 「罗浮」上发现星核不过数日，星槎海全面封闭，无人离开——各位如何未卜先知，又怎么认定这一切与星核有关？
E: It's only been a few days since the presence of a Stellaron was detected on the Luofu. Starskiff Haven has been under full lockdown — no one has been permitted to leave. How did you come to know of the incident, and what led you to conclude that it was linked to a Stellaron?

C: 久仰将军大名，您有什么事要拜托我们？
E: It's an honor to meet you, general. May I ask what the favor you spoke of is?

C: 卡芙卡什么都不会说的。
E: Kafka won't say anything.

C: 难道刃不在他们手里？
E: Could Blade have escaped?

C: 嗯嗯嗯，好好好，知道了，我还有要事。之后就全拜托「天赋异禀」的符卿了。
E: Yes, yes, yes... I have to go now — I'll leave this in your overwhelmingly capable hands, Fu Xuan.

C: 老人家？
E: Old girl?

C: 恩公明察。嫌犯十分狡猾，除去加密频段外，通信的时间也卡得刚好，无法准确定位。
E: Exactly right. The suspect is extremely cunning. She encrypted her transmission and timed her communication — we couldn't pinpoint her exact location.

C: 三月小姐，对于大部分人来说，这种响动也许毫无区别。但对负责维护设施的工造司来说，每一种机械的运转都像曲子的旋律高低各有不同了。
E: Miss March, to the untrained ear, these noises may sound the same. But for the craftsmen of the Artisanship Commission, each machine has a different pitch and melody.

C: 将军召来了匠人，在比对辨听之下，发现卡芙卡的背景音来自「迴星港」的造船设施。
E: The general sent for craftsmen, and they concluded that the sound came from the shipyard facilities in Stargazer Navalia.

C: 都会好起来的。
E: It will get better.

C: 卜算？那不是碰运气吗？
E: Divination? Isn't that the same as flipping a coin?

C: 说句不想承认的话：我都有点想念桑博了…慢着！这想法是怎么冒出来的？我疯了吗？不不不，仙舟人比桑博可强太多了！
E: I hate to admit it, but I'm even starting to miss Sampo... Hold up! I must be losing my mind. Nope — I'll take the Xianzhou over that blue-haired bore any day...

C: 很浪漫主义的比喻，不过…用在这里似乎不太恰当。
E: That's a romantic way of putting it, but I suspect the reality could be more sinister...

C: 我是将军请来的公务员。
E: And I'm a civil servant — the general hired me.

C: 遵地衡司总务府的公文，「长乐天」目前会暂时封闭……
E: This is an announcement from the Realm-Keeping Commission General Bureau. Exalting Sanctum is temporarily closing its borders...

C: …一定是累糊涂了。
E: ...I think I need to take a break.

C: 叨扰了，请随意。
E: Sorry to bother you.

C: 惨了，师傅他…
E: This is bad, master, he...

C: 那个…闷葫芦，你准备好了就跟我说一声，咱们好出发。
E: Um... So, silent but deadly, let me know when you're ready and we can set off.

C: 闷葫芦，我这么叫你，你不会生气吧？
E: Silent but deadly... are you sure that nickname isn't annoying you?

C: 我爹我娘都是「曜青」的名人！…要不然也不会有我了，所以打我落生起，他俩就特别严格地教育我。
E: My parents are both famous on the Yaoqing! I wouldn't be here otherwise. They've been training me ever since I was born!

C: 还有别的问题…
E: I have other questions...

C: 我奉命殿后，马上也要撤离了，你也快点走吧。
E: I'm taking up the rear — I should be out of here soon. You guys should hurry.

C: 喂喂，{NICKNAME}，你怎么光顾着看起吃的来啦！
E: Hey {NICKNAME}, we're not on a food tour, remember?

C: 我们是她的客人…
E: We're her guests...

C: 刚刚有狐人女孩从这儿路过吗？
E: Did you see a foxian girl pass by here?

C: 雕虫小技。
E: Rudimentary.

C: 云骑军武器的一部分，被什么锐利之物削断了……
E: Shards of a Cloud Knight's weapon. Something really sharp caused this...

C: 星际和平公司的广告到处都是，是时候该问候一下他们的贸易专员了。
E: There are IPC advertisements everywhere. It's about time I got in touch with their trade commissioner.

C: 接下来，是想让我们上阵了？
E: Is this a segue into us joining the fray?

C: 「建木」是罗浮禁忌。仙舟联盟素来独立，「药王秘传」的人怎么也料不到将军敢请外援，当然也不会为了对付短生种而作准备。
E: The Ambrosial Arbor is taboo for the Luofu, and the Xianzhou Alliance has always been fiercely independent. The Disciples of Sanctus Medicus could never have guessed that the general would seek outside help — they won't be prepared against short-life species.

C: 符玄不在这儿？
E: Fu Xuan was here?

C: 恩公同「药王秘传」的人说过话了？你觉得他们如何？
E: Have you talked with these Disciples, benefactor? What do you make of them?

C: 真不必。嘻，小女子常年在宇宙中航行，别看年纪不小，实际满打满算也只有十几年阅历呢。
E: Hehe, there's really no need — I've spent my years traveling the universe! Not to mention, I'm younger and stronger than I look.

C: 嗯，时间正好。
E: Mm, right on time.

C: 当年，「建木」虽被帝弓司命斫断，寿瘟祸祖的诅咒仍有少许残留。为了将之封印，罗浮请动「不朽」龙裔的力量，使驯服「建木」残骸成了可能。
E: When the Reignbow Arbiter severed the Ambrosial Arbor, remnants of the curse of the Plagues Author lingered. In order to make the stemming of those remnants a possibility, the Luofu invoked the power of the Scions of Permanence.

C: 描绘龙尊形象的石雕早已历尽风蚀沧桑，靠近底座处镌刻了一行小字。
E: The statue of the High Elder has been greatly changed by years of weathering. There are small words engraved near its base.

C: 但我却依旧要等待蜕生降临的那一日，等上许久许久……
E: Still, I wait for the day of my rebirth... endless waiting...

C: 现在，我会揭开这最后的封印……
E: Now, I will break the final seal...

C: 是啊，我依稀记得需要依序触碰石灯，来逆转此地的封印。
E: That's right. From what I recall, we have to touch these stone lanterns in a particular sequence to unlock the seals in this area.

C: 荡涤妖邪！
E: Get back!

C: 将军的意思是想再见见其他几位？只怕…你们没有机会了。
E: It's almost as if you can't wait to be acquainted with them... I'm afraid you won't have the chance.

C: 如今她暂代将军职责，在与你们见面前，得对外布告情况，稳定人心。这便是成为将军的第一个考验了，希望这位大人能早些习惯。
E: She's temporarily taken on the general's responsibilities. Before meeting you, she must make the current situation known and fortify public spirit. This is her first real test as a general — I hope she can get used to things quickly.

C: …是的。罗浮灾变平息，港口恢复通航，停云小姐领了天舶司的使命，又要出使其他世界了。
E: ...Yes. Now that the crisis has been averted and the ports are resuming operations, Miss Tingyun has been dispatched on business with the Sky-Faring Commission... out to other worlds.

C: 停云姐姐，真希望你能喝到这杯茶……
E: I'm sorry you won't be able to try this tea, Miss Tingyun...

C: 就是长乐天的商业街呀。虽然最近因为星核降灾，人流稀疏了不少。
E: It's the main commercial street in the Exalting Sanctum, although it's a lot quieter since the whole Stellaron crisis thing.

C: 这…确实可以算得上是某种纪念品。但它可不是你到此一游能买回的小礼物。
E: It... could indeed be considered a souvenir of a certain variety. But not one you could find in a gift store.

C: 无名客的前路还很长，祝列车通途坦荡。那么，告辞了。
E: The Express and its passengers have a long voyage ahead of them. May that voyage be smooth and untrammeled. I bid you Farewell.

C: 对哦，咱们都还没和有些人告别呢。
E: Oh yeah, there are some people we haven't said goodbye to yet!

C: 外客初来乍到，逛的都是星槎海的宣夜大街。那儿名声在外，热闹是热闹，但要说好吃的好玩的地方哪儿多，还得去金人巷。
E: Tourists fresh off the starskiff always head to Starwatcher Avenue in Starskiff Haven — it's one of those bustling tourist streets... but if you want the real deal on local snacks, you gotta get to Aurum Alley. I've marked it out for you on your map.

C: 仙舟的旅程到此告一段落了，接下来咱们该按原计划前进了吧？
E: Our time on the Xianzhou has come to an end. Back to the original plan, I suppose?

C: 我想学，快教我。
E: Sure, if it's easy to learn.

C: 抱歉，彦卿一直让我好好躺着…没法早点来见各位。
E: My apologies, I couldn't get to you any sooner — Yanqing made sure that I was fully recuperated...

C: 要有新伙伴了？
E: Are we getting new crew mates?

C: 瓦尔特先生看起来很沮丧。
E: Mr. Yang, you seem disappointed.

C: …听、听起来是做噩梦了帕！才刚到阿斯德纳星系就碰见这种事…你可要多小心啊，看样子，你对忆质的抵抗力很差。
E: ...S—Sounds like you had a nightmare! We just arrived in Asdana and already... You should be careful, it seems your tolerance to memoria isn't the strongest.

C: 在你听来，或许会有些古怪，甚至失礼，但我想知道……
E: You may think it somewhat strange, perhaps even rude, but I wish to know...

C: 这取决于我要付出何种代价。
E: That depends on the price I'd have to pay.

C: 我没听错吧——行个方便？这话不该由我对各位说吗？
E: I must be hearing things: Paving a convenience? Shouldn't I be saying this to you instead?

C: 啊…您是在问我吗？嗯…还不错，这里人来人往，能听见许多客人讲起他们的冒险见闻。
E: Er... Are you asking me? Hmm... It's not too bad. Many guests come and go, and I get to hear all about their adventures.

C: 因为种种意外耽误了这么久，想必你也累坏了吧——开拓之余，也别忘了好好放松哦。晚安，做个好梦。
E: You must be exhausted from everything that's happened so far. Even if you're Trailblazing, you mustn't forget to relax. Goodnight, and sweet dreams.

C: {NICKNAME}——这是你的名字，对吧？很高兴认识你。
E: {NICKNAME}, this is your name, isn't it? Pleased to meet you.
Mmm...

C: （但为了增强体验，我可以对该梦泡进行调整，这意味着您可以选择以任何人的声线为其配音——只要您足够熟悉，我就可以将您的潜意识完美复现！）
E: (However, I can make some adjustments to the dream bubble to improve your experience, meaning you can choose anyone's voice for Akivili's. As long as it's a voice you're familiar with, I'll be able to replicate it in your subconscious!)

C: 那个把列车炸成两截的家伙帕。
E: That guy who blew up the train into two pieces.

C: 当然是我自己！
E: Myself, of course!

C: 那个把列车炸成两截的家伙帕。
E: That guy who blew up the train into two pieces.

C: 你们驾驶雪地车闯入泰科铵大球馆，扰乱会场秩序，致使比赛中断，并导致二十名开拓客和你们一起无偿劳动三个月，以修复大球馆外立面的严重损毁——
E: You rode snowmobiles into the Taikiyan Stadium and disrupted the match, causing the match to be suspended. Because of you, Twenty Trailblazers were forced to repair the severely damaged exterior of the stadium for three months without pay...

C: 放屁。你们再好好看看？目击报告说是个银色的家伙，你们给我抓银色头发的小姑娘？能是一回事儿吗？还和客人打上架了？！
E: That's nonsense. Take another look, will you? The witness report says that the suspect is a lad with silver hair, and you guys are going after a girl with silver hair. Does that even make sense? She's our guest!

C: 这里有匹诺康尼绝大多数的特色美食，像是钟表披萨、橡木蛋糕卷、苜蓿色拉…还有经典苏乐达！你随便挑吧，我买单！
E: Well, you can find all kinds of local delicacies here — Clockie Pizza, Oak Cake Rolls, Alfalfa Salad, and the classic SoulGlad! Feel free to pick anything you like! Today it's my treat!

C: 我救了一只有棱有角的小鸟。
E: I rescued a bird — a bird with sharp edges and points.

C: 怎么了？
E: What's up?

C: 我看看，先玩什么好呢……
E: Let me see which one we should try first...

C: 你认识这么一个人吗？酒红色外套，绿眼睛，深蓝色头发……
E: Do you know anybody like that? A maroon jacket, emerald eyes, dark blue hair...

C: 啊…他来了！
E: Ah... He's coming our way!

C: 你是不是想害我？
E: Is this a trap?

C: …我们会为你加油的，{NICKNAME}。
E: ...We'll cheer you on, {NICKNAME}.

C: 呀，{NICKNAME}，你变回来了！
E: Oh, {NICKNAME}! You're back!

C: 怎么会这样……
E: How did it come to this...

C: 呃…谢谢你们？
E: Um... Thank you?

C: 老大这是怎么了？
E: What's wrong with boss?

C: 嗯，「秘密据点」在里面。
E: Yes, it's right inside.

C: 我的故乡在很久以前就毁灭了，也许是军团干的，也可能是虫群…我是个星际难民，就和匹诺康尼的许多「本地人」一样。
E: My hometown was destroyed a long time ago. It was probably the doing of the Legion or the Swarm... I'm an interstellar refugee, just like many of the Penacony locals.

C: 在这座金碧辉煌的大都会中，有些人的梦名为匹诺康尼，而有些人的梦…却和现实无异，尽管每一个来到这里的普通人，最初都怀抱着相同的目的。
E: In this splendid metropolis, some have a dream called Penacony, but some have dreams... that are no different from reality, even though everyone who comes here harbors the same motive in the beginning.

C: 人们为何选择沉睡？我想……
E: Why do people choose to sleep? I think...

C: 两位大可去好好享受这灯红酒绿的梦境世界，而不是在这里陪我这样一个连垃圾桶都不如的家伙谈心。
E: You two should enjoy this fun and exciting Dreamscape, instead of talking to someone who is worse than a trashcan.

C: 唉，看来你根本没把我的劝告放在心上啊…真可惜，那姑娘就这么让你着迷？
E: It looks like you have not taken my warnings to heart... A pity. Are you so enchanted by that girl?

C: 而至于你——拯救了冰雪世界的开拓者…哎，「桑博」那家伙到底在雅利洛-Ⅵ的故事里掺了多少水啊？算了，会相信他的话是我的问题……
E: And as for you — the Trailblazer who saved the Ice World... I wonder how many things Sampo glossed over when recounting the happenings on Jarilo-VI? Oh well, it was my problem for trusting him...

C: 放入垃圾。
E: Insert trash.

C: 这个垃圾桶里有本漫画，书页已经残破不堪。它讲述了这么一场冒险：塔塔洛夫曾是一位勇桶。他凭借勇气和意志击败了废品巨怪，还从它口中救出了一个人类。
E: There's a comic book inside this trashcan. The pages are torn and damaged. It tells of an adventure: Tatalov was once a brave trashcan. With valiance and willpower, it defeated a colossal junk monster and saved a human from its monstrous maw.

C: 你似乎很了解她。
E: It seems you know her well.

C: 时钟…
E: Clocks...

C: 黑天鹅小姐，列车组愿意与你合作。在忆域中，我们需要一位合适的向导。
E: Miss Black Swan, the Express is willing to cooperate with you — we need a proper guide to navigate the Memory Zone.

C: 咦，怎么是你们？
E: Huh? What're you doing here?

C: 我的意思是，没问题。
E: I mean, no problem.

C: 「状况我了解了。请你务必带{NICKNAME}撤离到安全地点。如果有余裕，也可先行调查流萤一事。稍后在『钟表小子』雕像处会合。」
E: I understand the situation now. Please take {NICKNAME} and retreat to a safe location. If time allows, you can investigate Firefly's matter first. Meet later at Clockie's statue.

C: 尽是些*燃烧*的记忆…在这片深海中尤为突出呢。
E: They're all just *burning* Remembrances... a stark contrast to this deep sea.

C: 如果他的目的地也是那里——现场就不会留下任何线索了。
E: If his goal is that place as well, there won't be anything left there.

C: 我怎么知道你们不是想陷害我？
E: How would I know you're not trying to frame me?

C: 可惜这条路，最终通向「死亡」的巢穴……
E: Unfortunately, this path ultimately leads one to the lair of "Death."

C: 事到如今，你还觉得那位「巡海游侠」是局外人么？
E: Did you really think the Galaxy Ranger was an outsider this whole time?

C: 我没有别的问题了。
E: I don't have any other questions.

C: 你好，我是NPC。
E: Hello, I am an NPC.

C: 整理下现状吧，{NICKNAME}的话让我想起一些事。小三月，还记得和我们交涉的那位家族代表是怎么说的吗？
E: Let's recap everything then. {NICKNAME} just reminded me of something: March, do you remember what that Family rep who negotiated with us said?

C: 失礼了。我叫瓦尔特•杨，星穹列车的一员，相信你已见过我的同伴了。
E: Forgive me. My name is Welt Yang — I'm one of the Crew Members on the Astral Express. I believe you've met my colleagues.

C: …很敏锐的直觉，就连家族也没能点出这把手杖的真面目。
E: ...Keen intuition. Not even The Family managed to point out the truth behind this cane.

C: 没什么计划，随机应变。与人交涉的筹码无非两种：利益或者恐惧。
E: I don't have a plan. I'll just play it by ear. There are only two kinds of bargaining chips when dealing with people: Benefit or fear.

C: 如今，您高贵的身份反成了镣铐，让您无法出手缉拿凶手，为令妹报仇雪恨。您孤立无援，才会感到焦躁不堪。
E: Now, your noble status has become a shackle, preventing you from apprehending the murderer and avenging your sister's death. You're feeling anxious because you're out on a limb.

C: 不好意思……
E: Umm, excuse me...

C: 你懂个屁，这样效率才高，别让总监发现就行了！先斩后奏，懂不懂？
E: What do you know!? It's more efficient this way. Just don't let the director find out! Act first, report later, understood?

C: 至于两起案件…抱歉，我手上的信息也不多。详情只能拜托各位继续调查了。
E: As for the two cases... Apologies, but I don't have much info on them either. All I can do is ask you to keep digging for more details.

C: 我、我们无可奉告，请回吧。
E: W—We have nothing to report. Please leave.

C: <size=36>下班咯！你们谁也别想拦着我——！</size>
E: <size=36>Time to clock out! And no one's gonna stop meeee!</size>

C: 这只是个比喻，比喻！懂吗？！
E: That's just a metaphor. A metaphor! Don't you get it!?

C: 最后，我们退回了沙滩。
E: Finally, we retreated to the beach.

C: 就这些吧。
E: That's everything.

C: 但如今你却站在此处，这也就代表…那个男人失败了。
E: And yet, you stand here right now, which also means... that man failed.

C: ——但抱歉，不可能。奴隶，别忘了自己的身份，你压根没有上桌的资格。
E: Sorry, but that won't do. Don't forget your place, slave. You're not qualified to be at the table.

C: 不然呢？别太指望匹诺康尼电影业的基本盘…他们还管这种东西叫作「先锋艺术」呢，可笑吧？
E: Yeah, what else can you expect? Don't put too much stock in the Penacony movie industry... They even call this junk "groundbreaking art," can you believe it?

C: 「死亡」？这…倒是个令人害怕的字眼，和美梦很不相称。
E: "Death"? That's... a pretty scary topic, and it doesn't really match the mood of this sweet dream.

C: 呃…都不是。我只是想请教你，你有没有在梦境里听说过「死亡」？
E: Um... neither. I just wanted to know if you've ever heard about "Death" in the Dreamscape?

C: 哦，你这话说的，和我父亲一模一样…他告诉我危险无处不在，即便在梦中也不可掉以轻心。
E: Oh, you sound just like my father... Always warning me about danger even in dreams.

C: 这里洒满了筹码哎……
E: Hey, look at all these chips scattered everywhere...

C: 跟我走吧！我们一定能成为匹诺康尼最瞩目的明星，把光芒洒进梦境的所有角落！拜托了，舒翁，我需要你……
E: Come with me! We'll become the talk of Penacony, shining light into every corner of the Dreamscape! Please, Siobhan, I really need you...

C: 也许其他家主并不觉得「死亡」是什么大问题…家族内部也是互相掣肘，矛盾重重啊。
E: Maybe the other family heads don't think "Death" is a big deal... One thing's for sure — there's a lot of internal conflict within The Family, and everybody has their own agenda.

C: 也许你骗得了所有人，但唯独骗不了你自己。
E: Well you may have fooled everyone, but you can't fool yourself.

C: 兴许是那个翅膀头为了嘲讽你才故意放这的。好让你明白，你费劲布置的魔术大秀不过是垂死挣扎。
E: Maybe that winged guy put it here to taunt you. Just to make you realize that your painstakingly arranged magic show is nothing but a death rattle.

C: 你的脑子？是我们的脑子。你就是我，我就是你，不分彼此。
E: Your mind? It's our mind. You're me, and I'm you. We're the same.

C: 言犹在耳，对吧？你是个乖孩子，绝不会忘记。
E: The words still ring in your ears, don't they? You're a good kid, so you definitely won't have forgotten.

C: 剑走偏锋，那是一种极为荒诞的做法，但在你身上并不罕见。因为「自己的生命」向来是最先被你扔出的那枚筹码，一直如此。
E: The road less traveled is less traveled for a reason. But you've never gone in any other direction. Your own life is the chip you're most eager to lay down. Always has been.

C: 你看起来还是很紧张……
E: You still seem pretty nervous...

C: 各位，擦亮眼睛。对方显然是有备而来。
E: Everyone, pay attention. The other party has obviously come prepared.

C: 当然，不要小看「存护」。琥珀王的基石自会为我指明出路……
E: Don't underestimate the Preservation. The cornerstone of the Amber Lord will surely guide me...

C: 很遗憾，我没有证据。唯一能佐证这些猜想的，也只有家族面对「死亡」时的坦诚。他们对外来者太过慷慨，反而显得欲盖弥彰。
