E: Proof is the one thing I don't have. The only thing that can prove these... conjectures... is for The Family to come clean. And with the way they buttered up these outsiders, it seems pretty clear they're intent on covering their tracks.

C: 因为我的目标从始至终就是你，猎狗。他闹出的动静越大，我就越有机会让你和你{RUBY_B#「钟表匠」}真正的主人{RUBY_E#}血债血偿。
E: Because my target from the beginning has always been you, Hound. The more noise he makes, the more opportunities I have to make you and your {RUBY_B#The Watchmaker}true master{RUBY_E#} pay in blood!

C: 这能证明你和忆域迷因「死亡」是一丘之貉——已经足够了。
E: This proves that you and the Memory Zone Meme "Death" are linked — and that's enough.

C: 一定要好好拿着它，等到谐乐大典开幕，然后——在剧目的最高潮，和身边的人一同摁下这个按钮……
E: Make sure to take good care of it until the opening of the Charmony Festival. Then, when the show reaches its climax — press the button together with the others around you...

C: 有。
E: I do.

C: 一切回到了原点，你曾经从这里踏入「黄金的时刻」，也将从这里踏入真正的{RUBY_B#流放之地}「匹诺康尼」{RUBY_E#}。
E: We're back to where it all began. You entered the Golden Hour from this place, and it is also from here where you will enter the true {RUBY_B#Land of the Exiles}Penacony{RUBY_E#}.

C: 星核猎手也想要遗产吗？
E: Do the Stellaron Hunters also want a piece of the legacy?

C: 哈哈，懂了懂了，又一个不当心闯入这里的人，把他留在这吧。
E: Haha, I see, another poor guy who accidentally ended up here. I'll take care of him.

C: 哼，这都被你看出来了？难怪你敢跟梦主和四大家系对着干，看来我的选择是正确的。
E: So, you've figured out who I am, huh? No wonder you had the guts to go against the Dreammaster and the four Families. Looks like I made the right choice.

C: 你又在耍什么花招？
E: What's your trick this time?

C: 是生命，小姑娘。富丽堂皇的美梦建立于精神的死亡之上，名为「快乐」的毒酒淌过梦境，令人们沉溺其中，心智缓缓流向同一个终点，最终变成美梦的胎盘。
E: It's people's lives. The opulent dream is built upon the decay of spirits, with a toxic elixir called "pleasure" flowing through the Dreamscape. It tempts people to indulge in the Dreamscape, and gradually their minds succumb, becoming nourishment for the sweet dream.

C: 他恐怕是打算用这个装置来追踪你的动向，或是在需要的时候与你联络。没想到竟在这种场合帮上了大忙。
E: If I'm right, he intends to use it to track your location or contact you when needed. As it so happens, this may actually be of some use in the current situation.

C: 我把加拉赫带来了，是时候…面对「真相」了。
E: I brought Gallagher here. It's time... to face the "truth."

C: 好久不见啊，匹诺康尼最受瞩目的男人，橡木家系的次任家主…星期日先生？
E: Hey, long time no see, Mr. Sunday! The most esteemed individual in Penacony and... the next leader of the Oak Family, right?

C: 他们当年还劝我不要把家当全都卖掉，一门心思向着匹诺康尼…呸，真是目光短浅！
E: They told me not to sell everything I had just to come to Penacony... Tsk, how short-sighted!

C: 但这就是问题所在。如果这世上有些雏鸟，终其一生都无法飞翔，我们又怎能断言天空才是它们的归宿？
E: But here's the thing. If there are birds in this world that can never fly, can we really assert that they belong in the sky?

C: 「你是否能够发誓，保证自己必定履行一切所许，无论过往、现今，还是未来？」
E: "Do you swear to fulfill all vows, past, present and future?"

C: …祂看到了你的信念，并对你的信念表示认可。如此，即可证明——
E: ...THEY have seen your faith, and have endorsed your faith. With this, it can be evidenced—

C: 我在酒店转了一整圈，这么重要的家系，在这么重要的日子，我一个成员都没见到。
E: I walked around the hotel but didn't meet a single member of the Oak Family on such an important day.

C: 你认为这起事件背后，是希佩的意志在推动？
E: You think Xipe's will is behind all this?

C: 所以……
E: So...

C: 瞒不住啦，全匹诺康尼都贴满了咱们的海报…但正因为人人都认识星穹列车，家族才不敢轻举妄动。
E: Can't hide it anyways, Penacony is plastered with our posters... and because the Astral Express is so well-known, The Family won't dare to make any rash moves.

C: 呃…那我心灰意冷，离开匹诺康尼…可以吗？
E: Uh... I leave Penacony in utter disappointment... Is that okay?

C: 来吧，试着将这一幕的悲欣交集——用精准的演技传达给我吧！
E: Give it a shot. Try and convey this bittersweet scene to me — bring it to life with precise and emotive acting!

C: 哦，勇敢的哈努兄弟…你看起来需要帮助，呵呵。
E: Oh, brave Hanu... You look like you could really use some help.

C: 既然这样…我们就向终点进发吧。
E: In that case... let's make our way to the end.

C: 两位的台词功底真是无比深厚！预祝你们获得圆满的成绩！
E: The depth of your dialogue delivery is remarkable! Best of luck with your results!

C: 且慢！{M#英俊的先生，俏美的小姐}{F#两位俏美的小姐}——
E: Please wait! {M#Handsome gentleman, beautiful miss}{F#My beautiful ladies}...

C: 去吧，我的挚友，俏美的小姐，海选的桂冠属于你们！我将在此地遥望各位沐浴在聚光灯下，与观众们一道献上最诚挚的欢呼与喝彩。
E: Go forth, my dear friend, beautiful miss, the audition's crown is yours to claim! I shall remain here, gazing from afar as you bask in the limelight, joining the audience in offering you the most heartfelt cheers and applause.

C: <color=#dbc291ff>要保持沉默，任凭他在猎犬的追踪下苟延残喘，直到注定的裁决来临吗？</color>
E: <color=#dbc291ff>Or will you remain silent, leaving him to languish while the Hounds are hot on his heels, until his inevitable judgment arrives?</color>

C: {NICKNAME}，如果你对星期日先生的问题感到迷茫，就从自己的经历中寻找答案吧。
E: {NICKNAME}, if Mr. Sunday's question leaves you puzzled, you should find the answer from your own experiences.

C: 咦，好像确实是这样。
E: Huh? Oh... that does seem to be the case.

C: 也许钟表小子还有我们不知道的过去呢。
E: Perhaps Clockie has a hidden past.

C: 小三月，你还记得{NICKNAME}先前提到过，有个只有{M#他}{F#她}才能看见的钟表小子么？
E: March, do you remember when {NICKNAME} mentioned a "Clockie" that only {M#he}{F#she} could see?

C: （查看背包。）
E: (Check the inventory.)

C: 可不知怎的，他竟然擅自从梦泡里跑了出去，还把使命全都忘光了。抱歉，真是让各位看了一出笑话。
E: However, he somehow left the dream bubble and forgot all about his task. I apologize for all the confusion this caused.

C: 你…！你这家伙，每次到重要关头就掉链子。
E: You...! Every time an important moment arrives, you hesitate.

C: 哀伤么？我不这么认为。那女孩是笑着离开的，她从未对自己的选择感到后悔，也一定希望我能笑着和她道别…我的确是这么做的。
E: Condolences? I don't need them. The girl left with a smile. She never regretted her choice and most definitely wanted me to say goodbye with a smile... So that's what I did.

C: 我们言尽于此。动手吧，橡木家系的十万七千三百三十六道灵魂已梦见这一刻太多次了……
E: Well, that's where our conversation ends. Go ahead. The <unbreak>107,336</unbreak> souls of the Oak Family have dreamed of this moment too many times...

C: 距「谐乐大典」开幕9系统时 黄金的时刻
E: 9 system hours until Charmony Festival - Golden Hour

C: 「我应为我的新主歌唱，正如祂高贵的声音，也曾为银河而响。」
E: "I shall sing for my new master, just as THEIR noble voice once resonated throughout the Cosmos."

C: 愧不敢当！到底还是多亏了列车组的各位，否则这座美梦乐园还没等来和平，反教那群「秩序」残党捷足先登了……
E: You flatter me! But ultimately, it's been all down to the Express. Without your efforts, this Sweetdream Paradise would have been claimed by the last remnants of "Order" before there was even a shot at peace...

C: 哎，说来话长…不过，那位星期日先生是个体面人，没有对我们两个下狠手。
E: It's a long story... but, at least Mr. Sunday took it easy on us.

C: 发生什么事了？
E: What happened?

C: 它能够将你的记忆以最鲜活的形式刻录下来，然后…为我欣赏把玩，成为独一无二的回忆。
E: It can etch your memories in their most vivid form, and then... allow me to admire and manipulate them, turning them into unique mementos.

C: 瓦尔特•杨
E: Welt Yang

C: 黄泉
E: Acheron

C: 友情出演
E: Cameo Appearances

C: 你的意思是，只要能让大量的星际旅客跃迁至阿斯德纳星系，他们的自由意志就会掺入这片梦中，动摇它的根基……
E: So you mean, if we can attract a large number of outsiders to this system, their free will would intertwine with this dream and shake it to its core...

C: 很好。那么，请闭上眼睛吧……
E: Very well. Now, please close your eyes...

C: 那么在这道影子的背后，也一定存在着世间最猛烈的光源。
E: Then behind this shadow, there must exist the most fervent source of light in the world.

C: 距「谐乐大典」开幕<unbreak>12</unbreak>系统时 星穹列车
E: <unbreak>12</unbreak> system hours until Charmony Festival - Astral Express

C: 你在太一之梦里遭遇了什么？
E: What happened to you in Ena's dream?

C: 抱歉打扰二位谈话，家主已经准备好和战略投资部的代表会面了。
E: I apologize for interrupting your conversation, but the family head is ready to meet the ambassadors from the Strategic Investment Department.

C: 即便您的态度再坚决，现实的困局依旧存在，不是吗？
E: Despite your determined attitude, the issues plaguing Penacony are real, are they not?

C: 毕竟你分不清哪些人是清醒的，而哪些人在装睡。他们固然会在走投无路时睁开双眼，却也会在危险过去后，重新投入梦的怀抱。
E: After all, you don't know who's awake and who's pretending to be asleep. While they'll open their eyes in the face of danger, once the danger subsides, they'll embrace the sweet dream again.

C: 很熟练嘛。
E: You're pretty good at this.

C: 哈…哈哈…哈哈哈哈！！天无绝人之路，属于「赌圣史黛西」的时代终于要来了！
E: Ha... Ha... Hahaha!! Finally, my luck has turned for the better! A great new era for Stacy the Master Gambler has arrived!

C: 要是我赢了……
E: If I win...

C: 家族对外的说法是「谐乐大典遭遇来历不明的星核袭击，被迫中止」——毕竟「秩序」的事怎么也没法摆到台面上讲嘛。
E: The Family's official statement was like, "The Charmony Festival was attacked by an unidentified Stellaron and came to a halt." After all, they can't just reveal the truth about the Order.

C: 算了，上不得台面的事先放一边吧，别坏了谐乐大典的气氛。
E: Let's set aside those under-the-table dealings for now, pardner. Don't wanna spoil the festive mood of the Charmony Festival.

C: 即便实现如此非凡的成就，你也依旧谦逊平和…这是多么富有骑士精神的行为！
E: Even after achieving such remarkable feats, you remain humble and gentle... Such is the true mark of knightly grace!

C: （这声音是……）
E: (Who's that...)

C: 为了「同谐」，为了「开拓」，为了匹诺康尼与银河的未来，还为了慷慨大方的苜蓿草家主奥帝•艾弗法先生——
E: To Harmony, to the Trailblaze, to the future of Penacony and the universe, and to the generous Alfalfa Family Head, Mr. Oti Alfalfa...

C: 除了制造者，恐怕没人能让它停下来了。
E: Apart from its creator, I fear no one knows how to deactivate it.

C: 别急，还有很多人正在赶来。
E: Don't panic. There are still many people on their way.

C: 真的来得及吗？
E: Can you really make it in time?

C: 该怎么说，这位大叔真不愧是虚构史学家，我突然想起来，他在影视乐园还说自己只有十三岁呢，不会也意有所指吧？
E: What should I say... I mean this guy is definitely a history fictionologist all right. I'm suddenly reminded of the time at the theme park when he said he was only thirteen years old. Could that have meant something, too?

C: 结果，最后又绕回了这里。
E: In the end, we still came full circle.

C: 银河浩瀚，生命渺小，「开拓」的脚步从不停歇，但在宇宙的尺度下，普通人穷尽一生也只能走出一段短短的距离。
E: The universe is vast, and our lives are but specks. The Trailblaze never ends, but against the backdrop of the cosmos, the average person's lifelong journey is merely a short stretch.

C: 它能像这样大哭一场，在我看来反而是件好事。这证明帕姆没有被漫长的时光磨耗，它仍然无比珍视每一位登上过列车的无名客、珍视每段和他们共同经历的旅程。
E: The fact that they're crying so hard is probably a good sign. It proves that Pom-Pom's emotions haven't become dulled by the grind of time — they still deeply cherish every Nameless who has boarded the Express and value every journey shared with them.

C: 有话直说吧。取决于内容，我们也可能会请你下车。
E: Please speak candidly. Depending on what you say, we could very well ask you to disembark.

C: 当然不。我来是为了满足你妹妹的愿望，提供一份绝对优渥的交易——只看你愿不愿意接受而已。
E: Of course not. I merely came to fulfill your younger sister's wishes. To offer you a generous trade — that is, if you're willing to accept.

C: 怎么可能？相信猎犬。
E: How is that even possible? Have faith in those Bloodhounds.

C: 看来大家都已经等不及了，那就这么定了。我会向折纸大学递交入学材料，准备好了就出发，一定要玩得开心啊。
E: Looks like everyone can't wait. Let's go ahead with that plan, then. I will submit the admission documents to Paperfold University. We'll leave once everyone is ready. Let's all have some fun.

C: 舒适的沙发，躺着就会感到昏昏欲睡，希望这次旅途不会把你送进一场奇怪的梦里。
E: A comfy couch that makes you drowsy as soon as you lie down on it — let's just hope this trip doesn't send you into another strange dream.

C: 我是盛会海选的巨星。
E: I'm the Superstar from the Festivity Auditions.

C: 蕉蕉蕉！
E: Bana bana!

C: 蕉蕉蕉蕉~
E: Ba na na na~

C: 在忍侠守护下，城中百姓安居乐业，一片欣欣向荣，连忍之都的下水道都会溢出幸福的气息。
E: Under the protection of the Ninja Hero, the people of the city thrived. They lived and worked in peace and happiness could be felt even in the sewers of the Ninja Capital.

C: 对，是我。
E: Yes, that's me.

C: 嗯…咦？
E: Uh... Huh?

C: 当然没——没能拒绝。他说我在筑梦学院会遇见「充满戏剧张力」的未来，煞有介事的，可太令人好奇了。
E: Of course I — did. He was all serious when he said I would encounter a future "full of dramatic tension" in Dreamweaver Academy. It made me really curious.

C: 然后…我们要加入一些「情绪」，赋予甜品特别的口感，这也是梦境烹饪的特点……
E: Next, we'll add some "emotions" to give the dessert its unique texture. This is also a feature unique to Dreamscape cooking...

C: 呃，是你认识的人？
E: Uh, do you know her?

C: 那谁说了算？米凯都没说什么…还要磨磨蹭蹭的？
E: Then who should we listen to? Micah hasn't said anything! There's no reason to delay.

C: 那…最可能是睡蕉小猴名言的是哪一句？
E: Which of the following is most likely to be a famous quote by Slumbernana Monkey?

C: 和我感知到的一样，笼罩流梦礁的弯曲杂音并未消失。
E: I sense the same. There is still a discordant static on Dreamflux Reef.

C: 恰恰相反。在流梦礁，那是绝不可能发生的。
E: On the contrary, that's something that will never happen in Dreamflux Reef.

C: 呦，瞧瞧这是谁来了。
E: My, my, my, look who's here!

C: 这个学生露出了痛苦的神色，似乎在为什么事情感到苦恼。
E: The student has a pained expression, as if something is troubling him.

C: 筑梦蕉师摇头晃脑，发出上课铃的声音，周围的同学们都聚了过来。
E: The dreamweaving BananAdvisor sways their head. The class bell rings, drawing all the students around.

C: 别念叨了，嘴是用来吃香蕉的，不是用来筑梦的——白卷！0分！
E: Alright, that's enough. Mumbling won't weave you any dreams, you're better off snacking on bananas with that useless trap of yours. Zero points for turning in nothing!

C: 各位同学，真是抱歉，是校方没看护好这些*蕉师*，给大家添麻烦了。
E: The university failed to take these BananAdvisors in hand. Please accept my apology for the distress they brought upon you.

C: 但只要在梦里待上一阵子，就会发现这是句彻头彻尾的空话，逐梦客很快就会在奔波劳碌中倒下，游客也会在一场场狂欢后疲倦。
E: Unfortunately, a couple of days in the Dreamscape is all it takes for them to realize this is nothing more than a fantasy. Dreamchasers soon give in to exhaustion and tourists eventually grow weary from the endless festivities.

C: 财富蕉师，您不是让我来取货吗？可这里什么都没有啊。
E: Uh, Fortune BananAdvisor? Aren't we supposed to pick up more stock? I don't see anything here.

C: 蕉蕉蕉，因为就在几天前，他来过这里，想看看你过得如何。
E: Bana bana! He swung by a few days ago to check on how you're doing.

C: 什、什么？您怎么能这么做？！
E: Wh—What? How could you!

C: 他似乎也停止运作了。
E: Looks like he completely malfunctioned.

C: 原始博士爱吃香蕉吗？
E: Is Dr. Primitive obsessed with bananas?

C: 蕉、蕉蕉蕉……
E: Bana, bana, bana...

C: 怎么全是小猴在叫？
E: Why is everything monkey gibberish?

C: 这角色都没写台词！
E: This character doesn't even have lines!

C: 蕉？蕉蕉蕉，看来*蕉学*开始起效了呀。
E: Bana? Bana, bana! Looks like the banacademics is taking effect.

C: 我一定不会让您失望的！
E: I—I will live up to your expectations!

C: 接下来，我们能见到「真正的睡蕉小猴」。
E: In just a bit, we'll get to see the actual Slumbernana Monkey in the flesh.

C: 阿尔冈-阿帕歇有句俗话：「死亡是最公平的爱护」。
E: There's a saying from Aeragan-Epharshel: "Death is the fairest form of grace."

C: 蕉？
E: Bana?

C: 拜见苦茶大师。秘咒…已被在下破解。
E: Salutations, Master Kucha. I have... deciphered the enchantment.

C: 你拜入师门已有五年，不惧苦修的熬煎，不畏试炼的艰险，百般忍法皆已精娴。
E: You've trained under me for five years. After rigorous tests and trials, you've mastered hundreds of ninja techniques.

C: 可否，助你一臂之力…？
E: Might I... lend you a hand?

C: 唉，你把副导演弄伤心了。这粗鄙的台词风格真得改改才行。
E: You've hurt the feelings of the assistant director. You really should work on changing your crude way of delivering lines.

C: 每位忍侠都有自己的「猎物」，银枪•修罗殿下此次只是人情相助，当下已去继续他的狩猎了。
E: Each Ninja Hero has their own prey. Silvergun Shura only came to repay a favor, after which he returned to his own hunt.

C: ——关于原始博士的去向。
E: ...about where Dr. Primitive went.

C: 蕉蕉蕉…实验的成果有所损坏，但用来清除害虫也足够了……
E: Banahaha... Despite the imperfections in the experimental results, it's more than sufficient for eliminating you pests...

C: 邪祟退却——超•正觉彩墨绽！
E: Fiendlings, be gone! Super Brilliant Enlightenment!

C: 蕉！蕉糕…睡蕉小猴的力量都不见了……
E: Bana wha! Holy bananas... The power of the Slumbernana Monkey has disappeared...

C: {NICKNAME}•忍者未能抵御邪祟的妖术蛊惑，{F#她}{M#他}的开拓•忍道——就此断绝！
E: Ninja {NICKNAME} was unable to resist the allure of fiendlings' evil. {F#Her}{M#His} trailblazing way of the ninja has now been severed!

C: 我来到这里…是为了接过你的命运。
E: I've come here... to take on your fate.

C: 准备好，迈德漠斯。
E: Get ready, Mydeimos.

C: 将世界推入死雾的是鲁莽和犹疑，而非悬置的神性。
E: It is foolhardiness and indecision, not the unclaimed seat of divinity, that pushes this world into the deathly fog.

C: 星核猎手？
E: The Stellaron Hunters?

C: 哈！终于发狂，可憎的狗蝇。一同毁灭吧，与你们的疯王，在那战场的旋涡中！
E: Hah! Finally gone mad, despicable vermin have. With your mad king, perish together, in that maelstrom of battle!

C: 神悟树庭是什么样的地方？
E: What is the Grove of Epiphany?

C: 小蝶真是心灵手巧，人家也想学……
E: Cas has such nimble fingers. I want to learn too...

C: 这几日相处下来，我好像也渐渐能听懂它话中的含义了…虽然只是一小部分。
E: After spending the last few days together, I feel like I'm gradually gaining the ability to understand what they're saying... even if it's just a little.

C: （这照片真该得个奖…不愧是我。）
E: (I never fail to impress... This photo deserves an award!)

C: 阁下，这种话…等下进去以后可千万不要说。
E: Um... Please don't speak such words once we're in the confines of the Grove.

C: 如此重要的外交事务，她绝不可能怠慢。
E: There is no way she would have neglected such an important diplomatic matter.

C: 那里…黑色的…好像动起来了？
E: That... black thing... seems to be moving?

C: 小小蝶，说得对！那，勇敢的缇安，先给大家开路！
E: Mm-hmm! In that case, brave Trianne shall clear the way for all of you!

C: 还是不必费力了，阁下。{RUBY_B#门径之泰坦}雅努斯{RUBY_E#}的力量…远比我们想象的更强韧。
E: Save your energy. {RUBY_B#Passage Titan}Janus{RUBY_E#}'s power... is far stronger than we could ever imagine.

C: 那刻夏老师也确实还活着，并且就在启蒙王座…至少这件事上，卡吕普索阁下并没有说谎。
E: Anaxa is indeed still alive, and he's at the Luminary Throne right now... It seems like Lady Calypso did not lie regarding this.

C: 可能是…那位那刻夏用「炼金术」留下的，想教我们做事？
E: Maybe... Anaxa left it behind using alchemy, in order to guide us?

C: 好像…就在高一点的地方，我们前面不远处。
E: It seems to be... a little higher and a little ahead of us.

C: 终于出现了…卡吕普索阁下。
E: You finally appeared... Lady Calypso.

C: 嗯？蝴蝶的振翅声……
E: Hmm? The sound of a butterfly's wings...

C: 呵…眼睛看不见了啊……
E: Ha... My eyes can no longer see...

C: 糟了，是他，那悬锋城的王储……
E: Drat! It's the crown prince of Castrum Kremnos...

C: 你、你们想干嘛？！
E: Wh—What are you up to!?
...Understood.

C: …缇安又使用了「百界门」。
E: ...Trianne used the Century Gate again.

C: 小…心……
E: Watch... out...

C: …那些被杀气震晕的浴客，我们会送他们离开的。
E: ...We will personally escort back home the customers left awestruck by our formidable presence.

C: 如何，这就是享用整座浴场的滋味。
E: So, how is the feeling of having the entire bath to yourselves?

C: 哈，这次护送浴客是我赢了。
E: Ha, I win this round of escorting the bathers home.

C: …在{RUBY_B#纷争之泰坦}「天谴之矛」{RUBY_E#}的试炼里。
E: ...And in the trial from the {RUBY_B#Strife Titan}Lance of Fury{RUBY_E#}.

C: 缇宝老师？发生了什么，竟然让你如此惊慌？
E: Lady Tribbie? What's making you so flustered?

C: 真是嘈杂…奥赫玛还是老样子啊。
E: All this noise and commotion... Okhema hasn't changed a bit, has it?

C: 哎哟，你瞧我，都老糊涂了。我那俩争气的女儿，早就毕业啦，现在在树庭做学者呢。你说我，年纪大了，总是一个晃神，就看到好多年前的事情。
E: Alas, forgive this old brain of mine. Both of my daughters graduated long ago, and they are now scholars at the Grove. As I get older, memories from years past tend to blend together.

C: 那泰坦自顾自对我做了一番手脚…到现在脑袋还是隐隐作痛。如果可能，我不想在这聒噪的城里再多晃悠一秒。
E: That Titan made a myriad of adjustments on their own... My head still aches from that. I don't want to stay a second longer in this noisy city if I can.

C: 你很清醒，因此才无比孤独。聪明的人，只能选择与世俗沉沦。
E: You have a clear head, which is why you're also incomparably alone. A smart person can only choose to tangle himself with the mundane of this world.

C: 不用不用，交给*我们*。你先休息会儿，很快的，*我们*准备好了就来叫你。
E: It's fine. Leave it to us. You should rest for now. It won't take long, and we will call you once it's done.

C: 嗯。它也是雅努萨波利斯的象征物之一。如果要复现记忆，*我们*最好能有一些历经当年岁月的事物做基底……
E: Yes. It's also a symbol of Janusopolis. If we are to replicate memories, we need to use something that has experienced those days...

C: 莫非，*我们*已经被{RUBY_B#岁月之泰坦}欧洛尼斯{RUBY_E#}发现，踏入了它的考验？
E: Is it possible that we were already noticed by {RUBY_B#Time Titan}Oronyx{RUBY_E#} and entered their trial?

C: {RUBY_B#岁月之泰坦}欧洛尼斯{RUBY_E#}的性格反复无常，就像是一名孩童。也许…是存心想要作弄*我们*吧。
E: {RUBY_B#Time Titan}Oronyx{RUBY_E#} has the whims of a child. Perhaps... they're toying with us on purpose.

C: 真是的…玩闹也要看场合呀。
E: Come on... This isn't the right time to be playing games.

C: 但此刻，当我以「神」的身份重新俯瞰这段历史——我终于看清了一切。
E: Yet, gazing upon our history through the lens of my newfound divinity, I now see it with unprecedented clarity.

C: 你杀死了我们所有人……
E: You have killed us all...

C: 现在，轮到我与之抗争了。
E: It's now my turn to fight against it.

C: 如此漫长的岁月里，你一直在苦苦寻找它。但你从未想过找我做些尝试么？
E: You have been painstakingly seeking that Titan for so long, but have you ever considered reaching out to me for help?

C: 哼，早该料到是你。
E: Hmph, I should've known you were the mastermind behind this.

C: …谁说不是呢。
E: ...You're right.

C: 为了荣耀，孩子。悬锋人一出生便认得剑和矛，战场是我们的归宿……
E: It is for glory and honor, my son. For Kremnoans, mastery of swords and spears is ingrained from birth, and the battlefield is our destined end.

C: 愿尼卡多利捍卫你。
E: May Nikador defend you.

C: 我身为神盾旅的冠军勇士之首，曾手持这面圆盾，在黑潮面前为国王保驾护航，千千万万次……
E: As the leader of the Godshield Brigade's elite, I protected the king against the black tide with this very shield. And I've done this over and over, hundreds and thousands of times...
Well...

C: …可以呀。
E: ...Alright.

C: 往世的入口——为我们洞开！
E: The entrance to the past — Open for us!

C: 有多久？
E: How long?
Hmph...

C: 这人…是个商人世家的纨绔子弟。整日游手好闲，只会在圣殿周围晃来晃去，捡些朝圣者遗落的贡品来拿去做买卖…偶尔还会顺走*我们*的小发明。
E: This man... he's a good-for-nothing son of a merchant family, loitering around the temple and cashing in on the pilgrims' lost tributes. He even swipes our inventions now and then.

C: 「{RUBY_B#门径之泰坦}雅努斯{RUBY_E#}宝库」是？
E: The {RUBY_B#Passage Titan}Janus{RUBY_E#} Vault?

C: 当然，泰坦。就让这预言将我打碎——
E: Without a doubt, Titan. Let the prophecy shatter me —

C: 怎么回事？圣女大人，那个亵渎火种的盗贼在哪里？
E: What's happening here? Lady Maiden, where's the thief who stole the Coreflame?

C: 那可真是一件大喜事哪。
E: That's certainly worth celebrating.

C: 而如今，史无前例的匹诺康尼第一届「圣杯战争」即将开幕，{NICKNAME}又再度回到了所有人的视线之中！
E: And now, with the unprecedented First Penaconian Holy Grail War about to kick off, {NICKNAME} is back in the spotlight!

C: 助理，快请这两位游客一边儿呆着去！
E: Assistant, get these two out of here!

C: 嗯？你怎么这么惊讶？我是不应该参加吗？
E: Huh? Why do you sound so shocked? Am I not supposed to?

C: （惊讶）她？（冷静）还真是意外的重逢。
E: (surprised) Her? (calm) Well, that is an unexpected reunion.

C: 谢谢你，不必费心介绍了，就这个「天环翅堡」吧。
E: Thank you, but no need to explain. We'll go with the Halovian Winged Burger.

C: 无需担心，不会有半点痛苦。请诸位剥离舞台上的炽烈激情与雄心壮志…就像帷幕后的演员们卸去脸上疲惫与妆容那样…好好休息。
E: Fear not. There will be no pain. Please leave your passion and ambitions on the stage, like how actors shed their fatigue and makeup behind the curtains... and rest.

C: 是有想去的地方吗？
E: Is there somewhere you want to go?

C: 这真是…就算遭逢困苦，你也还是继续着自己美好的旅程，如果生前的我也能这样就好了。
E: Well... Even in the face of hardship, you are still continuing on your wonderful journey. I wish I did that in my life.

C: 现在，她将我带回了做出选择的时刻……
E: She's brought me back to the moment I made my choice...

C: 我是个无名客了吗？
E: That I'm a Nameless?

C: 即便拔起它意味着不幸的结局…你们这些人也会照做不误吗？
E: Would you still pull this weapon out, even if it'll bring about a tragic end?

C: 握住球棒。
E: Grab the bat.

C: 这是我们共同的决定！
E: We made this choice together.

C: （波提欧他们也出来了，要不去看看他们的状况？）
E: (Boothill and the others got out too. Should I go check on them?)

C: 哼，匹诺康尼这块铜臭之地的规矩管不了我。Lancer，我们去收拾收拾那个老可爱。
E: Hmph. These Penaconian rules stinkin' of money won't keep me down. Lancer, let's go take care of that old fudger.

C: 看看周围有没有异常。
E: Scan the surroundings and look for anything unusual.

C: 事先声明，我是持反对意见的。耐不住有两个傻子要来探个究竟。
E: Just so we're clear, I was against this from the start. But those two blockheads insisted on investigating.

C: 呃…不必惊慌，制片人。我不是什么了不得的传奇英雄，你大可问问他们，葛瑞迪这个名字在匹诺康尼意味着什么？
E: Uh... don't panic, Producer. I'm not some legendary hero or anything like that. Just ask them. What does "Grady" even mean in Penacony?

C: 终于来了，正好让你的朋友们也欣赏欣赏你的丑态。
E: Finally. And right on cue. Let your friends get a good look at how far you've fallen.

C: 正确答案是，就能聚合成原本的形态。只要你们能从恶魔们的诅咒中活下来。
E: The correct answer is: She'll merge back into her original form. That is... if you survive the curses from the devils.

C: 在审判你们之前，有颗不听话的棋子需要优先处理——斯科特，如此卑鄙无耻的你，竟会站到他们那边。
E: Before I judge you all, I must first deal with a disobedient pawn — Skott, how utterly despicable that you'd side with them.

C: 摸鱼要扣绩效的。
E: Slacking off will cost you on your performance review.

C: 七个人会不会更强一些？
E: Wouldn't seven of her be more powerful anyway?

C: 领衔主演
E: Lead Actors

C: 我甚至有些怜悯你，在真正的天才面前一败涂地的，导演葛瑞迪。
E: I'm even feeling a little bad for you now, Director Grady. You were thoroughly outclassed by true auteurs.

C: 我竟给各位留下了如此奇怪的印象么……
E: I can't believe I've left everyone with such a peculiar impression of me...

C: 我就会哦？很久以前，有一个大姐姐…就带我飞到过很高很高的地方呢。
E: I can, I can fly! A long, long time ago, a big girl flew with me really high into the sky!

C: 您是要我通过这里？我…要和它对抗吗？
E: You want me to go through here? Do I have to... fight it?

C: 随我一同，行向群星。
E: Follow me, to the stars.

C: 于我而言，它是否「无疑」？
E: Is it "inevitable" for me?

C: 独轮飞车。
E: Unicycler.

C: 看您仪表堂堂，内心倒可爱得像个孩子。是白露大人会喜欢的装饰，就依您的主意啦。
E: You carry yourself with such dignity and grace, but you still have the heart of a child. Lady Bailu loves these types of accessories. Let's go with your suggestion.

C: 这是为您准备的梦泡，请收好。期待您下次光临。
E: Here are the dream bubbles I've prepared for you. Thank you for your business!

C: 嗯，已经聊过一会儿了，正巧是你们的熟人。
E: Yes, we've been chatting for a while. Turns out, she's an old acquaintance of yours.

C: 是我主动要求的，毕竟…回来的人是你。
E: I wanted to come because... after all, it's you who's coming home.

C: 不，这一站只是为了告别。我中途改变了某个决定，此行变数太多……
E: No, I'm just here to bid farewell. I changed my mind along the way. This journey has too many variables...

C: 再添一桩也无妨。
E: So it shouldn't matter if we add another.

C: 走吧。如果我不能迈出这一步…启程也无从谈起。
E: Let's go. Our journey can't begin if I can't take this first step.

C: 唉，真讨厌这副面孔啊，感觉表情都生动不起来。
E: I really hate this face. My expressions feel so dull and lifeless.

C: 我也曾是个孩子，有过深埋在心底的种种念想。那些童年的声音伴随我长大，逐渐被时光磨平，几不可闻。
E: I, too, was once a child, with aspirations buried deep within. Over time, those childhood voices grew increasingly faint.

C: 而这也意味着万维克会彻底消失。所以我才说，这是最后一站。
E: And this also means that Wonweek will vanish for good. That's why I said this was the last stop.

C: 阿基维利也没去过的世界，智库里一点资料都没有…但如果这趟「开拓」成功，燃料问题就解决了！
E: A planet not recorded in the data bank and a world even Akivili has never set foot on... But if this trailblazing expedition works out, it could solve our fuel problem!

C: 但这一次，或许我们有机会在星图上留下一个全新的站点，我也有些摩拳擦掌了。
E: But this time, we might just get the chance to add a brand-new stop to the astral charts. I don't mind telling you — I'm a little excited.

C: 嘘！别打岔，我在检查人偶的状态。#2757……
E: Shh! Don't distract me when I'm checking the puppet's parameters. #2757...

C: （命途狭间…不是由模拟宇宙构建出来的虚拟情景，而是真实的、可以触及的……）
E: (The Path Space... This isn't a figment of the Simulated Universe, but a perfectly tangible and accessible space...)

C: 黑塔女士，<color=#dbc291ff>我们是为「翁法罗斯」而来。</color>
E: <color=#dbc291ff>We're here because of Amphoreus</color>, Madam Herta.

C: 尤其是在亲眼见证后，如果翁法罗斯真的与星神、命途，乃至「智识」密切相关，我们需要天才的智慧。
E: If Amphoreus is indeed inextricably entwined with Aeons, Paths, and even the Erudition, we're going to need the wisdom of a genius to help us. Especially now that we've seen the planet for ourselves.

C: <color=#dbc291ff>对我们而言十分重要的两位同伴，在进入翁法罗斯后便杳无音讯。</color>
E: <color=#dbc291ff>We've lost all contact with two indispensable companions since they entered Amphoreus.</color>

C: 目前我们与本地人颇有隔阂，不如先顺着白厄的想法。私下独处时，也探探那位名叫缇宝的女孩态度如何吧。
E: There's a rift between us and the locals, so let's play along with Phainon for now. We can also learn what Tribbie thinks when we're alone with her.

C: 对了！维尔图斯他们是雅努萨波利斯的祭司，里拉琴一定弹得很好，不如为两位朋友弹奏一曲。
E: Right! Virtus and the others are priests from Janusopolis. They should be adept at playing the lyre. How about playing a song for our two friends?

C: 我俩也被算进去了？
E: He even included the two of us!

C: 看对面，好壮观的城门。
E: Hmm, now that's one monumental city gate.

C: 这样的日子什么时候是个头……
E: When will this end...?

C: 看着还挺信任他？劝你们三思。
E: You trust him that much? I suggest you think twice.

C: 遐蝶散发出的阴冷气息令你感到不妙，冥冥之中，似乎有一大片黑暗将要把你吞没……
E: The chilling aura emanating from Castorice fills you with unease. In the depths of your mind, it feels as though an overwhelming darkness is about to engulf you...

C: 什么声音？！
E: What's that sound!?

C: 看来在奥赫玛，英雄和平民的地位并不对等。
E: Seems like prophesied heroes and civilians aren't treated equally in Okhema.

C: 「我凭什么相信你呢？」这话第一时间自你的内心萌生。但无论如何，你和丹恒需要跟本地人搞好关系，完成「开拓」之旅。
E: "Why should I trust you?" That was your immediate response. However, you and Dan Heng need to build good relationships with the locals to complete your trailblazing journey.

C: 喔！你们就是白厄阁下从边疆带来的战士吧？
E: Oh! Are you the warriors that followed Lord Phainon back from the frontier?

C: 嗯，这大概是黄金裔的共识。
E: Yes, there must be some kind of understanding among the Chrysos Heirs.

C: 认真地讲，*我们*都觉得两位降临在…咳咳，来到奥赫玛绝非偶然。上手就能和{RUBY_B#岁月之泰坦}欧洛尼斯{RUBY_E#}共鸣的祭司，缇宝老师也是第一次见。
E: You know, we are pretty certain there's more to your sudden... arrival to Okhema. And Tribbie has never seen a priest achieve resonance with {RUBY_B#Time Titan}Oronyx{RUBY_E#} on their first try.

C: ——两位，在做什么呢？
E: What are you two doing up here?

C: …别挑剔了。
E: ...Don't be so nitpicky.

C: …它好像听懂了，只是懒得理你。
E: ...It seems to have understood you, but it's choosing to ignore you.

C: 嗡嗡…呜嗡嗡！
E: Grumph... Grumphhh!

C: 要回云石天宫么？还是在下边多逛一会儿，你来决定吧。
E: Should we return to Marmoreal Palace? Or do you want to wander around for a bit more?

C: 我听过这个名字，但从未见过其人。只听他人评价，他必定是个十足的疯——
E: I've heard of him but have never met him in person. Others have said that he's completely crazy—

C: 你想的没错——
E: You're right...

C: 怎、怎么能说是捏造呢？那顶多就是一些…呃…加工！艺术加工！
E: H—How can you call that a fabrication? At most, it's just a little... umm... reinterpretation! Artistic reinterpretation!

C: 是温水。
E: It's lukewarm.

C: 先借用扎格列斯之手尝试通过{RUBY_B#岁月之泰坦}欧洛尼斯{RUBY_E#}的考验吧。
E: Firstly, try to pass {RUBY_B#Time Titan}Oronyx{RUBY_E#}'s trial with the Hand of Zagreus.

C: 达米亚诺斯，果然是他！我们快追上去。
E: It's really Damionis! Let's give chase.

C: 你想送出一个正面的承诺，却无法呈上与之匹配的决心…记作一步。
E: Although you attempted to make a promise, your resolve didn't match your response... A step will be recorded.

C: 啊…又多了一件需要解释的事。别担心，翁法罗斯最深的秘密都藏在这儿了。
E: Ah... one more thing to explain. Let's not worry about that for now. You'll soon find out that Amphoreus' deepest secrets are all hidden here.

C: 她们两位，也是如今圣城中唯二的「半神」。
E: And they are the only two demigods in the holy city.

C: 讨伐{RUBY_B#纷争之泰坦}尼卡多利{RUBY_E#}一战，只要能获得成功…想必阿格莱雅也不会再质疑什么了。
E: Once we triumph in the battle against {RUBY_B#Strife Titan}Nikador{RUBY_E#}... that should dispel Aglaea's doubts.

C: 你我终有一日要退出这舞台，翁法罗斯的命运将被移交至他人之手…<color=#dbc291ff>那是你看到的未来，不是吗？</color>
E: You and I will eventually step off the stage and leave Amphoreus' fate in the hands of others... <color=#dbc291ff>That's the future you foresee, isn't it?</color>
...Yeah.

C: 有一阵了。外面太亮，我睡不沉…从抵达圣城开始，天空就一直这么明亮。
E: Yes, I wake up easily when it's too bright outside... The sky has been like this since we arrived at the holy city.

C: 像是动物的叫声，但能听懂。
E: It sounded like an animal, but somehow, I could understand it.

C: 照白厄说的，去灵水盆前冥想吧。
E: Let's go meditate in front of the spirit basin like Phainon told us.

C: {RUBY_B#纷争之泰坦}尼卡多利{RUBY_E#}
E: {RUBY_B#Strife Titan}Nikador{RUBY_E#}

C: 你没学过祷言吗？
E: You never learned the prayer?

C: 我来击碎它——
E: Let me smash it—

C: 我该怎么假装这只是一场普通的战斗？
E: But how can I pretend that this is just an ordinary battle?

C: 看好你自己吧，这底下可是无尽深渊。
E: Worry about yourself. There's an endless abyss below us.

C: 看，有人快等得不耐烦了。
E: Look, someone's getting impatient.

C: 她是非常重要的伙伴。
E: She is an important friend.

C: 那是…泰坦在说话，我想应该是{RUBY_B#岁月之泰坦}欧洛尼斯{RUBY_E#}。
E: I believe that was a Titan speaking... I believe it was {RUBY_B#Time Titan}Oronyx{RUBY_E#}.

C: 站在我们的立场，有一样宝物比这个世界——甚至比整片星空——更加重要。
E: From our perspective, there is something even more important than this world, or perhaps even the entire cosmos.

C: 总是在刀尖上旋舞的话，意外迟早会找上我们…卡芙卡。
E: Dancing on the razor's edge all the time, it's only a matter of time before disaster catches up with us... Kafka.

C: 我想，即便是星核猎手也需要一个「撤退信号」，用来应对危机的局面。
E: I suppose even Stellaron Hunters could use a retreat signal to respond to dire circumstances.

C: 流萤转头看向你，流露出的表情与你印象中的那位少女有些许不同——更加忧郁，更加幽深。
E: Firefly turns to you, her expression slightly different from the girl you remember — more melancholic, more profound.

C: 目光，注视。窗外，冰冷。
E: Gaze, watching. Outside, cold.

C: 有没有人能给我解释一下？
E: Can anyone explain this to me?

C: 一起…伙伴？
E: Together... Friend?

C: 再见了，{NICKNAME}。
E: Goodbye, {NICKNAME}.

C: 杀戮的音乐，多动听啊。
E: The melody of slaughter, how beautiful.

C: 真对不起，阿雅…如果*我们*能再成熟些，就不用让你一个人承担所有了……
E: So sorry, Agy... If we were more mature, you wouldn't have to face all this alone.

C: *我们*明白啦…阿雅，你要量力而为呀。
E: We got this! Don't exhaust yourself, Agy.

C: （轻轻触碰女孩的肩膀。）
E: (Gently touch the girl's shoulder.)

C: （用指尖扫过女孩的长发。）
E: (Run your fingertips through the girl's hair.)

C: （我的…我的髀石护身符，掉进可怕的东西里面了……）
E: (M—My knucklebone talisman fell into this really frightening place...)

C: 如此也好。若他果真是被命运选中的孩子……
E: So be it. If indeed he is fate's chosen child...

C: 万敌阁下已经带着族人投奔了奥赫玛；旧王欧利庞仍然在世，但{RUBY_B#纷争之泰坦}尼卡多利{RUBY_E#}却陷入了沉眠；悬锋城正在召集勇士，召开祭典……
E: Lord Mydei has gone to seek refuge in Okhema with some of his people. Old King Eurypon still reigns, though {RUBY_B#Strife Titan}Nikador{RUBY_E#} has fallen into a slumber. And Castrum Kremnos is now gathering warriors from all over in preparation for their festival...

C: 真正的挑战来了…艰难的部分才刚开始。
E: Now the true challenge begins... This is where it gets difficult.

C: 回头看看那些碎裂的尸骸，女孩——你能毫不犹豫地杀死那些战士，却要怜悯这只肮脏的狗鼠？
E: Turn around, girl. Look at the corpses of those we crushed. You can cut down warriors without a second thought, yet you show compassion to this scum?

C: 我们需要拯救…需要一位勇士带给我们希望啊。
E: We need salvation... we need a champion to reignite our hope.

C: 懦弱——他们惧怕失去信仰和指引。
E: Out of cowardice. They are afraid of losing their faith and guidance.

C: 两位阁下，请你们找到让{RUBY_B#纷争之泰坦}尼卡多利{RUBY_E#}的灵魂重归完整的办法。只有修正了这段历史…翁法罗斯才能拥有未来。
E: Please, you must find a way to make {RUBY_B#Strife Titan}Nikador{RUBY_E#}'s soul whole again. It is only by fixing this point in history... that we can salvage the future of Amphoreus.

C: 给我看看你的能耐吧。
E: Let's see what you can do.

C: 「它将以自身为城墙，阻挡无尽蔓延的疯狂。它深谙：若末世降临，世间将无物可供征伐……」
E: "They use their own body as our city walls, keeping out and protecting us from the pervasive spread of madness. They are acutely aware that if the end times were to arrive, there would be nothing left in this world to conquer..."

C: 或许要在施展「奇迹」之后才会出现？
E: Do we have to summon a miracle for it to appear?

C: 它在为世界抵御某种东西。
E: They were protecting the world from something.

C: 万敌，你……
E: Mydei, do you...

C: 可能是为了增加个性。
E: Maybe it gives you more personality.

C: 没人能骗过她，阁下。对于我们的谎言，她只是选择性地视而不见罢了。
E: No one fools her, Lord Phainon. She merely chooses to turn a blind eye to our lies.

C: 只有在那里…我才能暂享片刻安宁。
E: That's the only place I can be momentarily at peace...

C: 唔…转念一想，人家上次吃东西是多久之前的事了？记不起来……
E: Hmm... but come to think of it, I don't remember when the last time I ate something was...

C: 你邀请的见证人到了，白厄。归还仪式可以开始了。
E: Your guests are here, Phainon. We can begin the ritual now.

C: 「为肉身灌注黄金之血，为神谕甘愿枯竭干涸……」
E: "Fill our bodies with blood of gold, till we wither in willing service to the prophecy..."

C: 什么？！这才是增加好感度的选项吗？
E: What!? That was the correct option to increase friendship level?

C: <color=#dbc291ff>公民大会</color>？
E: <color=#dbc291ff>Citizens' assembly?</color>

C: 谈不上麻烦。我只是觉得，两位应该对奥赫玛的内部局势有更多了解。
E: I wouldn't call it trouble. I just think it will be favorable if the both of you understand the situation in Okhema better.

C: 休息，等待试炼。
E: Get some rest and wait for the trial.

C: 不对，好像有点奇怪…别担心，不会花太多时间的？嗯…放心，你一定能活着回来？
E: No, that sounds a little strange... Don't worry, it won't take up too much of your time? Um... Don't worry, you'll definitely make it back alive?

C: 开始吧。
E: Let's begin.

C: …这几个字只是为了让祷言听起来更庄重一些。请集中精神……
E: ...These are just words meant to make the prayer seem more solemn. Please focus...

C: 交给我们吧，泰坦。
E: Leave it to us, Titan.

C: …对不起，我不会再提出如此非分的请求了。
E: ...My apologies, I will stop making such unreasonable requests.

C: 怎么了，阿那克萨戈拉斯阁下？
E: Is there something on your mind, Lord Anaxagoras?

C: 话是这么说，阁下也需得我出手助力，才能在金线追缉下保全性命吧？
E: You say that now, but surely you also require my aid as well, so that you can stay alive, even when being pursued by the golden thread?

C: 话已至此，你我想必已对能在这场辩论中攫取何种利益心中有数了。就让我这么说吧：元老院向来以公正闻名，而公正建立在真诚的基础上……
E: At this stage, it's clear that you and I understand the benefits to be won from this discussion. Let me put it plainly: The Council of Elders has always been renowned for its fairness, and that fairness is built on a foundation of sincerity...

C: …成为半神的代价，远比我们想象得要沉重啊。
E: ...Seems like the price of becoming a demigod is a lot heftier than we thought.

C: 阁下都不问问是什么吗…？
E: ...Aren't you going to ask me what it is?

C: 在来到这里前，我曾在一座名为「哀地里亚」的雪国居住过很久。那是信仰{RUBY_B#死亡之泰坦}塞纳托斯{RUBY_E#}的城邦，以独特的丧葬文化闻名世间。
E: Before coming here, I had lived for many years in Aidonia, a city of rime and frost. The people there were devotees of {RUBY_B#Death Titan}Thanatos{RUBY_E#}, and were well-known for their unique burial rites and traditions.

C: 而是也可以，留下些什么？
E: Can I make anything...? Can I leave anything behind?

C: …赛飞儿阁下，请出来吧。
E: ...Lady Cipher, please come on out.

C: 金织、控制狂、奥赫玛第一美人、阿格莱雅妈妈…还要我多说几个外号吗？
E: Goldweaver, control freak, number one beauty of Okhema, Aglaea the Mom... How many more nicknames do you wanna hear?

C: 比起犹豫，还是启程更好。也许就在今天，命运会恻隐一时，抛下些许仁慈。
E: Rather than standing still, taking action is by far the better option. Perhaps fate might take pity on us today and show some compassion.

C: 活着的人…不卖，你们…太无耻了。买了鱼却不付账…等我再见到她，我非得…我非得……
E: I'm not selling my fish to... living people. You lot are too... shameless. Buying fish without paying... If I ever see her again, I will... I will...

C: 这些已经被打倒的家伙，难道是……
E: Could these dead monsters actually be...

C: …请您继续吧，我在听。您要讲的，莫非是斯缇科西亚的故事？
E: ...Please, go on. I'm listening. Are you about to tell the story of Styxia?

C: 那，我们约好了。
E: It's a deal then.

C: 当然可以。是什么？
E: Of course. What is it?

C: 记得在神山上的见闻吗？卡吕普索、格奈乌斯…那些英雄临到命运的尽头，次第离去，只留下递补「死亡」的双子。
E: Remember what happened on the holy mountain? Calypso, Gnaeus... As their destined ends approached, one by one, they left this world... leaving only the twins, who were fated to succeed Death.

C: 「去做吧，真理已尽在你手中了。」
E: Go forth, for the truth is already in your hands.

C: …我深感荣幸。
E: ...The honor is mine to bear.

C: （…谢谢你，遐蝶。）
E: (...Thank you, Castorice.)

C: 关于白厄。
E: Phainon.

C: 「走吧。前路将是光明，和永恒不熄的烈火。」
E: "Onwards. For your path to the future is bright and its flame eternal."

C: 啊呀…毕竟汝已「超越至纯粹之终极」，可曾为吾留下哪怕一点余地哪？
E: Well, you've already "transcended the peaks of purity" and you were never the type to give me any leeway.

C: 哎哟…没想到这么颠簸。早知道就让第二面镜把功率调低点了。
E: Agh... I didn't expect it to be so turbulent. I should have asked the Second Mirror to use slightly less power.

C: 它关乎缠绕翁法罗斯的第三条命途，也是您和您的朋友至今未能解明的那一条……
E: It concerns the third Path that is entangled with Amphoreus — a Path that you and your friends still very much lack understanding of...

C: 哦，逐火之旅的领袖，墨涅塔的半神……
E: Oh... The leader of the Flame-Chase Journey and a demigod of Mnestia...

C: 你身为「天空」祭司，却在「理性」泰坦的栖息地求学，似乎有些违背直觉。
E: You're a Sky Priest, yet you study at a place that is home to the Reason Titan... That's rather counterintuitive.

C: 果然，谈论「天空」在树庭算不上禁忌。这两位学者在争论的「天舟」，记得阿格莱雅审讯时也提到过，不是什么愉快的回忆。
E: As I expected, the Grove doesn't forbid discussions about the Sky. It's a debate between two scholars about the skyships... Aglaea also made mention of the ships when she interrogated us... a memory I'd rather forget.

C: 难怪，这一路连点像样的防备都没有。
E: No wonder we didn't see any defense mechanisms along the way.

C: 丹宝，我有一种不太好的预感。你看这里……
E: Dannie, look at this. I have a bad feeling about this...

C: 最担心的事情…果然还是发生了。一路看下来，我的猜想也在慢慢成型。
E: My biggest fear... It's come true... After going through his notes, I think I can piece it all together now:

C: 这未免太过于理想。只要黑潮还存在一天，我们怎么可能回到过去？
E: Your proposal is much too idealistic. As long as the black tide still exists, how can we go back to the old days?

C: 看来，我派你去找那刻夏，反倒促成了你和他的合作？
E: Well, it seems that when I sent you to look for Anaxa, I unintentionally facilitated your partnership with him instead?

C: …一段漫长而沉重的过去。
E: ...A past that was both long and heavy.

C: 翁法罗斯的历史在泰坦诞生前是一片「混沌」，这还不奇怪吗？
E: Amphoreus' history before the Titans were born was complete chaos. Is that not strange by itself?

C: 这是…玻吕茜亚的姐姐…？
E: Is this... Polyxia's sister...?

C: …一秒都不要犹豫！
E: Don't hesitate, not even for a second!

C: Diya...Gae！
E: Diya... Gae!

C: 黑衣剑士，盗火行者，管你叫什么名字——
E: Black-clad swordmaster, the Flame Reaver, whatever your name is —

C: 嘻嘻…悲哀的家伙，我已经摸透你了哪！
E: You sad little thing, I've got you all figured out!

C: <color=#dbc291ff>你也只能苦苦等着黄金裔们把火种带回地上，然后再靠蛮力强取豪夺…对吧？</color>
E: <color=#dbc291ff>All you can do is sit and wait for the Chrysos Heirs to bring it down, then swoop in like a brute to snatch it for yourself, isn't that so?</color>

C: 为了给你这条孤寡老狗一点关怀，今天我给你准备了一件特别大礼哦……
E: But hey, I'm feeling generous today — I've got a surprise just for you.

C: *太美丽了，斯缇科西亚…哎唷，这不盗火行者吗？*
E: Styxia, you're stunning... Oh? Look who it is — the Flame Reaver!

C: *唉，无聊…演瘾上来了，我还想着你能稍微陪我玩一会儿呢。*
E: Ugh, boring... I was hoping you'd at least humor me for a little while.

C: 估计逃也逃不出你的掌心，今天的有氧热身也算做足了。接下来……
E: Looks like there's no getting away from you, and hey, that was a pretty good warm-up. Now...

C: *公民们，朋友们！作为新任司铎，我在此提议…要在黎明云崖举办为期百日的宴会，以此感恩天父的馈赠！*
E: Citizens, friends! As the newly appointed Chaplain, I propose we host a grand hundred-day celebration at Dawncloud, a feast in gratitude for the sky father's gift!

C: 应该还有别的办法？
E: There must be another way!

C: 就是找补一下，人之常情嘛~
E: Hey, I'm just making it up to you. You'd do the same in my shoes.

C: 为了换取冥界入口的信息，遐蝶只好促成元老院提出「暂停逐火之旅」的议题，并在半神赛飞儿的帮助下，赶往龙骸古城•斯缇科西亚。
E: To obtain information about the entrance to the nether realm, Castorice had no choice but to support the Council of Elders in proposing a pause in the Flame-Chase Journey. With the aid of the demigod Cipher, she set out for the Dragonbone City — Styxia.

C: 这些人……
E: Are these people—

C: …一对四啊。
E: ...One against four, then.

C: 你没事吧？
E: Are you okay?

C: 你在看什么？
E: What are you looking at?

C: 阿格莱雅，呵，阿格莱雅……
E: Aglaea, Aglaea...

C: 瞧你那残缺又乞怜的眼神…真是让人扫兴，我们高估了你的手腕。
E: Look at those broken, pleading eyes... how disappointing. We overestimated your cunning.

C: …嚯，仔细听，你听见了嘛？冥河里的噬骨鱼，肚子正饿得咕噜咕噜叫哪？
E: ...Listen closely. Do you hear that? The gnawfish in the River of Souls are growling with hunger...

C: 桀桀桀，堂堂「诡计」的半神，没想到竟然会对水过敏哇？
E: Hehe, the mighty demigod of Trickery... uneasy around water?

C: 有了——就用那玩意吧！跟我来，大姐头！
E: Got it — let's use that thing! Come on! Follow me, Boss Lady!

C: 可别小看我啊，大姐头！你就找个干燥的角落好好等着吧，桀桀桀……
E: Don't underestimate me, Boss! Just find a cozy, dry corner and wait for me, hehe...

C: 哎呀…这看上去可真够惨的。你觉得他们成功逃到奥赫玛了吗？
E: Oh... this looks tragic. Do you think they made it to Okhema?

C: 喔，关于这山羊头是不是还有什么神话来着？「怕火的成为了羊，不怕火的成为了人」……
E: Oh, isn't there a myth about this thing? "Those who feared fire became sheep, those who did not became human"...

C: 什么羊不羊人不人的，我只知道把这玩意解开能拿到宝贝。喏，这殊荣就交给你了。
E: Sheep, humans — whatever. All I know is unlocking this gets us treasure. Here, this honor's all yours.

C: 你费尽心思监听我的一举一动，是什么居心？我早都说了，没有我你们也能成事，何必这么死缠烂打？
E: You've gone to such lengths to spy on my every move — what exactly are you after? I've told you before, you don't need me to succeed. Why won't you just let this go?

C: 我希望如此……
E: I hope so...

C: 已经这个时候了…你没有什么别的话想说吗？
E: It's late... Anything else you'd like to add?

C: …让我猜猜你在想什么吧，赛法利娅。
E: ...Let me guess, Cifera.

C: ——所以你想找我帮忙，在你缺席的时间里遛遛他们，对么？
E: — So you want me to give them a nice long walk while you're away, right?

C: 生在这个时代，我们不得不于骇浪中成长，而非做好一切准备后再启航。
E: Born into this era, we had no choice but to grow amidst the raging waves, not set sail after everything was prepared.

C: 那就是说，<color=#dbc291ff>海瑟音和那位山之民…</color>他们成功履行了自己的使命么？
E: Does that mean <color=#dbc291ff>Hysilens and the Mountain Dweller</color> successfully carried out their duty?

C: 我问你，雅辛忒丝——既然你能认出我的身份，那你应当也读过我的亲笔？
E: Answer me, Hyacinthia. Since you recognize me, you must have also read my writings, no?

C: 既然你已经下定决心，那就将你的信念贯彻到底吧，雅辛忒丝。
E: If your mind is set, Hyacinthia, then carry your resolve through to the very end.

C: 请打倒冷漠的{RUBY_B#天空之泰坦}晨昏之眼{RUBY_E#}，还翁法罗斯一片仁爱的天空吧。
E: Please defeat the indifferent {RUBY_B#Sky Titan}Eye of Twilight{RUBY_E#}, and restore a compassionate sky to Amphoreus.

C: 逐火之旅尽管是由黄金裔主持的，但为它做出贡献的绝不只被阿格莱雅选中之人。
E: While the Flame-Chase Journey is led by the Chrysos Heirs, it's not just those chosen by Aglaea who contributed to it.

C: 彩虹匣在震动……
E: The Chroma Coffer is vibrating...

C: 塞涅俄丝的英勇超乎常人想象，她率领两头翼兽伙伴将愤怒的泰坦逼入绝境，一同消失在了天空的尽头。
E: After driving the enraged Titan to the brink of defeat with her two winged companions, they all vanished somewhere in the sky. Her courage was unparalleled.

C: 我能隐约感受到此处的空旷和浩大，但眼下只有一片漆黑。
E: I can kind of feel how big and empty this place is, but all I see is darkness.

C: 这个锅确实该泰坦背。
E: This blame lies squarely on the Titan's shoulders.

C: 安抚结束，还是要靠球棒说话。
E: Words are done. Time for the bat to do the talking.

C: 那忆灵所言为实，但你们还需向导。
E: What the memosprite said is true, but you all still need a guide.

C: 英雄们，这里——
E: Heroes, over here!

C: 艾格勒曾和鼎盛时期的尼卡多利展开漫长的拉锯…还是不要小看它为好。
E: Aquila once engaged in a long, grueling struggle with Nikador in their prime... Best not to underestimate them.

C: 这个小家伙，它是……
E: This little one...

C: 没有哪位医者能治愈一切，面对深陷痛苦而无法被拯救的灵魂……
E: No healer can heal all, especially faced with souls that are trapped deeply in the clutches of pain...

C: 在天象画壁的穹顶，我们给艾格勒带去了致命的一击。
E: At the Celestial Mural's dome, we dealt Aquila a fatal blow.

C: 那些仰望我们拼杀的人们——我们看到了他们脸上的神色。
E: The people who watched us fight — we saw the expressions on their faces.

C: 人家能清晰地感觉到，这里的记忆在翻涌。就好像…有许多感情在漫长的岁月中彷徨，不愿就此消失。
E: I can feel the memories here churning. It's as if countless emotions have lingered through the ages, refusing to fade away.

C: 所以，*我们*希望你能成为英雄！希望你能让世界上的人们看到，我们应该团结起来，而不是互相争斗……
E: We hope you will become a hero and show the world that unity, not division, is what we need...

C: 究竟是为什么…？
E: Why is this happening...?

C: 何不…留下荣光？
E: Why not... leave behind some glory?

C: 如今，这个家园也危在旦夕…那就该轮到我回报你们的馈赠，去创造一个能承载所有愿望的新世界了。
E: Now that this home is also in danger... it is my turn to repay your kindness and create a new world that can carry everyone's wishes.

C: 你已经长成了阿雅期望中的样子呀，小白。
E: Snowy, you've grown into the person Agy always dreamed of.

C: 因为，无需预言的确证，*我们*也有自信断言…你一定会成为那一轮朝阳。
E: Because, even without the prophecy, we have the confidence to say... you will become that rising sun.

C: 两位阁下，此地不宜久留。缇宁大人的百界门就在城外大道——继续前进吧。
E: We can't stay here for long. Lady Trinnon's Century Gate is just outside the city — let's keep moving.

C: 螺丝先生，我相信你，所以只想确认一件事：翁法罗斯已经面临末日，留下来的人要如何保障安全？
E: Mr. Screwllum, I believe you, so I only have one thing I'd like to confirm with you. As Amphoreus is already facing its end, how can we guarantee the safety of the person who stays behind?

C: 人家觉得，你好像若有所思？
E: Something seems to be bothering you.

C: 总之，先去以前大家的「秘密基地」，把神谕牌找出来吧——
E: Anyway, let's go to our old "secret base" and look for those oracle cards—

C: 这次你们出远门，可要替老师去传说中的神悟树庭，见识见识真正的智慧园地啊……
E: When you travel far from here, you must visit the Grove of Epiphany for me, to see what a true haven of wisdom looks like...

C: 好了好了，我先走了。晚上说不好要下雨，你们也早点回家吧！
E: Alright then, I should be going. It might rain tonight, so don't stay out too late!

C: 「漫游签证」…是什么？
E: "Trailblazer Profile"... What's that?

C: 我们这次来，是为了找回「神谕牌」。你知道它去哪里了吗？
E: Actually, we're here for the oracle cards. Have you seen them?

C: 我也这么觉得，但多哆啦迷总说自己唱的不是诗，只是歌谣。
E: Right? Though Dolimem always says they're just songs, not poetry.

C: 我和白厄本来只打算离开村子一小段时间，学些本领回来。他要去悬锋城锻炼，我打算去雅努萨波利斯，接受命运泰坦的洗礼……
E: We weren't planning to be gone for long... just enough time to hone our abilities. Phainon would train in Castrum Kremnos, while I would seek the Fate Titans' blessing in Janusopolis...

C: 赛飞儿阁下，我并不是这样想的。
E: Cipher, that's... not how I see it.

C: 灾难终将过去。
E: Even the darkest storm must eventually pass.

C: 那是不可名状的丑恶之物，能将所有生命扭曲变作无血无泪的怪物。即便是泰坦也会被其侵蚀，自内向外烧熔殆尽，徒留一具只知杀戮、毁灭的空壳……
E: It's an unspeakable horror that twists all life into abominations that never bleed nor cry. Even Titans fall to its corruption, burning from within until only empty shells remain, knowing only death and destruction...

C: …都要归功于你的鼓舞呀，伙伴。
E: ...happened because you believed in him, friend.

C: 大家…在哪里……
E: Someone... anyone... where are you...

C: 单凭纤弱的双腿，他踏上旅途，翻过{RUBY_B#大地之泰坦}磐岩之脊{RUBY_E#}，跨越{RUBY_B#海洋之泰坦}满溢之杯{RUBY_E#}，穿行于{RUBY_B#死亡之泰坦}灰黯之手{RUBY_E#}冰冷的死雾中……
E: His feet carried him forward. Over the {RUBY_B#Earth Titan}Pillar of Stone{RUBY_E#}. Beyond the {RUBY_B#Ocean Titan}Chalice of Plenty{RUBY_E#}. Through the deadly fogs of the {RUBY_B#Death Titan}Hand of Shadow{RUBY_E#}.

C: 或是踏上最后的伟大征程。
E: ...or embark on one final grand journey.

C: （创世涡心…果然是这里。可是……）
E: (The Vortex of Genesis... So it is here. But...)

C: 创世涡心…上次来到这里，还是归还「理性」火种的时候。
E: The Vortex of Genesis... The last time I was here, I was returning the Coreflame of "Reason."

C: 那神谕中描摹的明天，西风尽头的花海，「再创世」…很快就能实现……
E: That prophesized future, the flower fields where the west wind ends, Era Nova... we're so close now...

C: 呵呵，您当真准备好了？容我郑重提醒：一旦您揭开记忆的真容……
E: Hehe, you really think you're prepared? Allow me to give you a warning most earnest: Once you see what these memories hide...

C: 我向你保证，痛苦…转瞬即逝。
E: I promise you, the pain... will pass in the blink of an eye.

C: 况且，深海无光，不正适合藏起那些不便示人的秘密么？
E: Besides, the deep sea is dark. Isn't it the perfect place to hide secrets best left unseen?

C: …巴特鲁斯！
E: ...Bartholos!

C: 有趣。告诉我，往日的迈德漠斯在面对你时，可曾退缩过？
E: Interesting. Tell me, when the Mydeimoses of the past faced you, did they ever retreat?

C: 我，晨昏之眼，雅辛忒丝…既无法强大到呼风唤雨，也不愿以天空陨落结束这场荒唐的闹剧……
E: I, Hyacinthia, the Eye of Twilight... am neither strong enough to command the wind and rain, nor willing to end this absurd struggle by letting the sky fall.

C: 我必须出发…我也必须背负。
E: I must go... and bear this burden.

C: 抱歉，我本该把你送回家的。这是我的逐火之旅，它本与你们无关……
E: ...I'm sorry. I was supposed to send you home. This is my Flame-Chase Journey. You were never meant to be part of it...

C: 所以，去吧。
E: Now go.

C: 也许两者都是呢？开个玩笑，一定要选一边的话…应该更接近后者吧。
E: Maybe I'm both? Just kidding. If I had to choose... Then I'm probably closer to the latter.

C: 我不知道…听着很奇怪吧？明明是自己的事，语气却像个旁观者。
E: I don't know... It sounds weird, doesn't it? It's something that happened to me, but I'm talking as if I'm an observer.

C: 不过，人家总有些不安…来古士会走上台前，说出一切，说明他对现状还游刃有余。
E: But I still feel a bit anxious... Lygus chose to walk into the spotlight and reveal everything, which means he still thinks the current situation is under his control.

C: …啊，不许偷看！
E: Ah! No peeking!

C: 待会儿再来…
E: I'll come back later...

C: （竟然有人在盯梢……）
E: (So someone's watching...)

C: 你、你们好……
E: H—Hello... to you both...

C: 是条狠鱼。
E: You're a vicious fish.

C: 你也品出同样的味道了呀。
E: You sensed it too, huh?

C: 这算不算醉酒上岗？
E: Wouldn't this be considered getting drunk on duty?

C: 这里！混进人群中去吧？
E: Let's mingle in the crowds here.

C: 请相信我，螺丝咕姆。此时此刻，深感遗憾的不止你一人。
E: Trust me when I say that you aren't the only one feeling regret right now, Screwllum.

C: 你也上去来一段？
E: You wanna go show off some moves?

C: 在命运面前，我们总会身不由己，不是么？
E: We always feel so powerless before fate, don't we?

C: 等等，这个声音是……
E: Wait... this sounds like...

C: （…有问题，她不是三月七。）
E: (...Something's not right. She's not March 7th.)

C: 那么，不必用问题来检验疑惑。珍惜你我的岁月，坦诚相待吧。
E: Then there's no need to feel things out first with questions. Let's treasure the time we have together and be frank.

C: 别想那么多啦！前进吧，只要跑起来就足够！
E: Quit overthinking! Just run. Keep running, and that'll be enough!

C: 我背负姊妹的愿景，化作曼妙的人形，期待着岸上有万民欢庆。
E: I bore my sisters' dreams upon my back, took on a graceful human form, and hoped to find a grand celebration on the shore.

C: ——只有沉默的死亡，在冥河里静静流淌。
E: ...Only silent death, drifting gently along the River of Souls.

C: 「啊！正所谓，懦夫在未死之前，便死了千万次。」
E: "Ah, as they say: the coward died a thousand times before his end."

C: 这不是正确的结局。
E: It's not the right ending.

C: 呵呵…我一直想说……
E: Heh... I always wanted to tell you...

C: 错乱的时空，映照出她的迷惘——
E: The twisted time and space reflect her confusion...

C: 前进吧——
E: Go forth...

C: {NICKNAME}，你呢？当我们彼此触碰，你又感受到了什么？
E: What about you, {NICKNAME}? What did you feel when we touched each other?

C: 是吗？那我会很开心！如果一缕记忆能带给人触动，那代表她一定是幸福的，对吧？
E: Really? That makes me really happy! If memories can move people, then it must've been a happy memory, right?

C: 但你对凯撒的忠诚没有随我一同死去。
E: But your duty towards the Imperator did not die with me.

C: 是那小跟班书中的一页。我对她下令，当一切行至终点时，要将这页留赠予你。
E: A page out of that sidekick's book. I commanded her to gift this page to you when everything finally reaches the end.

C: 只不过，比起血与火的征服，他们选择了更温和的道路。
E: Only that, instead of a conquest through blood and fire, they chose a gentler path.

C: 是！赴死者向您致敬！
E: Understood! Those who are resolved to die, we salute you!

C: 然后，成为新的牺牲者。
E: And they, too, will become this place's victims.

C: 果然，他看不见你哎。
E: So he can't see you, huh? As expected.

C: 「比起分析，我更想知道现在能做什么。」
E: "We can analyze all we want, but the real question is: What can we do right now?"

C: 或者换一种说法…他们的目标是<color=#dbc291ff>「神殒的记忆」。</color>
E: In other words... their goal is to gain the <color=#dbc291ff>memories of a God's death</color>.

C: 那和失去我…也无分别。
E: How is that any different from losing me?

C: 这是，三月七的记忆。
E: These are... March 7th's memories.

C: 我叫三月七，{NICKNAME}的同伴。误打误撞地闯进这里，真是不好意思……
E: I'm March 7th, and I'm {NICKNAME}'s companion. Sorry, I accidentally ended up barging in here...

C: 我准备好了。
E: I'm ready.

C: 安全协议…在「神话之外」也见过。
E: A safety protocol... I saw it in the Exomyth too.

C: （而且，好像有种既视感……）
E: (Also, I'm getting a feeling of déjà vu...)

C: （取出《如我所书》…）
E: (Take out As I've Written...)

C: 沐浴瞥视会变成令使吗？
E: Would basking in an Aeon's gaze turn someone into an Emanator?

C: 访问被拒绝了。有关「纷争」的记忆，总是与不屈和抗争相伴……
E: We were denied access. Memories about Strife are always so defiant and resistant...

C: 总是惴惴不安，尽力翻找不一样的「记忆」，希望能为一成不变的命运带来改变，找到这座迷宫的出口。
E: "I" was so anxious, trying to find as many different "memories" as possible, hoping to bring some change to this unchanging destiny and find the way out of this maze.

C: 祂何必这么做？
E: Why did THEY do that?

C: 难以想象，这还是翁法罗斯么？
E: It's hard to believe... Is this still Amphoreus?

C: 迈德漠斯的「纷争」之路，再次抵达了光荣而孤独的尽头…一如既往。
E: Mydeimos's road of Strife once again reached its glorious and lonely end... as always.

C: 先来玩个游戏吧，亲爱的{NICKNAME}？
E: How about we play a game, dear {NICKNAME}?

C: 但如果「三月七」也在场，局面就不一样了……
E: But if "March 7th" were here, that would be a different story...

C: 雅利洛就很不一样，看着大家用纸笔记录生活，我才明白为什么会有人还在坚持制作手账。
E: Jarilo is completely different. Watching people record their lives with pen and paper... I finally understood why some still cherish writing journals by hand.

C: 但咱也这么想的。相机只能拍下瞬间的{RUBY_B#「记忆」}风景{RUBY_E#}，但要把那些切片连缀成人生，还是得靠{RUBY_B#「开拓」}自己的双手{RUBY_E#}才行……
E: Anyways, that's what I thought too. A camera can only capture fleeting {RUBY_B#Remembrance}moments{RUBY_E#}, but stitching those moments into a story? You've gotta use {RUBY_B#Trailblaze}your own hands{RUBY_E#}...

C: 啊！这个必须得有——
E: Aha! No way we're skipping this one.

C: 观隅反三……
E: Three of a kind...

C: 终于……
E: Finally...

C: （航线会议…在匹诺康尼？）
E: (Navigation meeting... in Penacony?)

C: 别着急，我们很快就能见面了，因为……
E: Don't worry, we'll see each other very soon, because...

C: 这里是星际和平播报，观众朋友们晚上好。
E: This is the Interastral Peace Broadcast. Good evening everyone.

C: 情况紧急，拜托了。
E: We're in dire straits. I'm counting on you.

C: 记下「4」这个数字。在末王的预言里，四条命途会将银河推向终结，你会在旅途中与祂们一一邂逅……
E: Mark this number: "four." According to Terminus's prophecy, four Paths will push the cosmos to its end. And on your journey, you shall encounter THEM... one by one.

C: 那是……
E: Is that...

C: 但，我的同胞，他们值得继续抗争。在生命的尽头，我想最后为他们争取一次行向未来的机会……
E: But my compatriots deserve to continue their struggle. At the end of my life, I want to make one last effort to give them a chance to move on to the future...

C: 星海……
E: A sea of stars...

C: 「诡计」总会找到出路，小子！
E: "Trickery" will always find a way, boy!

C: 无论如何，你保护了我。
E: In the end, you were there for me.

C: 谢谢你，海瑟音。
E: Thank you, Hysilens.

C: 但他们…怎么变成了这样？
E: So... how did they end up like this?

C: 一只…更可爱的忆灵？
E: An... even cuter memosprite?

C: 关于这点，我们略有分歧：正因他们无惧生死，才有机会触碰真理。
E: Well, our views differ on that. They had a chance to reach the truth precisely because they did not fear death.

C: 就像「开拓」。
E: Just like the Trailblaze.

C: 与一位绝灭大君为敌，再谨慎都不为过。存亡面前，人人平等。
E: You can never be too careful when battling a Lord Ravager. All are equal in matters of life and death.

C: 彼时，我希望星穹列车能够记得，在如今这样艰难的时刻，石心十人即便寸步难行，也愿意与「开拓」站在一起——更何况，是只有我们愿意。
E: When that time comes, I hope the Astral Express will remember that the Ten Stonehearts were willing to stand with the Trailblaze even though we were in a difficult position, and more importantly, we were the only ones willing to do so.

C: 「果然，完全瞒不过姬子和杨叔呢。」
E: "As expected, I can't hide anything from Himeko and Mr. Yang."

C: 定位不会出错，「赞达尔」仍在此地。
E: The coordinates are accurate. Zandar is still here.

C: 是我们必须守护的世界。
E: It's a world we must protect.

C: 「显而易见——」
E: "Well, obviously..."

C: 这是，记忆严选…！
E: This is by the Remembrance's curation...!

C: 风堇，这道「金色」的光芒，是你唤醒的？
E: Hyacine, did you awaken this golden light?

C: <color=#dbc291ff>博识尊，向翁法罗斯投来了目光。</color>
E: <color=#dbc291ff>Nous has cast THEIR gaze upon Amphoreus.</color>

C: 时间的尽头，生命将点亮温暖的烛光，压倒「毁灭」的劫火。
E: At the end of time, life will illuminate the warm candlelight, subduing the flames of the Destruction.

C: ▀▄声音▄▀听不见▄█为什么▄▀
E: ▀▄Can't▄▀Hear▄█Why▄▀

C: 也是最后一次，对吗？
E: And the final end, right?

C: 总有一种不安挥之不去。就好像在哀丽秘榭，我望着水面，分不清水中的我和岸边的我，哪一个才是真正的我。
E: There's a sort of anxiety I can't get rid of. It's like when I was back in Aedes Elysiae, when the reflections in the water always made me wonder... which is the real me? The one reflected in the water, or the one standing on the shore?

C: 注意，注意！银河里的各位乘客，请在月台上站稳！
E: Attention~ Attention all passengers in the cosmos. Please stand steady on the platform!

C: 如果记忆中的风景模糊了，就伸手去触碰它吧。
E: If the view in your memory ever grows fuzzy, just reach out and touch it.

C: 我追上你了。
E: I've caught up to you.

C: 我们就什么都做得到♪
E: "We can do anything ♪"

C: 以明亮的光，照亮盲目的黑暗。
E: How we light up the blinding darkness with bright light.

C: <color=#dbc291ff>约好了，我们一起前进，{NICKNAME}。</color>
E: <color=#dbc291ff>We promised each other to keep moving forward together, {NICKNAME}.</color>

C: 以「爱」汇成长河——席卷「恨」的坟茔！
E: I converge "love" into a river that will drown the tomb of "hatred"!

C: 我们会否决，这错误的答案！
E: We will reject this false answer!

C: 我…我不行了……
E: I... I can't go on...

C: {NICKNAME}，你可知道——这广袤银河中的文明，多数是以何种体制存续至今的？
E: {NICKNAME}, what form of government have most civilizations across this vast cosmos survived with to this day?

C: …那么，答案只有一个了。
E: ...Well then, there's only one answer.

C: 仙舟联盟，匹诺康尼…都怪我的想象力太匮乏，光听丹恒的描述，我完全想象不出那些世界的样貌。
E: The Xianzhou Alliance, Penacony... I blame my poor imagination. I can't picture what those worlds look like at all from Dan Heng's descriptions.

C: 只有你一个人耍帅，未免太犯规了吧？
E: Hey, it's not fair that you get to be the only cool one here!

C: 所以，帮帮我们，找到翁法罗斯「记忆」的起点，然后把它带出来……
E: So, help us. Find where Amphoreus's "memory" began... and bring it out.

C: <color=#dbc291ff>你停下脚步，以自我为代价完成「收梢」…成为贯穿翁法罗斯的「记忆」。</color>
E: <color=#dbc291ff>You come to a stop and "fade," offering yourself... to become the "memory" that carries through Amphoreus.</color>

C: 真没想到，我们的初遇还藏着这一层秘密呢。
E: I never imagined there was a hidden truth behind our first meeting.

C: <color=#dbc291ff>「未知」就在眼前，除了「解答」，没有第二种选项。</color>
E: <color=#dbc291ff>The "unknown" is right in front of us, so we only have one choice: "Solve" it.</color>

C: 童年的朋友疑惑不解：「可你却总是嘻嘻哈哈，好像从来没有烦恼。」
E: My childhood friend did not understand. "Yet you always seem so happy, as if nothing ever worried you."

C: 「如那风中的歌谣所述，逐火是不断失却的旅途。」
E: "Just as the ballad blown on the breeze says: Losses are a constant on the Flame-Chase journey."

C: 详细信息
E: Details

C: >>>Philia<unbreak>093</unbreak>.exe 运行中…
E: >>> Running Philia<unbreak>093</unbreak>.exe...

C: 恍惚间，我似乎也能听懂你的话了。都是些很可爱的发言呢。
E: It's almost as if I can understand your words now. The things you say are very cute.

C: 概率：万分之一。
E: The chances are ten thousand to one.

C: 够鸟语花香的。不过……
E: That's a whole lotta pretty wubbaboo. But...

C: 我不在乎，只想战胜铁墓。
E: It matters not, as long as Irontomb is defeated.

C: 抱歉，今天的任务非常枯燥：仅仅是把目标「放进去」而已。
E: ...Sorry, I'm afraid there's not much I can do for you — our task this time is just to "place" the target properly.

C: 数据上看只是普通的全息影像，但它加了层壳……
E: The data suggests it's just an ordinary hologram. But it has an added layer...

C: 对了，亚伯拉罕呢？你没找到他？
E: By the way, where's Abraham? Did you find him?

C: 你看。从光年之外抵达的天鹰座星光，哪怕它是预示着毁灭的中微子爆发，能看到这样的美景，怎么着都值啦。
E: Look at it this way. Even if there's a neutrino burst that heralds destruction, it's still worth it to see such a beautiful sight.

C: 我不是，我没有。{F#丫头}{M#小子}，你可别乱说啊。
E: No. I did not. Don't be ridiculous, {F#lass}{M#lad}.

C: 少来，你以为「飞跃黑塔」很风光？
E: Oh come on. You think the "Station Breakout" is something to be proud of?

C: 或许吧。但「飞跃黑塔」这事他要真叫上我，我还不一定够胆呢。
E: Maybe. But if he had really invited me to make a breakout from the space station, I may not have had the guts for it.

C: 黑塔的企业文化嘛……
E: Such is the Herta company culture...

C: 目前人手不太够，只能先守住入口不让怪物上来。
E: We're low on staff right now — all we can do is make sure the monsters don't make it up here.

C: 你别这样，正常一点…
E: Do you have a request that's more... normal?

C: 就是你小子造谣艾丝妲？
E: Are you the one who started the rumor about Asta?

C: （就连「黑塔」特许通行认证也无法开启舱门——此处需要所谓三重权限认证。）
E: (Even the Space Station Special Permit is unable to open this hatch — a so-called triple authentication is required here.)

C: 臭不可闻。
E: They stink.

C: 满脑子就是中继器中继器，十几天没干正经事。不争气！
E: All he thinks about is the Airwave Repeater. He hasn't done any proper work for more than <unbreak>10</unbreak> days. Shame on you!

C: 你修好了中继器对吧？我看到你还拿着转译备份…嘿嘿，哪个是我的？
E: Did you fix the repeater? I see you are holding decoded backups... Hehe, which one is for me?

C: 我先去处理一下，再见了，哥们儿。
E: I should go fix it. See you, bro.

C: 有始有终，是个可塑之才。多余的这一份，是蓝色转译录…看来，你还是把真相告诉了他。
E: You are someone who finishes what you started. This is the blue log... so you told him the truth.

C: 这也太难了。
E: That's too hard.

C: 一加两个零！
E: One hundred!

C: 如果我告诉你，别去想「大象」——此时你的脑海一定全是那庞大的灰色身体。
E: If I tell you not to think about an elephant — then images of the large gray animal must be all over your mind.

C: 希拉！在这铿锵有力的唤声响起的同时，一些背景音正与它密不可分地交缠——这就是星神力量最直接的证明人所希求的正义在一颗星球注定的亡兆面前不值一提殊为可笑——你一边奋力分辨这个名叫希拉的名字，一边被那幻影般的连珠话语所淹没。
E: "Sheila!" A powerful voice calls out, accompanied by background noises that are hard to separate from it, as if inextricably intertwined. This is the most direct proof of Aeonic powers: In the face of the destruction of the planet, the justice sought by men is laughably insignificant. While you struggle to distinguish the name Sheila, you are drowned out by the murmurs in the background.

C: 一位法政科员的生平…
E: The life of a geopolitics researcher.

C: 别到处晃悠。你着了那些录像带的道，短时间内的意识紊乱够你喝一壶的。这就是好奇心的代价。
E: Don't wander around. You are affected by those videotapes, the consciousness disorder you're experiencing is no joke. This is the price you pay for being nosy.

C: 我有一些问题可以帮助你回忆。
E: I have some questions that may help you remember.

C: 这话从何说起？不过看你这么着急，也不像是在说谎，有什么话你们当面对质吧。
E: Why do you say that? Although, judging by your anxious look, you don't seem to be lying. Fine, you can sort it out with him face to face.

C: 难怪之前对希拉进行身体扫描，发现她的各项参数近乎完美——简直就像是精密设定的产物。
E: No wonder why her body scan showed a perfect reading — like a well-calibrated machine.

C: 感觉怎么样？
E: How do you feel?

C: 好呀好呀，不过最近都没看到前辈的身影，难道前辈是去异星进行田野调查了？咦，是有什么新发现吗，可以跟我透露下吗？
E: Sure. By the way, I haven't seen you around lately. Did you go on an exotic field trip? Did you discover anything new? Can you tell me anything?

C: 那接下来怎么办？
E: So, what next?

C: 站长说已经在准备采购新的设备了，不过眼下还没到货。所以，以目前的算力来说，您每天只能查询到一次结果。
E: The lead researcher said she was going to purchase new equipment. But it hasn't arrived yet. Therefore, with the current computing power, you can only query once a day.

C: 嗯？你尽管问，我知无不答。
E: Oh? Go ahead. I'll answer all your questions if I know the answers.

C: 你成功地从呜呜伯处提取到了信标数据，呜呜伯向你发出呜声致谢，便转身离去。
E: You succeed in extracting the beacon data from the Wubbaboo. It thanks you with a "woo" then leaves.

C: 他有没有提到修行？
E: Did he mention anything about a trial?

C: 我说你既然这么想证明自己，那就别嘴上嘟囔，要拿出行动！…其实我随口说说的，我也不知道他在做哪门子的修行。
E: I told him actions speak louder than words when you wanna prove yourself... I was just thinking out loud really, I had no idea what kind of trial he was doing.

C: 我真的没有想到…那些事情会给你带来…那么大的压力。
E: I—I honestly didn't realize that... these things would bring you s—so much... stress.

C: 哎，阿兰。事到如今，你竟然还是不愿意接受我的道歉。
E: Oh Arlan, won't you accept my apology?

C: 我总是给你布置任务，分配委托，但其实我很少亲眼见证你奔赴战场的样子。
E: I'm always giving you tasks and assignments, but I never actually see how you take to the battlefield...

C: 行了！怪东西在空间站里难道还少么？跟科员们说，这件事我会亲自调查。
E: Enough! It's not like the station has never encountered strange phenomena before! Go tell the rest. I will lead this investigation myself.

C: 小心惹得一身臊。
E: Careful what you ask for.

C: 才、才不是呢！
E: Th—They're not!

C: （虽然表情好勇斗狠，但它还是透露出了隐约的忧伤。）
E: (Despite its best efforts to put on an expression of fierceness and bravery, yet a hint of its sadness nevertheless seeped out.)

C: 嗯…从怪物手中回收科员的所有物，也是防卫科应尽的职责。
E: Um hum... Recovering researchers' belongings falls within the Security Department's purview.

C: 不谈论这个了。给——送给你，是我早上做的，一直放在保温舱里。
E: Never mind about that. Here — this is for you. I made it this morning. And I've been keeping it warm.

C: 这是，一个传输信标？哦，我明白了，她应该是在入侵时和反物质军团撞了个满怀，就用这个信标把敌人传送去了什么地方。
E: Is this... a transmitter beacon? Oh, I see! She probably ran into the Antimatter Legion during the invasion, then used this beacon to teleport the enemy somewhere else.

C: 这能帮助我们在模拟宇宙庞杂的数据中快速定位卡带的位置。从这条数据链入手吧，请做好意识深潜的准备——
E: This will help us quickly locate the cartridge in the vast sea of data. We'll start with this data link. Now, please prepare yourself for a deep dive with your consciousness...

C: 她话真多。
E: She talks a lot.

C: 不觉得和现状很像吗？也许她费尽心思，就只是为了和我们玩一场孩童的游戏。
E: And would this ongoing affair not be part of such an endeavour? Perhaps this is all nothing more than a game she's decided to play with us...

C: 所以什么关停宇宙，和黑塔的争执，都是在演戏？就是为了请我入瓮？
E: So, the business about shutting down the Universe and the argument with Herta was all just an act? You did all that to lure me in?

C: 放心吧，我已经有想法了，看——两公里外有个白云餐厅，有几个筑材物流部的临时工刚进门，我去和他们交个「朋友」。
E: Don't worry, I've already got an idea. You see that cloud diner just two kilometers from here? A few temps from the Building Material Logistics Department just stepped in. I'm gonna go and become their "friend."

C: 你和银狼交过手？
E: Did you face off with Silver Wolf?

C: 看你怎么定义「交手」了…初次见面时我说过，星核猎手离开空间站后，我本想追查他们的行踪，却误入了银狼的陷阱。
E: Depends on how you define "face off"... I told you when we first met that I tried tracking the Stellaron Hunters after they left the space station, but ended up in Silver Wolf's trap.

C: 关于之前的演练…
E: About the previous drills...

C: 嗯。如果你有需要，就和我说。
E: Uh huh. If you need anything, lemme know.

C: {NICKNAME}，我为自己的突兀道歉，突然要求与你单独沟通，十分奇怪。
E: {NICKNAME}, I apologize for being so abrupt. You must find me strange for wanting to speak with you alone.

C: 因此，我誓要以身作盾，捍卫这一缕温暖，而非苟且居安，让它反过来成为保护我的盾。
E: That is why I must swear to fight to protect this warmth, rather than be protected by it.

C: 我压根不关心谁，不过这个怪梦让我很在意，所以银枝那家伙到底打算干什么？
E: I—I'm not the type to start caring about people I've only just met, but the dream made me feel a little uneasy... So, what on earth is Argenti up to, anyway?
You...

C: 这家伙刚刚就一直抱着盆栽…这短短时间居然和盆栽建立起深厚情谊来了？虽然我也会担心房间里的玩偶……
E: Ugh, can you and the fern get a room already? How can anyone establish a bond with a houseplant? ...Although I guess you could say the same about me and my teddy bears...

C: 星穹列车的确需要定期清理、维护，毕竟这里可是列车组共同的「家」…用心呵护它吧，{NICKNAME}。
E: The Astral Express needs periodic cleaning and maintenance — it's home to the whole crew, after all. Let's take good care of it, {NICKNAME}.

C: 离开
E: Leave

C: （总之先去她办公室看看什么情况吧。）
E: (Anyways, let's go to her office to see what's going on.)

C: （如果有一些提示的话，或许……）
E: (If only there were some hints, then maybe...)

C: （这两个人说话怎么前言不搭后语的…好奇怪啊。）
E: (These two aren't making any sense... this is so weird.)

C: 要我说，密卷科这上上下下的年轻人啊，论手脚麻利哪个也比不上你。
E: ...though I confess I did hear someone say you were the shining star of the Department of Insight.

C: …也罢，既然我默许拉帝奥先生参与此事，他就不是外人了。
E: ...I agreed for Mr. Ratio to become involved in this, I should consider him one of us.

C: 阿德勒当时似乎想到了什么，但之后却迟迟没有联络我。
E: Adler seemed to have had an idea at the time, but he never contacted me again.

C: 我深感荣幸，螺丝咕姆先生。可既然你早已看穿，又为何一言不发？
E: I must say, I'm quite honored, Mr. Screwllum, but do explain — why opt for silent wisdom when you already had the pieces of the puzzle?

C: 多亏了阿德勒。
E: It was all thanks to Adler.

C: 总觉得你的戏份很少…
E: Why do I feel like you didn't do much...?

C: 把它当作一层保护吧，保护我的研究，也保护你的人身安全。等解决了那些麻烦，我就会给你解药。
E: Treat it as a layer of protection. This will shield my research and your personal safety. Once the problems have been dealt with, I'll give you the antidote.

C: 汪汪汪！
E: Woof woof woof!

C: 哦，那不行。且不论原始博士那堆劣迹斑斑的研究，他和巡海游侠的恩怨肯定会被公司大做文章。别了，我可不想模拟宇宙沾上奇奇怪怪的舆论。
E: That's a hard pass. Given Dr. Primitive's shady research practices and his tussle with the Galaxy Rangers, the IPC will surely turn this into a media circus... he can get lost. I'd prefer it if the Simulated Universe remained scandal-free.

C: 空间站还有别的舱段？
E: There are other zones in the space station?

C: 它称自己与外壳是一体的。
E: It claims to be connected with its shell.

C: 事物的规律总是外表庞杂动人，内在却简单质朴。万物归因，一行公式可解众生迷茫。
E: The patterns of all things always have complicated and enchanting exteriors, while their inner essences remain simple and plain. If we were to trace things back to their roots, just one equation would be enough to solve the confusion of all life.

C: 访客记录查询。
E: Check visitor records.
(Meow...)

C: 安置豆沙灰灰。
E: Accommodate Gray Bean Paste

C: （得找个地方安置这小家伙…刚才的声音似乎就在附近，是从锁住的房间传来的，怎么进去呢？）
E: (I need to find a place for this little one... That sound seems to be from that locked room. How do I get in?)

C: 有趣的是，它们也拥有一种倾向；思念自己的造物主，对其产生如同天然存在的，婴儿对母亲、生命对食物、人与人的、奇怪的「情感」。
E: Interestingly, they also possess a kind of inclination — a yearning for their creator. It manifests as a natural, inherent emotion — similar to that of a baby towards its mother... Life towards sustenance, or the peculiar bond between humans.

C: 系统已激活，用户身份已确认。
E: System activated. User identity confirmed.

C: 已更新用户数据，导航关闭，请自行联络。
E: User data updated. Navigation disabled. Please make contact with the target personally.

C: 我一直记得你对我们家的帮助，要不是你，我现在可没福气陪女儿逛街。
E: I will never forget how you helped my family. I wouldn't be here shopping with my daughter right now if it weren't for you.

C: 他们下层区是这样子的。
E: That's just how the Underworld is over here.

C: 说说看，这一路走下来，你有什么感受？
E: Well? What did you learn on this little adventure?

C: 带他们回去。
E: Take them away.

C: 托帕小姐给我讲了一个故事：七百年前，星核降落于雅利洛-Ⅵ之后，原本在这个世界驻留的外来者预见到了危机的迫近，纷纷选择离去。
E: Topaz shared with me the story of the Stellaron's descent upon Jarilo-VI — how the original outsiders stationed here foresaw the impending disaster and chose to leave in large numbers.

C: 真的吗？我怎么觉得完全动摇不了她呢……
E: You sure? I really don't think she'll change her mind.

C: 布洛妮娅他们费了好大的力气才让这个世界稍微变好了一些…如果所有努力眨眼间就被剥夺，那未免太过残忍了……
E: Bronya invested so much just to make this world a little better. And now, it feels like all of her efforts will be undone in the blink of an eye. It's just so cruel...

C: 突然有种威压感…好恐怖呀。
E: This isn't going as planned... What should we do?

C: 倒是没人受重伤，只是有几个「地火」的弟兄擦破了些皮。对方没下死手…万幸。
E: Nobody's been seriously hurt, but a few Wildfire members got minor injuries. Fortunately for us, it seems like they were holding back.

C: 这两个家伙，到底怎么回事？
E: Ugh, what's their deal?

C: 我要见你们老板！
E: I want to speak to your boss!

C: 虽然我也很相信她的判断。
E: I trust her judgment too, but...

C: 了解。
E: Understood.

C: 这么想知道的话，就告诉你们吧——
E: So many eager faces — I won't keep you in the dark any longer.

C: 我或许了解个中原因。「造物引擎」完全是由贝洛伯格人自己建造的，没有借助任何外来的技术。
E: I may know the reason why. The Engine of Creation was constructed solely by the people of Belobog, without any external assistance.

C: 钻石最后选了你？我以为会是「欧泊」…或者「龙晶」…那桩生意，至少得P<unbreak>46</unbreak>以上的人出面。
E: Hold on a minute... Diamond picked you for this project? I was expecting someone like Opal or Obsidian to handle it — at least somebody higher than rank P<unbreak>46</unbreak>...

C: 想听实话吗？到了我这年纪，那些宏图大业，或者什么远大的计划，早就没什么吸引力了。
E: Wanna hear the truth? I'm afraid great ambitions and lofty plans no longer hold much appeal for an old-timer like me.

C: 她弃票了。
E: She thought it wasn't her place to say.

C: ——决不可放松警惕！
E: We must be vigilant!

C: 我要得什么病才能混进去？
E: Do I need to be ill before I can make inquiries?

C: 我每看到一个书上描述的病症，就感觉自己的情况完全符合…这书才翻到一半，我就已经和十几种不治之症对上号了。
E: Every book I read has descriptions that match my symptoms exactly... I can diagnose myself with a dozen incurable diseases before I get halfway through.

C: 钱是小事，命是…
E: Money's one thing, but life...

C: 瓦赫留下的那些药物…不对，那些甚至不能算「药物」，只是些实验中产生的副产品、试剂罢了。
E: What Vache left behind is nothing more than reagents and experimental by-products... The word "medicine" doesn't apply here.

C: 如果想要了解详情，掘掘博士随时为您服务！
E: For more information, Dr. Dig is more than pleased to answer you anytime!

C: 换句话说，分数越高的拳手实力越强，您和对手皆是如此。这也意味着随着您胜利的次数增加，战斗强度也会随之增大——不过，这点我猜您早有准备，对吧？
E: In other words, the higher the points, the stronger the boxer, for both you and your opponent. It also means that the more you win, the harder it gets. But I guess you're ready for that, right?

C: <size=36>比赛，现在正式开始！</size>
E: <size=36>The match officially starts now!</size>

C: 这么找不是办法。
E: We can't go on like this.

C: 或者说，独立的意义，不仅是要摆脱水魈，还包括卡波特，以及我的软弱。
E: In other words, independence does not only mean leaving the Xenohydro, but also Capote and my weaknesses.

C: 他们的阵型…完全找不到破绽啊！
E: Ugh — can't find a way to break their formation!

C: 我会接着努力，争取靠自己的力量走出去。他说过，只有努力的孩子才配得到表扬。
E: I'll keep on working hard and try to get out on my own. He said only hardworking kids deserve praise.

C: 哔嘟！哔嘟！发现近似物件，发现近似物件——请问是否要切换至搜索模式？
E: Beep! Beep! Matching object found, matching object found — do you want to switch to search mode?

C: 它能帮我们找东西，挺好用的。
E: It can help us find things. Pretty useful.

C: …好了，给你。记得把刚才看到的东西统统忘掉，也不许和别人说起这件事！
E: ...Done. Take this one instead. Forget all the texts you saw on the back, and don't you dare tell anyone else about it!

C: 你这样喊，不怕引来怪物吗？
E: Aren't you afraid that your shouting will attract monsters?

C: 听上去很有趣，但就怕当天的剧目不合妈妈的胃口。我再想想……
E: Sounds fun, but there's a chance it won't suit my mom's taste. Let me think...

C: 当然。
E: Sure thing.

C: …没什么，只是我的自言自语而已。走吧，{NICKNAME}，该去追逐往日的影子了。
E: ...Ignore me... I'm just talking to myself. Let's go, {NICKNAME}. It's time to face my past head-on.

C: ——因为全身上下都在发热，一回城里就会闷得满身大汗，哈哈哈。
E: ...because the city would be too hot for us. We'd break a sweat just sitting idle, haha.

C: 离得这么近观察你战斗的样子，我还是头一次。帅气又利落，不愧是下层区的救星。
E: That was my first time seeing you in battle... you've got some moves, don't you? No wonder you were able to save the Underworld.

C: 第三件事…我听说矿区有些小孩子也和这事有关联。这点我还没机会查证，你们不妨留意一下。
E: Thirdly, I heard there are children in the mines that might be involved. I haven't had a chance to look into it, but keep an eye out.

C: 他给我买了很多、很多新衣服！下层区根本买不到的那种！
E: He bought me lots of new clothes! Things you can't even find in the Underworld!

C: 您的店很…呃，雅致。
E: Your establishment is, uh... very fancy.

C: 好少见…发生什么了吗？
E: That's not usually like him. I wonder what's going on?

C: 真的吗？我们确实有帮上忙，对吧？太好啦！
E: Really? So we were a big help, weren't we? Awesome!

C: 这是你经过观察后得出的结论吗？
E: Did you arrive at such a conclusion through direct observation?

C: 先从熟人开始吧。
E: Let's start with people we already know.

C: …这位先生，抱歉，我们今天只是来调查展品失窃案的…而且我们办案讲求证据，如果您有什么更确凿的线索，不妨联系执勤的铁卫……
E: Sorry sir, today we're only here to investigate the museum thefts... and we can't close the case without evidence. If you come across any reliable clues, please report them to an on-duty Silvermane Guard...

C: 如果那位少爷说的属实，保险起见，我们想派一位经验丰富的「民间人士」去尝试接触「寒腿叔叔」，看看能不能把他从巢穴里引出来。
E: If what Mr. Norbert said is true, then our safest option is to send a civilian to try to reach out to Mr. Cold Feet and lure him out of his lair.

C: 轻敲四次，重敲一次。
E: Tap four times and knock once.

C: 你，解决了星核危机的英雄，大守护者敬重的战友宾朋…要是只因为眼前小小的一道宾馆房门就让犯人溜走了，岂不令人耻笑？
E: Wouldn't it be a shame if you, the hero of the Stellaron crisis, the supreme guardian's respected comrade-in-arms, let the prisoner slip away... just because of a hotel door?

C: 这样啊…那家伙，还是一如既往地狡猾，而且还擅长一些莫名其妙的戏法……
E: I see... So he's just as cunning and crafty as ever...

C: 您好！请您稍等，我这就把您的简历转交给佩拉小姐！
E: Hello! I'll pass your resume on to Miss Pela right away!

C: 没问题，我们会等你的。
E: No problem. We'll wait for you.

C: 我记得…在可可利亚大人上任以前，银鬃铁卫的战略还是以防守为主——那时的野战医院，绝大部分时间里应该都与普通医院无异吧？
E: I remember... Before Madam Cocolia took office, the Silvermane Guards were still focused on defense — back then, field treatment hospitals were pretty much just the same as normal hospitals, right?

C: 你有兴趣来博物馆当志愿者吗？
E: Are you interested in volunteering at the museum?

C: 嘿，这不是{NICKNAME}嘛。来找我有什么事？
E: Hey, isn't this {NICKNAME}? How can I help you?

C: 哈，真够巧的！佩拉前脚刚走，你就来问我这个啦。
E: What a coincidence! You came asking about this right after Pela left.

C: 就这么写…「星核危机解决前夕，多次协助外来者通缉犯成功逃避银鬃铁卫追捕，并在冲突中成功击败铁卫军官和戍卫官」——你觉得呢？
E: Write this: "Assisted wanted outsiders in escaping the pursuit of Silvermane Guards multiple times, and successfully defeated the Silvermane officers and captain in the Stellaron Crisis." What do you think?

C: 行了，那我们一起去上层区吧，把这玩意交了去。
E: Well. Let's head to the Overworld and submit this thing.

C: {NICKNAME}——你有什么想说的吗？
E: {NICKNAME}, is there anything you want to say?

C: 嗯？你们在说什么悄悄话呢？
E: Eh? Are you two having a secret talk?

C: …咳咳！没什么……
E: ...Ahem! Nothing...

C: …那可是我的亲戚，其他的流浪者我才管不着。
E: ...He's family. The other vagrants aren't my problem.

C: 要我说，他也算是制止了地下的冲突，只不过方式简单粗暴，毫无人味。
E: If you want my take, he prevented another Underworld conflict, even if the execution was rough around the edges.

C: 哔嘟…本机脑波扫描模组已损坏。请在保修期承诺的二百三十二年零八十四天内将本产品送至「星际和平家电」门店进行免费保修维护。
E: Beep, beep, beep... My brainwave scanner module is damaged. Please send me to an Interastral Peace Appliances retail store near you for free repair within the warranty period of <unbreak>232</unbreak> years <unbreak>84</unbreak> days.

C: 哔嘟…正在处理请求……
E: Beep, beep, beep... Request is being processed...

C: 这下应该就大功告成啦！
E: Alright, mission accomplished!

C: 你应该货卖两家，坐山观虎斗。
E: Maybe you should've sold the intel to both parties and let them duke it out.

C: 再见！
E: Seeya!

C: 这小鬼！上来就给我扣一顶小偷的帽子，一看就是欠管教！我这人光明磊落，从来不干那小偷小摸的事。
E: You little brat! How dare you label me a thief! Someone needs to give you a good lesson on manners! I'm an honest and decent man, I'd never do such a shady thing!

C: 好…你们问吧。要是能帮我洗清嫌疑，那就太好了。
E: Okay... ask away. It would be good to clear myself of suspicion.

C: 啊，对了！在来矿区之前，虎克还在路上看到了桑博叔叔…这件事会不会跟他有关系啊？
E: Oh yeah! I saw Mr. Sampo on the way to the mine when I came here... Could he be involved in this?

C: 难道真的不是你？
E: Is it really not you?

C: 我们去老爹存放探测器的地方找找，说不定还能找到些线索。
E: Let's go look around where daddy kept the detector. Maybe we can find some clues there.

C: 我跟你不熟…
E: We are not that close...

C: 你放心好了，你的委托我已经派人加急帮你处理了，绝对不会耽搁的。
E: Don't worry, I've sent someone to handle this matter. Rest assured.

C: 居然又上了你的当…
E: Can't believe I fell for your tricks again...

C: 这下好了，匹克老弟的矿具找回来了，我的租赁生意也能顺利进行，你也拿到了传奇藏宝图…这就叫「三赢」吧？
E: Well... Peak got his tools back, my renting business can continue and you got your treasure map... I bet we can say this is a win-win-win situation?

C: 麻烦你们转告娜塔莎，矿队会做好重新开工的准备——如果缆车站真的能开放，我们也会派矿工代表上去和筑城者交涉的。
E: Please tell Natasha that we're ready to get back to work... If the cable car station can start operating again, we'll dispatch a mining representative to negotiate with the Architects.

C: 我们出发吧，为铁卫和「地火」开路。
E: Let's move out. We need to clear a way for Wildfire and the Guards.

C: 那个小姑娘…很勇敢。跟你当年很像。
E: That's one brave little girl... You were like that at her age too.

C: ——昨天还宣誓要守护的人，隔了一晚就活该被放弃…什么家规，真可笑。
E: Vowing to protect the Underworlders in one breath, and then deciding they deserved to be abandoned in the next... "Family code of conduct" — what a joke.

C: 不过，那家伙消散前可真够吵的…{NICKNAME}，你听清楚它说什么了吗？
E: All that noise before it perished... {NICKNAME}, did you catch what it said?

C: …原来如此。你真是一条路走到黑了啊，可可利亚……
E: I see... You really made no effort to correct your mistakes, Cocolia...

C: 它说…「谢谢你，希露瓦」。
E: It said, "Thank you, Serval."

C: 前方是战斗区域，非战斗人员不得入内！
E: Battleground to the fore, non-combatants are not allowed beyond this point!

C: 还不能开火？！
E: Can't we open fire yet!?
