C: 啊…是七百年前的生鱼片，还有可爱的拟态雪蛞蝓。
E: Ah... raw fish from <unbreak>700</unbreak> years ago and some cute mimic snow slug.

C: 真的没这个必要啊，交给我就好了嘛。露营就是要放松，不用老是紧绷绷的。
E: You really don't need to, just leave it to me. Camping is about relaxing — no need to be so tense.

C: …是啊。
E: ...I know.

C: 我觉得，她应该是在检查那枚软盘的内容…让她一个人静静吧。
E: I think she's looking over the contents of that floppy disk... Let's give her some time.

C: 你还真打算给他钱啊？都跟你说了，这是他的惯用伎俩——
E: You're actually planning to give this little crook money? I'm telling you. This is his same old trick—

C: 要不要我带你在孤儿院周围转转？跟你不一样，小时候的事我可都记得一清二楚。
E: How about I show you around the orphanage a bit more? Unlike you, my memories from when I was little are crystal clear.

C: 所以他才守着大柱子，不让人离开？
E: So he stands guard at the huge pillar stopping people from leaving?

C: 怎…怎么启动不了……
E: It... it won't turn on...

C: 是老巫婆给虎克的奖励！等我挖出来你就知道了。
E: It's a reward from the old witch! You'll know what it is after I dig it up.

C: 尤利安，吾辈楷模…
E: Well, that explains "sorta wanna go play on the swings for a while..."

C: 我也不知道……
E: I don't know...

C: 被怪物毁掉了一些。
E: Monsters had destroyed some of them.

C: 是我啊，朋友们，奥列格派我来给你们带个路……
E: I will be your guide, friends. By order of Chief Oleg...

C: 右手？给，你想干嘛——哎哟喂，疼疼疼！
E: My right hand? Here you go. Why is this part of the— Hey, hey! Ow, ow, ow!

C: 一点点火，一点点光，深夜他决定逃出这地方
E: Crackling flame, flickering light, now he escapes in the dead of the night

C: 哈！终于不用费脑子了，让我来修理修理这个铁疙瘩！
E: Ha! Finally, no more racking our brains. This rust bucket's about to meet its maker!

C: 不是想象。
E: They're not made-up.

C: 放心吧，克拉拉！我们是来和他讲道理的。
E: It's okay, Clara! We're here to reason with him.

C: 真相总是让人心痛。
E: The truth can be heartbreaking.

C: 现在你可以相信我们了。
E: You can believe us now.

C: 虎克想说的是拍卖会吧？原来如此，流浪者营地的那个吗？
E: The auction... right Hook? The one at the vagrant camp?

C: 嗯，我再看看…做工确实不错，布料也很柔软…但光凭这些应该也卖不出多少钱吧？
E: Hm, let me take another look... The craftsmanship is excellent, and the fabric is soft... but I'm afraid that won't command a high price on its own.

C: 探针？小朋友指的可是「地髓矿脉探针」？据在下所知，想买探针的人还真不少，成交价格估计不会低于<unbreak>600</unbreak>冬城盾。
E: Probe? Are you talking about the Geomarrow Probe? As far as I know, there are a lot of people interested in acquiring that device. The estimated sale price is no less than <unbreak>600</unbreak> shield.

C: 你们是卖家吧？刚才我在竞拍清单上看到个什么玩偶熊，是不是你们的拍品？
E: You're sellers, right? I just caught sight of a teddy bear on the bid list. Is that yours?

C: 你听谁说的？这地髓探针是个什么玩意儿？
E: Where did you hear that? What is a Geomarrow Probe exactly?

C: 想想有没有别的礼物可以送吧。
E: Aren't there any other gifts you could send him?

C: 太好了，虎克竟然真的拍下来了！
E: Woohoo!!! Hook actually won the bid!

C: 哎呀，被你听到啦？不可以太骄傲哦，荣誉队员！
E: Argh, you heard that? Don't get too cocky, honorary member!

C: 没什么！虎克才没有在背后夸奖你哦，荣誉队员！
E: Nothing! Hmph, Hook would never compliment an honorary member behind their back.

C: 居然…卖掉了……
E: You... sold him...

C: 没想到这悍匪喜欢垃圾堆…
E: I didn't expect our thief to like waste heaps...

C: 确实…这个型号的机器人，应该没有配备金属利器才对。
E: Yes... This robot model probably doesn't have any kind of metal weapon.

C: 不过，有一点克拉拉可以确定——这个小家伙没有受到遥控，它是完全凭着自身的意志在行动……
E: But one thing is for certain... This little fella is not under remote control. He's operating entirely of his own accord...

C: 那个…克拉拉想先把机械零件还给叔叔阿姨们，之后再继续确认这个小家伙的状况。去机械墓场找外壳的事，能先麻烦{NICKNAME}{F#姐姐}{M#哥哥}吗？
E: I'm gonna return the parts to the vagrants first, then I'll check on the little fella. Can I trust you to find a shell in the machine graveyard, {NICKNAME}?

C: 已收到克拉拉小姐的指令，为您规划在「机械墓场」的游览路线。本机将持续为您导航航航航——
E: Miss Clara has assigned me the task of planning your sightseeing route in the machine graveyard. I will guide you down the path.

C: （但外壳看起来状况不错，姑且带上吧。）
E: (However, the shell appears to be in good condition, so I'll bring it with me.)

C: 啊，找到了！它的核心在这里。我要把它装起来，带回去……
E: Here it is! This is the core. I'll pack it up and take it with us...

C: 但感觉这里的机器人都很聪明。
E: But the robots here appear to be quite intelligent...

C: …虽然克拉拉说自己一定会陪着帕斯卡到最后，但其实…克拉拉也很害怕。
E: I said I will stay with Pascal until the end, but I'm actually scared too.

C: 史瓦罗先生没有选择清除这种「病毒」——这不就是最好的证明吗？
E: ...Mr. Svarog chose not to get rid of it. Isn't that the most convincing proof?

C: 邓恩…抱歉，你就先小睡一会儿吧。
E: I'm sorry Dunn... Time for a little nap.

C: 哈…好像怎么都打不倒他……
E: Phew... he just won't go down...

C: …贝洛伯格的人民。
E: ...The people of Belobog.

C: 当然，早就理解了。不过依我看，她需要的不是别人的理解，而是迈过自己心里的那道坎。
E: Of course I do, I've understood them for a while now. But as far as I can tell, she doesn't need other people's understanding. She needs to understand her own heart.

C: 可这里是军事管制区啊，按说连只雪地鼠都进不来…你是怎么出现在这里的？
E: But this is a military restricted zone, and not even a snow mouse is supposed to be able to enter... How did you manage to get in?

C: 这批机器人失控了，我来回收。
E: It's a faulty robot. Let me handle it.

C: 啊…你、你来了！那个，茉莉她……
E: Oh... You are here! Well... Molly...

C: 你还没看清吗，布洛妮娅？这里没有对错，有的只是人类的傲慢，还有短视。
E: Do you still not see, Bronya? There is no right or wrong here. Some of them acted out of human pride, others out of human shortsightedness.

C: 你会听到真正的宏伟之声，布洛妮娅…然后，你会理解我的选择。
E: You will hear the real voice of magnificence, Bronya... Then, you will understand my choice.

C: 甚至还妄图用「它」来抑制星核…可悲，可笑。
E: Even going so far as to attempt to use "it" to control the Stellaron... Woeful... laughable.

C: ——你还在犹豫什么，可可利亚？这不是你一直在期待的吗？离开这个笼子，亲眼看看这座城市吧！我们还有什么可失去的吗？
E: ...Why do you hesitate, Cocolia? Isn't this what you've always been hoping for? Get out of this cage and take a look at the city. What is there to lose!?

C: 看着我，可可利亚！千万别把目光移开……
E: Look at me, Cocolia! Don't you dare look away...

C: 今晚…咱们就去老歌德那儿开个庆功宴吧！
E: As for tonight... let's go to Old Goethe's place and have a big feast to celebrate!

C: 一辆超快的星槎打断了你的思路，明显那是危险驾驶。
E: A speeding starskiff interrupts your thought process, obviously driving recklessly.

C: 为什么？
E: Why?

C: 这还不至于要辞退她吧。
E: It's not that bad. No need to fire her.

C: 见到了。
E: I saw her.

C: 要是真的也不打紧，俺先去把现在要做的事情做了。
E: Even if it's true, it doesn't matter. I need to go do what I need to do.

C: 岩明大人的推理应该没有问题，走吧，我们去迴星港抓捕犯人。
E: Yanming's inference seems right. Let's go to Stargazer Navalia to catch the suspect.

C: 按照学会的宗旨，知识需以同样珍贵的知识交换，我给了她一份古老文献的影本。而她回赠了我一纸学会从未收录过的丹方。
E: According to the Guild's creed, knowledge should be exchanged with an equally valuable piece of knowledge. I gave her a copy of an ancient text, and she gifted me a prescription the Guild had never seen.

C: 我明白了…
E: I get it...

C: （上报希拉的学习成果）
E: (Reporting the results of Sheila's studies.)

C: 我也是蘑菇啊。
E: I'm a mushroom too.

C: 呃，我其实也不知道静斋那位爱人到底是什么流派的诗人，所以一口气造了好几个机巧，各个流派尽在我掌握！
E: Uh, I actually don't know what kind of poet Jingzhai's ex is, so I've rolled out a few different ones — so I can master each genre of poetry!

C: 拜托你了，{NICKNAME}，找回这些机巧，您就是我的再生媒人啊！我不会亏待你的。
E: Please, {NICKNAME}, find these ingenia, and you'll be my celebrity matchmaker for real! I'll reward you well.

C: …我定位到了下一位诗人，就在星槎海，走吧。
E: ...I've located the next poet over in Starskiff Haven. Let's go.

C: 但我还是想要灵感玉兆。
E: But I want the Inspo Jade Abacus.

C: 我们付出了这么多努力，却没有一件事是与静斋小姐有关的。
E: None of what we've done so far has anything to do with Ms. Jingzhai.

C: …我还不想放弃，你们能再帮帮我吗？
E: ...I don't feel like giving up yet. Can you help me again?

C: 想和你打听一下静斋的事。
E: I'd like to ask you about Jingzhai.

C: 据说他们不是一世之缘，孤屿的前世、前前世似乎也与静斋卜官是恋人关系。外人说起来都觉得浪漫极了。
E: It is said that they are lovers not only in this life. Guyu and Jingzhai dated each other in their two previous lifetimes too. Everyone considers that a romantic love story.

C: 你说…孤屿是我的前世？我一直嫉妒的诗人是我自己的前世……
E: Do you mean... I was Guyu in my former life? I am the poet I've been jealous of so far...

C: 找货全做个「天才卜者」的匾。
E: Get Salesby to make a plaque that reads "Genius Diviner."

C: 不是你不够好，不够真心，只是我已经不会再爱上任何人了，这与你无关。
E: You're a great person, and I can feel your sincerity. However, I just can't fall in love with anyone anymore. This has nothing to do with you.

C: 哎…真希望他能别再执着于我了。
E: *sigh* I really hope that he gives up on me.

C: 这样吧，我给你拿些好处，你去帮我揭下小广告好不好？尤其是那些特别显眼的，我记得有什么「寻物启事」的，你都去揭下来。
E: How about I pay you, and you help me remove the posters, especially the ones that are particularly eye-catching? I remember there are some Lost and Found notices. Please remove them all.

C: 此去经年，应是良辰好景虚设。我们有缘再见。
E: Years have passed since this departure, and it seems the promised beautiful moments were but illusions. If fate allows, we shall meet again.

C: 不过，最近他突然向我提出了想要做外驻研究，还指明想要进行仙舟文化现象调查。
E: Recently, however, he suddenly requested to be dispatched to conduct research off-station, specifically to investigate the cultural phenomenon in Xianzhou.

C: 姐姐不要以己度人呀。
E: Lady, you shouldn't project yourself unto others.

C: 你要先给出诚意。
E: You have to show your sincerity.

C: 拉、拉黑了？
E: I—I'm blocked?

C: 她、她…算了，我也不演了，我就是黛青。
E: She... She... Oh, darn it. I'll drop the act. I am Daiqing.

C: 你们将他带到地衡司自首，地衡司严谨地处理了「美丽狐仙聊天」的案件。
E: You take him to turn himself in at the Realm-Keeping Commission. The Commission took the case seriously and processed the case of the Foxian Beauty Chat.

C: 仙舟上到处都是这样的狐人姐姐、狐人妹妹吗？
E: Are you saying foxian ladies like this are everywhere on Xianzhou?

C: 仙舟就是这样的地方。
E: Xianzhou is, in fact, a place like this.

C: 照片拍好了。
E: I took the pictures.

C: 与平日衰老的样子不同，老头以惊人的速度开始专心处理起这些图案来，不时发出梦呓般的自言自语。
E: Unlike his usual tired and old self, the elderly man starts sorting out the drawings at an astonishing speed. In the meantime, he can be heard muttering to himself like a sleep talker's ramblings.

C: 无论见过还是没见过，长生种应该不会记得咱们短生种的脸——就像一枚水果，昨日鲜活饱满，今日皱缩干瘪，再过几日便是一抔土灰了。
E: Whether he did or did not, it isn't likely that a long-life species can remember a short-life species like us. We are like fruits that look fresh one day, shrunken and dry the next, and are reduced to dust in yet another few days.

C: 不行啊，白露大人，我信不过{F#她}{M#他}……
E: No, Lady Bailu. I don't trust {F#her}{M#him}...

C: 出来之前，我和白露大人有一桩交易。这件事情非办到不可。求求你，请不要带走她！
E: I made a deal with Lady Bailu before we escaped — we have an urgent task to complete. Please, don't take her away!

C: 你问的问题，仙舟人自己也问了千百遍。
E: The people of the Xianzhou have asked themselves that question thousands of times.

C: 我想吃琼实鸟串！我就是想吃琼实鸟串！给我买点尝尝嘛？
E: I want berrypheasant skewers! I just want berrypheasant skewers! Can you please get me some?

C: 小神医，你好啊。
E: How's it going, O miracle doctor?

C: 你不知道那是仙舟律法中不赦十恶之一吗？
E: You know that's one of the Xianzhou's Ten Unpardonable Sins, right?

C: 别动…让我擦一下药膏。
E: Stay still... this ointment will help.

C: 听到梁沐说话的那一瞬间，我突然很悲伤。人一生的时光不该是这样的，至少不应该连这段时间的拥有者都对它无所谓。
E: ...but the moment I heard Liangmu's words, I suddenly felt sad. A person shouldn't feel that way about their life... They shouldn't be indifferent to the time they own.

C: 咳咳…我这头盔…怎么…怎么已经取不下来了……
E: *coughing* Why can't I... take off... my helmet...?

C: 我们没有告诉他，这样做，真的好吗？
E: We didn't tell him the truth. Was that really the right thing to do?

C: 丹恒大人，无论您是要会见白露小姐，还是同妾身一道去参见龙师长老，我都会在去往鳞渊境的渡口等您到来。
E: Master Dan Heng, whether you choose to meet Miss Bailu or go with me to see the Preceptor elders, I will be waiting for you by the ferry leading to Scalegorge Waterscape.

C: 仙舟的英雄也就此沦为了大罪人。
E: And so the hero of the Xianzhou became its arch-villain.

C: 持明族轮回自足，可却无法生育繁衍，遭遇天灾人祸，难免会折去人口。
E: The Vidyadhara perform self-reincarnation, but we are unable to reproduce. Natural and artificial disasters inevitably reduce our population.

C: 不。我宁可入灭，也绝不去那里……
E: Too late, Jing Yuan. I go no further...

C: 我原本担心白露小姐空有名衔，却没有龙尊之力，迟早会遭遇麻烦。但，这是我多虑了，你拥有真正的力量。
E: Miss Bailu... at first I was worried that your title of high elder was in name only, and that an absence of true power would eventually put you in grave danger... It seems I was overthinking things — you have no shortage of true power.

C: 真的太感谢您了！
E: We can't thank you enough!

C: 二位稍等。这污水多少有些毒害，在下略通医术，二位按我的方子抓些药，服下后好好休息。
E: Ah, one moment, both of you. That sewage could well contain harmful compounds. I'm something of a doctor — let me give you a prescription. Make sure to use the medicine and get some good rest.

C: 哦…对哦，确实是这个道理。还是你聪明！
E: Oh yeah, I guess. You're pretty smart... sometimes.

C: 哇，净砚小姐突然变得好耀眼。
E: Wow, good for you Miss Jingyan.

C: 对呀，你就是神探旁边的能干小助手！
E: That's right, and you're the sidekick!

C: 看来隐书不在啊…她现在会在哪里呢？
E: Looks like Yinshu isn't here after all... Where could she be?

C: 不，这些都很有价值。非常感谢你。
E: On the contrary, any information you can give is valuable. Thank you very much.

C: 不像在推理，倒像被夺舍。
E: Is this deduction or necromancy?

C: （哦，对了，差点忘了这个撕掉的扉页…他把这张纸带走，那八成是有大用的……）
E: (Oh, almost forgot about that title page... He took it with him, so it must have had some significance.)

C: （想了想，不太对吧？他们怎么会在一个军机重地见面？）
E: (Now that I think about it, something's not right. Why would they rendezvous at a military airfield?)

C: 其实是两命。
E: Since when did we start sharing a life?

C: 咱们是客人，客人有客人要守的规矩。
E: No, but we've been invited — we certainly don't want to be late.

C: 今日请来二位，是为了加深与列车的了解，切莫让这些琐事扫了兴致。
E: I invited you here to gain a better understanding of the Express, not bore you with these trivialities.

C: 就会成为星槎飞行士？
E: They'll become a starskiff pilot?

C: 这是妈妈一直贴身携带的挂饰，但我以前从没注意到，里面还藏了个小东西……
E: Mom always carries this trinket around with her, but I never realized there was something inside...

C: 嗯…瓦尔特先生说得对。在此之前，我还有些事要确认。景元将军所说的「过去」，应该就存放在司辰宫的某个档案柜里。
E: Hmm... You're right, Mr. Yang... but I still have something else to check first. This past that General Jing Yuan mentioned is probably archived in the Palace of Astrum.

C: 她确实不会知道，但是君子要慎独。
E: She won't, but I have my principles.

C: 因为我已经触碰过天空了。
E: Cause... I already touched the sky.

C: 天赋？要是没有那两个异邦人，你现在已经死了。偷走星槎，飞上天的那一刻很快乐吧？被孽物包围时呢？
E: Talent? You'd be dead if it weren't for those two travelers. Do you think stealing a starskiff and taking to the skies is a show of talent? What about being trapped by abominations?

C: 妨碍你捉拿卡芙卡了，真对不起。
E: Sorry for getting in your way when you were going after Kafka.

C: 是啊，我们都是…「命运的奴隶」。
E: Haha, yes, we're all "Destiny's Slave."

C: 于是，艾利欧就看见了新的未来可能性。
E: ...and so Elio saw a new future possibility.

C: 就这么简单。
E: That's all there is to it.

C: 我不知道，阿刃没有告诉我，他说自己也不知道。
E: I don't know. Bladie didn't tell me — he said he doesn't know either.

C: 本座素不好斗，唯好解斗…
E: I, Diviner Fu, do not like conflict...

C: 快醒醒！忆庭正在偷窃你的记忆！
E: Wake up! The Garden of Recollection is stealing your memories!

C: 你早说啊，名字我都报出去了。
E: Next time, why not remind me before I give up my name?

C: 早有耳闻，唉…恩公们来得不巧，仙舟出了意外，本不适合待客。无论几位是来观光、求医还是经商，怕是什么事情都做不了啦。
E: Indeed I have. *sigh* ...You've arrived at a bad time — the Xianzhou has suffered an incident. Whether you're here for leisure, treatment, or trade, I'm afraid you won't be able to go through with it.

C: 刚才打架时你不是自己报了吗？叫罗——罗什么…罗刹！对吧？本姑娘记着呢。
E: You already said it when we were busy fighting. Luo... something... Luocha! Is that right? I remember it.

C: 还请各位船上稍坐。我们这就出发。
E: Please take your seats, everyone. We'll be off right away.

C: 可恶，谁干的好事啊！怎么办，本姑娘对机巧玩意儿向来一窍不通…等会儿，你为什么会知道？！
E: Ughh, who did this? I'm terrible with ingenium creations and stuff... Hold on, how do you know!?

C: 稍等。
E: Not yet.

C: 饮月，若是想起了什么，不妨说来听听。
E: Imbibitor Lunae, if memories are returning to you, share them.

C: 命不久矣。
E: She won't live much longer.

C: 呜汪，汪～
E: Woof, woooof~

C: 大张旗鼓只会打草惊蛇。好猎人向来独来独往。
E: Making a big show of it will only scare the snake deeper into the grass... A good hunter must operate alone.

C: 对了，犯人要在各个洞天间穿行，还得依靠星槎。
E: Hmm... A fugitive would still have to rely on starskiffs to travel between different delves.

C: 是呀，打从「饮月之乱」后，罗浮的剑首就一直空悬着，不过，待到罗浮云骑部队巡猎归来，演武仪典再开，这头衔我是志在必得。
E: Right! Ever since the Sedition of Imbibitor Lunae, the title of Sword Champion has gone unclaimed. But once everything settles down and the Combat Arts Ceremony returns, it's a title I'm determined to win!

C: 不了，我不习惯跟陌生人走。
E: It's a no — I don't make a habit of following strangers around.

C: 好的，再等一下。
E: Okay. Just a moment.

C: 好啊，那这下一步等我们明天再来吧？我现在是勤务时间，偷偷跑出来的，再不回去他们会起疑心的。
E: Sure... but can it wait till tomorrow? I'm supposed to be on duty right now — they'll get suspicious if I don't head back soon.

C: 长期合作的伙伴…没看出来，你还是个道上兄弟。
E: A long-time associate, eh? You're well-connected, I see...

C: 梓桥听完，打了几个电话。在确认情况后，她帮你找到了那个上面写着「神策府收，加急」的邮包。
E: Ziqiao listens to your explanation. After making a few calls and confirming the situation, she helps you find a parcel that has "For the Seat of Divine Foresight. Urgent," written on it.

C: 等等…你认得我？你从哪里认识我的？为什么听到「执信」这个名字，你的表情就变得不对劲了？
E: Wait... you recognize me? Where do you know me from? Your face changed when you heard my name...

C: 我冤枉啊！这人可是当着我的面杀了一个云骑啊！
E: I—I couldn't have known, sir! I witnessed this person slay a Cloud Knight before my very eyes!

C: 汝之样貌甚是熟悉。
E: You look familiar.

C: 啊，等等我们！
E: Hey, wait for us!

C: 但我想，黑天鹅女士留下这枚梦泡定有她的用意。不过，这就不是我一介局外人能妄断的了。
E: But, I also think Miss Black Swan must have her own reason for holding on to this dream bubble. And as an outsider, that is not my place to judge.

C: 我只对那些失格之人发起挑战，而熔炼是我保护那些剑器的方式。
E: Yes, but only for those who cross the line. Melting their swords is my way of protecting those weapons.

C: 我不认识啊！既然是工造司的人，又怎么会不认得这儿的路呢？
E: No idea who she is! If she really works here, how can she not know her way around?

C: 和使团一样，他要是想偷宝剑，何必非要在送来罗浮之后再将它偷走呢？
E: So, he wouldn't have gone through all that trouble to bring it to the Luofu if he wanted to keep the sword for himself, right?

C: 那么……
E: So...

C: 剑匣内鞘
E: Sword Case Interior

C: 这里是…你的记忆？
E: Is this... your memory?

C: 我记得这些人为我做的一切：放在山洞口的食物，缝补的皮袄，还有那些人加入我之前立下的誓言。
E: I remember everything the people did for me: They left food at the entrance of my cave, fixed my fur coat, and some even joined my resistance.

C: 打从你在赠剑仪式上出现，爷爷心中就警铃大作。为此我特地准备了另一把剑作为替代。放心，剑里绝对没有添加岁阳！
E: Well, ever since you showed up at the ceremony, I had a hunch, so I prepared another sword as a backup plan. And don't worry, this one has nothing to do with heliobi!

C: （该用哪个证物来说服大毫呢？）
E: (Which piece of evidence should I use to convince Dahao?)

C: 只是一些「记忆」层面的暗示。如果一件事出现在所有人的记忆中…那么它就是「事实」。
E: Just some suggestions at the memory level. If something happens in everybody's memory... then that something becomes a fact.

C: 其实不太讲得通，就算这三个人关系不好，可是……
E: That actually doesn't make much sense. Even if they were on bad terms, those three...

C: …您要想指认我是花火，可得提出相应的证据才行。哦，证据怕是有点难了，所以…「推理」也可以。
E: ...If you want to accuse me of being Sparkle, you have to provide the evidence. Oh, I'm afraid evidence is a little hard to come by... so "deduction" will do.

C: 这条领带是佐罗的东西，而它正是本案的凶器，还有比这更坚实的铁证吗？
E: This tie belongs to Lefton, and it just so happens to be the murder weapon in this case. Could the evidence be any more solid than this?

C: 游戏马上要结束了…这一次，我们会追上她。
E: This game will be over soon... This time, we're going to catch her.

C: 卜算不是谈空说玄。条件不足，所占对象不明，答案就像星海捞针，你懂我的意思吧？
E: Divination is no mere conjecture. If the parameters are insufficient and uncertainty surrounds the target, then it is like looking for a needle in a galaxy. Do you understand?

C: 呼，有惊无险。这下三个阵基都启动了。
E: Phew, we did it. All three terminals activated.

C: 把话说清楚啊！
E: Tell us what's going on!

C: 你不是一直想试试，当将军是种什么样的体验么？
E: You've been eager to discover for yourself what it is to be a general, have you not?

C: 不如等灾变平复，再来和各位谈谈「回报」的话题。
E: Once catastrophe has been averted, we shall discuss this in greater detail.

C: …不必了。
E: ...No need.

C: 事在人为，走吧！
E: I'm sure it's nothing we can't manage. Let's go!

C: 为了抢救成果吧？
E: To save his research data?

C: 那么，告辞了。
E: Well then, goodbye.

C: 我不能和你们同行啦。
E: I'm sorry I'm not able to accompany you further.

C: 谁跟你们公平分配，世上就是拳头大的说了算！
E: Who said anything about sharing? Might makes right!

C: 来…来吃小孩？哈哈…你别胡说八道了……
E: D—Devour children? Hahaha... N—Not funny...

C: 老大！
E: Boss!

C: 你没事吧？
E: Are you okay?

C: 怎么样？药已经送到了吗？
E: How was she? Did you deliver the medicine?

C: 总会有愿意帮她的人。
E: There will always be someone willing to help her.

C: 想问的话就问吧，我一定知无不言。
E: Ask, and I shall answer to the best of my ability.

C: （不…不对劲，身体好热，好难受…有点喘不过气来了……）
E: (S—Something's wrong — I'm burning up... Feels like I can't breathe...)

C: 不少兄弟姐妹都折在{F#她}{M#他}手里了！
E: Many of our brethren have fallen by {F#her}{M#his} hands!

C: 要知道，你帮了我，就是帮了那些下落不明的小羊。如此你便在丰饶之主那儿累积了功德福报。往后你的人生便会身体健康，好运连连！
E: You should know that by helping me, you're helping those missing sheep too, and that will earn you merit with the Aeon of Abundance. You'll be in good health and have great luck in the future.

C: 不行，放生帮的事业，是光荣的事业，是脱离了低级趣味的事业。
E: No way. Being a part of the Unshackled is glorious and meaningful.

C: 接下来，贝娜，她希望解救无法繁衍的濒危物种。
E: Next, it's Benna. Her goal is to rescue endangered species that are unable to reproduce.

C: 既然这是咱们一起协商得出的结论，那咱们就一起奔波这么一回吧。
E: Since this is a decision we made together, let's do our best to make it work.

C: 你可真能挑事啊你。
E: You really know how to pick a fight, don't you?

C: 我明白了，我没问题了！
E: I understand! I have no more questions!

C: {NICKNAME}提醒了我，只要让这家伙在能量耗尽后进入节能停滞，打开太阳能板晒上几天就行了。
E: Thanks for the reminder, {NICKNAME}. When this individual runs out of energy, just let it enter the energy-saving mode and expose the solar panel to sunlight for a few days.

C: 呃，也没什么，就是好久没有更新了，想拍些有关幽灵鬼怪的影像，当作视频素材…嘿嘿。
E: Uh, no reason. I haven't posted anything for ages, so I wanted to film some ghosts for my videos... hehe.

C: 嗯，我能感受到你信守承诺的笃定。这份念头沉沉的，不太好消化。
E: Mm, I can taste your integrity — such a rich flavor. A little hard to digest...

C: 别找了。桂乃芬这会儿多半已经被岁阳吃了吧？
E: Give it up. Guinaifen was probably eaten by the heliobi already.

C: 怎怎怎、怎么会这样？ 连阳气旺盛的桂乃芬也···那我岂不更容易被盯上了......
E: H—H—How can that be!? If that could happen to someone as lively as Miss Guinaifen... that means I'm in even more danger...

C: 谁能想到，大岁阳「燎原」最好斗的碎片，竟然被封印在一个哭哭唧唧的小姑娘身体里充当看门狗——
E: Who would have thought that a piece of Ignamar the Great — the fragment with the most fight in it — would become a guard dog sealed inside a crybaby...

C: 尾巴大爷，她对你的来历一无所知呢…小妹妹，岁阳本该寻人类聚集的地方盘踞，眼下却要在这荒无人烟的绥园里聚首，你知道是为何吗？
E: Well, "Mr. Tail," seems she knows nothing about your past... Little missy, do you know why the heliobi are gathered in this abandoned garden instead of seizing human habitations?

C: 仇怨？真是肤浅。如果非要为我们的行事加上一些动机……
E: Grudge? How shallow. If you must know the forces behind our actions...

C: 你们看，门后…有一面镜子。
E: Look! Th—There's a mirror behind the door...

C: …幻胧？…幻胧！我记起来啦！我记起来啦！这么好的棋子，我也想要！
E: ...Phantylia? Phantylia! I remember! What a wonderful host... I want it!

C: 绥园的情况更糟了，汝等为何还不出来，莫非里面有了其他变化？
E: The situation in Fyxestroll Garden is getting worse. Why have you not left? Is something the matter in there?

C: 去调查其他铜镜。
E: Investigate other mirrors.

C: 所以，我们接下来……
E: So, we're gonna...

C: 只要挺过这一段时间就好了……
E: You just have to get through this...

C: 「特调」？
E: Special drink?

C: 报酬方面，您不必担心…多少我都可以支付。毕竟金钱对我来说已经没有意义了。
E: As for the reward, you don't have to worry... I'll pay whatever it takes. Money has no meaning to me anymore.

C: 我不能欺骗老客户…
E: I can't scam our loyal customers...

C: （也许我真的永远无法在梦境世界中立足……）
E: (I may never be able to hold my own in the Dreamscape...)

C: …情况恐怕有变，柯柯娜小姐。我猜，庞德之所以让我来给您传话，是因为…咳，是因为他大概不会再回匹诺康尼了。
E: ...I'm afraid circumstances have changed, Miss Cocona. I'm guessing that the reason Pound had me deliver his message to you, is because... Ahem, it's because he probably won't be returning to Penacony.

C: 无论发生什么，不要放弃自己。
E: No matter what happens, don't give up on yourself.

C: 对不起，柯柯娜。
E: I'm sorry, Cocona.

C: 如果您恰巧获知了真相…是否要向我传达那个真相，就由您来决定吧。
E: If you happen to learn of the truth... I shall leave it up to you whether to share it with me or not.

C: 也就是所谓的「联觉梦境」。
E: This is the so-called "Synesthesia Dreamscape."

C: 我深爱着他。我深爱着他。我……
E: I love him deeply. I love him. I...

C: 他是属于我的…他是属于我的…他是属于我的……
E: He is mine... He's mine... mine...

C: …我不饿。
E: ...I'm not hungry.

C: 不急，您可以慢慢考虑。
E: There's no hurry. Please take your time.

C: 罗莎将你带至空艇游人必经的长廊里。
E: Rosa leads you to the long gallery on the airship where visitors must pass by.

C: 您真高…呃呃，不对，您真好看…这雕像也就只有您的六成美貌吧。不过摆着倒是挺霸气的，不愧是船长大人。
E: You're so tall... Oh, that's not right, you're so good-looking... This statue only captures about <unbreak>60%</unbreak> of your beauty, but it still looks rather commanding anyway. That's my captain.

C: （除了大堂经理之外，前台还有一些其他工作人员……）
E: (Besides the lobby manager, there are other staff at the front desk...)

C: （迄今为止干得不错，{NICKNAME}…继续努力！）
E: (So far, so good. {NICKNAME}... keep up the great job!)

C: 啊，找到了。他的名字是，罗伊罗伊…布奇布嘎…巴登豪威尔。
E: Ah, found it! *ahem* His name is Royroy... Bougiebooga... Baden-Powell.

C: …毫无意外，你一败涂地。你只能无助地见证这场战争在你眼前展开……
E: ...And as expected, you completely fail. You watch on helplessly as this battle unfolds before your eyes...

C: ——等等，为什么是你先？没记错的话，我可是先一步到的。这年头，大家都忘记先来后到的礼数了吗？
E: ...Hang on, why are you going first? If I remember correctly, it was me who got here first. Has everyone forgotten the principle of "first come, first served"?

C: ——我感谢天命！
E: I'm grateful for my fate!

C: 模仿挥球棍的动作。
E: Act like you're swinging a bat.

C: 让我再瞅一眼…「邪恶组织经常倾巢出动，无差别地袭击街上的行人——主要犯罪方式包括：用钝器敲击膝盖、强迫下跪、偷走鞋子和帽子……」
E: Let me take another look at them... "Cults often act in groups and attack pedestrians indiscriminately. The crimes they mainly commit include hitting people's knees with blunt objects, forcing them to kneel, and stealing their shoes and hats..."

C: 组成三巨头再上不好吗？
E: Wouldn't it be awesome to team up as a trio before diving into battle?

C: 怎、怎么会这样？矲主的神通力，在理应外强中干的巨人族面前居然显得不堪一击……
E: H—How could this happen? The all-mighty master seems so powerless against those giants, who are supposed to be weak despite their size...

C: 你们负得了责吗？
E: Can you guys bear the responsibility!?

C: 是吗？抱歉。我带了苏打豆汁儿，你要不要先喝一罐解压？
E: Really? Sorry. I brought some mung bean soda with me. Why not have a can to take the edge off?

C: 所以，三月其实是怕你赶不上告别。
E: That's why March was scared. She thought you'd miss getting to say goodbye.

C: 这不是我们罗浮仙舟的守擂冠军彦卿小弟吗？哦，星穹列车的朋友也在。
E: If it isn't Yanqing, the Xianzhou Luofu reigning champion! Oh, and our Astral Express friends are here, too!

C: 在时间面前，谁都是输家。
E: There are no winners in the face of time.

C: 彦…卿…小…弟，你这算是伤口上撒盐吧？！啊？！
E: You... Yanqing! You just wanted to rub salt in my wounds! Huh?

C: 哈？本座可不能当作没听见。
E: Huh? I cannot pretend I didn't hear that.

C: 诶？杨先生，旁边的，难道是姬子小姐？
E: Huh? Mr. Yang? And could that be.... Miss Himeko?

C: {NICKNAME}，站这里！
E: {NICKNAME}, stand here!

C: 我这不是还没习惯嘛，虽然眼睛不方便，但在下的耳朵可灵敏了！可以听声辨位。
E: I'm still not used to this yet. Though my eyes may not be of any use, my ears are extremely sensitive! I can pinpoint location through sound!

C: 对呀对呀，对正常人来说，还有比贪生怕死更正确的事吗？
E: Yep. Like, seriously, what's more normal than being afraid to die?

C: 嗯…我可没算到事情会有这样的发展。
E: Hmmm... I didn't expect things to turn out like this.

C: 好一段时间的翻箱倒柜竟没有触动警报，无数乏人问津的文档被找了出来。
E: After a long period of rummaging around, the alarm was not triggered, and countless dusty old documents were unearthed.

C: 你说得对，还是让他自己看看吧。
E: You're right. Let's get him to see it for himself.

C: 走吧，我们去看星槎！
E: Let's go. We'll go look at some starskiffs!

C: 你先别遗憾美了，现在出师也来得及嘛。
E: Don't regret just yet. It's never too late for you to graduate now.

C: 我最好奇的也是这个问题。我每天都会乘坐星槎，没想到它是从种子里长出来的。
E: That's what made me most curious, too. Every day I'll be catching one of these starskiffs, without knowing that it's actually been grown from a seed.

C: 就帮我拍一个我和星槎的合照吧，麻烦你了。
E: Help me snap a pic together with this starskiff. Thank you.

C: 铖杰，你有伟大的思想吗？
E: Chengjie, have you got any of those world-changing ideas up there?

C: 但是就像是我说过的，莱恩老师将他最重要的时间给了我。如果我做不成匠人了，那些最珍贵的时光就这样彻底浪费了，不复存在了。
E: But as I said, Master Ryan gave me his precious time. If I give up now, that time will be wasted and cease to exist.

C: 遥控器是不是坏掉了？
E: Is this remote control broken?

C: 这艘星槎能源充足…你真是太客气了，你应该问星槎是不是坏掉了。
E: The starskiff has enough energy... Thanks for being so considerate of my feelings. In fact, you should ask whether the starskiff is broken.

C: 不好，这艘星槎要冲出去了……
E: Oh, no. The starskiff is going out of control...

C: 我忘了你是个异邦来的化外民。那咱们换个说法，把人的意识「拓印」下来，这样好懂些了吧？
E: The fact that you're an Outworlder has slipped my mind just now. Let me put it this way — the judge will make a copy of the person's consciousness. Got it now?

C: 因果殿？
E: Hall of Karma?

C: 我觉得莱恩老师说的没错，因为我不太相信「实现某个人的梦想」这种事情。
E: I agree with what Master Ryan said, as I think there's no such thing as helping someone fulfill their dream.
...Hehe.

C: （看向希儿）
E: (Look at Seele)

C: 我们可没那个时间……
E: We haven't got the time...

C: 唷，怪不得前面那些小喽啰那么活跃，原来身后藏着这么个大家伙啊！
E: Ah, no wonder these minions are so active — there's a big fella hiding behind them!

C: …咳，这都是他自己一拍脑门想出的主意。同不同意都看你，史瓦罗。
E: *sigh* He's the one who came up with this idea. It's up to you to accept it or not, Svarog.

C: 哈，我来给它致命一击！
E: Ha! I'll deal the final blow!

C: 嘘！别出声，你差点害我们暴露了！
E: Shh! Be quiet! You almost exposed us!

C: …嗯。你说得对。
E: ...Yeah, you're right.

C: 那就让三月留下维护列车？
E: So, we should leave March behind to take care of the Express?

C: 比一般的星槎还大？
E: So, it's even larger than a regular starskiff?

C: 哪儿的话，将军侍卫又怎么会记得我这样的小小角色。在下刚刚随出征部队返抵罗浮，因为仪典召开前的安全工作，被临时调派至此。
E: Well, I'm just a junior officer. I recently returned to the Luofu from the front lines and was temporarily assigned here for security duty before the ceremony.

C: 不用不用，一点小事罢了。
E: Thank you, but it's no big deal.

C: 喔？我入故人梦，明我长相忆。能在诸位的美梦之中有一席之地，荣幸之至。
E: Oh? Well It's an honor to be in your dreams, my friend.

C: 哪里哪里，被云璃那丫头如此挤兑，就算是木人也有三分火气呢。你把弟子教得很好。呵呵，若换成老朽年轻的时候，只怕要当场翻脸一剑砍去。
E: Not at all. Taunted by Yunli like that, even a training dummy would be angry. You've taught your apprentice well. If it were me in my younger days, I'm afraid I'd have drawn my sword and fought.

C: 等等，我的剑！
E: Wait, my sword!

C: 夕葵姐姐，我被派来解决公司的抗议，眼下到底是什么情况？
E: I was sent here to deal with the IPC protest, Miss Xikui. What's going on here?

C: 当然，我…我无意与仙舟发生冲突。但就像我刚开始说的那样，我要求的自始至终只是取回货物，就此离开。是各位不肯放行啊。
E: Of course, I... I never wanted conflict with the Xianzhou. Like I said, all I wanted was to retrieve the cargo and be done with it, but they just refuse to let us go.

C: 工造司发来文书，说有含有不明生物样本的货物滞留此间，需要丹鼎司派人勘验。左右我闲着也是闲着，就亲自来咯～
E: I received a report from the Artisanship Commission about cargo containing samples of unknown organisms. It said they needed help from the Alchemy Commission. I had nothing better to do, so I came myself.

C: 事已至此，还是不要推诿责任更好些。
E: I don't think trying to shift the blame is a wise choice.

C: 我是真不知道这东西怎么就动起来了…我可以向琥珀王发誓！
E: But seriously, I don't know why that thing suddenly started moving...! I swear on the Amber Lord!

C: 再壮观也是寿瘟祸迹。仙舟与孽物争斗数千年，看到建木重又升起，人人心底都难免隐然不安的。
E: Even if it's impressive, it's a plaguemark. The Xianzhou have been fighting abominations for thousands of years, and now that the Ambrosial Arbor has been reborn, it's only natural for everyone to feel uneasy.

C: 他俩碰上，非死即伤…
E: It'll be either death or disaster when these two clash...

C: 第一次听到别人叫自己师父，彦卿得稍微…适应一下……
E: This is the first time someone has called me master... I need to... get used to it...

C: 彦卿师父，你得支棱起来，狠狠培养她。
E: You need to toughen up and train her properly, Master Yanqing. Don't go easy on her.

C: 哼，真正的比试现在才刚刚开始。
E: Hmph, the real competition is just getting started.

C: 空想？你自诩能听懂剑说话，这又算什么？空想社交派？
E: Theorist? You claim to be able to talk to swords, so what does that make you? A lunatic?

C: 你不是医士嘛，怎么谈起做菜来了。
E: Aren't you a healer? Why are you talking about food?

C: 我手中这瓶药，你们可识得？
E: Do you recognize this bottle of medicine in my hand?

C: 真是的…我想了半天自己的梦想是什么，他居然不问了！
E: Seriously... I just spent so much time thinking about my dream, but he didn't even ask me!

C: 是那三个小崽子！我说过了，让你及时善后，你就是不听，白痴！
E: It's those brats! I told you to get rid of them, but you didn't listen, you idiot!

C: 我们作为证人前来回答问题。
E: Yeah, we're here to answer your questions as witnesses.

C: 他预见仙舟和列车都将参与对抗纳努克的战争。而将我们引来解决罗浮的星核危机，正是为了实现这一预言。
E: He foresaw that the Xianzhou and the Express would have important roles to play in the war against Nanook. That's why we were lured here to the Luofu, to deal with the Stellaron crisis and fulfill the prophecy.

C: 放逐饮月君，才有今日祸患
E: The exile of Imbibitor Lunae is what led to this calamity.

C: 请将军允许我们重新回答您的问题。
E: Could you please give us another chance? I'd like to answer that question again.

C: 怎么，{NICKNAME}不想见到我？也罢，我可以唤来擅用针灸的判官，精通斧锯的判官，又或是长于鞭索的判官来问话…多种选择，必有一款适合您。
E: Hmm? You don't want to see me, {NICKNAME}? Well, in that case, I can call in the judge who's an expert in acupuncture, or the one who's handy with axes and saws, or the one who knows all about whips and ropes... We've got plenty of options here, and we'll find one that suits your taste.

C: 判官大人，这便到了吗？
E: Have we arrived already, your honor?

C: 那些劫狱者如此胆大妄为，一定为这次行动计划了许久。
E: Those intruders are quite bold. They must have been planning this for quite a while.

C: 幽囚狱中道路难行，有些冥差偶尔为了贪图脚程便捷，借用工造司里的机巧来去穿梭。
E: Some spiritfarers occasionally use ingenia from the Artisanship Commission to navigate the treacherous terrain here.

C: 只是是是权宜之计。
E: It's just a t-t-temporary solution.

C: 这次逃狱事件的背后显然有人在精心谋划，试图掀起乱局，要是让这些人得逞了，云骑还有什么荣誉可言？
E: Obviously, there is someone behind the scenes orchestrating this prison break, intending to spread chaos. If we fail to thwart their evil plan, what honor will be left for us to uphold?

C: 那个女人…是曜青的将军！你在等什么，动手！
E: This woman... She's the general of the Yaoqing! What are you still waiting for!? Attack her!

C: …今天穿的这身衣服还真是有些不习惯啊。
E: ...I'm not used to wearing clothes like this at all...

C: 啊！妈妈，我出息了。
E: Ahhh! Mom, I'm winning at life!

C: 都蓝子裔背弃了「狼之古训」。为了苟延生命，我们在黑暗中东躲西藏，互相啃噬；我们不再是狼，反而变得像老鼠般龌龊、可悲。
E: The descendants of Duran have abandoned the Wolf's Creed. In order to ensure our survival, we took solace in the shadows and fed on one another. We were no longer wolves. We were no more than rats, living a dirty and pathetic life.

C: 地面上步离人突然展开了袭击，飞霄将军担心这是呼雷的障眼法，于是我就主动请命赶来驰援竞锋舰。
E: The borisin on the ground suddenly launched an attack. General Feixiao was concerned that this was all a diversion by Hoolay, so I requested to come to the Skysplitter and provide support.

C: （低吼）！
E: *roaring*!

C: 按照爷爷的安排，现在应该问问竞锋舰上的云骑士兵，有没有新的情况……
E: According to Grandpa's plan, I should seek out the Cloud Knight soldiers aboard the Skysplitter and see if there've been any new developments...

C: 我确实败了，但这并不出乎我的意料。但你还是露面了，飞霄。
E: Yes, I was defeated, but this was not unexpected. And regardless, you still showed your face, Feixiao.

C: 这些熟悉的场面，仙舟人应该向你展示过无数次了。但这一切不过是他们想让你看到的。
E: I'm sure that the people of the Xianzhou have shown you these familiar scenes countless times. But they only showed you what they wanted you to see.

C: 于「月狂」之怒中肆行杀戮，令友军枉死…天击将军，你辜负了联盟的信任！
E: Blinded by the fury of your Moon Rage, you slaughtered your allies... Merlin's Claw, you have betrayed the Alliance!

C: 渐渐地我明白了，那根本不是什么承载愿望的流星。每一道光矢的出现，意味着一个无可救药的世界和无数生灵的湮灭。
E: Gradually I came to understand. That light was not some shooting star that carried wishes and aspirations. Each Lux Arrow meant that countless lives in a helpless world were about to be obliterated.

C: 如此一来，罗浮内的事情算是议定了。不过我更担心这桩祸事背后所涉及的那只黑手——
E: This settles the immediate concerns on the Luofu, but my thoughts linger on the orchestrator behind these events.

C: 到了这一步，棋盘上所摆的乃是数千琥珀纪以来未曾有过的棋局。在这样的棋局里，就连棋手们也会成为上阵拼杀的卒子，胜负所系乃是天上万千星辰的明灭。
E: It's clear we're engaged in a game of chess not seen in thousands of Amber Eras, a game where even the strategists become pawns in battle, where the stakes are as high as the fates of countless stars in the sky.

C: 差不多吧。这地方叫「世界尽头」酒吧，是欢愉信徒的基地。
E: More or less. This place is a bar called the World's End, a depot of debauchery for acolytes of Elation.

C: 没关系，我们再去问问别人。
E: It's all right. We'll ask someone else.

C: 久而久之，至少在这「黄金的时刻」，大家多多少少都受过她的帮助，也就愿意给她个面子，尊称她一声「陛下」。
E: As time passed, at least in the Golden Hour, everyone has been helped by her in some way, so they are willing to show her the courtesy of addressing her as "Majesty."

C: 苏安瓜说的对，我们不是土匪——但我们也有不得不做的事。得罪了！
E: Swanga's right. We're not bandits, but we do have something we need to do! Sorry about that!

C: …我知道这样打哑谜让人恼火，但我们必须让她自己回忆起自己的罪行。否则…即使把她抓回去也没有意义。
E: ...I know it's really annoying to do this, but she must recall her own crimes. Or else... it won't matter even if we bring her back.

C: 你先去忙吧。如果二位不介意，可以随朕一起在这里等{F#她}{M#他}回来。
E: You go get busy. If you two don't mind, you can wait here with me for {F#her}{M#his} return.

C: 所以，当我捧着一大捆纺锤花，声泪俱下地求他免除赋税时，没有人会觉得这是个政治问题——这只是小姑娘纯洁的希冀罢了。
E: So when I skip in with a huge bouquet of spindleblooms, crying and wailing to beg him to remove tax levies, no one will think that it's an issue of governance, just an innocent desire of a little girl.

C: 你真是个畜生。
E: You really are a beast.

C: 我忘记了很多事情…但那个标志我还记得，无名客可是一群传奇人物。
E: A lot of things have slipped my mind, but I remember that symbol. The Nameless are a legendary bunch.

C: 无数个散落的碎片在我眼前闪过…我试图用一张网捕捉它们，但它们总能狡猾地穿过网洞，消失在无意识的汪洋里。
E: Countless scattered fragments flash before me... I try to catch them with a net, but they keep slipping through the mesh slyly and vanish into the ocean of unconsciousness.

C: 我宁愿相信，每个世界都是一枚随风飘来的树种，因为巧合落在了这片土地上，然后开始自顾自地扎根、生长，最后形成了这片树海。
E: I prefer to see each planet as a seed carried by the wind that happens to land on the soil. The seeds then begin to take root and grow bigger, eventually forming the forest.

C: 我来是想告诉你，博士，你的努力没有白费。哪怕在肉身消亡以后，你仍然坚守着那些知识，没有给居心叵测之人留下可乘之机——
E: I'm here to tell you that your effort isn't in vain. Even after the death of your physical body, you're still safeguarding your knowledge, leaving no chance for those harboring ulterior motives...

C: 咳…查德威克博士，我虽然没见过你本人——但我对你的头脑和研究深感钦佩。
E: *cough*... Dr. Chadwick, although I've never met you in person, I deeply admire your intellect and research.

C: 没想到他居然会把毕生的成果都托付给我…他是不知道这座空间站跟公司之间还有合作关系吗？
E: To think he would entrust his life's work to me... Did he not know this space station was connected with the IPC?

C: 你知道「钟表匠」。
E: You know the Watchmaker.

C: …嘀嗒！{NICKNAME}，快过来！
E: ...Tick-tock! Get over here quick, {NICKNAME}!

C: 他躲在梦境之底，却时刻在仰视着上方的天空——他唾弃费歇尔的宣言，却仍期待着费歇尔口中「开花结果」的某日。
E: He hides at the bottom of the Dreamscape, yet his gaze is fixed upon the heavens above — he scorns Fischer's proclamations, yet he yearns for the day when Fischer's words come to fruition.

C: 你明知道…？
E: You knew...?

C: （必须唤醒奥尔拉！）
E: (I must wake Orla!)

C: 不知不觉，奥尔拉也是能独当一面的筑梦师了。
E: Unbeknownst to everyone, Orla may have become a full-fledged Dreamweaver as well.

C: 是嘛，那你的行动力着实令人佩服。
E: Is that so? Your actions are worth commending then.

C: 那我就不客气了。
E: Then I'll gladly accept it.

C: 不不，没有不行，果然是英雄出少年啊。那你千万记得，要躺在椅子上、按照步骤用餐……
E: Of course! You're definitely a hero in the height of your youth. But you must remember to lie back in your chair and eat them in order...

C: 肯定没有，不然我哪有机会来到这里？
E: I'm pretty sure I wasn't — I wouldn't have been able to return otherwise.

C: 这话说得直击要害。人们纷纷看向远处的黎明机器，以及将黎明托起的刻法勒——它的精神确实值得学习。
E: This point strikes true and draws blood. Heads gradually turn towards the Dawn Device in the distance, and Kephale, who supported the dawn on their shoulders through sheer will — their spirit is truly worth emulating.

C: 这不是他犯罪的理由。
E: This is not the reason for his crime.

C: …难说。
E: ...That's difficult to say.

C: 正如这位老者，他的态度就很鲜明，他的行动也确实产生了影响。有人因此受益，有人因此受罚……
E: Just like this old one. His stance is clear. His actions have indeed made an impact. Some have benefited, while others have faced punishment...

C: 浴场这么大…那位老者的浴池在哪呢？
E: The bath pool is huge... Where is that old man's bath?

C: 你直说要我帮忙不就行了。
E: You could just ask me for help.

C: 但如果回到她的过去，或许能找到一些线索……
E: But, if we go back to her past... Maybe we can find some clues...

C: 原来阿卡迪亚是个这么厉害的地方！但只有故事中的记述可能还不够，也没有问到关于帕里斯的事情…我们还是再找找其他人吧。
E: I didn't realize Arcadia was such an amazing place! Although, descriptions in stories probably still aren't enough, and we still know nothing about Paris... Let's go and find someone else to ask.

C: 人家不知道怎么修理眷属，她这样子也去不了其他地方……
E: I don't know how to repair Titankin. She can't go anywhere else in this state, either...

C: 等会儿！我觉得咱俩拦不住这家伙，要不就当没看见……
E: Wait! I don't think just us two can stop them. Why don't we just pretend we never saw them...

C: …我不是朋友，只是因为没能送你们全军踏入冥河，而不得不与你共赴冥河的败者。而我也不是姑娘，只是铠甲用了女子的模样。
E: ...I am not a friend. I am merely a failure that must swim the River of Souls alongside you as I was unable to send your entire army to its depths. Nor am I a young girl. My armor was simply cast in the shape of a girl.

C: 哦！我知道，那些大英雄们都喜欢给自己起各种各样的称号——你一定也是外出冒险的英雄吧，快救救我们！
E: Oh! I know! Great heroes love to give themselves all sorts of titles... You must be a hero out on a great adventure, too? Quick, you must save us!

C: 算了，记忆的气味飘向了奥赫玛的方向，我们继续让记忆向前吧——
E: Forget it. The memory fragrance is floating towards Okhema. Let's continue following the memory...

C: 啊！既然咱们的客人不能吃水果，我们就去另外一家店看看吧——
E: Ah! Well, since our guest cannot partake of fruits, we will take a look around another store.

C: 不会在这儿还要收集这个吧？
E: She's not still collecting those things here, is she?

C: 嗯？恩人但说无妨，我有问必答。
E: Oh? Please, tell me, savior. I will tell you all that I know.

C: 听说这家伙造出来就是用来打仗的，说不定还杀过我们的同胞，为什么要让这种东西来宴会啊……
E: I hear this thing was created only for war. It might have even killed our kin! Why should we allow something like that to come to our celebration...

C: 又要球棒侠出手了。
E: Galactic Baseballer to the rescue, once more!

C: 他们的面庞上的笑容是那么牵强，眼神中的惶恐胜过快乐。即便在两张俊美的脸上，也显得有些诡异。
E: The smiles on their faces are forced as fear devours any joy in their eyes. Though their faces are beautiful, there is something distorted about this image.

C: 这件宝物真的很沉重。
E: This treasure truly is precious.

C: 呜啊，真的很不想理你。
E: Ugh, I really want to ignore you.

C: 啊…她自己把日记打开了。
E: Ah... She's opening the diary on her own.

C: 我知道，你一直觉得我们都是群骗子，用神谕来控制神殿外的蠢货。
E: I know that you've always thought us a bunch of liars, using prophecies to control the fools outside the temple.

C: 我当然知道我们宣告的神谕是假的，可既然如此，它为什么不把真正的神谕给我们？眼睁睁地看着翁法罗斯走向灭亡？
E: I obviously know the prophecy we declared is false. But since that's the case, why doesn't the Titan give us the true prophecy? Do they wish to simply watch as Amphoreus is destroyed?

C: 去做个学者。
E: Go be a scholar.

C: 母亲，这世上唯一仍爱着你，你唯一爱着的人。她将所能给予的一切全都给了你，现在，连她的生命也要因你而消逝。
E: Your mother, the only one who still loves you in this world, and the only one you still love... She has given you everything she has. Now, she even has to give up her life for you.

C: 我把天外之音带回来了。
E: I have brought back the echoes from beyond the sky.

C: 也是，奥赫玛的大家也还在等我回去呢。
E: Yes, everyone at Okhema is still waiting for my return.

C: 跑得比我都快。
E: Runs even faster than me.

C: 咦，先别说先别说，我看到的部分里，她还没登场呢！
E: Wait wait, hold on. From what I've seen so far, she hasn't even shown up yet!

C: 听说，符玄也参加了那场战役…
E: I hear Fu Xuan was also in that battle...

C: 铁墓一战，罗浮虽然取胜，但也不是毫发无损。你能平安归来，实属幸事。
E: Though the Luofu emerged victorious in the battle of Irontomb, we did not escape unscathed. Your safe return is truly a blessing.

C: 难忘的旅程啊，看来这份回忆会被你珍藏很久呢。
E: And what an unforgettable journey it is. I can tell you'll cherish this memory for a long time.

C: 白厄真君先拜于树庭居士门下，后又追随千面童姥。负日逐火，讨获十二火种，百折千回，终得再造生机。
E: Lord Phainon first apprenticed under the Sages of the Grove, and later followed the Thousand-Faced Matriarch. Carrying the sun and chasing flame, he sought out the twelve Coreflames. Through countless trials and tribulations, he at last won the chance to remake the world.

C: 相信我，只要为结局做一丢丢修改，让它不那么完美，保准有一大群人爱得死去活来呀！
E: Trust me. Just tweak the ending a tiny bit to make it less perfect, and people will absolutely go crazy for it!

C: 今天讲《如我所书》哪一段啊？
E: Which part of As I've Written are we covering today?

C: 没错。我去了一个阿基维利也未曾抵达的世界，完成了前所未有的「开拓」……
E: That's right. I went to a world that even Akivili never reached, and accomplished an unprecedented "Trailblaze"...

C: 你说话能不能别这么冲？
E: Can you please talk in a less hostile way?

C: 好像…还可以？
E: Seems... Okay?

C: 老师老师，我想起一件事，有时候我会遇到那种滔滔不绝的，就是总喜欢吹嘘自己的人。
E: Teacher, I thought of something. Sometimes I meet people who love bragging and don't shut up about themselves.

C: 负荷为零，推进装置无法启动。
E: No load detected. Thruster compartment unable to initiate.

C: 不是我修的，难道是呜呜伯修的啊？
E: Of course, I did. Did you think the Wubbaboo fixed them?

C: 那就是…这个家伙被束缚的灵魂意识体，究竟可以凭借什么类型的载体进行依附！
E: And the issue is... What kind of receptacle can that person's incorporeal consciousness get attached to?

C: 肯定是假的…
E: It's definitely false...

C: 对啊，你知道它的来历？
E: Yes. You know what it is?

C: 你没事吧？
E: Are you okay?

C: 你在等人？
E: Are you waiting for someone?

C: 前几天，有个铁卫兴冲冲地给告诉我，他在南边的雪原目击到了冰原狼的活动——这可是件大事啊！
E: An excited Guard told me a few days ago that he saw activities of direwolves on the Southern Snow Plains — That's big news!

C: 你还在犹豫什么？
E: Why are you hesitating?

C: 我欣赏你的自信。
E: I admire your confidence.

C: 要是我未来的朋友恰巧也对音乐剧感兴趣，那兴许我们可以一起包场观看——包场费由我担负。
E: If my future friend happens to be interested in musicals, maybe we can book a whole theater and watch a show together. I'll pay for all that, of course.

C: 将和拉雯妮的谈话内容转述给了华劳斯……
E: You convey what Lavonne said to Wallace...

C: 那就祝你们顺利…
E: Good luck to you then...

C: 唔，你好像很爱说些奇怪的话呢…你以为尤利安是小孩子就听不懂吗？
E: Hmm, you seem to like saying strange things... You think I won't understand just because I'm a kid?

C: 真是老谋深算啊…
E: You're so crafty...

C: 啊？什么阴谋，你别在那胡思乱想啦！
E: What? Scheming? That's quite the imagination you've got there.

C: 下次任务再见啦，荣誉队员——鼹鼠党，解散！
E: I'll see you at our next mission, honorary member. The Moles, dismiss!

C: 机器人？唔…这好像也没什么特别的啊，我也经常要负责修理禁区里的故障机器人……
E: Robot? Hmm... it doesn't sound special, I'm often in charge of repairing malfunctioning robots in the Restricted Zone...

C: 对啊，让我想想……
E: Yeah, let me think about it...

C: 答应我一件事，{NICKNAME}——如果吉尔伯特以后还来找你帮忙的话，尽量答应他的要求，行吗？那老头是个好人，我不想看到他在这最后几个月里受委屈。
E: Promise me something, {NICKNAME} — if Gilbert comes to you with another request in the future, do your best to help, okay? He's a good man. I don't want to see him suffer during his last few months of service.

C: …竟然答对了。好吧，我会向教育部申请受理你这份论文的，请你回去等消息吧。有消息了会通知你的。
E: ...That's right. Very well, I'll apply to the Ministry of Education to accept your thesis then. Run along then, and wait for my news. We'll notify you when ready.

C: 哎，很可惜，答错了。看来也没有必要继续问下去了。
E: Ah, how unfortunate, that's incorrect. It seems like there's no need for us to continue.

C: 很好！很有朝气！我就喜欢这种年轻人，哈哈哈哈哈。
E: That's the spirit! Jolly good beans! I love the cut of this youngster, haha!

C: <unbreak>42</unbreak>
E: <unbreak>42</unbreak>

C: 哦…是这事儿啊，怎么样？论文成功递交上去了吗？教育部受理了吗？
E: Oh yes... that's right. And what of it? Has the paper been submitted yet? What did the Ministry say?

C: 你的论文兹事体大…
E: Your thesis made me realize...

C: …科学家的任务罢了。
E: ...That's what a real scientist would do.

C: 请再听一次题面：莱姆士汀家有一个大停车……
E: Listen once more to the question: The Limesteins own a large parking lot...

C: 已经有很多年，没人为了我的事四处奔走了。我这人说话比较冲，但我是真挺感谢你的。
E: It's been years since anyone cared about my thesis. I know I come across as blunt, but I really am grateful to you.

C: 嗯…很遗憾，回答错误。
E: Hmm... I'm afraid that's incorrect.

C: 教育部官员
E: Ministry of Education Officer

C: 花店的店员一定知道，她最喜欢买什么花~就拜托你去问问咯~
E: The florist definitely knows the kind of flowers that she likes~ Please, find out for me~

C: 拜托你啦~
E: Please~

C: 之前有一段时间，她总来问我，有没有和《歌德宾馆的夜与雾》类似的小说。
E: Some time back, she kept coming over to ask if there was any novel similar to Evening Ember at the Goethe Hotel.

C: 说到这个，你能帮小女子一个小忙么？
E: Speaking of which — can you please help me out with just one little thing?

C: 说到这个，你能帮小女子一个小忙么？
E: Speaking of which — can you please help me out with just one little thing?

C: 说到这个，你能帮小女子一个小忙么？
E: Speaking of which — can you please help me out with just one little thing?

C: 最近还顺利吗…
E: Everything going well?

C: 就那里吧，靠窗的位置。那里阳光正好，一定很舒服。
E: I'll sit over there, by the window. I'm sure the sunlight there will make me warm and comfy.

C: 你们先吵，我就凑个热闹。
E: Keep arguing. I'm just here to watch.

C: 你将方才的遭遇一五一十地报告了老歌德……
E: You tell Old Goethe what happened...

C: 「正当权益会社——会员 查威 发布了一则委托。有意向提供协助的社友请前往面洽！」
E: "Chavez, a member of the Rightful Rights Society, has issued an assignment. Please contact Chavez if you are interested in offering your help!"

C: 你还挺会生活的。
E: You sure know how to enjoy life.

C: 简单来说…你变成幽灵了。
E: Put it simply... You are now a ghost.

C: 是的。
E: Yes.

C: 我就看你，怎么了？
E: I just want to look at you. What about it?

C: 我…我其实是昨天才上前线的，所以对这东西还不了解…所以，能请你帮忙看看吗？
E: I... only came to the front lines yesterday. I still don't know much about the Barrier Launcher... Can you please take a look at it?

C: 你将漂流瓶扔了回去。按照常识来看，漂流瓶多半不会回到落难者手中吧……
E: You threw the drift bottle back. Logically speaking, there should be no way it makes it back to the castaway...

C: 你的添笔加重了文明社会的危机程度，这封信里根本没有仁义道德——想必「星期六」收到信之后，会横竖睡不着，从字缝里看出「吃人」二字。
E: Your additions further exaggerate the critical state of the modern society. This letter contains no shred of kindness or morality. Presumably, Saturday will be unable to sleep after reading this, for the words "naked exploitation" is positively leaping out of the page.

C: 听好了，我的工作内容不太能见光。而如今我打算金盆洗手，将我的「前世」就此放生，好好过我的下半辈子。
E: Listen, my job can't really see the light of day. Today, I want to wash my hands of that and release my "previous reincarnation" here, so I can move on to enjoy what I have left.

C: 我不会询问你，你现在就可以闭眼数数了。
E: I won't ask twice. Close your eyes and start counting now.

C: （总之先打开看看，再考虑怎么办吧。）
E: (Let's take a look for now and decide what to do from there.)

C: 显然不是单人分量的美食与佳酿，你忍不住想起了列车组的伙伴——三月七要是在就好了，这些显然都是她爱吃的东西。
E: The servings of delicious cuisine and fine brew are obviously not meant for a single person. You can't help but think about your Express comrades — if only March 7th was here. These are all evidently her favorites.

C: 不摇。
E: Don't ring.

C: 爬上大地兽的后背！
E: Climb on the back of the dromas!

C: 作为浅试今日水温的设施，它原本更加精巧，看上去如同喷泉。
E: A facility used to quickly test today's water temperature. Originally more intricate, akin to a fountain.

C: 你被流逝的时间击倒了。
E: You are struck down by the passage of time.

C: 将它复原后，你不禁思索——它的存在是否有些多余？但回答你的只有无尽的虚无。
E: Now restored, you cannot help but wonder — isn't its entire existence a little redundant? But the only answer you receive is endless nothingness.

C: 好吧，至少从击碎雕塑的手感来看，它和新品确实没什么区别。但你可以再试试。
E: Well, from the feel of smashing the sculpture, it seems indistinguishable from a new one. Perhaps you should try again.

C: 你坐下，群星般的光芒在你面前荡漾，水波璀璨，空气中仿佛有阵阵回响。
E: As you sit down, the light of the stars begins to ripple before you, the waves shine, and the air seems to resonate with echoes.

C: 星际和平公司及时介入，控制了奥瑟顿星的局势，防止惨剧进一步恶化。
E: The Interastral Peace Corporation has promptly intervened, bringing the situation on Oceton under control and preventing it from worsening.

C: 本次播报到此结束，请在指定时间收听下一周期的星际和平播报。再见。
E: And this is the end of our broadcast. Please tune in for our next episode. Thank you for listening.

C: 该星球曾在对抗军团的战斗中遭到焚毁，重建期间，于地下探明储量巨大的反物质晶矿。
E: Previously ravaged in the fight against the Legion, the planet underwent reconstruction, during which massive reserves of antimatter crystal ore were identified underground.

C: 昔日被朝拜的圣城在悲叹，只余一丝火光供人凭想。
E: The holy city that was worshiped is lamenting, only a glimmer of fire was left for people to contemplate.

C: 「在神话中永垂不朽的，必须在人世间灭亡。」
E: "What is immortal in legends must perish in the mortal realm."

C: 回忆中，那是场金色的雨——
E: In memory, it was a golden rain —

C: 「解开你受缚的翅膀！你将粉身碎骨，希望也在此刻发生；
E: "Unbind your wings! Though you will shatter, hope is born in this moment.

C: 城中能与我酣战的人没有几位，旅途也并没有那么多挑战非人之物的机会。只因如此，我难以察觉自己剑技的薄弱之处——直到遇见你。
E: There are few in this city that can match me in battle, and chances to battle non-humans are few and far between in my travels. Because of this, it has been hard for me to observe the weaknesses in my swordsmanship... Until I met you.

C: 天平将回归平衡，就像两侧都未盛放砝码那样，过度的贪婪与空无一物，二者并无差别。
E: The scales will return to perfect balance, as if there is no weight on them at all. Greed and nothingness are inseparable in nature.

C: 克拉特鲁斯，你在欧利庞手下坚持了三十余合，于众督战勇士中亦最为骁勇，我以悬锋王后之名，将一项特殊的职责托付予你……
E: Krateros. You stood tall over thirty rounds against the hand of Eurypon. You stand as the most courageous of all warriors. As Queen of Kremnos, I bestow unto you a special duty...

C: 她是死于奸计！
E: She fell to an evil plot!

C: 通往树冠的空中连廊，由「神识之蝶」把守的要道。你想起上次途经此处时，并未有闲暇帮三月七拍摄绝景的照片，现在似乎是个补救的好机会。
E: The airborne pathways leading to the treetop are guarded by the Butterfly of Divine Mind. You recall how, on your last visit here, you hadn't had the time to capture this breathtaking scene for March 7th. Now seems like the perfect opportunity to make up for it.

C: 硬币的结果是…伟大。太好了，你是位贤明的君主，兢兢业业地为治理王国而奉献了自己的全部。没有人比你更有资格坐上这个宝座。
E: The result is... greatness. Wonderful! You are a wise monarch, diligently dedicating yourself to the governance of your kingdom. No one is more worthy of this throne than you.

C: 好，我去去就回。
E: Alright, I'll be back shortly.

C: 好。翁法罗斯，照明很差，我们，都要想办法。这些，给你花。
E: Good. Amphoreus... poor lighting. We... must find solutions. Here... take these flowers.

C: 嘻嘻，哪里有妈妈的手巧呀！妈妈可是能把整块的红石头，一点点磨成晶莹剔透的…艺术品呢！
E: Hehe, I'm still not as talented as you, mommy! You can take a whole block of red stone and slowly carve it into a crystal clear... work of art!

C: 只是？
E: Just what?

C: 只是，要用这等手段渎神……
E: It's just that such methods are blasphemous...

C: …可恶，它离开了…少了阿塔卡玛姐姐，战线已经在逐渐崩溃了……
E: They've vanished... Without you, Artakama, our defenses crumble... We can't hold...

C: 非也，生命的意义在于付出。
E: Not really. Life's meaning is in sacrifice.

C: …大地兽似乎也不错。
E: ...The dromas could be a good choice.

C: 这种简单的问题，竟然能难倒富有智慧的勇士吗？答案远在天边，近在眼前——就是正在和你说话的这头狮子吼吼！
E: Such a simple question, and yet it can confound a Warrior of wisdom like yourself? The answer is far away, and yet right before your eyes — it's the lion speaking to you now!

C: 是的，这些若虫的赐福已经被金针取出。为避免伤及它们的灵魂，我用金丝缝制了特别的虫躯，供它们暂时凭依。
E: Yes, the blessings of these nymphs have been extracted by golden needles. To avoid harming their souls, I crafted special insect bodies sewn from the golden threads, allowing them to temporarily reside within.

C: 学者…塑像…有人流传千古…有人被历史埋葬……
E: Scholars... statues... some eternal... others forgotten...

C: o((='ω´= )o「嗷呜，撒娇的海豹最好命~」)∋
E: o((='ω´= )o "Woohoo! A seaw who wins da hearts wins evewwythim~" )∋

C: 你不明白它为何会出现在这里。能勉强与这匹木马扯上关系的唯有{RUBY_B#门径之泰坦}雅努斯{RUBY_E#}，可命运三相殿早已荒废，那位半神同样不在此处。
E: You cannot understand why this would appear here. This wooden horse could only feasibly be connected to {RUBY_B#Passage Titan}Janus{RUBY_E#}, but the Temple of the Three Fates has long since fallen into ruin, and that demigod is nowhere to be seen.

C: 是吗？好吧。那会是谁呢？
E: Really? Then who could it have been?

C: 帮大忙了，感谢。愿刻法勒庇佑你，朋友。
E: Thanks again for your help. May Kephale watch over your back, my friend.

C: …啊，在那儿！圣城守卫还挺能藏。希望我有足够的力气爬过去……
E: ...Ah, over there! The Holy City Guards sure know how to hide things well. I hope I have enough strength to crawl over...

C: 我没有胡说！
E: I'm not!

C: 看来，信箱的主人把它当成了告示板。
E: Looks like the owner's turned the mailbox into a public notice board.

C: 没事，照样钻。
E: No worries, I could crawl in anyway.

C: 虽然这鬼头鬼脑的声音如此解释，但你能感受到，真的有某种被囚禁了许久的神性，在对你道谢后，安然消散了——
E: Though that sneaky, eerie voice explains it all, you can sense something else — a divine presence, long trapped, that thanks you before fading away in peace...

C: 斯缇科西亚的蜜酿果然名不虚传——即便隔着厚重的木桶，你依旧能嗅到浓郁的甘美与醇香。
E: Styxia's famed honey brew does live up to its name — even through thick barrels, you can still catch the sweet, heady scent of richness and depth.

C: 我记住了。
E: Got it.

C: …甚好。
E: ...Well said.

C: 就直率地接受我的好意如何呢？
E: Why not just accept my kindness, plain and simple?

C: 银河这么大，或许有某种能够隐形的生物来到了我们的列车……
E: The galaxy is huge. Maybe there's some kind of organism that can become invisible visiting us...

C: 随着女孩的一字一句，你感到肉体沉重、滞缓、疲惫，它是水泥浇成的外壳，举手投足慢如背壳的蜗牛，慢如一个纪元的缓缓流逝……
E: With each of the girl's words, you feel heavier, sluggish, and tired. Your body is a shell caste from concrete and its movements are as slow as a snail, as slow as an era gradually passing by...

C: 虽说有些「窃忆者」能绕开禁令…但我不是那种人！
E: Although some Memosnatchers can bypass the restrictions... Um, I'm not one of them!

C: 数量取胜。
E: Quantity wins.

C: 你再检查检查，等准备周全了就来找我吧。预祝咱们合作愉快，{NICKNAME}。
E: Keep running checks, and come back to me when you're ready. I'm looking forward to our cooperation already, {NICKNAME}.

C: （狗狗有什么不好吗？）
E: (What's wrong with being a dog?)

C: （神探佩佩来咯！）
E: (Super Detective Peppy has arrived!)

C: 最好还是<color=#dbc291ff>去它身边调查</color>看看吧，或许会有收获。
E: It'd be better to <color=#dbc291ff>investigate by its side</color> — we may have some luck.

C: 好吧，那就再见。
E: Alright, see you around.

C: 质疑
E: Interrogate

C: (就凭它那小短手，用什么汇报？终端的键盘按得过来吗？）
E: (What is it going to report with those short hands? Can it even reach the terminal keyboard?)

C: 也不知道是谁在传这些话，真是迷雾重重呢，对吧？
E: I wonder who's spreading all the stories. Sure is mysterious, don't you think?

C: 忘了，不重要。
E: I forgot. It doesn't matter.

C: 嘻嘻，还是{NICKNAME}厉害，人家就总是忘记听过的故事……
E: Hehe, {NICKNAME} is so impressive. I always forget the stories I've heard...

C: 有道理，我也这么觉得。
E: Makes sense, right? I thought so too.

C: 所以我才只敢放心交给你这种硬核狠人啊！
E: That's why I was only confident in entrusting the job to someone as hardcore as you!

C: 别急嘛！年轻人，就帮我一个小忙，不白忙活儿。
E: Not so fast, kid. Just do me a little favor. It won't be in vain.

C: {NICKNAME}，有何贵干？
E: {NICKNAME}, what brings you today?

C: 风云变幻的行情，不正适合拿来演练穷观阵吗？
E: Don't you think ever-changing market conditions are good for training the Matrix of Prescience?

C: 某位不愿意透露姓名的老板告诉我，他们会根据那组号码提前找到「天选之子」，和那人签订协议、平分奖金，顺便隐去身份，避免被他人盯上。
E: One of my managers who wish to remain anonymous told me that they would find the Chosen One of the day before their social security number is drawn out, and sign a contract with them to split the winnings — while helping hide their identity and all the personal targeting that comes with that.

C: 为短生种的事操心可不值得。何况这乐透的结果就像是一日假释罢了。
E: It's not worth worrying about that for a short-life species like yourself. Besides, the prize is just one single day of liberation.

C: 是你不妙还是我不妙？
E: Bad for you, or bad for me?

C: 我已经习惯了，说真的，我已经不想放狠话了。
E: I'm used to it already. Seriously, I don't even want to say anything tough anymore.

C: 这么多人，好丢脸哦。
E: It's too embarrassing to play in front of so many people.

C: 只可惜…我还没找到积木就倒下了。不过，吃一堑长一智…现在我做足了全套防护工作，我不会再被它们影响了。
E: Unfortunately, I collapsed before I could find them. But we all live and learn, don't we? I've now taken full precautions to ensure that they won't affect me again.

C: …或许这和你的慷慨有关，我要开启我的旅途了，保重！
E: ...Perhaps your kindness is what set all this in motion. It's time for my journey to start. Stay well!

C: 挺好的，还想接着玩。
E: The game is pretty fun, and I would like to play it again.

C: 游客，要不…我来给你占个卜？
E: How about... I do some divination on you?

C: 太麻烦了吧？
E: Is it too much trouble?

C: 总之呢——
E: In any case...

C: 乐意效劳。
E: I'm happy to help.

C: 在传说中，「浪漫」的信徒会在死后被塞纳托斯送入残茧，蜕生为蝶，继续伴于泰坦们左右。
E: Legend has it that Thanatos sent disciples of Romance to defective cocoons, where they were reborn as butterflies, destined to continue their lives as loyal aides to the Titan.

C: 嗯…有位织者精通把棋子连成线的技术。金丝带来消息，它正在某面<color=#dbc291ff>布满盾牌的墙上</color>，去那里找找看吧。
E: Hmm... There is a weaver skilled in the art of aligning chess pieces. The golden thread brings tidings: They now gaze <color=#dbc291ff>at a wall adorned with shields</color>. Go there and seek them out.

C: 嗯…有位织者热爱与人游戏。金丝带来消息，它正在<color=#dbc291ff>掘石场的大门外</color>，和一群眷属玩木头人游戏，去那里找找看吧。
E: Hmm... There is a weaver who loves playing games with humans. The golden thread brings tidings: They now linger <color=#dbc291ff>at the entrance of the Excavation Ground</color>, playing "Red Light, Green Light" with a group of Titankin. Go there to find them.

C: 宇宙街溜子，正是在下。
E: The universal street rat, at your service.

C: 呃啊！您的风采，能和当年的悬锋勇士相媲美了！
E: Ack! You fight just like the Kremnos warriors of the past!

C: 这回的策略是装傻？
E: Is the plan this time to play dumb?

C: 哦——我知道了。你一定是看了什么赞美我巴特鲁斯伟大职业生涯的戏剧！嗐，这也正常，崇拜我的人确实很多。言归正传……
E: Ah — I see! You must have seen a show about my magnificent career! Well, that's natural — I do have many admirers. But anyway...

C: 不错不错，身手矫健，技艺非凡——这个从泰坦眼皮子底下偷走的宝箱属于你啦！
E: Fine skills and agility — the treasure chest stolen from under the Titan's nose is yours.

C: 失敬失敬，不过对着这些玩意儿，能考据出些什么呢？
E: My apologies, I didn't realize. But what is there even to collect with junk like this?

C: 这也太过分了！
E: That's beyond the pale!

C: 诶，这就是你的不对了。我要是每次都老老实实把东西给你，那这游戏还有什么意思？
E: Now, now. If I just quietly handed things over every time, where's the fun in that?

C: 看见那边闷不做声的{RUBY_B#负世之泰坦}刻法勒{RUBY_E#}了吗？
E: Notice that silent {RUBY_B#Worldbearing Titan}Kephale{RUBY_E#} over there?

C: 太可恶了，到处都是冥界的脏水，搞得巴特鲁斯在这里根本没法找到真正的宝藏！
E: This is maddening — the nether realm's foul water is everywhere, making it impossible for me to find any real treasure here!

C: …嗯？老祖它说话会这么沉稳吗？也可能没有吧，时间太久，巴特鲁斯有很多东西都记不真切了。
E: ...Hmm? Would they really talk so cohesively like that? Maybe not. It's been so long. I can't remember things clearly anymore.

C: 嚯。不愧是您，一下儿就看穿了巴特鲁斯的诡计！那恭敬不如从命，我们就速速开始试炼吧！
E: Ha! Just like you to instantly see through my trick! Well then, let's get this trial started immediately!

C: 这个问题嘛，确实没有标准的答案——扎格列斯老祖讲给巴特鲁斯的时候就没有。不过，巴特鲁斯倒是觉得…它未必不是某种历史事件的预演？
E: Indeed, this question has no definitive answer — ancestor Zagreus offered none when telling Bartholos. Still, Bartholos thinks... it might be a preview of actual historical events?

C: 所以，还是算了吧！我即将动身去和真正的巴特鲁斯会合，而你…不出意外，你将见证翁法罗斯最后、也是最初的命运。桀桀，掰掰！
E: So, never mind! I'm off to rejoin the real Bartholos, and you... if all goes as planned, you'll witness Amphoreus' last — yet also first — destiny. Hehe, see ya!

C: 原来如此，您觉得面对老巴特鲁斯的最佳策略就是不为所动！可在这种情况，咱要是真的干干净净，您在概率上可就要吃亏了哦？
E: Ah, so your strategy is to stay the course no matter what, huh? Well, if you were playing fair, you'd be hurting your odds, pal.

C: 「把才华浪费在正道上实在可惜，您有没有兴趣和我合作合作？」——如果这真是我们第一次碰面，想必我会说出这样的话吧。可惜……
E: "It would be such a shame to waste your talents on the right path. Would you be interested in a little collaboration?" — That's what I would've said, if this were truly our first meeting. Pity...

C: 你也…变慢…了吗…
E: You've... slowed down... too?

C: 那只是比喻，你就关心吃的了……
E: It was just a metaphor, and all you care about is food...

C: 是
E: Yes.

C: 桀桀，还记得扎格列斯老祖的另一句名言吗？「行窃，只是取回本该属于自己的东西」。
E: Heheh, remember another one of ancestor Zagreus's famous sayings? "Theft is but retrieving what belonged to you in the first place."

C: 这就是我们已知的最后一段。希望它已经能满足你的好奇心。
E: This is the last known stanza, I hope it quenches your curiosity.

C: 我认识来古士，可是…
E: I know Lygus, but...

C: 看起来是的。
E: Looks like it.

C: 我还有别的事…
E: I have other things to do...

C: 交给你了，辅祭。
E: I'll leave it to you, acolyte.

C: 再试一次吧！这次抓住时机<color=#dbc291ff>用祷言让它停住！</color>你可以的！
E: Try again! This time, seize the moment and <color=#dbc291ff>use the prayer to stop it!</color> You've got this!

C: 开启火种匣需要欧洛尼斯的祷言，凯妮斯女士已死，元老和祭司也四散逃走，现在能打开它的只有您了——
E: Opening the Coreflame Casket requires Oronyx's prayer. Lady Caenis is dead, and the elders and priests have scattered... You're the only one left who can do it —

C: 感谢您坦诚相待。因此，即便只有一线生机，我也希望能尽力抓住。
E: I appreciate your honesty. That's why even if there's only the slimmest chance... I want to hold onto it.

C: 即便这就是旅途的终点，我也再无遗憾了。
E: Even if this is the end of my journey, I have no regrets.

C: 你从疑惑中回神，虹彩色的屏障逐渐在空中溶解——不知何时，风堇用她的权能罩住了你。
E: You snap out of your confusion, and the prismatic barrier slowly melts away — somehow, Hyacine has cloaked you with her power.

C: 黑塔啧了一声，好像觉得你的疑惑毫无意义：<color=#dbc291ff>「那是『存护』的星神，名为克里珀的太空巨像。当然啦，你看见的是阮•梅和螺丝咕姆精心培育的模拟体，真正的星神才不会搭理咱们哩。」</color>她闷闷不乐地说，<color=#dbc291ff>「——其实模拟星神也一个德行。所以我们找你来当诱饵，好找到和祂们联络的途径。」</color>
E: Herta tuts, as if your suspicions are utterly meaningless.<color=#dbc291ff>"That's the Aeon of Preservation, the space colossus known as Qlipoth. Well, what you saw was the simulated entity that Ruan Mei and Screwllum had meticulously nurtured. The real Aeons would pay no attention to us."</color>She continues sullenly,<color=#dbc291ff>"Actually, the simulated Aeons are not much better than the real things. That's why we're using you as bait to try to find a way to communicate with THEM."</color>

C: 下次请事先提醒我。
E: Please warn me next time.

C: 「…祂来了！」你的耳边传来黑塔不可置信的说话，「不，不是祂…是另一个*星神*！是——」她的声音突然被拉远，你有种奇怪的感觉，仿佛黑塔的话语凝固了，整个「模拟宇宙」也变得不那么真实——
E: "THEY... came!" You hear Herta's stunned words. "No, not THEM... It's another Aeon! It's..." Her voice suddenly drifts off. You have a strange feeling about this, as if Herta's words solidified and the whole Simulated Universe became somehow unreal.

C: 你看见一个男人，他大约三十岁，其貌不扬，上着一件白衬衫，下身是褐色的吊带裤。当他开口时，他的眼神四处游弋，像在躲闪：「呃，我想给这个游戏加点儿随机事件，那会很好玩…不过，似乎脑波读取器的稳定性有点问题。所以，呃，现在你碰到的事件会比较，呃，单调。我很抱歉。」
E: You see a man about thirty years old with an unremarkable appearance, wearing a white shirt and brown suspenders. His eyes wander while he speaks, as if avoiding something. "Uh, I wanted to add some random occurrences to this game to make it more fun... But I think the brainwave reader is on the fritz. So, uh, now the events you encounter will be a little more, uh, monotonous. Sorry about that."

C: 「很有用的纪念品。」
E: "A very useful souvenir."

C: 太遗憾了，我刚上瘾。
E: What a shame! I was just getting addicted.

C: 谢谢你的诚实。
E: Thanks for your honesty.

C: 说着，男人的身影消失了，他所在的地方出现了一行字：你遇到了「商店」事件。
E: After speaking, the man disappears and a line of words materializes where he was standing: "You have encountered a Shop event"

C: 什么也不做
E: Do nothing

C: 祂的指节轻轻触动，拨动宇宙秩序千丝万缕。你躁动不安的破坏欲骤然止息…你并不确定，祂对你的安抚究竟是出自爱护，还是出于剧烈的、无可遏止的「秩序」？
E: The gentle movement of THEIR fingertips rattles the intricate order of the universe, causing your strong urge to destroy to come to a sudden halt... You are unsure whether THEY placate you out of love or out of an intense and unstoppable desire for "Order."

C: 当你抬头察觉所处境地时——你发现自己已身处被隔绝的孤岛境地之中。这个岛国充满了椰林与洋流，居民身着最原始的皮毛。在被迫隔绝的大地上，你突然查觉这即是*命定之地*。「繁育」飞升为星神后，降临的第一个世界仿佛被提前选定：数琥珀纪前，此地因地理洋流迁徙而逐渐被隔绝，孤独浓稠地搅在一起，如同一把等待着播种的土壤。
E: When you look up, you find yourself on an isolated island with coconut trees and ocean currents. The inhabitants are dressed in animal hide in the most primitive form. Forced to live in isolation, it suddenly occurs to you that it is the *place of destiny*. The first world the Propagation descended upon after their ascension seemed to be predetermined. Several Amber Eras ago, this place was gradually isolated due to geographic and ocean current changes. Loneliness thickens, mixes, and stirs, and the island is like a handful of soil waiting to be sown.

C: 她被你吓到了！一时间你不知道你和她谁更*疯狂*！你很满意！于是你趁机观察四周，当你看见散落在地板上的小鞋子时，你知晓了她的命运——
E: She is startled by your bold move! For a moment, you're unsure who is the *madder* one between you and the woman. Satisfied, you glance around the room and spot the toddler shoes scattered on the floor, a heartbreaking revelation of the woman's cruel fate...

C: 他的脚边匍匐着一些*拉尔诺利虫*，它们是身躯柔软、绚丽如光线的彩色软虫…看上去像软糖。
E: At his feet lie a few *Larnoli Worms*, characterized by their soft bodies and exquisite color hues... reminiscent of jelly drops.

C: 你厌烦地回过头…却发现背后是空的。
E: You turn back in annoyance... only to find nothing behind you.

C: 好吧，事实上，你只需要再等待一会儿，待到火柴闪烁三次后，一些戏剧性的情节就会发生……
E: Well, actually, you just have to wait a bit longer for the match to flash three times, and a dramatic scene will unfold...

C: 真是够了。
E: That will be all.

C: 你相信是零卡。
E: You believe it has no calories.

C: 应当是第一个清晨？还是第二个？你的脑海有些混沌不清。你已经分不清过往的一切是想象，还是切实发生过的——那些杏仁香的苦涩味道无处不在，游戏的快乐也无法盖过它。接着，████████……连你的手指也█████……███渐渐变得沉重……
E: This should be the first dawn? Or the second? Your brain is a little addled. You can no longer tell if everything in the past was an imagination or actual occurrences — That almond-scented bitterness is everywhere, and even the joy of gaming cannot overtake it. Then, ████████... Even your fingers █████... ███ gradually grow heavier...

C: 应当是第一个清晨？还是第二个？你的脑海有些混沌不清。你已经分不清过往的一切是想象，还是切实发生过的——那些杏仁香的苦涩味道无处不在，游戏的快乐也无法盖过它。接着，████████……连你的手指也█████……███渐渐变得沉重……
E: This should be the first dawn? Or the second? Your brain is a little addled. You can no longer tell if everything in the past was an imagination or actual occurrences — That almond-scented bitterness is everywhere, and even the joy of gaming cannot overtake it. Then, ████████... Even your fingers █████... ███ gradually grow heavier...

C: 「祂的火焰绚烂无比；祂的巨口吞噬万物。噢，无数信徒、巨兽、生命，从未得知自己的存在因祂们的斗争而被扼杀——如此可怜弱小，结局早已注定，可他们还得认真过完这一生！」
E: "THEIR flames were magnificent beyond compare, THEIR giant maw devoured all existences. Oh, innumerable believers, giant beasts, lifeforms, that never knew their existences were ended by Aeons' battle. How weak and pitiful, for the outcome was already ordained, but they still had to live out their lives in earnest!"

C: 原来如此。不错{NICKNAME}，你的反应很有趣。接下来我会自己去看，套话时间结束了。好了，正如我所允诺的，伟大的黑塔女士要回馈你一个情报——
E: I see. Not bad, {NICKNAME}, that was an interesting response. Now I'll take a look myself. Interrogation's over. All right, as I promised, Yours Truly will bequeath you with a piece of information...

C: 践行「行者之道」，走在各位前路人已踏好的行迹上，努力接近星神！不用担心，按自己的性子去践行命途就行。
E: Continue along the Trail of Pathstrider, and walk along the traces already paved by those who came before you, and try your hardest to get closer to the Aeons! Don't worry! Just carry out the Paths in the way you want to.

C: 有任何避免的机会吗？
E: Is it possible to stop it from happening?

C: 「不可能。」阮•梅斟酌着，但她露出了犹豫的神情。思忖片刻，她放弃了推论，「我知道你关心他，但<color=#dbc291ff>鲁珀特二世</color>不可能出现在如此古老的时空中。」
E: "No way." Ruan Mei ruminates the question with a look of hesitation. After a moment of contemplation, she gives up speculating. "I know you care about him, but it's impossible for <color=#dbc291ff>Rubert II</color> to exist in such an ancient dimension."

C: 是的，这中间经历了很多，才演变为如今的局面：「博识学会」的<color=#dbc291ff>可瑞希特拉博士</color>，曾为「装卸部」柯拉帕乌制造超距运输船只，帮助他在边星战中躲过各种危机的人——却在帝皇战争中遭到背叛：背叛来自柯拉帕乌的<color=#dbc291ff>合伙人-叄号</color>，但博士认定其中有柯拉帕乌的授意。
E: Indeed, the current situation is the result of a series of events: <color=#dbc291ff>Prof. Cressitra</color> from the Intelligentsia Guild once built a long-distance vessel for Korapao of the Cargo Division to keep Korapao safe during the Borderstar Trade War, only to face betrayal in the Emperor's War by Korapao's <color=#dbc291ff>Associate No. 3</color>'s hands. Prof. Cressitra firmly believed that Korapao knew and approved of the deed.

C: 由于一些意外，部分无机星系与外界的资源交换出了问题。你作为机械方的代表来到<color=#dbc291ff>特劳拉•法恩莎的宴会</color>。你的身份是*卧底*…通过对自我认知的调控，你已彻底相信自己是一名有机生命。现在，你要弄明白公司究竟遇到了什么*意外*。
E: Due to some mishaps, some of the inorganic planetary systems are having problems exchanging resources with the outside world. As a representative of the machines, you attend a banquet held by <color=#dbc291ff>Telora Farnsha</color>. You are an *undercover*... By adjusting your Intra-Cognition, you are completely convinced that you are an organic life. Now, you need to find out the *mishaps* that have happened to the IPC.

C: 可这真的能抵达永恒吗？你在心中一遍遍地质问自己。哪怕穷尽一生的智慧，也没法从知识的海洋中找到答案。
E: But can this really reach eternity? You ask yourself this question over and over again. Even if you devote your whole life's wisdom to it, there's still no way of fishing up an answer from the ocean of knowledge.

C: 你下意识地张开嘴，等待孩子们将撕裂的餐食扔进来，注射了消化液的肉块如琼浆在你的肚子里融化开，被重构为它们的兄弟姐妹。但今天似乎有些不一样，振翅的浪潮带着强烈的恐惧。
E: Subconsciously, you open your mouth and wait for the kids to toss shredded food in. The chunks of meat are injected with digestive juices and melt in your belly like ambrosia, re-forming into their brothers and sisters. But something seems a little different today. A strong sense of dread permeates the wingflapping waves.

C: 赞美帝国的崩塌！
E: Hail the fall of the Empire!

C: 你振动翅膀，缓缓地悬浮在大气层中，像一颗太阳，试图靠近的敌人都会在瞬间升华。真是可惜了，你不希望他们都这样消失掉，幼虫们会饿到的。
E: You flap your wings and gradually float into the atmosphere, just like a sun. Enemies who try to draw close will be vaporized in an instant. It's a real pity, because you don't want them all to vanish like this — their larvae will starve.

C: 你侧身望向远处的内卡齐齐，闻名遐迩的星际巨贾，他套着一件灵长类的外皮，向你缓缓招手。
E: You look to your side and see Nekar Chichi in the distance, a widely known interstellar business tycoon — he is wearing a primate skin and gives you a warm wave.

C: 向他道别。
E: Bid him farewell.

C: 你记起了来时的风景，淡紫色的星云如花朵开放，尘埃云流淌在射电流里，无可计数的船只在其间荡漾，引擎的蓝色火光比星海更明亮。
E: You begin to remember the scene you saw on arrival: Lilac nebulae blooming like flowers, clouds of dust flowing through radio currents, countless ships undulating among them as the blazing blue lights of the engines shine brighter than even the stars.

C: 缝补他们的伤口。
E: Stitch up their wounds.

C: 我想瞥视神明的秽举。
E: I want to glimpse the foul deeds of the Gods.

C: 我想观赏天才的愚行。
E: I wish to admire the folly of genius.

C: 你知道这是陷阱，无论回答是与否，都会成为学生继续质疑你的把柄。
E: You know that this is a trap. Whether you answer yes or no, it will become an excuse for the students to continue interrogating you.

C: 而作为该事件始作俑者的你，再次遭到驱逐。
E: As the instigator of this incident, you were once again expelled from the school.

C: 「我从不吝啬对聪明人的褒奖，尤其是他们的研究和我同处一个领域时。」
E: "I'm never stingy with my commendations for intelligent individuals, especially when their research is in the same field as mine."

C: 大会将决定「权杖」的分配，谁的课题更有价值？谁能解决未来的难题？谁便成为遗产的新主人——至少名义上如此。「权杖」在帝国废墟中星罗棋布，与会的你们也各怀异心。
E: The conference will decide the distribution of the Scepters: whose project is more valuable? Who can solve the difficult problems of the future? That "who" will soon become the owner of the legacy — at least in name. The Scepters are scattered across the empire's ruins like stars in the sky, and each of you in attendance harbors a hidden agenda in your hearts.

C: 机械不朽的身躯。
E: A body of mechanical immortality.

C: 但不仅于此，你感到分外悲伤。这个已被确定的未来，让你富有一种机械天生的使命感，去杀死那些悲哀的，毫无自由意志的有机生命。
E: But it's not just that. You feel particularly sad. This already ascertained future has given you a sense of duty inherent to machines — to slay those wretched organic beings devoid of free will.

C: 「寂静领主，对鲁珀特而言，她就是那个阻止自己走出知识圆圈的存在。可她的目的到底是什么？」未来的天才对出现的同僚心感困惑。
E: "To Rubert, the Lord of Silence is the existence that prevented him from leaving the Circle of Knowledge. But what exactly are her intentions?" The future genius is perplexed by the appearance of her peer.

C: 历史的蝴蝶，再次扇动了它的鳞羽。
E: The butterfly of history flutters its scaled wings once more.

C: 「『知识』是编造的谎言，战争是争夺话语权的游戏。」博识学会在宇宙中建立了一种暴政，那就是，<color=#dbc291ff>只有他们能决定什么是正确！</color>
E: "Knowledge is a fabricated lie, and war is a game to seize the right to have your voice heard." The Intelligentsia Guild has established a despotic rule over the universe, that is — <color=#dbc291ff>only they get to decide what is right!</color>

C: 「谁知道呢？」少女的回答出乎意料。
E: "Who knows?" The young woman's reply is unexpected.

C: 「多此一举的小家伙！别乱翻我的书！」头发花白的老人呵斥道。他向你走来，你看到他皱得发胀的皮肤。「你手里拿着的那本，*新伦蒂尼恩王国*的历史，我最得意的作品。」
E: "Hey, nosy kid! Don't touch my books!" An elderly man with white hair reprimands you. As he approaches, you notice his wrinkled and bloated skin. "What you're holding is the 'history of the kingdom of New Londinium,' my proudest work."

C: 你拍了电视机一下，它的屏幕闪烁两下，接着恢复了正常的画面。
E: You smack the television. Its screen flickers twice and returns to normal.

C: 「购买公司的债务，等待这场浩劫过去，公司就会给予你数十倍的回馈。」
E: "Buy the IPC's debt, wait for this catastrophe to be over, and the IPC will pay you an amount more than ten times your principal."

C: 你跟随在淘金机器人身后潜入山洞，它的探灯照到一处裂缝，钻头开始高速运转，你看到被凿开的地下，源源不断地涌出令人激动的金币……
E: You follow a gold-panning robot and sneak into a cave. The robot aims its headlight at a crevice, and its drill bit starts running at high speed. To your excitement, gold coins come gushing out non-stop from underground through the crack...

C: 你获得了一些宇宙碎片。
E: You have obtained some Cosmic Fragments.

C: 然而…这议论持续了很久。他们各自连声点头称赞，接着自报名讳，他们研究你的困境，并向你提供数十种针对性的「帮助」……境况的困惑程度如熵增愈发膨胀，你开始忧虑起他们是否可被信任。
E: Yet... the discussion lasts for a very long time. They shower you with praises before introducing themselves. After analyzing your predicament, they provide you with dozens of targeted solutions... You find the situation more and more confusing, and you start to wonder whether they can be trusted.

C: 你站起身，发现自己掉在一个巢穴入口前。你拨开这个巢穴的门帘，认出了这些「鏖兜虫」：它们作为地面作战单位，以牺牲飞行能力为代价，获得了沉重的身躯与刚硬的甲壳。
E: You get to your feet and find yourself landing before the entrance of a lair. You draw the curtain open and recognize the Combatobugs. As ground combat units, they traded their flying abilities in exchange for heavy and rigid exoskeletons.

C: 你熟练地戴上皮手套。作为一位「漫游徘徊者」，对于刺杀区域「脑体」这种活儿你已再熟练不过。
E: You slide your leather gloves on with practice. As a Roamer, you can assassinate *the brain* of a domain with your eyes closed.

C: 这里的装修风格十分有公司派头…你来到了柜台前。
E: The place is renovated in a style very much iconic to the IPC... You walk up to the counter.

C: 「机械城分部，如果手里有好东西，就拿来升级吧。」机械职员懒得说太多，示意你自己选。
E: "This is the Mechanical Branch. You can bring your good stuff here and upgrade them." The mechanical staff doesn't bother to explain too much — a signal for you to make your own choice.

C: 伟大的方程式在脑海中展开，冰凉的数据浸润在你的认知当中，等待在未来潜移默化的改变。
E: A grand formula unfolds in your mind. Cold data permeates your perception, waiting for subtle changes to take place in the future.

C: 「哔嘟…方案已拟定完成，请接受您的专属服务。」
E: "Beep... Your plan has been drafted. Please enjoy your personalized service."

C: 你的肚子叫得更大声了。
E: The growls of your stomach grow louder.

C: 冉比希三世的目光落到你的身上，「打败塔塔洛夫的英雄，和其他的劣等人类不同，我会给你一个机会。」
E: Rumbas the Third's gaze falls on you. "The hero who defeated Tatalov... You are different from other inferior humans. I will give you a chance."

C: 语言，认知宇宙的基础。人类将信息解码为语言，存储在大脑中，并以语言作为媒介，完成思考过程。
E: Language. The foundation with which to know the universe. Humans decode information into language, store it in their brains, and complete the process of thought with language as the medium.

C: 「世上不存在无用的东西，只有未被发现用处的东西。」
E: "There's nothing in this world that has no value. There are only things with value that have not been discovered yet."

C: 一团垃圾数据以极高的速度与舰船碰撞在一起，渗透的代码撕裂你的载具，同化负载的数据。在自己被拽进黑暗深处前，你不舍地按下了紧急弹射按钮。
E: A cluster of junk data collides with the ship at a rapid pace. The infiltrating code tears your vessel apart, assimilating the data it carries. Just before being dragged into the depths of darkness, you reluctantly activate the emergency eject button.

C: 你提起一百分的警惕，将长枪对准祸乱人间的妖邪和孽物。
E: Fully vigilant, you raise your lance toward the demons and abominations sowing chaos in the world.

C: 看着眼前的怪物，你决定——
E: Looking at the monster before you, you decide to...

C: 其一为矛，在艾格勒创造刻法勒时，投入大地脊髓的雷枪，经由冥河的淬洗，成为刺穿天空的闪光。
E: The first of these was a spear, created during the creation of Aquila by Kephale. The lightning spear thrust into the earth's spine became a gleaming streak that pierced the heavens after tempering by the River of Souls.

C: 法吉娜被大地所唾弃，只能在天地间漂浮起舞，一刻不停地狂饮，一场徘徊在空中的，永无止境的大雨就此诞生。
E: Phagousa, spurned by the earth, can only dance endlessly between heaven and land, drinking ceaselessly. Thus, an unending rain hovers over the skies.

C: 永世的佳酿。
E: Eternal finest brew.

C: 若是走上第二条路，它将创造快乐与自由的化身，如海浪无拘无束，似云朵变化无穷。
E: If the second path is chosen, they manifest as the incarnations of joy and freedom, as boundless as the waves and as ever-changing as the clouds.

C: 「扎格列斯在上，我这可是冒着生命危险从遗迹里偷…哦不，找到的，得把卖命的钱也算在里面啊。」
E: "By Zagreus above! I risked life and limb to recover... Oh, I mean, acquire these relics! You can't expect me to leave out the danger fee!"

C: 不要去管启示的真假，只要能让无助的人在黑夜中安然入眠，便足够有帮助了。
E: Don't worry about the truth of the revelation. As long as they allow the helpless to sleep peacefully in the night, it is enough to be of help.

C: 你严格遵守了空间站垃圾分类守则，循环再生后的纸张将以全新面貌回到你的视野中。
E: You strictly adhere to the space station's garbage sorting code. The waste paper will be recycled and returned to you in a different form.

C: 记得要遵医嘱哦。
E: Don't forget to follow your doctor's orders~

C: 一枚千纸鹤，表面有着淡淡清香，你小心地将它拆开，字迹浮现于眼前——
E: An origami crane, lightly-scented. You gently take it apart, and some words unfold before you...

C: 卡利白。
E: Kapo-Kali.

C: 别急，听我给你分析，你要多留意那些看似不起眼的细节。
E: Don't worry. Just listen to my analysis. You have to pay attention to those seemingly inconspicuous details.

C: 以后有机会一起切磋。
E: Let's spar together if we have the chance.

C: 与会人数应有<unbreak>138</unbreak>人，实际到场<unbreak>136</unbreak>人。其中<unbreak>42</unbreak>人位于你左侧，<unbreak>44</unbreak>人位于右侧，<unbreak>49</unbreak>人与你遥遥相对，而最后1人正在你身下不远处的讲台上慷慨陈词。
