E: The actual number of attendees is <unbreak>136</unbreak> when it should be <unbreak>138</unbreak>. <unbreak>42</unbreak> of them are on your left side, <unbreak>44</unbreak> are on your right, <unbreak>49</unbreak> are on your opposite end in the distance, while the last one is giving a speech on the stage below not far away from you.

C: 「女士们，先生们，」此人语音声压级约为<unbreak>45</unbreak>分贝，「现在，在各位眼前所展示的正是利尔他-雅各宾数理院的最新成果——普朗托专家系统！」
E: "Ladies and gentlemen!" This person is speaking at a volume of about <unbreak>45</unbreak> decibels. "Now, we proudly present the latest product of the Aiden-Jacobin School of Mathematics and Science, the Pronto Expert System!"

C: 哈…快到了，就快到了！天空变得澄澈，冽风渐弱…你紧咬牙关，试图调动早已因失温几近坏死的臂膀，向上挥下至关重要的一镐——
E: Huff... almost there! The sky has cleared up, and the gale is turning into a breeze... With your teeth clenched, you try moving your hypothermia-damaged shoulder to swing the pickax for that one crucial move...

C: 「我，奥勒里乌斯，笼中的窥视者，痴愚的牧人，一切哲人之王，在此向各位致敬！」你振臂，「因各位将在这神圣柱廊的注视下欢庆胜利，禀受真正的理性！」
E: "I, Aurelius, the watcher in the cage, the foolish shepherd, and the king of all Philosophers, hail you all!" You raise your arms. "You will celebrate your victory under the gaze of this sacred colonnade, and be endowed with true rationality!"

C: 站在你身旁的菜鸟似乎还没能习惯你这极其危险的爱好。她显得有些惶恐：「是的，教授。他们害怕爆炸产生的高热使病毒活化……」她咽了咽口水。
E: The newbie standing next to you seems like she isn't used to your dangerous antics. She appears to be somewhat terrified. "That's right, professor. They worry that the high temperatures produced by the explosion will activate the virus..." She gulps.

C: 万物本是一，一生二，二生三；太阳为父，月亮为母；父母在，不远游……
E: All things are one, from which comes two, which splits into three. The sun is the father; the moon the mother: Wander not from filial duty...

C: 是没见过的勇士呢…长相倒是蛮可爱的，我喜欢嗡…
E: Now there's a warrior I've never seen before... Pretty cute, too... I like it...

C: 想必你一定听过更加优美的乐曲，也推荐给我吧嗡！
E: I'm sure you must have heard more beautiful music played before. Please, give me some recommendations!

C: {RUBY_B#塔兰顿}行律者{RUBY_E#}绝对不会原谅此等不均之事！能不能扣几块下来喀？
E: {RUBY_B#Talanton}The ruler{RUBY_E#} would never let such unbalance go unpunished! Can I chisel a few pieces of this ore off?

C: 哦，我明白了——你也是混自由搏击圈的，是吧？那你应该也听过那位小青龙的名号吧？
E: Oh, I see. You're also involved in mixed martial arts, yeah? So, you've probably heard of Cold Dragon Young, right?

C: 拿着吧，我能复制出无数份。
E: Take it. I can make tons of copies.

C: 呃，您瞧，我这菜单上所有小食都给您免费尝过一遍了……
E: Uh, look — I've given you a free sample of one of everything on the menu here...

C: 什么也不写。
E: Write nothing.

C: …但那都是没有用的！因为漆黑的虎克大人一定会把你们统统抓到！哈哈哈！
E: ...But that's all pointless! For I, Pitch-Dark Hook the Great, will find every last one of you! Hahaha!

C: 这对从头到脚都别无二致的女孩凝视着你。
E: Two utterly identical twins stare at you.

C: …然后三月七就会拿我是问。
E: ...Then March 7th will hold me responsible.

C: 告诉希露瓦吧。
E: Tell Serval.

C: 我确实是一只岩居蟹…
E: I am a Rock Crab...

C: 还是换个地方吧。
E: Maybe switch to another spot.

C: 还是换个地方吧。
E: Maybe switch to another spot.

C: 大家都躲好了吗？我要来抓你们了哦！
E: Ready or not, here I come!

C: 我想想…嗯……
E: Let me think... Hmmm...

C: 喀！你怎么就走了喀！真是的，好不容易遇到个能听我说话的喀……
E: Hey! Don't go! I thought I'd finally found a good listener, crrk...

C: 气死虫了…
E: I'm absolutely furious...

C: 是的，船长！！！
E: Aye-aye, Captain!!!

C: 你等着，等出征的黄金裔英雄们归来之后，我一定让他们为我的坐骑报仇！
E: Wait till our Chrysos Heir champions return from battle. They'll make you pay for what you did to my mount!

C: 如果你们能说话，真想好好问问你们嗡……
E: If only you could speak, I have so many questions for you...

C: 就是这鸟架上的同款。
E: It's the same model as this cycrane.

C: 机巧鸟飞到领域上空，帮你确认了此处四周无人靠近。你缓缓地吐出一口气，现在正是动手的好时机。
E: The cycrane flies up into the air to help confirm that there isn't anyone nearby. You slowly exhale. Now's your chance.

C: 我不是机巧鸟，我不懂。
E: I'm not a cycrane. I don't know.

C: 那我必须跟你认真对决了。
E: Then I'll have to take things seriously with you.

C: 我怎么知道自己是男是女。
E: How would I know if I'm male or female?

C: 而在这只机巧鸟的前方，是面目可憎的入魔机巧。它受到了建木的影响，擅自变成了伤人的怪物…幸好，你已经击倒过无数这样的敌人了。
E: And standing before this cycrane is a repulsive Entranced Ingenium. Affected by the Ambrosial Arbor, it turned into a malevolent monster... Luckily, you've already defeated countless enemies like this one before.

C: 笑死，就这？
E: Oh em gee, what's this?

C: 哇——你这化外民，连小孩子都威胁啊？！
E: Wow — this Outworlder even threatens kids!

C: 各位选手，听我口令！
E: Contestants, listen carefully to my instructions!

C: 对吧对吧。
E: I know, right?

C: 但是，记住——后果自负！
E: But, remember this: Do it at your own risk!

C: 当然没了。你还想看到什么？看到自己用大规模杀伤性武器把丹鼎司洞天乃至仙舟罗浮开个大洞吗？
E: Of course. What were you expecting to see? Your weapon of mass destruction making a massive explosion, blasting a gigantic hole on the Alchemy Commission delve or even the Xianzhou Luofu?

C: 我的奖励呢？
E: Where's my reward?

C: 我的任务完成了？
E: So my job is over?

C: 哎，别逃别逃！我开玩笑的啦。还是先聊聊刚才发生的事吧？
E: Hey, don't run away! I was only kidding. You want to talk about what happened just now?

C: 什么意思，我没听懂…
E: What does that mean? I don't understand...

C: 哈哈！没什么，就是…那个「我明年要成年了，六大司部该报考哪个啊？」，这玩意儿是我发的，没想到吧！
E: Haha, nothing! Just... that whole "I'll be an adult next year, which of the six major commissions should I apply for?" That's me! Bet you didn't expect that, did you?

C: 《仓鼠球骑士冒险谭》，老少咸宜的合家欢电影，屹立不倒的摇钱树——只要敢拍就有人看。
E: The Adventures of Hamster Ball Knight is great for the whole family, and a real cash cow — it'll always have an audience so long as you're bold enough to shoot it.

C: 在我面前，即使黑暗也无所遁形！
E: Before me, even the darkness has nowhere to hide!

C: 原本是专门为皮皮西人设立的包厢，不过事实证明其它种族的需求和皮皮西人没什么不同。
E: This box was originally designed for a Pepeshi, however, it seems that the requirements of other species are not so different from the Pepeshi.

C: 挣脱护栏的束缚，俯瞰城市的美景——请务必推荐给你的恐高症朋友。
E: Break free from the shackles of the guardrails and take in the beautiful vistas of the city... Make sure you share this advice with all of your friends that are scared of heights!

C: 所谓的列车，不过是环境影响下的心理作用罢了，你反复告诉自己。
E: This so-called train is just the environment affecting my senses — you repeat to yourself.

C: 欧洛尼斯…请您指引…
E: Oronyx... Please give me your guidance...

C: 你怎么不去看表演？
E: Why aren't you attending the show?

C: 只要接受瀑布的锤炼…
E: As long as I endure the tempering of the waterfall...

C: 哟，好了…辛苦你啦。
E: Ooh, all right... Thanks for the hard work.

C: 我也想当圣女。
E: Me too.

C: 会不会变成女的？
E: Will we be born as women?

C: 只要将硬币投入玦轮，就可以让接下来的旅途平安顺利。看我——丢！
E: Just toss a coin into the jade wheel and the upcoming journey will go completely smoothly. Check it out — unf!

C: 女人屏息凝神，手腕发力，将三枚硬币抖了出去。那三枚硬币如狂风骤雨，击打在星槎的尾翼上，无一命中目标。
E: The woman holds her breath, concentrates intently, and hurls three coins. They scatter and ping the tail of the starskiff, but not a single one hits their mark.

C: {NICKNAME}……
E: {NICKNAME}...

C: 行帕，和三月七乘客一样的话，那以后就准备双份。
E: Very well. Since it's the same as what March 7th wants, I'll prepare 2 glasses of fruit juice from now on.

C: 还好有你在呢。
E: Luckily, you're here.

C: 你喜欢听什么歌？
E: What songs do you like?

C: 哎，你自己去看看就知道啦！
E: Tsk. Just take a look and see for yourself!

C: 就这样吧，不好也不坏。
E: There's nothing to write home about.

C: 把你做成备用粮！
E: I'll just make you our emergency food.

C: 丹恒乘客到底梦见了什么呢？…啊，窥探乘客的隐私可不是列车长该做的事情。
E: Pom-Pom wonders, what is Dan Heng dreaming about? ...Ah, it is not proper for a conductor to pry on a passenger's private affairs...

C: …还有一句话叫「识时务者为俊杰」！
E: ...There's another saying: "A wise man adapts to circumstance."

C: （那是…次元扑满？难道那些食物是……）
E: (Is that a... Warp Trotter? Could the food be...)

C: *电波滤音*…你还记得<color=#dbc291ff>「回响发生装置」</color>吗？能够发现隐形怪物的位置，请酌情使用。
E: *electronic voice* Remember that the <color=#dbc291ff>Reverberation Generator</color> will help you locate invisible monsters. Please use it wisely.

C: 没有了，至少现在是绝对没有了。
E: No, at least not for now.

C: 然而，像你这种{F#富家千金}{M#富家阔少}本该自甘堕落，但你没有——你反其道而行之，将有限的精力投入到无限的自我提升中……
E: Yet, not only did a {F#rich girl}{M#rich fop} like you avoid becoming spoiled, you even dedicated yourself to self-improvement...

C: 不愧是我！
E: I impressed myself!

C: {F#大姐姐}{M#大哥哥}太厉害了！
E: {F#Miss}{M#Mister} is just too good!

C: 没想到，新秀{NICKNAME}竟然拿下两分！看来赢家已经诞生，游戏结束了……
E: The rookie {NICKNAME} has scored two points! I guess we have a winner and it's game over...

C: 姐姐对我说，她要去的地方叫作…「裂界」。在那儿能够寻得值钱的东西……
E: She told me she was going to some place called... the "Fragmentum," and she could find something worth selling there...

C: 虚弱的啜泣声渐渐微弱。
E: The already-weak sobbing fades away gradually.

C: 噢、噢…！路过的好心人啊，求求你，请帮帮我……
E: Oh, oh...! Kind passerby, please, please help me...

C: 对不起，我知道错了。
E: I'm sorry. I was wrong.

C: 嗯？什么通缉令？
E: Mmm? Which Wanted poster?

C: 我被碰瓷了。
E: I've been scammed.

C: 不是，我是说您得提高警觉性了。
E: No, I'm saying that you should be more alert.

C: 惊叹之余，你毅然决定点开看看，好奇心指引着你探索仙舟上幽邃隐秘却最为地道的风土人情。
E: While amazed, you decisively tap it open and take a look. Your curiosity guides you to explore the most secret and profound of authentic local customs.

C: 好吧，是这么回事——这东西就跟狗皮膏药似的，你看到就别乱碰，不然这种「垃圾消息」只会越来越多。
E: Alright, here's what going on... This thing is like a strong adhesive. Whatever you do, don't touch it, otherwise this spam news will just keep growing.

C: 那「罐」伫立在那里。罐中仙所言非虚，这就是一个俗物。你曾打碎过无数个这样的罐子。
E: The vase stands there, as much a mundane object as the Immortal in a Vase claims. You've broken countless vases like this before.

C: 不，绝不。
E: Absolutely not.

C: 你的手毫无阻碍地伸入了罐中。你在罐底摸索着，想要找到罐中仙的「谢礼」。
E: Your hand reaches into the vase without any obstruction. You grope around the bottom, trying to find this "thank-you gift."

C: 为了求证你所做的一切是否有意义，你再次掀起了那落满灰尘的门帘……
E: You roll up that dusty curtain once more, seeking confirmation that everything you've done actually has meaning...

C: 我这不也是怕您的才能被埋没嘛！
E: I just don't want to see your talent go to waste!

C: 助人为乐而已。
E: Helping others is my pleasure.

C: 「*不连续的机械噪音*谨记…秘行…事，切勿…打草…蛇。」
E: "*Intermittent mechanical noise* Remember... act covertly... Don't... expose yourself."

C: 不过咱这里是「赎珠阁」，换言之，咱这里是家典当铺，我对商品的价值也格外敏感——你以为它毫无价值时，它可能价值连城。
E: But we're the Jeweler's Pagoda here, a pawnshop, and that's why I'm particularly sensitive to a good price — one man's trash is another man's treasure.

C: 戾气重？你说的对，我自己都没有注意……
E: Hostile? You're right. I didn't even notice...

C: 感觉还可以和谁交换…
E: Feels like I can exchange this with someone I know...

C: 说来都是一段笑谈，您要是不介意的话，我可以全部告诉您。
E: It's all a bit of a joke. I'll tell you all about it, if you don't mind.

C: 你等待女子读完了信件，她泪光闪闪，就好像如约收获了最美的回忆。
E: You wait as she reads the letter. Tears stream down her face as if her most precious memories are being reaped.

C: 你还没反应过来，她就风风火火地离开了码头。
E: Before you could react, she shot off from the jetty.

C: 你现在去试试看吧。
E: Why don't you give it a try now?

C: 母星费尽心思养育你，是希望你能够建设它，不是为了让你放肆享乐！
E: Your home planet puts all these efforts into raising you out of hope that you can build it up — not for your wanton pleasure!

C: 为了进入博识学会，我死死把控着玩乐的欲望，用全部脑力来学习、记忆…真是一段充实又压抑的时光。
E: To join the Intelligentsia Guild, I had to rein in tightly any desire to have fun, and devote all of my brain to study and rote learning... It was an enriching time, but also a stifling time.

C: W的目光在你脸上来回逡巡，寻找欺骗的痕迹。他歪歪头，笑了起来——
E: W's eyes comb back and forth across your face, scouting it for signs of deception. Tilting his head, he laughs...

C: 对，鼓励师的确是该心怀善意，为宾客排忧解难…但我们也是人！不是用来盛装情绪垃圾的垃圾桶！
E: Yes, Motivators should be kind-hearted and solve the guests' concerns... but we're also people! We're not receptacles for emotional trash!

C: 你知道吗，孩子，在成为影评家之前，我也曾是一名导演…一名有梦想的导演。
E: You know what, kid? Before I became a critic, I was once a director... A director with his own dreams.

C: 梦境素材？
E: Dreamscape material?

C: 我仔细一看，发现那家伙身上的皮肤干瘪不堪，似乎已经死了…看它的样子，在宇宙中生存应该没什么问题才对。
E: Upon closer look, I realized that this guy's skin was all dried up as though dead... Judging by its appearance, it should have no problem whatsoever surviving in the universe.

C: 于是我执行分离程序，将飞船的整个货仓都向后发射出去，借着产生的反冲力脱离了旋涡。
E: And so I performed a separation procedure, launching the entire cargo cabin of the spaceship backwards to use the recoil generated to break away from the black hole.

C: 毁于星核的文明并不少见。最初我也没把这事放在心上，打算上报完坐标就走——直到我发现了这些小行星表面的符号。
E: Civilizations destroyed by stellarons are not altogether uncommon. At first, I didn't really take it seriously, and was planning on warping out of there as soon as I'd reported the coordinates — that is, until I discovered those symbols on the surface of the asteroids.

C: 那是一段疯狂的日子，每天都有鲸群在炮火中丧生。就连「泯灭帮」都被韦兰的雄心折服，自愿加入这场狩猎——净瞎凑热闹。
E: Those were crazy days, with whales perishing in the cannon fire every day. Even the Annihilation Gang was won over by Wyland's ambition, willingly joining this hunt — just for the thrill of it.

C: 钱？嘿嘿，可以这么说……
E: Money? Heh, you can say that again...

C: 咳…这个数字确实非常可观，我们乐意接受。但是，你真能拿出这么多钱来吗？
E: *coughs*... It's an impressive number, and we're happy to accept it. But can you really put together all of it?

C: 咳咳，既然钱已经付完了，那我们兄弟俩也不再掺和了。告辞！
E: *coughs* Seeing as the money's been paid, we shall take our leave. So long!

C: 那时我们的食物足够饱腹，这些人只是想尝尝异星生物的味道罢了…屠刀落下前，我看见大毛湿润的眼眶流出了泪……
E: At the time, we already had enough food to feed ourselves — but these people just wanted to try a new exotic species... Before the butcher's knife fell, I could see tears welling up in Hairy's eyes...

C: 你一定很好奇，为什么这玩意会和钟表匠的谜题有关吧——我也很好奇。
E: You must be wondering how this item is related to the puzzle of the Watchmaker... I'm curious, too.

C: 我也觉得一般。
E: I agree.

C: …外人谁都别想对我指手画脚！别想！
E: ...No one is in the position to speak ill of my accomplishments! Nobody!

C: 以至于现在突然有人愿意陪我说说话，我反而不知该讲什么好了。实在是抱歉……
E: Now that there's finally someone willing to listen to me, I have no idea what to say. Very sorry about that...

C: 但愿那家伙能安分点。瞧他先前搞出的乱子，刚刚我路过吧台前的时候，看到那边的*电视*还在播报呢……
E: I hope that guy will watch his behavior. When I passed by the front of the counter earlier, the broadcaster happened to be talking about the mess he caused on "TV"...

C: 不行，我一定得想办法把人救出来！
E: I must think of a way to get my partner out!

C: 说什么「一天到晚总给他们添麻烦」，不过是想打压刚入行的新人罢了。
E: They call me their burden because they want to bully me, a newbie.

C: 我？我叫艾默里奇，是个发明家。
E: Me? I'm Emmrich, an inventor.

C: 更难能可贵的是，它的使用方法特别简便…看好了！

C: 你总算明白了，这并非是普通的学生电影，而是苏乐达公司的广告片，其余酒瓶不过只是个陪衬，更重要的是——你似乎也成了这场商业活动中的一环。
E: You finally understand — this isn't some ordinary student film. It's an ad for the SoulGlad company. The other bottles were mere ornaments. More importantly, you seem to have become a cog in the business machine.

C: 奥赫玛古话曾云：「泰坦赐，不可辞。」你欣然接受了泰坦内定于你的重任，将双手贴近圣烛装置——
E: An old saying from Okhema goes: "The Titans' offer is not one to be refused." You gladly accept the duty handed to you by the Titan and reach out to touch the holy candle with your hands...

C: 现在，有一个能够「认识你自己」的机会摆在面前，你会如何选择？
E: Now that the chance to truly "Know Thyself" is before you, what will you choose?

C: 墙上有一尊石头雕成的狮子脑袋，大张着嘴巴。
E: There is a sculpture of a lion's head on the wall, its maw wide open.

C: <unbreak>45</unbreak>万利衡币！
E: <unbreak>450,000</unbreak> Balance Coins!

C: 吼吼吼！一点小小的手段而已。本狮提醒过，题目里的每个字都很重要吼！
E: Ho-ho-ho! Just a little trick up my proverbial sleeve. I have reminded you before that every word in the question is equally important!

C: 不，我只是想看你被咬。
E: No, I just want to see you get bitten.

C: 万敌有什么看法？
E: What do you think, Mydei?

C: 还是没头绪？你刚好认识几位适合这道题目的新朋友——
E: Still stuck? You just happen to know some new friends who're perfect for this question...

C: 求人不如求己！
E: Titans help those who help themselves!

C: 这可是本狮压箱底的究极谜题，能答出的人寥寥无几。异乡的勇士啊，你寻求的是哪位智者的援助？本狮要好好和那人切磋一番吼！
E: This is one of my most brilliant riddles. There are few who can get this. Warrior from outlands, from which sage did you seek advice? I would like to spar with this person in a battle of wits!

C: 唉——还是晚了，查杀程序已经在运行了…查杀完成，我就完蛋！
E: Alas — it's still too late, and the checking process is already ongoing... I'm screwed as soon as it's finished!

C: 删些应用程序。
E: Delete some programs.

C: 我能有什么好处吗？
E: What do I get from this?

C: 等于<unbreak>11</unbreak>。
E: It equals <unbreak>11</unbreak>.

C: 而我将给予试炼。
E: And I shall grant trials.

C: 巴结有钱人。
E: Butter up the rich.

C: 来，和我学。塔塔洛夫教导我们，若是出现了不公，直接回敬！
E: Come, learn with me. Tatalov taught us, when faced with injustice, respond directly!

C: 果然，信箱里静静躺着一封新的来信。
E: Sure enough, a new letter rests quietly inside.

C: 被人打理过的空花盆，铺着厚厚的土。
E: An empty flowerpot, clearly tended to, its soil piled thick.

C: 离开。
E: Leave.

C: 到时候，就让{NICKNAME}用麦穗给人家编个头环吧♪
E: When the time comes, {NICKNAME} can make wreaths of wheat for everyone ♪

C: 我钓鱼的时候也很耐心。
E: I'm also very patient when fishing.

C: 女孩子的缎带怎么可能只有一个嘛。不过，有些事人家也说不清楚。
E: A girl always has more than one ribbon. But some things are hard to explain.

C: 那就让我们约好…在新的旅程开始的时候，要重新认识彼此，一起翻开故事的下一页哦！
E: Let's make a promise... When a new journey begins, we will learn about each other again and write the next page of our story together!

C: 你朝周围环视了圈，确定没有人看着这边。嘿，既然有这个机会，为什么不来验证下自己的猜想呢？
E: You survey the surrounding area to make sure no one is watching. Well, why not use this opportunity to test your theory?

C: 不错。与我收集的信息一致，你的形容确实与记录里的某位军官相符合。快走吧，塔兰顿绝不徇私，你为赢得你的自由放置了足够的砝码。
E: Not bad. Your description matches that of an officer I have collected information on. Be gone. Talanton bears no personal grudges. You have given enough weight to win your freedom.

C: 谎言。那是出城的路，莫非你希望我放下手中兵器，投奔奥赫玛？
E: Lies. That is the path out of the city. Perhaps you are hoping that I would lay down my weapons and seek asylum in Okhema?

C: 确定，你没法结束这场战争。
E: I am certain that there is nothing that you can do to end this war.

C: …是吗？没想到你如此地忠于「开拓」职责，可想想那些被你翻过的垃圾桶、反复研究的路灯，还有不知道砸了多少个的盾牌…真的不打算钻进去看看吗？
E: ...Really? I had no idea you were so faithful to your duty as a Trailblazer. But just think about all of those trash cans you've flipped over, all of those street lamps you've investigated over and over, the countless shields you've smashed... Are you really not going to go inside and take a look?

C: 啊，我知道，您从未抛弃过我们！既见神迹，当然要跪拜。这些是您喜爱的物品，我悉数呈放在神迹前，供您享用，以示虔敬。您看，都放好了。
E: Ah, I knew it! You never abandoned us! When in the presence of a miracle, it is only right for me to bow before you. These are your favorite items. I present them before this miracle for you to enjoy as a sign of my reverence. See, they are all here for you.

C: 要只是个普通信徒，就别打扰我们的清净！
E: If you're merely a common disciple, leave us be!

C: 悬锋人是必须争取的盟友，可完成使命的难度也极高，不仅要提防灾厄的侵袭，还要直面「纷争」的怒火…希望它们能平安返回。
E: While the Kremnoans are crucial allies, the mission there poses grave challenges — facing both the calamity's strike and Strife's fury... May they return unharmed.

C: 第三问：你相信「真实」与「虚假」之间存在着另一个状态吗？
E: Question Three: Do you think there's a state that exists between "truth" and "falsehood"?

C: 什么是「火柴」来着？
E: What is a "match" again?

C: 其实我大老远就闻到了，真香！
E: To be honest, I could smell it from far away, it smells amazing!

C: 不、不准走！你们是怎么办事的…想临阵脱逃，把我们留在这里等死？你是谁手下的，你知道我是谁吗？
E: N—No, you can't leave! What kind of job do you think you're doing... Are you trying to leave us here to die? Whose command are you under? Do you even know who I am?

C: 快来人啊！有人受伤了——
E: Someone, help! Someone is injured!

C: 聆听星宿之声。
E: Listen to the Voice of Constellation.

C: 尽管你听不懂它在说什么，但在它的努力下，你好像明白了…它想让你给它取个绰号。
E: Despite not understanding what it says, with a little effort you seem to get that... it wants you to pick a nickname for it.

C: 小狗看着你，眼神中有某种期待。
E: The puppy looks up at you with a certain anticipation in its eyes.

C: 「数据」？什么数据？
E: "Data"? What data?

C: 不过……我好像没有见过你？是新来的科员吗？
E: However... I don't think I've seen you before. Are you a new researcher?

C: 看你的样子，也不是界种科的人。算了算了，还是不和你说了。
E: You don't look like you are from the Department of Ecology. Anyway, I better not talk about this with you.

C: 奇怪，怎么还是觉得心跳加速？看来这招不好用啊。
E: How strange, my heartbeat is still very fast. It doesn't seem to be working.

C: 你能为我提供什么帮助吗？
E: How can you help me?

C: 还以为遇到了复读机。
E: I thought I bumped into a repeater.

C: 那些在这次灾难中失去生命的人……甚至连铭牌都没能被完整保存……
E: People who've lost their lives in this disaster... Some of them didn't even have an intact nameplate left behind...

C: 哈！？你知不知道你在说什么话？奇物怎么可能是想要就能给的！
E: Huh!? Do you even know what you're talking about? I can't just give a Curio to a random person!

C: 什么，你说现在也是工作时间？你这人还真是意料之外的死板。工作时间与非工作时间，难道是被时间表框定的吗？你这样的人很容易在三十岁前发际线就跑到头顶上去的。
E: What? Are you saying this is working hours too? You are surprisingly stubborn. Do you think working hours and non-working hours are specified by a timetable? At this rate, your hairline will recede before you turn <unbreak>30</unbreak>.

C: 既然知道就别跟我搭话。打扰一个想打瞌睡的人，比打扰一个正在熟睡的人更加恶劣。
E: I'm glad you noticed. Stop talking to me then. Disturbing a person who is trying to sleep is even worse than waking up someone who's already asleep.

C: 哎，要这时候来口酒，最好再来点下酒菜……
E: Imagine if I have a bottle of wine and some snacks just about now...

C: 还得再有个一块儿喝酒扯闲篇的人一块儿！嘿，那才叫过日子！
E: And someone to drink and chat with! Ha! C'est la vie!

C: 你想要扯什么闲篇？
E: What do you want to chat about?

C: 什么古恩那家伙年轻的时候风风火火的样子，还有伯纳德刚来的时候那身板才叫一个结实……
E: How energetic Gunn used to be... And how strong Bernard was when he first joined us...

C: 那我可就不客气了…
E: Anything? Hmm...

C: 复兴计划路漫漫啊…
E: Looks like Project Revival has a long way to go...

C: 如何评价阿兰。
E: What do you think of Arlan?

C: 那没事了。
E: That's all I wanted to ask.

C: 可以呀，你想聊些什么？
E: Of course. What do you want to talk about?

C: 我有点好奇你家的事…
E: I'm curious about your family...

C: 啊，你好！我叫…呃，萍萍姐给我起了个名字…叫…叫什么来着？啊，是婷婷！我叫温婷婷！
E: Hi, there! I am... um, Wenfry gave me a name... What was it again? Ah, it's Wendy! My name is Wendy!

C: （讲述你在空间站的经历）
E: (Tell her about your experience at the space station)

C: 今天的工作还没完成呢，我还要继续加油。希望下一次阮•梅女士来的时候，会对我们的工作刮目相看！
E: I have to keep my nose to the grindstone to finish the work today. Hopefully, Miss Ruan Mei will be impressed by our work when she visits!

C: …你不也很年轻，装什么成熟。
E: ...Stop pretending to be mature when you're young yourself.

C: 怎么了，有点眼力劲儿行吗？没见我正忙着修复机器人吗？
E: Are you having trouble seeing? I'm busy fixing this robot, you see?

C: 本天才早已洞悉了这个舱段的一切秘密，现在正在无偿为大家提供生活上的咨询服务。你要是遇到什么麻烦，也可以来问我！
E: As a genius, I've figured out all the secrets in this zone, and I'm offering free life advice to everyone. If you run into any trouble, you can come to me!

C: 远程通话已开启，远程信号正常。
E: Remote call started. Remote signals normal.

C: 通讯似乎没有接通。
E: The call doesn't go through.

C: 更有预言称——哪怕黑潮淹没最高的山峰，填平最深的沟壑，唯有它能承载我们最后的希望，传递生命的火种，开启新的纪元……
E: There is even a prophecy stating: Even if the black tide drowns the highest peaks, fills up the deepest ravines, only it can bear our last hopes, pass on the kindling of life, and usher in a new age...

C: 按现在的局势看，双方的支持者势均力敌。您大可考虑考虑！
E: With the current situation, the supporters on both sides are about even right now. You could consider it!

C: 老实交代，争取从宽处理。
E: Come clean and you'll receive lighter punishment.

C: 学生的成就超过老师，是什么稀奇事吗？按你的观点，世界岂不是始终在倒退？
E: Is it that rare for a student to surpass their teacher? If we follow your view, surely the world would only ever be regressing?

C: 那么，若不是我们已经有了关于「阿卡索斯」的知识，怎么能判断出他们的观点不够全面？若是「阿卡索斯」不存在，我们能从何处得到的关于它的知识？
E: So, if we did not already have knowledge of "Icatus," how could we realize that their views are not comprehensive enough? If "Icatus" does not exist, from where did we gain our knowledge of it?

C: 论辩不过是言语间的游戏，得不出真理，更无法改变信念。
E: The art of debate is simply no more than a game of words. There is no truth to be gained, nor can it change my beliefs.

C: 我反对你的立场，并非因为坚信「阿卡索斯」真实存在，而是这些概念对知识的传承至关重要。若是按你的做法，对任何事物都抱着否定态度……
E: My opposition to your view is not because I staunchly believe in the existence of "Icatus." I disagree because these concepts are crucial in the inheritance of knowledge. If we follow your approach and maintain an attitude of denial towards everything...

C: 队员们怕他们出了什么意外，紧急在附近搜寻起来，却不巧遭遇了黑潮怪物，只能暂时撤离。后来他们又去找了好几次，我也四处打探，但都……
E: Worried something had happened to them, the other team members frantically searched the area but were unluckily met with monsters of the black tide, which forced them to flee for the time being. They went back many times later, and I've been looking for them everywhere too, but...

C: 以上就是全部了？好，我们来稍微梳理一下信息吧。
E: Is that all there is? Alright, let's go through what we know once more.

C: 老人眼神放空，某种奇异的激动与恍惚之情于她面色中浮现。
E: Her eyes glaze over and a bizarre, excited, and mesmerized look falls across her face.

C: 上门提货，已经拿走了。很古怪，过去总送到家里。
E: They came by, picked it up, already gone. Really weird. In the past, always delivered things, to their house.

C: 可算抓到你了！
E: I finally got you!

C: 去学一门乐器吧。你懂那么多野史，要是会一门乐器，应该能成为不错的吟游诗人。
E: Go and learn a musical instrument. You know so many rumors and tales. If you learned to play an instrument I'm sure you'd make a fantastic bard.

C: 他也好、我也好，即便明知被黑潮吞噬的人什么都剩不下，却依旧…想要去找找他们最后留下的痕迹……
E: He's like me — we both know the black tide doesn't leave anything behind, but still... we want to find whatever that's left of them...

C: 据说小提图斯打听到了他家老头子的消息，前两天已经跟着探险队出发了。
E: I heard young Titus got word about his old man and left with the expedition team a few days ago.

C: 什——真、真的吗？如果可以的话…不行，还是算了吧，太危险了。
E: What— You mean it? I mean... No, that's asking too much. It's too risky.

C: 别说话了，姐姐！你可是黄金裔啊！
E: Don't talk like that! You're a Chrysos Heir, remember?

C: 没…没有。
E: No... not yet.

C: 我真服了……
E: I give up...

C: 你，「一日塔兰顿」，应当头脑清晰。
E: You, One-Day Talanton, are supposed to keep a clear head.

C: 呵，我可不会被你这样的小辈激怒。信仰一事，本就无关年纪大小。
E: Heh, someone like you can't provoke me. Faith has nothing to do with age.

C: 从今天起，你也是小太阳！
E: From today onward, you're a little ray of sunshine!

C: 挑战人的极限，捍卫人的尊严，「奥凯纳斯精神」绝不允许我们向神明摇尾乞怜。
E: Pushing human limits and upholding human dignity — the Okeanas spirit forbids us from begging the gods for mercy.

C: 附近原本便存放着一些盾牌，在那两个小贩回来前，我们可以先用它们搭个简单些的壁垒。
E: There are shields stored in the vicinity. Let's use them to construct a basic barricade before those two merchants get back.

C: 没别的事了。
E: I have nothing else to ask.

C: 啊，是你，{NICKNAME}。咳…我感觉…有点不舒服……
E: Ah, it's you, {NICKNAME}. Ahem... I'm not... feeling so great...

C: 毕竟，我们是要站上奥赫玛小贩业顶点的男人啊！
E: After all, we're the men who will stand at the pinnacle of the Okhema marketplace together!

C: 太好啦！那我们就在这里乖乖等着，等你的好消息。
E: Great! We will be waiting here for your good news.

C: 关于这点，或许是最不用担心的。
E: That's probably the least of our worries.

C: 选择卷五
E: Select Volume 5

C: 啊…瞧我这失误，宴会上太久没有生人，我险些忘记您是来自天外了。
E: Oh... my apologies! We haven't had outsiders join our celebration in ages. I forgot you're from beyond the sky.

C: 总之试试看吧。
E: Worth a shot.

C: ——这些都不是重点啦。
E: ...Of course, there are other things in life too.

C: 因为「公司」旗下的音乐平台实在太乱了，像我就是十几个平台的付费会员。
E: It's hard to find the music you want on the streaming platforms managed by the IPC. I, for one, had to subscribe to at least a dozen of them.

C: 太好了，{NICKNAME}，我正好有事找你呢。
E: Hey, {NICKNAME}! I was looking for you.

C: 感谢你邀请我登上星穹列车，{NICKNAME}。
E: Thank you for inviting me aboard the Astral Express, {NICKNAME}.

C: 「星星碎了，列车要到处去接星星，所以在天上飞。」
E: "The stars exploded, and the Express has to go everywhere to pick up all the pieces, and that's why it flies up in the sky."

C: 喔，这不是荣誉队员{NICKNAME}嘛！
E: Well, well, well, if it isn't our honorary member {NICKNAME}!

C: 看来克拉拉很喜欢列车。
E: Seems you like the Express very much.

C: 想想就很期待~
E: Looking forward to it~

C: 慢慢来，别着急。
E: It can be a little overwhelming. Take your time.

C: 帕姆好可爱……
E: Pom-Pom is so cute...

C: 「造物引擎」…可惜我也没见过那台大机器人。
E: The Engine of Creation... Sadly, I never got the chance to see the robot myself.

C: 虽然小姐已经为大家购买了人体工学的座椅，但依然觉得差了点什么。如果能使用这个材质的坐垫，应该可以让小姐和科员们都感觉轻松一些。
E: Lady Asta bought ergonomic chairs for everybody, but I feel like there's still room for improvement. Cushions like this one might actually be the missing piece.

C: 要不要留下来？
E: Sounds like you wanna join the Express!

C: 这些日子，你帮了罗浮，也帮了我很多忙。于公于私，我都应该感谢你……
E: My time with you has been a great help to the Luofu, and a great help to me. I want to say thank you, both publicly and privately.

C: 抱歉，我并不是和你打官腔。一旦到了我这个年纪，就不怎么会结交新朋友了……
E: Sorry, I don't mean to sound so formal. Once you reach my age, it's difficult to make new friends...

C: {NICKNAME}，我来当「列车医生」，咱们今晚就逃离罗浮吧！
E: {NICKNAME}, why don't you guys let me be the resident doctor on the Express! Let's escape the Luofu this evening!

C: 我是说，在梦里我会飞，飞得很高很高。
E: ...I was dreaming about flying!

C: 最近我又做梦了……
E: I've been dreaming lately.

C: 呜呜伯都在哪儿出没？
E: Where are Wubbaboos usually found?

C: 你应该自我反省…
E: You need to self-reflect more...

C: 哎，{NICKNAME}。从那件事之后，我又何尝没有反省过自己的呢？可是那些人哪儿会听我讲话？在他们眼中，我已经是个不知悔改的罪人了。
E: Ahh, {NICKNAME}, have I not reflected upon my actions since then? But who amongst those people would listen to me? For them, I am already an unrepentant sinner.

C: 谢谢你愿意听我讲话。如果之后你有需要，我也愿意随时倾听你的发言。
E: Thank you for listening to me. I am also always ready to listen whenever you need me.

C: 因此，我将自己的反省与思考都告诉了她。虽然拉明娜当时…并没有接受我的道歉，但我相信我的诚意一定可以传递给她的吧？
E: Therefore, I told her all about my introspection. Lamina didn't accept my apology there and then, but I believe she must have felt my sincerity.

C: 智库里有很多强者……
E: There are many strong adversaries in the data bank.

C: 「天外之境」另有他处。
E: This isn't Satelleden.

C: 其实非要说到姐姐的话，也都还好啦。她确实很厉害呢，是的是的。
E: If you really want to talk about her... I guess that's fine. Yes, yes, she really is impressive.

C: 还是不聊了…
E: Let's stop here...

C: 那些你给卡波特的奇物…
E: Those Curios you gave Capote...

C: …开个玩笑。毕竟丹恒还得睡觉呢。
E: ...I'm kidding. Dan Heng needs the room to sleep in, after all.

C: 干脆现在就回家去收拾行李吧……
E: Maybe I should go pack my bag right now...

C: 是要拿他们俩的可爱指数来计算吗？那这道题也太难了，我可算不出啊~
E: Huh? Hmm, we'd have to assign them both a numerical value based on a shared characteristic, like... cuteness? But in that case, we'd be talking astronomical values... Ugh, this one's too hard — I can't do it!

C: 答案我倒是知道啦——「谷氨酸」，对吧？
E: ...but that doesn't stop me from knowing the answer! It's glutamic acid, isn't it?

C: 捏鼻子，一口闷！
E: Hold your nose and chug it!

C: {NICKNAME}，又见面了。我给列车组准备了一件礼物，想想还是直接交到你手上比较合适。
E: {NICKNAME}, I've prepared a gift for the Crew. I feel that it'd be most appropriate if you held onto it.

C: 听闻你对这类深空中的「石头」情有独钟。所以我特地搜集了一些，当作礼物，以表心意。
E: I hear that you are very interested in these deep space stones. By way of thanks, I've taken it upon myself to gather some for you.

C: …今天的列车之旅就到此为止了。下、下次还有机会的话，我会再来的。
E: ...That's enough Express for today. The n—next time I have a chance, I'll come back and visit again.

C: 雪衣说你的擢升，与意外无关…
E: From what Xueyi said, your promotion was no accident...

C: 原本刚登上列车的时候，还以为列车长只是一个吉祥物，来这里的机会多了以后，我发现列车长待客又周到又靠谱，太可爱了……
E: When I first boarded the Express, I thought the conductor was just a mascot... but now that I've been here a few times, I know how important they are to the train. They're so considerate and reliable.

C: 但最令人难忘的…还是眼看着它慢慢逝去，并为此而感到心痛的那种「感受」。
E: But, what remains most unforgettable... is the profound sensation of watching a flower fade away and the heartache that accompanies it.

C: 旅途总是充满了艰难险阻。
E: Adventures always seem to come with their own set of risks.

C: {NICKNAME}，你来啦，能帮我挑一款假发吗？
E: {NICKNAME}, you're here. Can you help me pick out a wig?

C: 很正常啦！我有时候也记不住。
E: That's normal! I can't remember mine sometimes either.

C: 照片即是回忆！
E: Photographs equal memories!

C: 若干系统时后，文字会转变为大家都能够读懂的普遍样式。
E: After some system hours, the words will turn into a common language that everyone can understand.

C: 第三组，七彩色。
E: The third set, the rainbow deck.

C: 不过比起计数，我只愿那些神兵利器都有珍惜他们的主人，而非单纯被蛮力驱使。
E: But really, I just want those marvels of weaponry to all have masters who treasure them rather than wield them with only brute strength.

C: 总有种你会更加纵容她的预感。
E: I have a feeling you're going to let her off even more.

C: 我不知道，我不说。
E: I don't know, so I won't say.

C: 桌面上散落着几张手稿残页，你觉得此情此景需要一位会喵喵叫的桌面清扫专家。这突如其来的想法是否又会成为某项实验的灵感来源？你无从得知……
E: The remaining pages of a manuscript are scattered all over the desk. In your opinion, the situation calls for a meowing desk cleaning expert. Will that sudden thought become your inspiration for research? You have no means to find out...

C: 培养罐中孕育着大株绿植，你很好奇它是否需要吸收星光。
E: Large green plants are grown in the incubation jar. You wonder whether they need to absorb starlight.

C: 你忽然醒悟，为什么要徒劳地追逐理论的彼岸，你该让宇宙的法则为你臣服。
E: Suddenly, realization dawns on you. Why make futile efforts to prove theories when you should in fact make the laws of the universe yield to you?

C: 这样东西就是「朋友」。对，我华莱士•凯特博瑞屈•莱姆士汀这一生中，从来没拥有过真心的朋友。
E: And that something is... a friend. That's right, I, Wallace Cambridge Limestein, have never had a true friend in my life.

C: 娘哎，影响仕途啊！
E: Gosh, my career would be ruined!

C: 怎么又来了？都说我很忙，非常忙，城东城西，大事小事，事事都需要我们政务官思考……
E: You're here again? I told you I was busy. Like, very busy. No matter where or what the issue is, we civil servants have to be on hand at all times...

C: 嗐，别提了。
E: Ack, don't mention it.

C: 你从她的眼神中能看出来，曼娅已经决定把这封信留给自己了。
E: You can see in Manya's eyes that she has decided to keep the letter to herself.

C: 好吧，我稍微花点时间给你科普一下：你知道光是一种粒子吗？
E: Fine, I'll show you some basics: Do you know that light is a particle?

C: 在我这本书的结尾——他们没有去往「天外之境」，阿尔乔姆选择了帮助达米尔寻找他故土之下的秘密……
E: At the end of the book I'm working on now, they don't go to Satelleden. Artem chooses to help Dalmir search for the secret that lies below his homeland...

C: …虽然不确定编辑那边会不会接受这样的稿子，但总之我还是先继续写下去了。就算内容一般，但这至少是我自己的作品…代笔的活我是不想再干了。
E: ...But I'm not sure if the editor is going to accept this kind of manuscript. I will keep writing for now. Even if the content is just average, at least it's my own work... I don't want to be a ghostwriter anymore.

C: 怎么说呢，她确实无可挑剔啦…但我也是正儿八经科班出身，视唱练耳我也从未偷懒过。
E: She is impeccable indeed... but I too was professionally trained. Never missed a day of practice.

C: 这可不是剧场这边单独能决定的，观众想看什么都是很诚实的。
E: Even if the theater agreed with me, the audience would not buy it. They have been quite honest in likes and dislikes.

C: 不过你说得对…这种「规则」的确是陋习。
E: But you do have a point... people should be less judgmental.

C: 接下来我打算继续练歌，消化一下满脑子的杂乱思绪。请和我稍微保持一些距离，谢谢你。
E: I'll have to keep practicing and clear my mind in the meantime. If you don't mind, I'd like some privacy. Thank you.

C: 「我不想唯唯诺诺，也不愿曲意逢迎。因为我的人生…只属于我自己…只属于…我自己……」
E: "I don't want to walk on a path others laid out for me, for life knows no boundary. I want to break free..."

C: 塔米拉小姐声线虽然低沉了点，但演技与歌唱水平都是没太大问题的。再怎么说她也是人气女演员嘛～
E: Although Tamila's voice is a bit deep, her acting and singing skills are not much of a problem. She's got a lot of fans.

C: 来，本少爷带你仔细读读这版报纸——
E: Here, let me show you how to read this newspaper...

C: 诶？是你啊，吓我一跳，我以为是哪个不长眼的流浪者呢。
E: Ah? It's you. You startled me. I thought it was some dense vagrants.

C: 说吧，你找我到底有什么事？
E: So, what exactly do you want to see me about?

C: 原来他已经入土了啊…我说怎么好几天没见着这人呢。
E: So he's kicked the bucket, huh... I was wondering why I hadn't seen him for a few days.

C: 再见啦。
E: See you.

C: 为什么你这么懒？
E: Why are you so lazy?

C: 好了好了，我要继续睡了…呼…呼噜……
E: Okay, I'm going back to sleep... *snore*...

C: 哼，现在的大人真是一点见识都没有。可惜我现在已经吃完了，等下次我再分你一点吧——不过…你要用一条有用的信息来交换！
E: Hmm, grown-ups these days really have no idea. Too bad I've finished it all. You can have some next time — but... you'll have to trade me some information for it!

C: 发生什么事了？
E: What happened?

C: 你在找谁？
E: Who are you looking for?

C: 啊…原来布洛妮娅姐姐住在上层区啊。怪不得一直都找不到她呢……
E: Ah... so she lives up in the Overworld, then. No wonder I couldn't find her...

C: 那要看你是怎么定义「特别的住客」的了。住过这儿的客人一茬接一茬的，的确留下过不少故事。
E: Well, it depends on how you define special guest. Many guests have stayed with us. Indeed there are a lot of stories.

C: 「会社」的职责是？
E: What's the Society's mission?

C: 还是说你有别的什么事？
E: Or do you have other business?

C: 我想和你聊聊…
E: Can we talk...?

C: 如果事情没有出现转机，我可能会辜负全城民众的信任…还有希儿的信任。我必须吸取教训，继续成长——我的意志必须更加坚定。
E: If things had not turned around, I may have betrayed the trust of all our citizens... and Seele's, too. I must learn from this lesson and continue to grow. My will must be stronger!

C: 结果各位也看到了——不论背景出身、身份高低，上下层区的贝洛伯格人团结在了一起，为了维护这个世界的自由自主贡献力量。
E: And you all saw the outcome. The citizens of Belobog — regardless of background and status, both Underworlder and Overworlder — have all come together to contribute to maintaining the freedom and autonomy of this world.

C: 我现在就专注于教训那些家伙。得让他们明白，不论处于什么时期，干偷鸡摸狗的勾当都是会被惩罚的。
E: I'm just focusing on teaching those guys a lesson. Gotta make them understand that if they break the law, they're gonna be punished — no matter what era we're living in.

C: 嚯，自信真好。不过你也确实有吹牛的资本。
E: Well, it's good to have confidence. But I suppose in this case, you really do have bragging rights.

C: 是啊，你听谁说的？那人真有眼光！
E: That's right. Who told you that? They must have great taste!

C: 这节骨眼上还想着聊天啊…不过我没什么意见——想聊什么？
E: Chatting at a time like this... But that's okay with me. What would you like to chat about?

C: 不过嘛，他那小队里有个铁卫小伙，总是替他背黑锅——好像是叫萨克雷？总之，那天邓恩也把萨克雷推出去顶锅了。
E: There is a member in his squad who always takes the blame for him. His name is Zackery, I think? Anyway, that day, Dunn blamed it on Zackery again.

C: （他好像非常投入…要不要听他说完呢？）
E: (He seems rather involved... Would you like to hear him finish his preaching?)

C: 可可利亚大人的牺牲令人痛心。她用一生的时间对抗「存护」的敌人…即使不被理解，即使遭受非议，她的内心仍然牵挂着人民，她的牺牲将被世代铭记！
E: Madam Cocolia's sacrifice was heartbreaking. She spent her whole life fighting against enemies of Preservation... Even if she was misunderstood and sometimes criticized, her heart still cares about the people. Her sacrifice will be remembered for generations!

C: 我和几个志同道合的朋友就这么组成了摇滚乐队，当时在军官学校还算小有名气吧。
E: I formed a rock band with a few like-minded friends, which was quite famous in the cadet school back then.

C: 哈哈，我就知道…那看来我们能放假都多亏了你啊。感激不尽！
E: Ha, I knew it! It seems like we all owe you a debt of gratitude for our vacations. Thanks so much!

C: 算了…反正我天天都去机械屋，现在和茉莉的关系也不错。
E: Forget it. I visit the workshop every day, and I've been on good terms with Molly.

C: 从数据上看，布洛妮娅大人做出了非常正确的选择。对贝洛伯格的大家来说，这可能就是最好的结果了吧？
E: Looking at the data, Lady Bronya made a very appropriate decision. This might even be the best possible result for the people of Belobog.

C: 好。我也该继续工作了，回见。
E: All right. I should get back to work too. I'll see you later.

C: 有空常来看看啊！
E: Come back again when you've got time!

C: 帮娜塔莎稳定下层区的民心，执行灾后重建工作——她出脑力，我出体力。跟往常没太大区别，只是心情轻松愉快不少。
E: Helping Natasha calm any Underworld unrest, performing post-disaster rebuilding work — she's the brains of the outfit, and I'm the brawn. Not much difference from usual, but I'm much happier and relaxed.

C: 另外，我周围有不少年轻人都想趁这个机会离开磐岩镇，去上层区闯荡闯荡。我和他们聊了很多，也算给了他们点生活上的指导吧。
E: Also, many younger people around me have been taking this chance to leave Boulder Town to try their luck in the Overworld. I've chatted plenty with them, to give them some of life's pointers, I guess.

C: 四千个日子里见不到光，黑暗~
E: Four thousand days with no light / gets dark~
...Yeah.

C: 不要来催，不管是谁
E: Don't tell me what to do. Don't tell me what to be

C: 我找到了古代钱币…
E: I've found some ancient coins...

C: 不过，我们其实在那段时间里还会经常偷偷进入雪原私自考察……
E: But to tell you the truth, we used to go on unauthorized expeditions into the Snow Plains from time to time back then...

C: 我们第一次认识是在学校的图书馆里。那时，我捡到了她丢掉的创作——和《奇谭》有关的那种——还给她了。
E: The first time we met was at the school library. At the time, I happened to pick up her unfinished writing, something like Tales, and returned it to her.

C: 但我想这毕竟是虎克的心意，就没有卖给他。
E: But that was a gift from Hook, so I didn't sell it to him.

C: 你好啊{F#女士}{M#先生}。如果还有和手机相关的问题，欢迎随时来找我。
E: Hey there, {F#Miss}{M#Mister}. If you ever have any questions about phones, feel free to drop by anytime.

C: 我想跟你聊聊。
E: Can we talk...?

C: 哼，哼哼！
E: Oink, oink oink!

C: 电话亭好像有段恐怖传说……
E: I heard there's a legend of horror about the phone booth...

C: 大哥，算了算了。
E: Bro, forget about it.

C: 是贝洛伯格学院毕业的吗？
E: Are you a graduate of Belobog Academy?

C: 几点发车来着？
E: What time does the cable car depart?

C: 我…我也不知道……
E: I... I dunno...

C: 油炸葬礼虫…再来一碟……
E: Deep-fried funeral worm... I'll have another serving, thanks...

C: 一边去，别瞎凑热闹。
E: Move aside and quit causing trouble.

C: 爸爸之前为什么会输？
E: Why did Daddy lose?

C: 我看你个头！你自己看看，这地方能看清楚吗？
E: "We can watch it from here"... Grow a pair of eyes and look around! You think we can see anything from here?

C: 大守护者可可利亚牺牲后，她的女儿布洛妮娅决定向公众展示冬城七百年来的全部真相，于是这博物馆便成了窗口。
E: After the Supreme Guardian Cocolia's sacrifice, her daughter, Bronya had decided to open seven hundred years' worth of the Everwinter City's history to the masses, so this museum has become a window to our past.

C: 别看我现在是博物馆的志愿导览员，但这都是伪装——你就瞧好了吧，我鼹鼠党的二把手尤利安一定会不辱使命的！
E: We may look like your regular volunteer tour guide, but this is just a disguise... Just wait, I, Julian, the second chair of The Moles, will not fail!

C: 是我打扰你了。
E: I was the one who disturbed you.

C: 有没有什么奇葩的犯人？
E: Are there any particularly strange prisoners?

C: 老板您不必计较这些粗浅的词句，看看价格就知道档位了。
E: Those names are of no importance. The prices speak for themselves!

C: 当然啦，这只是咱个人的坚持。咱们尚滋味还是什么食材都肯提供的哈，请您不必担心。
E: Of course, that's just my personal mantra. Spices Supreme serves everything. Don't worry.

C: 不过说实在话，您今天要是不提，咱都快忘了这些渊源了…现在咱做饭开店，就图一乐儿，别无他念。
E: But to be honest, if you hadn't mentioned it today, I'd have forgotten about that goal... Now I run the restaurant just to have fun. Nothing else.

C: 我好像在星槎海见过。
E: I may have met him in Starskiff Haven.

C: 但说真的，他这话我不爱听。什么年代了，还有这种对理工学者「高智商低情商」的刻板印象。
E: But honestly, I hate hearing that. In this day and era, why are there still stereotyped notions that engineers have high IQ and low EQ?

C: 咳咳…鳞渊境里浪滔滔，一棵大树高又高。你一口来我一口，长得像根大串烧。
E: Ahem... Scalegorge waters surge and flow; mighty tree you grow and grow; a sip for you, a sip for me; growing like a kebab tree.

C: 可你明明只是一把伞。
E: But you're an umbrella.

C: 我会知无不言。
E: I'll tell you everything I know.

C: 这不就是虚拟现实吗…
E: Isn't this virtual reality...

C: 你们接下来有什么打算？
E: So what are your next plans for the future, then?

C: 我先收着，你讲吧。
E: Alright, I'll keep this and you tell me about it.

C: …二百四十九。干嘛，没见过这么大的未成年？
E: ...<unbreak>249</unbreak> years old. So what, haven't you ever met a kid this old before?

C: 好吧，谢谢你。
E: Alright, thank you.

C: 你这里都有什么灵丹妙药？
E: Do you have any cure-all medicine here?

C: 其实我是地衡司的带刀侍卫。平时没别的活，就站在这地衡司门口望风。
E: Actually, I'm one of the armed guards at the Realm-Keeping Commission. There's usually nothing much to do, so I just stand by the door and keep watch.

C: 听上去不像是真的。
E: I'm afraid that doesn't sound real to me.

C: 不过你如果不识趣地偷看到一位「浴铁」的面孔，他们就会只剩下一副面孔了。其他的人就会不动声色地消失，就像从未出现过。
E: If you catch a glimpse of a Yutie's face, all the others' faces will simply disappear. They just fade away, like they were never even there.

C: 你一个人负责管理？
E: Are you the only person in charge here?

C: 听说穷观阵能预测未来？
E: Is it true that the Matrix of Prescience can predict the future?

C: 稍等一下。
E: One second.

C: 不错，你们的工作做得很好。
E: Yes, you've all done a great job.

C: 最终，在普朗克汗的文治武功之下，「埃伊加汗国」将「古登堡汗国」、「黎曼汗国」和「海森堡汗国」归于一统，成为了现在的「埃伊加文明」。
E: In the end, Planck Khan's cultural and military achievements unified the Aigaia, Gutenberg, Riemann, and Heisenberg Khanates under one banner — the almighty Aigaian civilization, which we know to this day.

C: 想要随便聊聊天。
E: Let's have a small chat.

C: 我并不是对您不满，但是您显然缺乏对占卜演算的了解…建议您不要把青雀当作太卜司的职场参考，那是特例。
E: I'm not upset with you. It's just that you obviously have no comprehension of how divination works... I don't suggest holding up Qingque as a model worker at the Divination Commission, because she is an absolute outlier.

C: 太卜大人临危受命，有要务在身，这司内上下事宜，卜官们自当殷勤打理。每个人都应该对自己应该完成的工作心中有数，而不是等待着别人催促。
E: The master diviner is trying to manage the situation as best as she can with so many important tasks at hand. The managing diviners should be working hard to take care of their own departments. Everyone should know what they need for their roles and shouldn't need other people to keep hounding them.

C: 像我这种遵纪守法的小商人，要是遇见什么可疑的人和事了，我定然会及时上报到神策府去。
E: As a law-abiding small businessman, any suspicious character I come across is going to get reported to the Seat of Divine Foresight immediately.

C: 哎，以前我没得选，只能继承家业。
E: *Sigh*... Before, I had no choice but to take on the family business.

C: 等等，你是在哪里看到我的？这不可能，我明明一直待在药店里……
E: Hang on, where do you think you saw me? That's impossible. I've definitely been here in my pharmacy the whole time...

C: 没什么事了。
E: I have nothing else.

C: 你和那些药王秘传很熟吗？
E: Are you close with those Disciples of Sanctus Medicus?

C: 正所谓「越狱一时爽，一直越狱一直爽」，越着越着还搞出了一些名声。有人称我是越狱大师，还抢着要我当我徒弟。
E: I have a saying: "Break out of jail once and you get a moment of joy, spend your life jailbreaking and you'll be happy forever!" I've actually become quite renowned for all my escapes. Some call me the "jailbreak master," and some are even begging to be my disciples.

C: 就拿幽囚狱来说吧，虽然这里的安全措施已经复杂到令人发指的程度，但那个步离人不是照样跑出去了么……
E: Take The Shackling Prison for example. Even though their security measures are so complicated they can drive a man insane, that borisin still managed to escape, no?

C: 但我看她离职之后眼睛里有光，是比不少眼神涣散的卜者要健康不少的。
E: But I can see her eyes sparkling after quitting her job. She seems healthier than those diviners who always look lethargic.

C: 究竟是不是好事，我不知道。
E: I'm not sure about that.

C: 要知道长生种的社会里，平凡无奇的琐碎物件会成为外界的历史文物。不过嘛，在公司专家的眼中，这些不过是过时的破烂而已。
E: In the society of long-life species, some mundane and trivial objects may hold great historical value for Outworlders. However, in the eyes of IPC elites, these objects are nothing more than outdated trash.

C: 要是这里建立起大型购物中心，「尚滋味」和「美馔阁」或许会有位置的。
E: If we were to build a large shopping mall here, perhaps we would reserve space for Spices Supreme and Delicacy Pavilion.

C: 慢走啊，希望日后有机会与您合作。
E: Take your time. I hope we'll get to work together in the future.

C: …明知故问，是说谎的味道。
E: ...You know what I mean. It's the smell of a liar.

C: 呵呵，我根本不在意你的评价。
E: Heh, I couldn't care less about what you think of me.

C: 你不会是公司派来的坏家伙吧？
E: You're not one of those thugs working for the IPC, are you?

C: 呵呵呵，你又来了。就直说吧，是什么事情要找我来着？
E: Hehe, here you are again. What do you need this time?

C: 放生的理念可不仅仅在仙舟上传播，还有不少化外民将它发扬光大了。只有这种超脱于物种之上的大爱，才能真正提升一个人的心境与修养。
E: The concept of releasing things back to nature isn't limited to the Xianzhou. It's also practiced outside of the Alliance by many Outworlders. Only a love that transcends the boundaries of species can truly elevate a person's heart and soul.

C: 你有什么推荐的店吗？
E: Any recommended stores?

C: 嗯，你要是有什么观光心得也可以跟我交流交流。
E: Well, if you have any ideas to share about sightseeing, I'm all ears.

C: 那里有一种巨型的浮空兽，叫做「六眼飞鱼」。咱当时骑在它身上，足足鏖战了两三个时辰，好悬没让它给咱囫囵个儿吞下去！
E: It had a giant airborne beast called a six-eyed flying fish. I stood on it, and we were locked in battle for hours. It was a miracle it didn't swallow me whole!

C: 大概一百年前吧，星际和平公司有个卖陆地履带的子公司，搞了个什么「星际美食家协会」。他们就在银河内，给各种餐厅评定星级。
E: The IPC had this subsidiary company a hundred years ago which sold conveyor belts, and they had an "Interastral Gourmet Association" that went around and rated all the eateries throughout the whole cosmos.

C: 欢迎光临，想来杯九分劲道的烈焰浓茶吗？
E: Welcome, customer. Would you like a mug of ninety-percent strong Flaming Potent Tea?

C: 首先我不是异星水魈，丑八怪啊，没什么品味。蛤蟆一样的头身比，说起来话咕嘎咕嘎，浑身还湿漉漉的，光是描述我都觉得嘴巴里有股腥味。
E: First off, I'm not a Xenohydro. Those freaks have no taste. The body-to-head ratio of a toad, the gurgling way they talk... the wet, slimy body... I can taste how fishy they are from the description alone.

C: 偏激？我哪里偏激了，不过是实话实说，你可别平白冤枉我。
E: Radical? I'm not radical! I'm just stating the truth! Don't go stick labels on me.

C: 况且我这么说，也不过是希望能引起更多持明对这些问题的重视！
E: Besides, I'm saying this so more Vidyadhara can pay attention to these issues!

C: 欢迎光临，本店药品均有丹鼎司备案，品质上乘，童叟无欺，请随意挑选。
E: Welcome! All our medicines are licensed by the Alchemy Commission and are of the best quality. Please, take your time.

C: 平日工作很危险吧？
E: Is your job dangerous?

C: 最初我自己做了一些牙膏，阿合马从里面看到了商机，就索性拉我入伙了。
E: All I made in the beginning was toothpaste, but when Arma noticed what I did, he spotted a business opportunity and roped me into his venture.

C: 是想同我聊聊开拓者的列车冒险，还是想和我商讨在仙舟遇上的事情？
E: Do you want to talk about the adventure on the Trailblazer Express or the incidents that happened on Xianzhou?

C: 彦卿的日常工作是护卫将军，您觉得这样的工作会有什么压力可言吗？
E: My job is to protect the general. Does that sound stressful to you?

C: 关于你遇到的蒙眼女子…
E: About the blindfolded lady you met...

C: 本姑娘自幼在曜青长大，加入罗浮云骑之后，我这还是头一次离开出远门呢。
E: I grew up in the Yaoqing and have been a hometown girl all my life. This is the first time I've ventured far from home since I joined the Cloud Knights.

C: 你有没有听《天击征孽记》，是西衍先生新出的本子，可精彩了！讲的是天击将军飞霄运兵如神，三破步离人大军的故事……
E: Have you listened to Wrath of Merlin's Claw? It's a new release by Mr. Xiyan, and it's absolutely thrilling! It tells the story of General Feixiao, the Merlin's Claw, whose strategic genius led her to defeat the borisin army three times...

C: 不过真相却和他们想的差之千里。我自幼受学卜算，穷究命运变通。但论及「命运究竟是否可以改变」，这个终极之问，却无力回答。
E: However, the truth is far from their assumptions. I have studied divination since I was a child and extensively examined the fickle outcomes of fate, yet I remain powerless before the ultimate question of whether destiny can be altered.

C: 自打建木长起来后，太卜司严重人手不足啦，像我这样的闲职也根本闲不下来…真是麻烦呀，说真的我也不知道自己在忙什么。
E: The Divination Commission has become severely shorthanded since the Ambrosial Arbor started growing. Even an idle position like mine is swamped with work...This is so annoying. I have honestly no idea why I'm even so busy.

C: 你看我没在打牌，我们要聊点儿什么吗？工作内容除外。
E: Since I'm not playing, shall we have a chat? Not about work, of course.

C: 十王司为什么不销毁你们？
E: Why didn't the Ten-Lords Commission destroy you?

C: 你真的是持明族龙尊吗？
E: Are you really the high elder of the Vidyadhara?

C: 换句话说，{F#小妹妹}{M#小兄弟}，十王司只有保持绝对的独立，才能完成它自诞生起被授予的使命。
E: In other words, {F#kiddo}{M#kiddo}, only by maintaining complete independence can the Ten Lords complete the mission they were entrusted at birth.

C: 藿藿大人之前就负责驱魔道具的管理和维护，她比我更了解这些东西。
E: Huohuo used to oversee the management and maintenance of exorcism tools, she knows more about this stuff than I do.

C: 不行不行，确实是有点太困了。要不你陪我聊会天？
E: I can't, I'm just too tired. How about you stay for a chat?

C: 「赎珠阁」区别对待顾客？
E: The Jeweler's Pagoda engages in preferential treatment of customers?

C: 饮茶人背后的手铐、脚镣、脖锁、刑枷各种刑具开始铮铮作响，铁皮囚犯已经用他的御铁之术包围了饮茶人。
E: The myriad of cuffs, shackles, chains, and spikes hanging behind the tea drinker began to rattle, for the iron-skinned prisoner had already used his iron-wielding skill to entrap the youth.

C: 那咱们就来品品新茶，试试口味。这应季新芽的「狩原毛峰」初展肥壮嫩芽，入杯冲泡，滋味醇甘，香气如兰。
E: Okay, let's try sampling a new tea then. This season's new buds of Hunter Maofeng have begun to ripen up. Brew it for a mellow sweet flavor and rich floral bouquet.

C: 无妨，等客人得闲的时候，再来光顾。
E: It's okay. Come back when you've got more time to spare.

C: 人在一定程度上是被食物塑造的。所以，你能接受自己被粗制滥造吗？
E: We are all, in some way, shaped by our food. You wouldn't want to be made shoddily, would you?

C: 「百步穿杨」就是一个文学概念，通常来说驭空大人的箭就算飞行<unbreak>1500</unbreak>米也具有十足的威力。
E: It's a figure of speech. Generally speaking, Madam Yukong's arrows are a threat from even <unbreak>5000</unbreak> feet.

C: 聊聊筋肉之道。
E: Tell me about the Path of Brawn.

C: 全是我看不懂的仙舟话术，不过没事，点一杯鳞渊春也无妨。
E: It's all in unintelligible Xianzhou words. But that's okay, no harm in ordering a pot of Whale-Tide Spring tea.

C: 但所有现存的类似设计全都在一定的复制周期后停转，或者说「死亡」了。也许息壤也是类似的东西吧？
E: But all similarly existing designs have been halted, or rather, "died" after a certain number of replication cycles. Perhaps this Fallow Earth is the same?

C: 咱寻思着一定是天上的仙人来接神仙姐姐啦！咱就跑啊跑，咱瞅见那艘船停着，船底开了个洞。
E: I thought it must be other celestials here to take her back! So I ran and ran, and saw that the ship had landed, and there was a hole at the bottom.

C: 据说山君带走的那些孩子，都被变成了吃人的狼怪供他使唤。赤泉山周遭的几条村子的青壮汉子都想尽法子要除掉山君。
E: The kids that the Mountain Lord took away were turned into man-eating wolf monsters that answered his commands. All the grown men in the villages around the Redspring Peak were all bent on getting rid of the Mountain Lord.

C: 倒不是不研究。只是仙舟人所谓的「历史学」，和我们短生种所谓「历史学」根本就不是同一个概念。
E: It's not that they don't study it. It's just that what they call "history" is a completely different concept from what our short-life species consider to be history.

C: 别说这种蠢话。无论是仙舟人还是化外民，生命都只有一次。可绝不要因为这种无聊的事而白白浪费掉哦。
E: Nonsense. You only get one chance at life, whether you're a Xianzhou native or an Outworlder. Don't waste it on such a trivial matter.

C: 没别的事了。
E: I have nothing else to ask.

C: 现在是做什么呢？
E: What are you doing now?

C: 你也不是真的对工作安排、会议文件很感兴趣，对吧？
E: You're not really interested in arranging work and poring over corporate files, are you?

C: 只是觉得你很好看。
E: I just thought you looked nice, is all.

C: 那么，这是第一条来自天舶司主司秘书的建议——在仙舟上千万不可以以貌取人。跟你打招呼的人可能有几百岁了，这是很正常的情况。
E: Well then, here's the first tip from the Chief Secretary of the Head of the Sky-Faring Commission: Don't ever judge a book by its cover on Xianzhou. Anyone you talk to could be hundreds of years old. That is the norm here.

C: 你是在倚老卖老？
E: Are you trying to lord your seniority over me?

C: 报名？跟这些小孩子玩过家家的游戏？不要侮辱我了，我不会报名的。
E: And play house with these kids? The thought alone is insulting enough. I refuse to lower myself to that.

C: 呵呵，我经常听到有人对我说「范勇你真的很温柔啊。」
E: Heh, I hear things like "Oh, Fanyong, you're too nice" all the time.

C: 哎呀，算了算了，我也是被气昏了头。抱歉…你要是和那帮仙舟的老东西交涉一番，你就能明白我的感受了。
E: Sorry, I lost my mind there, but you'd know exactly how I feel if you got to meet those fogeys.

C: 不知道你是否熟悉仙舟历史。他们在漫长的历史中遭遇了无数的灾难，每一次都没能从历史中吸取经验，反而妄自尊大，自以为能保护好自己。
E: Are you familiar with Xianzhou's past? Throughout their long history, Xianzhou suffered crisis after crisis, but every time instead of learning from history they only became more arrogant, thinking they will always be able to protect themselves.

C: 具体有哪些方法？
E: What kinds of methods do you actually use?

C: 后援会?
E: Fan club?

C: 文雅但不够响亮。
E: It's elegant, but not loud enough.

C: 曾经的星际大盗躲在这？
E: Is the old space bandit hiding here?

C: 威哥跟我说，得走后门…
E: Wei told me that we need to go through a back door...

C: 我不知道，你去问步离人？
E: I don't know. Try asking the borisin?

C: 没错，击倒一名强大的敌人，往往不需要什么兵刃，而是一条丑闻。
E: Uh-huh. You don't always need to draw steel against a powerful enemy to take them down. A scandal can do the trick too.

C: 咦，有事找我吗…啊，不对，你是谁？这里是引擎舱，你为什么会出现在这里？
E: Oh, you're looking for me...? Ah, wait, who are you again? This is the engine room. Why are you here?

C: 其实我是引擎工程师。
E: I'm the engine engineer.

C: 可是，就在入学不久后我得知了一个消息——负责授课的武术师范在学校外面被星际海盗暴打，从那时起，我便决心背弃「好讲武德」的传统仙舟功夫。
E: However, shortly after enrolling, I received news that our martial arts instructor was beaten up by interstellar pirates outside the school. From that moment on, I've been determined to abandon the traditional and honorable Xianzhou martial arts.

C: 如今我开门立派也算是有些时日了，正需要一些你这样的弟子打出名声，你有没有兴趣？
E: I've been running my school for a while now. I'm in need of disciples like you to make a name for my school. Are you interested?

C: 要问咱门派最经典的招式，必然是疯狗拳和爆丸腿。从名字里你也能听出，这两招，强调的就是疯和爆。
E: If you're asking about our most classic moves, it's definitely the Crazy Dog Fist and Explosive Marble Kick. From just the names, you can tell that these two moves emphasize craziness and explosiveness.

C: 感觉有些残暴。
E: Feels a little inhumane.

C: 我也只是奉十王司的命令行事。
E: I was only carrying out orders from the Ten-Lords Commission.

C: 回到镇妖塔后，我有时会梦见这世上真有轮回转世，我们托生成两团自由的灵火，飞向天外，融聚为一，再也不分开……
E: Since coming to the suppression tower though, I sometimes dream that there really is reincarnation in this world, that we've been reincarnated into two free-moving ghostly flames, flying out beyond the sky, fusing into one, never to be separated again...

C: 文远走后，我灵魂深处有很多狂热的部分从迷醉中清醒了起来…这让我突然觉得，自己的「爱」是一种残酷的掠夺。
E: After Wenyuan left, many obsessive and maniacal parts of my soul woke up from their stupor and regained reason... I suddenly felt that my "love" was nothing but brutal plunder.

C: 杀不死我的，只能让我更强大！
E: What doesn't kill me will only make me stronger!

C: 往事已经记不得了。
E: I can't remember much about the past.

C: 有什么可以打听的情报吗？
E: Have you heard anything useful for me?

C: 小师傅，要切中路！
E: Warrior, you have to strike with accuracy!

C: 我…好像不认识！
E: I... don't think I do!

C: 但如果不可以的话，累就累点吧，至少要得到我满意的结果就成。
E: If that is not possible, I shall just have to face the exhaustion. As long as I'm satisfied with the result.

C: 你有什么养生建议吗？
E: Do you have any self-care recommendations?

C: 进行打坐、冥想之类的活动时，可以试试醇厚感比较强的香。比如我在批复各种报告和材料的时候，就喜欢这类的香。
E: If you're in meditation or deep reflection, you can try a stronger and more potent fragrance. For example, I like incense like this when I'm reviewing various reports and materials.

C: 看不完的参考情报，批不完的军务报告，还要同天舶司处理外事，同工造司讨论修缮…如此一看，出征巡猎反而更像是休假。
E: I have endless pieces of intelligence to read and military reports to review. Besides, I also have to deal with external affairs with the Sky-Faring Commission and discuss the reconstruction work with the Artisanship Commission... With so much going on, any outing, even if it were on official business, would feel like a vacation to me.

C: 都是编的吧…
E: It's all made up...

C: 有话好好说…
E: Let's talk calmly...

C: 不必遮掩，吾听得懂翼兽的言语。「外表看似孩童，年纪却远超常人……」
E: No need to hide it, I can understand the winged beast's words. "Despite her appearance as a child, her age far exceeds that of ordinary people..."

C: 听说，有句来自天外的箴言是这样的：「但愿世间人无病，宁可架上药生尘」。也许，这就是所有医者应当具备的心境。
E: They say there's a proverb from beyond the sky that goes: "May all people be free from illness, even if it means medicines gather dust on the shelves." Perhaps this is the mindset that all Healers should possess.

C: 今天想吃些什么，我亲自下厨。
E: What would you like to eat today? I'll be the chef.

C: 他们就是这样，让你见笑了。
E: That's just how they are, sorry you had to see that.

C: 带上这盏酒杯吧。每位曾和我并肩作战的伙伴，都有与我碰杯的资格。
E: Take this wine glass. Everyone who has fought by my side has earned the right to share a toast with me.

C: 缇宝老师…
E: Miss Tribbie...

C: 没几杯…
E: Just a few cups...

C: 是呀，要多谢缇安老师和灰宝。不然，我的医术可都要生疏了。
E: Yeah, I have to thank Trianne and Grayie. Otherwise, my medical skills would've gone rusty.

C: 但这么做是为了探索群星，为了翁法罗斯的明天！这点小牺牲，他们会理解的。
E: But it's all for exploring the stars, for Amphoreus' tomorrow! They'll understand a small sacrifice like this.

C: 有什么希望我铭记的东西吗？
E: Is there anything you want me to remember?

C: 呵，你越喜欢大地兽，就越会与大地兽产生深刻的羁绊，正如对世界本身的研究——心怀求索，真理自能究明！
E: Heh. The more you cherish dromases, the deeper your bond will grow. It's just like studying the world itself. Keep your heart filled with curiosity, and the truth will reveal itself!

C: 毕竟我们又不是什么恶魔 。
E: We're not gonna force it upon you, after all.

C: 你是寒鸦判官的人，是吗？
E: You're working for Judge Hanya?

C: 可否看看你的证件？
E: Can I see your ID?

C: 我抢劫仙舟上下各大银铺，神策府出动彦卿骁卫才将我逮捕，你又有什么本事？
E: I robbed all the major silver stores on Xianzhou, and the Seat of Divine Foresight even had to send Lieutenant Yanqing to capture me. What are you capable of?

C: 罗浮武术有个很有趣的点，不少招式都是用动物命名。比如琼鸟剑法，形虎拳之类的…那么有观摩智械运行而领悟的招式么？
E: There's something interesting about Luofu martial arts in that many moves are named after animals, such as Mignon Starling Swordplay and Tiger Fists... Are there moves that take inspiration after Intellitrons?

C: 啊？我也活不到那会儿啊！
E: What? There's no way I can live that long!

C: 感觉被针对了呢…
E: Why do I feel targeted...?

C: 《生长》系列其二
E: Part two of the Growth series

C: 启动备用能源。
E: Activate backup power.

C: 这种广告放竞锋舰的浮梯里？
E: This ad's placement is inside the Skysplitter's levitator?

C: 对手是贝洛伯格人啊？
E: Is the opponent a Belobogian?

C: 那边就是卢卡的房间吧？
E: Is Luka's room that way?

C: 因为我们都支持着他！
E: It's because we are all rooting for him!

C: 后来呢？
E: What happened next?

C: 种子内的生物材料渴望自由，终于摆脱了玉兆的「遗传信息」控制，才没有活成别人想要它成为的样子。
E: The biological materials in the seed yearn for freedom. Finally, it breaks free from the control of the jade abacus' genetic data and deviates from what others expect from it.

C: 此阵名为「界寰」，是大衍穷观阵的阵基之一，与其他阵基一同演绎着大衍万化之道。
E: This matrix is called the "Spatial Terminal," and it is one of the base terminals of the Matrix of Prescience Ultima. Along with other base terminals, it carries out the way of all change.

C: 「步离人，灵长目 • 人科 • 犬亚种。丰饶之民中最强盛的一支，也是仙舟联盟长久以来的大敌。」
E: "Borisin: Primate, hominid, canine subspecies. They are the most powerful race of the Denizens of Abundance and have long been the arch nemeses of the Xianzhou Alliance."

C: 「可以推测其幕后隐有一位如棋手般冷静自持的大君，引导着战事发展，并在缓杀慢死的过程中对受害文明详加研究。」
E: "From that, we could assume there was a Lord Ravager as calm and composed as a chess player behind the scenes. He or she did thorough research on civilization going through a disaster during the gradual destruction process."

C: 本台记者为您报道。
E: This is a report from our station.

C: 看演出也好累啊…
E: It's tiring to watch performances too...

C: 不久前，一位鬼鬼祟祟的、头戴蓝色鸭舌帽的人出于某种原因将它遗弃在了这里，随后便扬长而去。
E: Not long before, a shifty guy with a blue cap abandoned it here for some reason and just walked away without even a glance back.

C: 看来这群自称「放生帮」的人是懂一点幽默的。
E: Seems like this group called The Unshackled has a sense of humor.

C: 那么你以不可撼动的强力论据将自己说服了。
E: You convince yourself with unshakably strong logic.

C: 「米糕没幻戏社的诸位编剧：我很喜欢贵社近期更新的大作《仙舟折剑录》……」
E: "Dear Mellow-Golden-Mayor Immersia Club Writers: I love the latest update to your masterpiece Xianzhou Sword Tale..."

C: 它不值得我浪费时间。
E: It is not worth my time.

C: 丹鼎司行医市集中最著名的地标，是如同神龙蜿蜒盘踞的古树。
E: The most well-known landmark of the Alchemy Commission Healer's Market is an ancient tree with dragon-like intertwining roots.

C: 你贴近珍珠般的外壳，梦见自己曾是一位护珠人，与挚爱驭浪而行，穿梭古海波涛间。
E: You edge closer to the pearlescent shell and have a dream in which you are a Pearlkeeper who rides the waves, and travels across the ancient sea with your true love.

C: 你和他在一起如此快乐，但蜕生之期由天定命。你只得偷偷将一枚玉佩含在口中，作为转世相见的凭证。
E: The time you have spent with your lover is full of happiness, but the time of hatching rebirth is determined by destiny. You secretly put a jade pendant in your mouth so that you and your lover can recognize each other in the next life.

C: 你指尖轻触卵壳…机巧鸟、机巧鸟、机巧鸟、机巧鸟…你看到不可胜数的物流机巧鸟在空中飞行，像一张致密的罗网。
E: You brush the eggshell with your fingertip... One cycrane here, one cycrane there... Numerous express cycranes are flying around, making the sky look like a dense net.

C: 听懂警告，置之不理。
E: Heed the warning and ignore it.

C: 我好爱这场演出！
E: I love this performance!

C: 听说乐队的成员都跑了。
E: I heard all the band members left.

C: 拍下来肯定能火！
E: If I film this, it'll definitely go viral!

C: 这么多年过去了，仙舟人真是变化太大了。说出来你可能不信，最近是甚至有帮人自称是我的「信徒」，一直缠着要我以真身露面。
E: Years have gone by, and the Xianzhou people are so much different than before. This may sound unbelievable, but recently, there's a group of people who fancy themselves my "believers." They have been pestering me to reveal my true form.

C: 得了吧，我还不知道你啊，你就贪图人家学生聚在一起够热闹。真没出息，你说你，就知道就学堂里跟着学生瞎混。
E: Save the excuses. Do you think I don't know you by now? You just want to join in on the fun. Useless. Look at yourself. You are only wasting your time messing around with these students in class.

C: 「使用入梦池前，请勿饮用过多苏乐达。」
E: "Please do not drink excessive SoulGlad before entering the dreampool."

C: 「苏乐达好处都有啥，谁说中了就送他。」
E: "What are the benefits of SoulGlad? Whoever gets it right wins this!"

C: 设立在桥下的店铺，远离大众视线，又不过分偏僻——是秘密集会的绝佳地点。
E: A store under the bridge, far from public eyes, but not too obscure. A perfect place for secret gatherings.

C: 「无动力通风球」，在任何情况下都能保证建筑内外的空气流通。
E: The non-kinetic ventilation ball ensures air circulation within and around the building under all circumstances.

C: 破碎的画面一闪而过。你看到了离别，听到了哭声，尝到了嘴角咸咸的液体。
E: Fragments of images flash by. You see parting, hear crying, and taste salty liquid in the corner of your mouth.

C: 祝你美梦成真。
E: May your dreams come true.

C: 您是上流人士，可别被这些闲杂人员的话蒙了眼！刚才谈到的理财产品，要是有意……
E: You're a member of the upper crust. Don't be swayed by people who know nothing! If you're interested in the financial product I mentioned earlier...

C: 了解我们，您将拥有迅速累积财富的机会；信任我们，您会获得持续回报的未来。
E: Understand us, and you will own the chance to a swift and bountiful fortune. Trust us, and you will keep reaping rewards of the future.

C: 好像没问题……
E: It looks fine...

C: 感谢你的介绍。
E: Thank you for your introduction.

C: 为什么会这么空虚，感觉就像…在喝一瓶完全没有汽的苏乐达。
E: Why does it feel so empty, like... drinking an uncarbonated SoulGlad.

C: 这个社会对皮皮西人未免也太不友好了！
E: This society is too unfriendly to us Pepeshi!

C: 现在请听好了！——关于「皮皮西人为什么是神」的本体论证明。
E: Listen up! Here is the evidential proof behind the theory that "the Pepeshi people are gods":

C: 喏，拿去吧。它理应属于你。
E: Here, take it. It's rightfully yours.

C: 谛听没有跑出多远，反而在街角的阴影处转悠了起来，随后叼回来…一袋垃圾。
E: The Diting hasn't made it that far before it starts loitering in the shadow at the street corner and later returns with... a bag of garbage.

C: 「匹诺康尼新闻台」，听起来很高大上对不对？要我说，就是个草台班子！
E: "Penacony News" sounds pretty prestigious, right? But if you ask me, it's college radio!

C: 唉…其实，我当年并没有想过要做一个裱糊匠。
E: *sigh* I've never actually thought about being a reality fixer-upper before.

C: 不过是废纸一张，我不稀罕。以后我再也不想听到和她有关的消息了——永远都不！
E: But it's just a scrap of paper, nothing precious. In the future, I don't want to hear anything at all about her — never again!

C: 「飞鸟已逝，羽折在寥旷之天；永驻时光，待来生与你再见…」
E: "The swooping bird has passed away, feathers folded in the sky; a product of its time, awaiting a meeting in the next life..."

C: 维塔利扬起鞭子抽打在脆筒身上，后者却全然不为所动。
E: Vitali raises his whip and hits the cone with it. However, there is no reaction from the cone.

C: 你怎么看待自己？
E: How do you see yourself?

C: 我们聊聊吧？
E: Let's have a talk.

C: 十分抱歉…
E: I'm so sorry...

C: 暂时没有别的消息。
E: I have no more news right now.

C: 很抱歉擅自揣测您的想法，不过我听*钢琴夫人*说过，麦克斯先生在「现实中」似乎与*现在*不大一样。
E: I apologize for assuming your thoughts, but according to *Mrs. Piano*, it seems that Maestro Max isn't quite the same in reality as he is *now*.

C: 有些问题想要问你…
E: I have some questions for you...

C: 听着，那边的指挥家，停下你罪恶的指挥棒！那是屠杀艺术的屠刀！
E: Listen up, conductor! Lower your evil baton! That is the executioner's axe upon all art!

C: 演奏的意义、乐手的处境、艺术的未来…这些根本就不是他们在乎的东西，无论我怎么解释，也没办法让这些人共情。
E: The meaning of performance, the circumstances of artists and the future of art... These are not things that they are concerned about. No matter how much I try to reason with them, they simply can't empathize.

C: 能怎么办呢，就当是个教训，想保住工作，就必须吃这个亏…我真傻。
E: What can I do about it? I'll just take it as a lesson learned. If I want to keep this job, I'll just have to take this... I'm so stupid!

C: 为您服务是我的荣幸。
E: It's an honor to serve you.

C: 你要知道，对绝大多数普通人来说，现实只会带来一肚子负面情绪，唯有在梦中才能尽情释放自我。
E: What you have to understand is that for most regular people, reality only brings a world of negative emotions. It's only in the dream world that we can truly unleash our inner selves!

C: 「黄金的时刻」你肯定已经玩了个八九不离十，我就不再赘述了。
E: I know you must have played almost everything Golden Hour has to offer by now, so I won't keep babbling on...

C: 就这样吧，拜拜。
E: That's all. Bye-bye.

C: 可惜，没有了激情，再热闹的派对也嗨不起来了。
E: Unfortunately, a party without passion will never be a true blast.

C: 我还有事，下次再聊。
E: I have things to take care of. Let's speak again another time.

C: 其实也挺好的。虽然我遭受到了巨大的文化冲击，但这又何尝不是一种幸事呢？
E: You know what, that is okay, too. Although I suffered a great culture shock, is that not a good thing?

C: 这些缺陷后来都被公司擅自改掉了，嘎鲁酋长直到现在还在生气，说公司「败坏了艺术」，太可笑了。
E: IPC later fixed these problems themselves without consultation. Chief Gru is still mad to this day, saying that IPC ruined art. It's ridiculous.

C: 说实话，作为智械，我的脾气实在是太差了，有时候不愿意好好和学生们沟通。如果我们能好好沟通，也许他们也能明白我的良苦用心。
E: In truth, as an Intellitron, I have a terrible temper and sometimes I am unwilling to properly communicate with my students. If we could communicate properly, perhaps they would understand that I mean well.

C: 我乃银河球棒侠。
E: I'm Galactic Baseballer.

C: 近日有位蓝发「商人」四处兜售「价格低廉，功能可靠」的新式入梦工具。
E: Well, recently, a blue-haired "merchant" has been selling a new type of "affordable and reliable" dreaming device.

C: 听好了，所谓的「梦想之城」匹诺康尼，其实是由<unbreak>12</unbreak>个独立的梦境共同组成的，其中每个梦境都对应时钟的一个刻度。
E: Listen up, the so-called City of Dreams is made of <unbreak>12</unbreak> discreet dream worlds, each corresponding to a "moment" on the clock.

C: 「猎犬」家系是什么？
E: What is the Bloodhound Family?

C: 嗯…您在梦境中的初始形象将与您入梦时状态相同，所以请确保自身穿戴齐整。
E: Well... your default appearance in the Dreamscape is based on how you were when you entered the dream, so please ensure you are properly dressed.

C: 我怕原本的长相吓到大家，就根据皮皮西人的外貌调整了形态——据说他们在宇宙中超受欢迎。
E: I was worried that my true appearance might frighten everyone, so I changed my form and became a Pepeshi. I heard they're super popular in the universe.

C: 顺带一提，您只需要花上<unbreak>3600</unbreak>万苜蓿币，就可以从我这里买到收录了过去五届「谐乐大典」的终极梦境合辑哦？
E: By the way, I have prepared the ultimate dream collection for the previous five Charmony Festivals. They are for <unbreak>36</unbreak> million Alfalfa credits only!

C: 这就对了——您可能不知道，现在的客人最喜欢的就是「开放式结局」！
E: Exactly! You might not be fully aware, but open-ended endings have gained popularity among guests these days.

C: 叮铃铃——感谢您使用窥梦电话服务！欢迎您下次再来！
E: *ring* Thank you for using the Dreampeek Call service! Please come back next time!

C: 叮铃铃——叮铃铃！
E: *ring*... *ring*!

C: 只要您投入一点点{RUBY_B#信用点}苜蓿币{RUBY_E#}，窥梦电话就能自动检索你的通讯录，找到您正在熟睡的某位朋友——
E: Just insert a small amount of {RUBY_B#credits}Alfalfa credits{RUBY_E#}, and the phone will automatically search your contacts for a sleeping friend and allow you to listen to their dreams...

C: 一台设计十分荒诞的电话机被固定在这里，等待路过的好奇宾客拿起它的听筒。
E: A peculiarly designed telephone is fixed in place, waiting for curious passersby to pick up its receiver.

C: 这些是近期颇受好评的单品，挑出来供您选购。
E: These are some of the bestsellers recently, I've picked them out for you to choose from!

C: 打开车灯。
E: Switch on the car's lights.

C: 活干的还挺快。找到所有折纸小鸟了？
E: That's efficient. Have you found all the origami birds?

C: 我要来找星期日。
E: I am here to see Sunday.

C: 再见，愿你在美梦中同享喜乐。
E: Goodbye, and may you have joy and happiness in the dream.

C: 请问您有什么需要帮忙的吗？
E: Do you need help with anything?

C: …请见谅，我压力大的时候总是容易喜怒无常。毕竟这里的工作并不轻松。
E: ...I apologize. My mood swings get erratic when I'm stressed out. The work here isn't exactly a walk in the park.

C: 哪怕梦想变成了工作，也终究是一份工作。
E: Even if one manages to work at a dream job, in the end, it's just that: A job.

C: 哈，你也这么觉得吗…果然…即便美梦早已被金钱锈蚀，人也不该放弃自己的追求……
E: Ha, you feel that way too... That's right... Even if dreams have long been corrupted by money, we should never abandon our pursuits...

C: 皮皮西头顶的绒球突然蔫了下来，仿佛一根枯草般搭在脑壳边缘。
E: The fluff ball on the Pepeshi's head suddenly droops down and rests on the edge of his head like a withered weed.

C: 瞧你这话说的…匹诺康尼已经不做监狱很多年了。
E: Oh, c'mon... Penacony hasn't been a prison for a long time.

C: 那你要当无名客吗？
E: So, you want to be a Nameless?

C: 还想和我聊聊么？就算手边没有特别调制的饮料，随便唠上两句也是好的。
E: What do you want to talk about? I'm willing to open up to you, even if I don't have a custom drink in my hand.

C: 但没想到，猎犬家系来得比预想得要快，更没料到的是，你们会去「黄金的时刻」找我，还恰好听到了我和艾米绮的对话。生活真是充满了意外。
E: But, I never expected that the Bloodhound Family would have arrived so quickly. Even more unexpected was the fact that you happened to overhear me and Amiky talking when you came to Golden Hour to search for me. Life really is full of surprises, isn't it?

C: 这块钟表摆放得十分端正，似乎承载着某种仪式性作用。
E: This clock is positioned extremely precisely and seems to serve some kind of ritualistic function.

C: 据说沙盘内部设有隐秘的机关，指向公馆更深处的秘密。
E: Rumor has it that there is a secret mechanism inside the sandpit that leads to secrets that lay further in the depths of the pavilion.

C: 各大家系家主会定期在此处展开会谈，商议梦境都市的日常事务、经营情况，以及未来的发展规划。这座沙盘就是他们流程的一环。
E: Each Family Head will periodically hold a meeting here to discuss the daily affairs, operational status and future development plans of the Dreamscape here. This sandpit is used as part of this process.

C: 想听听你对这家酒吧的看法。
E: I want to know what you think about this lounge.

C: 都是群傻了吧唧的家伙，过去被欺负成那样还不反抗，没骨气！
E: Those imbeciles! They're spineless worms who don't even have the guts to fight back against the mistreatment they endure!

C: （进行搭讪）
E: (Chat)

C: 想听听你对怪物们的看法。
E: I want to know what you think about monsters.

C: 对了，你有看过歌剧院的演出吗？
E: Say, have you seen a show in the Grand Theater before?

C: 我在这演过一场大戏。
E: I put on a big show here once.

C: 我现在意识到，比起一味的攒钱，适当地做一些改善生活的事情要重要得多。
E: I've come to realize that doing things to improve our lives is more important than blindly making money.

C: 准备好了吗，朋友们？那么，布莱茨，从你开始……
E: Everybody ready? Alright, Blite, you're up first...

C: 你呢，朋友？据我所知，现在的大剧院可不是寻常游客能随意出入的地方。
E: And you, friend? As I understand it, the Grand Theater doesn't just let in any ordinary tourists for a visit these days.

C: 跨越了最初的{RUBY_B#「情绪的同谐」}第Ⅶ音级{RUBY_E#}，我们才有机会与集群之声融为一体…而且可不是说融合就融合——只有通过选拔的家人才能享受这种福利。
E: Only after the first {RUBY_B#"Emotional Harmony"}scale degree VII{RUBY_E#} do we get the chance to merge with the other Family voices... and not just anyone gets to merge — only those selected Family members are able to enjoy this privilege.

C: 总得让那些缺乏自知之明的人知道，超级骇客不是谁都能惹的！
E: When people are lacking in self-awareness, you gotta let them know not to mess with a super hacker!

C: …呜呜呜？
E: ...*boohoohoo*?

C: 所以我在想，你是不是有某种特殊能力，就比如能影响别人的心情、改变别人的想法之类的……
E: So I'm thinking perhaps you have some kind of special ability, like influencing people's mood or somehow getting people to change their minds...

C: 休息时间快结束了…喝口水，歇一下，然后赶紧去准备下一组镜头吧。
E: Break time's almost over... Drink up and catch some rest, then get ready for the next few scenes.

C: 红哨小姐发出一声低频、沉闷的哨音，她的心情似乎有些低落。
E: Miss Red Whistle lets out a low, depressed whistle. She seems to be down.

C: 进来还算容易，想出去可就麻烦了。当我发现怎么都离不开这个倒霉的梦时，就只能认命了。
E: Getting in was easy enough, but it's getting out that is the challenge. When I realized I could never leave this unfortunate dream, I just had to accept my fate.

C: 啊…哈哈、你也看不到…没关系，我看得到，我认得出危险……
E: Ah... Haha, you can't see it either... That's fine. I can see them, and I know the danger...

C: 就这样吧，拜拜。
E: That's all. Bye-bye.

C: …这就是冒险的尽头吗？「钟表匠」想要向我们展现的，就只是这样的小场面而已？
E: ...Is this really the end of the adventure? Is this small stage really all that the Watchmaker wanted to show us?

C: 很扯，对吧？但确实让我焕发了第二春。而且…我伪装得很好。人的心态会被他人所扮演的社会角色左右——没有什么比一位可怜的少女更容易惹人疼爱了。
E: Ridiculous, right? But, it's given me a second chance at youth. Plus... I play the role well. People's attitudes are influenced by another character's role in society... And what is more loveable than a pitiful young girl?

C: 男人兴奋地为你讲述了梦境耕耘的一百个注意事项。
E: The man excitedly reels off hundreds of things to look out for when farming in the Dreamscape.

C: 我叫梅隆，要是你对种田感兴趣的话，欢迎随时来找我探讨。
E: My name is Mellon. If you're interested in farming, you're welcome to come and discuss it with me whenever you please.

C: 不打扰你了。
E: I'll leave you to it.

C: 但如果组成岛屿的忆质不断流失，那么终有一天它会消融在忆域之中。
E: However, if the memoria that is forming the island is constantly depleting, the island will inevitably dissolve in the depths of Memory Zone one day.

C: 不知从什么时候起，流梦礁变得越来越小，越来越破败，人们走的走，逃的逃，许多人暂别之后便再也没见过面。
E: I don't know when it started, but the Dreamflux Reef seems to be shrinking and becoming more dilapidated. People have left or fled, and many have never crossed paths again after a temporary farewell.

C: 下次碰到类似情况，您可以试试这样做。
E: Next time you're in a similar situation, you can try doing this.

C: 能形容下有多好吃吗？
E: Can you describe for me how delicious it is?

C: 不用不好意思，我们不歧视智械的。
E: Don't be embarrassed about it. We don't discriminate here against Intellitrons.

C: 啧，来得太快了，我还没休息够呢。
E: Tsk, here so soon? I'm still tired.

C: 那都是些精力充沛的孩子，万一打扰到其他客人，被老师知道了，一定会生气的啾。
E: They're all energetic children. If they disturbed other guests, the Professor would be mad if he knew.

C: 现在谁还玩玩具啊。
E: Who still plays with toys in this day and age?

C: 哦~恕我冒犯，但宇宙中在追寻愉悦上走得最远、最疯狂、最刺激的永远是你们有机生命。
E: Oh! I apologize for any offense, but when it comes to the pursuit of joy, organic beings like you will always go the farthest, the wildest, and the most thrilling route in the universe.

C: 不能。
E: No.

C: 哦~看看那些失去自由的孩子，在宣扬快乐的梦境里，却没有资格享受自己的快乐…我一定要帮帮他们！
E: Ohh, look at those children who have lost their freedom. In a Dreamscape that promotes happiness, yet unworthy to enjoy their own... I must help them!

C: 后面的故事你应该已经有所了解了。我的一生都在追随父亲的脚步，他的理想亦是我的。即便他已经离开，「钟表匠」的传说也会一直在匹诺康尼流传下去。
E: I'm sure you know what happened after. All my life, I followed in my father's footsteps — his dream was mine. He may be gone, but the Watchmaker's legend has always been passed down on Penacony.

C: 但我们不会强迫任何人留下。我们只希望能吸引到志同道合的战友，加入这场对抗虚假美梦的抗争。
E: But we never forced anyone to stay. We only hoped to gather enough like-minded comrades to join in the resistance against this false dream.

C: 他已经逝去了数百年，曾为我带来过困惑，也曾令我陷入迷茫。但现在，他是我的精神榜样。
E: He has been dead for centuries. He once brought me vexation and caused me confusion, but now he is a role model that I emulate in spirit.

C: 呵呵，我不要苜蓿币和信用点。
E: Hehe, I don't want Alfalfa credits or IPC credits.

C: 说什么呢大叔，到底是谁没礼貌……
E: Hey, what did you say, mister? Who's the impolite one around here, I wonder?

C: 你实在不知道自己传达过什么意思。事实上，从刚才开始，你们都只用眉毛做出过类似交流的表示。
E: You cannot fathom exactly what message he has interpreted from your expression. In truth, since you met him, the both of you have only communicated via your eyebrows.

C: ……我的确只是一块做不得志水手的料？
E: I'm just a terrible excuse of a sailor?

C: 除此以外…他都和流浪汉没什么两样，我实在不知道他是怎么来到这里的。
E: Apart from that... he was no different from your average wanderer. I really cannot fathom how he was able to come here.

C: 他是如此风度翩翩，总能以智械的视角，给出些不同寻常的提议。
E: He had such dignified elegance, and offered unique insights from the perspective of an Intellitron.

C: 看吧，这就是理财的意义所在了，时间是把饕餮的镰刀，我们不能坐以待毙。
E: You see, this is why financial management is important. Time swings a mighty scythe. We must act before it's too late.

C: 过去，每当有人问起时，我总会半开玩笑地说——哦，我刚被人打了一拳。
E: In the past, when someone asked about it, I would joke and say I was punched in the face.

C: 不说了，我要准备出席雅各布大厨的新品揭幕环节了，回见。
E: Alright, I have to go get ready to attend the unveiling of Chef Jacob's new dish. Later.

C: 我总是翻来覆去地想…这一切真的值得吗？为了足够安享晚年的钱，要跟小丑一样在这么多名流面前装疯卖傻…表面上我还是明星，可实际上大家都把我当成笑料吧？
E: Night after night, I'm haunted by the question: Is this really worth it? For the sake of a plush retirement, I play the mad clown for these bigwigs. I'm pretty sure they see me as a joke instead of the celebrity they call me.

C: 时间就是金钱。但如果你愿意无偿捐赠我一笔钱，我也可以当场度假。
E: Time is money. Of course, if you're willing to unconditionally offer me a sum of money, I can switch right into vacation mode.

C: 啾？啾——这可真是个失礼的请求啾！不过如果是客官您的话，倒也不是不可以啾……
E: Tweet? Tweet — what a disrespectful request, tweet! However, if you really wish to do so, I will allow it, tweet...

C: 小鸟温柔地叼过你拿出的代币，然后…吃掉了它！
E: The bird gently holds the token you gave it in its mouth, and then — swallows it whole!

C: 顾客气炸了，就去投诉我发的货不对板，要求十倍赔偿…呜呜…您能不能跟人力那边说一声，千万别开除我，我会改的，我保证以后绝不再犯。
E: The customer blew up in rage and lodged a complaint against me for sending them things they did not order, demanding a tenfold compensation... *sob* D—Do you think you could ask HR not to fire me? I promise this will never ever happen again.

C: 我招他们几个也是经过严格筛选的——你别看咱们皮皮西人个头小，论航行的经验和胆量他们几个都是一流的。等着看吧，我保证他们会让您眼前一亮的。
E: Each one of them went through a stringent selection process to be recruited! Don't be fooled by our diminutive stature, no matter navigation experience or courage, all them Pepeshi are the cream of the crop. Just wait, they'll impress you someday.

C: 我曾经历一场太空事故。被家族回收时，记忆存储模块已熔化了大半，而维修费用是一笔天文数字。
E: I was once involved in an accident in space and by the time I was recovered by The Family, a large portion of my memory storage module had already melted. However, the repair cost was astronomical.

C: 那就统统打破吧！于是我拿起了麦克风，梦想着在沉闷的折纸大学引领新的潮流。
E: Therefore, I shattered all of the norms! I picked up the microphone, dreaming about starting an all-new trend at Paperfold University.

C: 我父亲可能是觉得脸上有光，从来瞧不起艺术的他，竟专门开了家唱片公司帮我出道，还砸重金请了鸢尾花家系最有名的音乐总监，亲自为我们制作出道专辑。
E: Perhaps because of how proud he felt, my father, who always looked down on the arts, started a record label to help me make my debut. He even splurged to hire the most famous music director from the Iris Family to personally create our debut album.

C: 那我去找当事人问问好了。
E: I guess I'll ask her myself, then.

C: 唯一要战胜的敌人，只有我们自己！
E: The only rival that can defeat us is ourselves!

C: 我拼命学习，是为了折纸大学的奖学金，为了那份荣誉…为了找到一份好工作……
E: All of my hard work studying is so I can attain the Paperfold University Scholarship. For that honor... And for finding a good job...

C: 按照某个故事里的说法，那些「小鸟」是逝于梦中之人所化的幽灵。它们被困在梦里，无法离开，又太过孤独，才会时不时想办法让人们看到自己……
E: According to a story I once heard, these "birds" are actually the spirits of people who passed away in a dream. They are trapped inside, unable to escape. It is their unbearable loneliness that leads them to occasionally allow themselves to be seen by us...

C: 四大天王有五个，七大不可思议有九个，这不是常识吗？
