E: There are five people in the Formidable Four, right? It's only normal that there would be nine of the Seven Wonders, right?

C: 老实说，我想过这个问题，我的未来一眼就能望到头——没什么天赋，注定只能跑跑龙套，当个业余段子手。这种水平完全不足以养活自己……
E: Truth be told, I've thought about this question before. My future is plain as day — mediocre in talent, destined to be an extra on the stage, working freelance as a joke writer. I won't be able to eke a living with my meager skills...

C: 没什么想问的了。
E: That's all the questions I have.

C: 经理，我想请你帮个忙，就是…学校要出年鉴了，可以邀请同学给自己写赠言，那个…我在学校里和其他人不太熟，您能帮我写一段吗？
E: Manager, I'd like to ask for a favor. Um... the school's yearbook is about to be out, and we can invite classmates to write us messages. Um... I'm not really familiar with others at school, so can you write something for me?

C: 你好，演出乐队的经理。音乐派对能取得如此成功，在银河间引起广泛关注，你和那位乐队核心的确功不可没。
E: Hello, band manager. The music party's success and its amassed following across the cosmos are all thanks to you and your band's lead.

C: 若是还有疑问，你可以随时与我沟通。
E: If you still have any further questions, please talk to me anytime.

C: 就聊到这里吧。
E: That's it for now.

C: 随着年纪增加，这记性是越来越差了，刚抄过的曲子，过不了多久就忘了。哎。
E: As one gets older, the memory starts to fade. Melodies copied not long ago are forgotten soon after. *sigh*

C: 看来你可能要等到毕业典礼的时候再出手了——如果你能顺利毕业的话。
E: It appears you'll have to wait till the graduation ceremony to try your hand... if you even manage to graduate.

C: 提问：罗浮六御中谁最幸福？答案：符玄。因为她姓符。
E: Who is the most tired among the Luofu's Six Charioteers? Jing Yuan. Because he's the "Dozing" General.

C: 如今我唯一想做的，就是尽可能走在她前面。倒不是身为兄长的好胜心。只是前路若有我们尚未得知的苦难，我更希望先她一步承受。
E: All I want is to lead the way for her. It's not about sibling rivalry. There are unknown hardships ahead, and I wish to face them first.

C: 关于目的地…
E: About the destination...

C: 没什么，还要再等等。
E: Nothing much. Still have to wait.

C: 出发的时间…
E: The departure time...

C: 储存组织经费的保险柜，据说它的内部空间远比外面看起来要大。
E: A strongbox storing the organization's expenditures. It is said to be much better on the inside.

C: 价值连城的汽水展柜，预留给那些能改变世界的客人。
E: A priceless soda display case. This is reserved for visitors who can change the world.

C: 你注意到浮空艇原来在不断前进，透过云层，露出的城市景象犹如某种画作，笔触模糊，带着些许朦胧感却引人深思。
E: You notice that the airship is actually constantly moving forward. Past the clouds, you can see the vague outline of a city, as though painted with indistinct brushstrokes, its blurriness thought-provoking.

C: 抱歉，是我太激动啦，正巧之前买了点特产……
E: I'm sorry, I was too excited. Here are some specialties that I bought previously...

C: 在人群爆发出某种激动的喧哗声后，你被热情的住客包围了！
E: As a loud commotion erupts among the crowd, you are surrounded by a bunch of enthusiastic guests!

C: 我们是不是见过。
E: Haven't we met before?

C: 还有，记住了…
E: Also, remember...

C: 唉…就算在梦里，有的有钱人也比其他有钱人更有钱哪。
E: *sigh*... Even in the dream, some rich people are richer than other rich people.

C: 四个知更鸟，炸！
E: Four robins. Checkmate!

C: 圆桌台球？真新鲜。
E: A circular billiard table? That's new.

C: 那我们岂不是发财了？
E: Ain't we gonna get mega rich?

C: 赌狗赌狗，一无所有…
E: Foolish bets lead to empty pockets...

C: 一堆气球？
E: A bunch of balloons?

C: …这是重点吗？
E: ...Is that even the point!?

C: 我听说梦里有很多人特意编造假身份骗人，名字啊、长相啊、甚至连种族和性别都……
E: I've heard that there are people who deceive others in the Dreamscape by deliberately using fake names, fake appearances, even faking their race and gender...

C: 哈哈，怪有意思的……
E: Haha, looks interesting...

C: 你冷静点…
E: Just calm down...

C: 让我考虑考虑…
E: Let me think about it...

C: 紧张刺激的潜入戏码，
E: A tense and exciting espionage scene...

C: 还不是时候，我希望能在一个更浪漫的场合听你说这句话。
E: Hmmm. Maybe not yet. Ask me later during a show or something.

C: 这次比赛你押注了吗？赛前最看好的谁啊？
E: Have you bet on this competition? Who're you rooting for?

C: 海选不仅是娱乐的盛会，也是商业的盛会。
E: The auditions aren't just a festival for entertainment. It is also for business.

C: 万一是被诬陷的呢？我看公司来了不少人，说不定就是他们联合真正的叛徒干的。
E: What if he was framed? I noticed many IPC staff around. Maybe they're in cahoots with the real traitor.

C: 吃饱了就睡的感觉真好……
E: Nothing better than sleeping on a full tummy...

C: …说吧，你又有什么鬼主意了？
E: ...Spit it out. What wonky ideas do you have this time?

C: 你也一起来啊，哈哈…
E: Come on, haha...

C: 反正典礼只是延迟…
E: Either way, the Festival is just delayed...

C: 让老爸给你造一艘吧。
E: I'll have Daddy build me one.

C: 欠你的钱再缓几天…
E: Give me a few more days to return you the money...

C: 我可以付出一切代价……
E: I'd be willing to pay any price...

C: 财富学院会帮毕业生安排工作吗？
E: Does Fortune Academy help students with job placements after graduation?

C: …她是怎么考进谐乐学院的啊？
E: ...How did she even make it into Charmony Academy?

C: 据说谐乐学院的学生们会将这张海报挂在床头，每日看三遍。
E: It's said that the Charmony Academy students hang this poster over their beds, looking at it three times a day.

C: 你很好奇，为什么有些标本会出现在摊位上并被标以高价，有些则只能出现在生物学的课堂上。
E: You are curious as to why some samples appear on the shelves and are marked with high prices, but others can only appear in biology classes.

C: 前面的车厢，以后再来探索吧。
E: How about we explore the cars ahead of us later?

C: 毕竟大部分成员参加社团，都是出于好玩的心理。以能力水平的高低来划分地位，未免太不近人情了，我不喜欢这样。
E: Most members join clubs out of sheer fun. If we established our roles based on proficiency, it'd be too draconian. I don't like that.

C: 你是最称职的部长！
E: You're the best president ever!

C: 听着不太…道德？
E: It doesn't sound very... ethical, right?

C: 这下听懂了。
E: Now I understand.

C: 拨通「窥梦电话」。
E: Dial the Dreampeek Call.

C: 「咔哒」，你说要有黑夜——于是就有了黑夜。
E: "Click," you say there should be night — so night comes.

C: 欧斐摩斯是阿斯忒利翁的战友，也是除了赫拉克勒斯之外最强壮的大地兽。欧斐摩斯曾跟随着我，在黑潮侵袭之前抢救出了科尔基斯的稀世珍宝——
E: Euphemus is a close comrade of Asterion's, and the mightiest dromas after Heracles. We once made it to Corchis just before the black tide hit and managed to salvage its legendary treasures...

C: 早知道应该就地打开那几个箱子，让橡皮鸭子们跟着黑潮随波逐流拉倒……
E: I should have just popped open those crates right there and let those ducks ride the black tide...

C: 行商不易，后会有期。
E: Wish you all the best in your business.

C: 嗯，我正好去看看在烧的陶罐，下次再聊。
E: Sure, I'll go check on the dolia in the kiln. Catch you later.

C: 唔…刚刚…我应该是梦到了昨晚新写的情节嘿嘿。
E: Hmm... I guess... I must've been dreaming about the new story I wrote last night, hehehe.

C: 紫纱料。
E: Purple silk, please.

C: 嗯？有新客人啊——欢迎光临，请问您想来点什么？
E: Hmm? Oh, a new customer. Welcome! What can I get for you today?

C: 咕嘟…咕嘟…酸麻的味道自舌尖蔓延，脑袋也开始变得昏沉。
E: Bloop bloop... A sour, tingling sensation spreads from your tongue, and your head grows heavy.

C: 我们俩负责看住你。
E: We are in charge of watching over you.

C: 我自说自话，是不是有点怪？
E: Am I talking to myself? Is that weird?

C: 怎么样，这种蜜果是不是很神奇？可惜它的产量不是很高，所以价格稍贵一些。那么承蒙惠顾，<unbreak>500</unbreak>利衡币。
E: Pretty incredible, right? Unfortunately, it's a bit pricey due to its limited availability. That'll be <unbreak>500</unbreak> Balance Coins. Thank you for your patronage!

C: 我以前，也是异乡人。刚来奥赫玛，元老院的移民官，问我以前做什么。我说，是厨师，是高级厨师。
E: I was an outlander too. When I came to Okhema, the immigration officer from the Council of Elders asked me what I did, and I told them I was a cook, and a good one.

C: 至于墨涅塔嘛…据我所知，那家伙更像是一位手忙脚乱的老妇人，从纷争世到幻灭世，眼睁睁地看着自己手中的绳结越来越没有办法解开。
E: As for Mnestia... from what I know, that goddess is more like a clumsy old lady. She juggled from Era Bellica to Era Erasa, watching helplessly as the knot in her hands became harder to unravel.

C: 孩子啊，你千万别嫌我们这种老人唠叨。来来来，相逢就是缘…这个见面红包，孩子你一定要收下，啊？
E: Child, please don't mind us oldies nagging. It's fate that's brought us together. Here... this little "greeting gift" is for you. Take it, my child.

C: 原来「金织」大人也有黑历史！
E: Even the "Goldweaver" has embarrassing childhood stories!

C: …人之所以独处，是为了独自享用清静——这么简单的道理，你应当明白吧？
E: ...The reason people spend time alone is to enjoy peace and quiet... You must understand such a simple logic, surely?

C: 本来想投奔这儿的老朋友，结果一到就听说他前段时间...唉，算了。看来这世道，谁也说不准明天会怎样。
E: I came here to seek shelter with an old friend but, when I arrived, I heard that he just recently... Ah, forget it. I guess no one in this world can ever really know what tomorrow will bring.

C: 可别小瞧了这些东西，它们每一样都代表着我对刻法勒虔诚的敬爱，是我信仰的寄托与证明！
E: It's nothing to sneeze at. Every single one of them represents my piety and love for Kephale — proof of where I place my faith!

C: 你信就准，不信就不准。
E: It is if you have faith. If not, then no.

C: 嗯？看来又有客人上门啦——你好啊，外乡人，需要我为你占卜吗？
E: Hm? I see I have another customer... Hello, outworlder. Do you seek my divination?

C: 这敢情好。您想听听香料的知识，还是肥皂的知识？
E: Fine indeed. Would you like to hear about spices, or soaps?

C: 距离产生美…不只是风景，人类也同样如此。
E: Distance is what creates beauty... Not just in nature, but also in people.

C: 唔，我还挺喜欢你这种干脆的人。拜拜。
E: Mmm, I quite like people like you who are straight up with me. Bye.

C: 前些日子，我给它们做检查，小家伙们表现就很奇怪。放在以前，它们虽然害怕，但还是乖乖地排队，顶多就小声哼唧两句，不像现在这么狂躁。
E: A few days back when I was checking in on them, the little fellas were acting out a little... In the past, whenever they were afraid, they'd still line up obediently and would just grumble a few notes... But now they've turned feral...

C: 好的，请不要介意。
E: Alright. That's fine.

C: 报他的名字试试？
E: Maybe try dropping his name?

C: 在您面前的只是一名侍者，浴场有需要服务的地方出现，我就会前往，仅此而已。
E: This man before you is merely an attendant. When my services are required in the baths, I shall appear. That is all.

C: 做梦。
E: Dreaming.

C: 你慢慢躺着，我先溜了。
E: You enjoy lying down. I'll be going.

C: 在战场上，卑鄙并不可耻。敌人不会因你的仁慈而手下留情，你自然也不该如此。
E: There is no shame in being ruthless on the battlefield. The enemy will not go easy on you because of your kindness, nor should you.

C: 哈哈，看来你是个脑子活跃的年轻人。那好，等你有兴趣了，再回来找我吧。
E: Haha. I see you have an active mind, youngster. Very well, feel free to come back when you're interested.

C: 没有勇气向尼卡多利献出生命吗？倒是可以理解。你面相年轻，不必急着追寻荣耀之死。
E: Too cowardly to offer your life for Nikador? Understandable. You look young. There's no need to hurtle to your death in search of glory.

C: 我有些疑问…
E: I have some questions...

C: 感觉那块铁胚很特别……
E: That iron billet feels very special...

C: 万敌，许多回，武器坏了。幸存的武器，我修复时，听得见沉吟。
E: His weapon, many times, Mydei has broken. A hum, I hear, when fixing the surviving weapons.

C: 老希这卖的不是别的，正是那泰坦老爷的余留的威能，只要付上一笔利衡币，你就能雇佣老希这都精英操作员团队，远程启动翻飞之手，想做什么就做什么！
E: I'm not selling just anything — it's remnant power from Titans. For a fee of Balance Coins, and you can hire Old Hygilos' elite operator team to remotely activate the Whimsy Hand. You can do anything you want with it!

C: 好说好说，看您长得就像老希的下一位大客户，跟您打好关系肯定不亏。
E: Why of course. You look like my next big client, it's only right to build a good relationship with you.

C: 得嘞，朋友，常来光顾哈？
E: Be well, friend. Stop by often, eh?

C: 你捧起瓶身，一饮而尽……
E: You raise the bottle, and down it in one go...

C: 堵住耳朵。
E: Stuff your ears.

C: 一段从未听闻的跫音…今日竟果真有幸相逢。你好，奥赫玛的贵客。
E: Sounds of footfalls never before heard... I didn't think I'd actually get to encounter you today. Greetings, honored guest of Okhema.

C: 直觉告诉你，治好他的社交恐惧症就差临门一脚了。再试试看吧！
E: Your intuition suggests you're on the verge of breaking through his social anxiety. Give it another try!

C: 欧洛尼斯执掌记忆权柄，完全有能力虚构你的过往。帕门弥德，别太认真了。
E: Oronyx holds power over our memories and is completely capable of fabricating our past. Parmenides, you must not place too much weight on such things.

C: 我暂时想不出新的论点，是你们获胜了。但还请注意，我输了，并非意味着你们的立场便是正确的。说到底，辩论无非是驳倒对方的游戏，至于真理……
E: I cannot currently think of a new argument, so victory is yours. However, please be aware that my loss does not mean that your view is absolutely correct. In the end, debate is simply no more than a game of refuting the other party's arguments. When it comes to the truth...

C: 你觉得呢？艺术应该追求视觉上的真实，还是情感上的真实？
E: What's your take? Should art focus on depicting things as they are, or capturing how they feel?

C: 所以我很注重奥赫玛的历史，在资料收集上花费了大量时间——结果到头来，他们却总说我能看到过去，而不知道我背后有多努力。
E: I place great importance on the history of Okhema, dedicating an enormous amount of time to research. Yet, people often think I can simply see into the past, unaware of the extensive effort I put in behind the scenes.

C: 有你这么说话的吗？
E: Who talks like that, huh?

C: 我看有回复说，还有其他人也遇到了类似的事情，不过他们看到的「消失无踪的塞纳托斯信徒」在消失前是摆弄着奇怪的羊头还是什么……挺诡异的。
E: Some users reported similar incidents, noting that the "vanishing disciples of Thanatos" were fiddling with odd goat heads or something equally strange... pretty eerie.

C: 为何如此坚持，你这样，我怎么好意思开口拒绝…其实…我有脚气！
E: Why are you being so insistent? With you like this, how can I say no...? Actually... I have athlete's foot!

C: 话虽如此，能早日解决始终还是更好。哎，这东西可就不能麻烦孩子你了，哈哈。希望在我变成老骨头前能拿出点成果吧。
E: That being said, problems like this are always better solved sooner than later. Ah, I cannot trouble a child like yourself with such things, haha. I just hope that I can make some progress before I am too old.

C: 欧弥利亚婶婶，我发誓这次真的不一样了！就在今日，刻法勒已赐予我第二个征兆，虽然我答应它不能说…我是命中注定的十二黄金裔之一，你要相信我！
E: Auntie Aumilia, I promise this time is different! Kephale has given me a second sign today. Though I promised them I wouldn't say... I am definitely one of the twelve prophesied Chrysos Heirs. You have to believe me!

C: 抱歉，我也不知道。
E: Sorry, I have no idea.

C: 噢！那当然！我差点以为你会跟我收版权费呢。
E: Oh, absolutely! I was half expecting you to charge me a licensing fee.

C: 哎，我们小时候关系很好，长大了就不行了。她和我虽然同样是树庭的一份子，但观念上…只能说分歧很大。
E: *sigh* We were very close as kids, but not after we grew up. We may both be from the Grove, but in terms of perspective... I can only say that we don't see eye to eye.

C: 我们已经在这里住了多久呢……
E: Has it been that long since we moved in here?

C: 够了，我现在就去做准备。心怀对雅努斯的敬意，然后安静等待吧。
E: Enough. I am going to make my preparations. Cherish Janus in your heart, and wait here quietly.

C: ——嗷？嗷呜呜呜…呜！
E: ...Aw? Awoowoowoo... Woo!

C: 好吧，你记得曾有人称呼这个物种为「法吉娜的圣兽」。将神圣形象的玩偶摆放在房间里，说不定会有好事发生呢？
E: Alright. You recall someone referring to this species as "the divine beasts of Phagousa." Maybe placing a doll of a divine image in your room will bring good things your way?

C: 首先是生活助理模式，我可以为你打扫房间，整理杂物。在有足够食材的情况下，也可以为你做饭。
E: First up, "Life Assistant" mode. I can tidy your room and manage clutter. If we have the right ingredients, I can cook for you too.

C: 「我最近去面试了一个音乐剧项目，内容是讲一个女舞者意外进入女子监狱的故事，故事有点黑暗色彩。果然外面的世界就是不一样，这种题材在贝洛伯格可见不着。」
E: "I recently tried out for a musical that's quite edgy — it's about a female dancer who unexpectedly finds herself in a women's prison. It's got a dark twist to it. The outside world sure offers some unique stories, you wouldn't come across this kind of plot back in Belobog."

C: 人生就是一场朝圣…你只要无愧于自己的信仰，那，就是最大的虔诚。
E: Life is a pilgrimage. You need only be devout to your beliefs. That is the greatest form of piety.

C: 祭司笑眯眯地将你递出的东西收入囊中。那么，命运泰坦要如何占卜一处虚构之地的未来呢？你对此颇为好奇。
E: The priest stuffs the item you handed over into his pocket with a gleeful grin on his face. Well then, how will the Fate Titans divine a future for a place that you made up? Your curiosity is truly piqued.

C: 你在这工作了很久吗？
E: Have you been working here long?

C: 有其余见到圣女的办法吗？
E: Is there another way to see the Holy Maiden?

C: 其他黄金裔。
E: Other Chrysos Heirs.

C: 嗷、嗷…嗷嗷…我只是一只可怜又弱小的奇美拉，不要对我抱有任何期待嗷呜！
E: Awooo... Awo... awo... I'm just a poor, weak Chimera — don't expect anything from me, awoo!

C: 所以我认清了现实，早早结业，领受父母之命出来找工作了。元老院的工作就是家父推荐来的——也因此，我躲过了树庭惨案。
E: So, I came to terms with reality, graduated early, and followed my parents' advice to start job hunting. My father recommended this position at Council of Elders — which, incidentally, helped me avoid the Grove tragedy.

C: 这就是我那非常不靠谱的八卦了，你记在心里便好，不要告诉别人。
E: And that's my utterly unreliable bit of gossip. Keep it to yourself, though. Don't go spreading it around.

C: 没问题，你可以多问问我的辉煌战绩，我可以给你讲一整天。
E: Of course. Ask me about my glorious achievements. I can talk about them all day.

C: 我有些事想请教你。
E: There's something I'd like to ask you.

C: 我想起来了…有位织者自称是女王的骑士，它正骑着<color=#dbc291ff>飞天坛递</color>在庭院里巡逻、等待着英雄们归来呢。
E: I remember now... A weaver claims to be the queen's knight. It's patrolling the courtyard on a <color=#dbc291ff>Flying Amphora</color>, awaiting the return of heroes.

C: 我们还有救吗？
E: Is there any hope left for us?

C: 嗯，可不能少了它。它的根蒂坚固，莲叶甚至能供大地兽行走。
E: Yes, we can't forget that one. Its roots are strong, and its leaves can even support dromas.

C: 他总说那些被黑潮带走的人还会出现，甚至会呼唤生者。我气疯了，我只想让我的家人安息。
E: He kept saying that the people taken by the black tide would return, that they might even call out to the living. I was furious. I just wanted my family to rest in peace.

C: 诶呀，没想到会在这里遇见。我们果然非常有缘啊，朋友~
E: Oh! Fancy meeting you here. Destiny truly binds us, my friend~

C: 不过嘛，你们的「探险队」要是还打算招收新人的话，我可是会踊跃报名的哦？
E: Though should your "expedition team" seek new members... I'd gladly volunteer~

C: 你相信「再创世」吗？
E: Do you believe in "Era Nova" yourself?

C: 如今，末日的舞台被搬到奥赫玛…若我还有时间，我该如何为后人传递文明的信号？
E: And now, Okhema has become the stage of the apocalypse... If I still have time, how should I leave a message for those who come after us?

C: 女孩望着你，一言不发，但她的眼中似乎透露着一种期盼。
E: The girl looks at you, silent, but there's a glimmer of hope in her eyes.

C: 这里千年来未曾有人涉足，贵客，请务必小心。
E: No one has ventured here in a thousand years, esteemed guest. Please be very careful.

C: 别心急，我们还有好多好多时间。慢慢来，时光会为我们停下脚步。
E: No rush, we've still got all the time in the world. Just take it slow. Time will stop for us.

C: 风铃叮叮当当，就像是怦怦的心跳，好浪漫呀。
E: The wind chimes are ringing, just like heartbeats... It's so romantic.

C: 故乡是很让人怀念，可更重要的，是迈出向前的脚步，对吧？
E: People always miss their home, but what's more important is to take the next step forward, right?

C: 好想举办宴会迷…
E: I really wanna throw a party, memi...

C: 才没有！我、你…我只是在为下一次比赛踩点！告诉你，我可是村里的「捉迷藏冠军」，怎么样，厉害吧？
E: N—Nothing! I—I was just scoping out the next competition spot! Just so you know, I'm the hide-and-seek champion of this village! Pretty awesome, huh?

C: 原来是这样。
E: So that's how it is.

C: 直接和你老爹说不就行了吗？
E: Couldn't you just explain everything to your dad?

C: 嗯，那就好。村子里的生活总是很平静，但到了外面，还是得多留个心眼。
E: Good to hear. Life here is quiet, but out there... you'll need to stay sharp.

C: 你想许什么愿？
E: What would you wish for?

C: 或许情况并非如此。相较于外部世界，我与你的关系更为密切。
E: I don't believe so. My connection to you is more intimate than to the outside world.

C: 暂时不想做什么……
E: I don't feel like doing anything right now...

C: {NICKNAME}总是这么坚定，和记忆中一模一样呢。只是现在，载我们前往下一站的航船还没靠岸呀。人家会和你一起等待。
E: That's the {NICKNAME} I know, determined as ever. But for now, the ship that will take us to our next adventure hasn't arrived. And I'll wait right here with you.

C: 社会边角料，妈妈小骄傲。
E: Society's leftover, but mama's little pride and joy.

C: 宏愿之正义，应由曳石爵进谏规正；宏愿之回响，应由吟风爵执笔流传；宏愿之播扬，应由冬霖爵扫清阻碍……
E: The righteousness of great ambitions should determined by Dux Helkolithist. The reverberations ambitions gain will be determined by the pen strokes of Dux Carminum. To spread the greatness of ambition, all obstacles shall be swept aside by Dux Brumalis...

C: 阁下有聊天的雅致，我自然不能扫兴。想聊些什么？
E: Since you're in the mood for conversation, I certainly wouldn't want to spoil it. What do you want to talk about?

C: 聊聊你的过去吧。
E: Let's talk about your past.

C: 阁下好奇我的过去吗？哈哈，那可能要让阁下失望了，因为没什么有趣的往事。
E: You're curious about my past? Hah, I fear you'll be disappointed — there are no tales of intrigue to share

C: 聊聊你的将来吧。
E: Let's talk about your future.

C: 那你闭嘴不就行了？
E: Can't you simply keep your mouth closed?

C: 有一天，断锋爵，蜜酿喝，喝多了。坐在本狮旁边叹气。本狮问他怎么了。他说想起糗事。
E: One day, Dux Fragoris had t—too much honey brew to drink and sighed as he sat next to me. I asked him what was wrong, and he said he remembered something embarrassing.

C: 这里的池水凉凉的，翅膀泡进去好舒爽嘤~
E: The water here is cool and refreshing, it feels good to dip my wings into it, eep~

C: 店长不要这么客气，这是我哈基迷身为厨师应该做的迷！
E: No need to be so polite, manager. This is what I, Hachimem, am meant to do as a chef, mem!

C: 听说，元老院出资的探险队回来了，就昨天的事。
E: I hear the expeditionary squad that the Council of Elders' funded returned yesterday.

C: 金血乃泰坦之神体，而黄金裔乃泰坦神授，自然也是金血先于英雄存在。
E: Golden blood is the divine body of the Titans, and the Chrysos Heirs are divinely ordained by the Titans. Naturally, the existence of golden blood precedes that of the heroes.

C: 我觉得可以，就从旁边的这个浴池开始吧！
E: Excellent idea. Let's start from this one at the side!

C: 哈哈，其实大浴场的导览里也有写到哦？
E: Haha, actually it's mentioned in the guide at the baths.

C: 没办法，你们没发现吗？他们所谓的新「设计」，都是捡阿格莱雅玩剩下的元素东拼西凑。
E: No way. Haven't you noticed? Their so-called new "design" is just a hodgepodge of Aglaea's cutting room scraps.

C: 真的真的，比奥赫玛的太阳还真。还有不要再叫我祭司大人了，老婆子我不干这行已经好些年啦。
E: Yes, as sure as I know that Okhema has a sun. Also, please stop calling me Lady Priestess. It's been many years since I quit this job.

C: …我答应你。
E: ...I promise you.

C: 生活的意义是？
E: What is the meaning of life?

C: 嗷呜呜嗷呜！
E: Awoowoo awoo!

C: 必须帮，考试是鸟生大事。
E: Count me in. Exams are a major event in a bird's life.

C: 安全区的开辟工作很危险吧？
E: It must be dangerous to establish safe zones, right?

C: 顾名思义，主要负责回收因怪物入侵而收容失效的奇物。
E: As the name suggests, it is mainly responsible for collecting the Curios that have been displaced due to the recent monster invasion.

C: 袭击者到底有什么目的？
E: What was the attacker's purpose?

C: 这……这关你什么事！空间站有空间站的规矩，应物科也有应物科的准则。
E: It's... it's none of your business! The space station has its own rules and regulations, so does our department.

C: 有没有什么陈年旧梦的八卦？
E: Is there any old gossip?

C: 瑟希斯赐我灵智，驱散愚昧！
E: Cerces, bless me with wisdom, and dispel ignorance!

C: 想到那边近距离看看树上那条龙，可我自己没法使用这个{RUBY_B#雅努斯密径}传送装置{RUBY_E#}…
E: I want to get a closer look at the dragon on the tree, but I can't use this {RUBY_B#Janus's Hidden Passage}teleporter{RUBY_E#} myself...

C: 嗯…有位织者对自己的境遇迷惑不解。金丝带来消息，它正在<color=#dbc291ff>天花板的木箱上</color>，观察过路的旅者呢。
E: Hmm... There is a weaver who's puzzled about their situation. The golden thread brings tidings: They're <color=#dbc291ff>on a wooden crate on the ceiling</color>, watching travelers pass by.

C: 荒笛大人离开了…
E: Lord Terravox has left...

C: 哪儿能啊，瞧您说的——正主就在旁边站着呢，我们这次可是有授权的！
E: No way, how could you say that. The real champion is standing right here. We've got official permission this time!

C: 诶呦，你来得正是时候！前两天我才刚收到一幅刻法勒的三联画，是难得的孤品，有空给你鉴赏鉴赏。
E: Oh hey, perfect timing! I just received a rare Kephale triptych the other day — it's quite a unique piece. You should come check it out when you have the chance.

C: 唉，我愚蠢的妹妹啊，就沉浸在你那不切实际的理想主义里吧。
E: *sigh* Oh, my foolish little sister, keep drowning in your unrealistic idealism.

C: 住嘴！我的所作所为…不需要一个醉鬼来指指点点。
E: Shut up! What I choose to do... needs no drunkard's "wise" advice.

C: 只要有人的地方，就有政治。能够统率民众、协调需求、解决矛盾的议会，总有一天会重建。早做打算，才能为自己在其中占据一席之地啊！
E: Wherever there are people, there's politics. A parliament that can lead the masses, coordinate needs, and resolve conflicts will be rebuilt someday. Better plan ahead if you want to secure your own seat at the table!
*sigh* ...

C: 这就是所谓一拍即合吧，咱们说干就干。
E: Talk about hitting it off! Let's get this show on the road.

C: 把大家喊出来，就为了这事啊。
E: You called everyone here just for that?

C: 呵呵，不多下些饵料，恐怕游鱼会不屑一顾，也勾不起猫儿的好奇心呢。
E: Heh. The fish won't bother to bite without enough bait, and the cat definitely won't have her curiosity stirred otherwise.

C: 但现在，我从空白中找到了新生的含义，慢慢有了新的愿望。
E: But now, I've found meaning in the blankness, and gradually, new desires are taking shape.

C: 娇小柔和的外表下，问出的问题却这么直击人心吗？
E: For someone with such a gentle and petite appearance, your questions are remarkably sharp and insightful.

C: 只剩最后一个问题了，再说说吧！
E: Only one question left. Tell me more!

C: 可以用百界门送过去。
E: You can deliver things with the Century Gate.

C: 有什么希望我铭记的东西吗？
E: Is there anything you want me to remember?

C: 所以，阿那克萨戈拉斯，你怎么看？
E: So, Anaxagoras, what do you think?

C: 我没听错吧，阿格莱雅当面夸赞那刻夏老师了？
E: Did I hear that right? Aglaea actually praised Professor Anaxa to his face?

C: 这猫猫很坏了。
E: This kitty has gone bad.

C: 没有「时光硕果」的帮助，记忆的航船无法远渡…只能之后再来了。
E: Without the help of the Fruit of Time, the ship of Remembrance cannot sail far... I can only return later.

C: 不给~
E: Nope~

C: 哪里还有没搜集的若虫？
E: Where are the remaining nymphs?

C: 好想听你讲讲过去的事情…
E: I want to hear about your past...

C: 你还有正事要干，我呢，也有列车停靠时维护检修之类的细碎工作要干呀。
E: You've still got work to do. As for me, I've got to maintain the Express while it is parked.

C: 不管你有没有满足，要是你还有别的问题，可以去问问瓦尔特。{NICKNAME}，现在我得继续干活了。
E: Well, satisfied or not, you can ask Welt if you have any more questions. If you'll excuse me, {NICKNAME}, I have to get on my work now.

C: （三把兵器便是一座岛屿，这里总共是两柄铳枪，并不是这里…）
E: (Three weapons make an island. There are two guns here. Not here...)

C: 你居然会用「毕业」这种词语？
E: You know the meaning of the word "graduate"?

C: 咱要做的就是通过规划轨道、通过控制器调整轨道方向，将矿车推到原定的目的地。
E: All we need to do is plan out the path and adjust the track direction through the controller to push the mining cart to its destination.

C: 还真解决了……
E: You actually solved it...

C: 滴答…仔细想想，这些故事也太离谱了，我以前怎么会相信这种东西？
E: Tick-tock... Think about it, these stories are insane, right? How could I have believed such things?

C: 哦，这…这是什么感觉？我感觉我的零件都顺滑多了…指针转起来…滴答！真不错，像是有什么千斤重的东西解除了一样。
E: Oh, wh—what is this feeling? I feel that my parts are moving more smoothly... My hands are also turning... Tick-tock! Amazing, it feels like something heavy has been lifted off me.

C: 不是，他们到的要更早些。
E: No, they were quite a while earlier.

C: 准确地说，我们就是在玩游戏…虽然不知道对方的真正用意是什么。
E: To be precise, we are the ones playing a game... Even though we don't know what the creator's intentions are.

C: 不怎么样。我尽力把病毒程序的影响范围控制在了监控室内，至少不用担心空间站出什么乱子，但更多的…还有待努力。
E: Not the best... I've done my best to isolate the intruder's viral influence to the monitoring room. I don't have to worry about other troubles throughout the space station, but as for everything else... It all needs more work.

C: 不过我还是觉得很奇怪，这家伙这么大费周章，真的只是为了找一堆人陪她玩游戏？完全没有别的目的？
E: But I still think it's strange how this hacker goes to all this trouble, just to play games with a bunch of people. Does she really have no other goal here?

C: 不知道在哪儿？他畏罪潜逃了？
E: No clue where he's at? Did he just bail out on you to avoid trouble?

C: （大师的脾气确实古怪啊……）
E: (The master painter really is eccentric...)

C: 让我看看，现在还缺哪些画……
E: Let me check which paintings are still missing...

C: 虽然不是很古老，但看起来也有些年份了。我猜，我们或许能在这里找到一些有价值的东西来当作展品。
E: It's not tremendously old, but it sure looks aged enough. I'm guessing that we might be able to find something of value from here to display.

C: 哈，你来了！你准备好了吗？
E: Ha, there you are! Are you ready?

C: 哇，好漂亮啊……
E: Wow, this is amazing...

C: 说起来，废弃的矿镇街道上为何会亮着灯呢？
E: Speaking of, why are the street lamps lit in an abandoned mining town?

C: 我叫作晴霓，是天舶司的职员。
E: I'm Qingni, a staff member from the Sky-Faring Commission.

C: 请看，这是真正的幽灵星槎…投影。
E: Look, this is the real phantom starskiff's... projection.

C: 感觉拍得不够好。
E: It doesn't look great.

C: 首先声明，我不请客。
E: Before you continue — I'm not a free meal ticket.

C: 味道还是一点没变。
E: *sigh* Same great taste...

C: 你们来处理？真是笑死人了！
E: What a joke! You people can't "take care" of anything!

C: 简单呀，你也当着父老乡亲的面如此向我赔礼道歉，在我的面前学狗叫。
E: Oh, that's simple. You apologize to me in front of all the people of Aurum Alley, and you bark like a dog.

C: 对，光是租用港口，商会就已经欠公司一屁股债了。
E: Yes, the entire port... Now we owe the IPC an arm and a leg.

C: 我同意了。
E: Yes, I'll do it.

C: 哈——？说大声点，我听不太清。你们金人巷就是这么对待游客的？
E: Ha...? Speak louder, I can't quite hear you. Is this how you treat guests in Aurum Alley?

C: 哦，你还希望它碎啊？
E: Oh? You wanted it to be broken?

C: 收支记录？
E: Income and expenditure records?

C: 材料我都确认过一遍了。
E: I've looked over everything.

C: 什、什么？！那个老古董…仙舟人不是一直宣扬什么讲义气吗？我给他那么多钱，他转眼就把我卖了！可恶啊——
E: Wh—What? That little... Aren't the Xianzhou people always preaching about righteousness? I gave him all that money, and he sold me out in a heartbeat! Darn it...

C: 我不！凭什么要我向你道歉！
E: What? Why should I apologize!?

C: 我、我要向金人巷的父老乡亲们道歉——
E: I—I apologize to all the people of Aurum Alley...

C: 啧，真是丑态百出，今天就到此为止吧。
E: Tsk, what a clownshow. This arbitration is hereby resolved.

C: 你想说公司是为了公司做出的决策，我们是为金人巷做出的决策。
E: You're saying that the IPC is in it for the IPC, but we just want what's best for Aurum Alley...

C: 老爸，人家替咱们把活儿干了，咱们工钱可不能吝啬啊。
E: Just a reminder, Father — fair work for fair pay.

C: 资料上不难看出，金人巷的辉煌是时代造就的。
E: The data suggests that the success of the old Aurum Alley was largely due to the economic circumstances of the past.

C: 会长其实另有目的？
E: He wasn't really against us?

C: 会长真是用心良苦。
E: He is indeed very wise.

C: 还是让小秘书再想想口号吧！现在我们回去找燕翠师傅。
E: I'll ask Mingxi for some more ideas later. Let's go back to Yancui's place.

C: 算是我安排的特别要求吧，我会给你们自由讨论的时间，希望你们能充分碰撞观点。
E: By personal request of the committee, a discussion session will be added to allow all participants to raise and answer questions.

C: 但是你没有否定码头的重要性，无论是合作，还是物流规划，最终都服务于码头。
E: But you don't deny that the dock was vital to your operations, correct? Your partnership with the shop owners and the increase in cargo handling capacity — none of it would have been possible without the dock.

C: 你看看这个。
E: Take a look at this.

C: 来一份肉桂香排盖饭，再来份豉油蒸鸡，不要香菜。
E: Gimme one portion of cinnamon pork ribs on rice, and a portion of steamed soy sauce chicken. No coriander.

C: 好好好，不要那么严肃，我的理由要真是站不住脚，你就让着我点嘛……
E: Fine, fine, fine. No need to be so serious. If my excuses are really that shaky, just go easy on me a bit...

C: 你的说法不就是在倚老卖老吗？
E: You can't just rely on your age and experience...

C: <color=#dbc291ff>（这句话好像不太对劲……）</color>
E: <color=#dbc291ff>(I sense a hole in his logic...)</color>

C: 公司愿意更进一步，充分开发码头的物流效应。将金人巷打造成银河闻名的商业港口。
E: The IPC seeks to unleash the full potential of the dock, taking full advantage of its role as a logistics center — thus transforming Aurum Alley into one of the most advanced commercial ports in the galaxy.

C: 商会的会计同事要我提醒一下，我们还没有完成阶段的营收目标。
E: My colleagues from the Merchant Guild Accounting Department want me to remind you that we haven't met our revenue target for this phase yet.

C: 好的好的，收到指令，「向左直行」！
E: Alright, alright. Order received, "Turning left"!

C: 没事，大不了就多飞几圈，我的能源提示还剩百分之九十九，保证能飞很久。
E: Alright, it'll just be a few more laps around the block. My display still shows ninety-nine percent battery left, so I'm good to go for a long time.

C: 诶？！你怎么在这儿？我找了你老半天了，一直追踪不到你的定位，急死我了。
E: Huh!? What are you doing here? I've been looking for you all day and couldn't keep up with you. I'm at wit's end!

C: 啊咧，我是真的在轮休啊，我前不久可是连轴转了好久呢。我出来逛逛也不行嘛……
E: As I said, I'm on vacation. I've been working for such a long time, and now I'm glad I can finally go out for a stroll...

C: 对对对，小组长也是这么评价世玲之前的实验报告的！
E: Yep yep, You're right! The team leader did say something similar when he praised me for my last research report!

C: 报告，点击，提交！嘿嘿～之后就会收到绩效考核汇报邮件了。嗯…不知道是升职还是升职还是升职呢？世玲好期待哦！
E: Report, submitted! Hehehe~ Now I'll just wait for the performance review result. Hmm, will I get a big promotion or an even bigger promotion? I'm so excited!

C: 不错，看上去你已经有为科学献身的觉悟了。
E: Not bad, looks like you already have the resolve to sacrifice for science.

C: （猛摇售货机）
E: (Shake the vending machine)

C: 瞧见没？这就是科学的力量！坐标已经给你标好了，快去快去，趁着感应还热乎！
E: Did you see that? This is the power of science! I've already given you the coordinates, go go go while the track's hot!

C: 这是新的么……
E: Is this new...?

C: {F#大姐姐}{M#大哥哥}，这个大铁坨坨，该怎么用啊？
E: {F#Miss}{M#Mister}, how do you use this big metal block?

C: 幸好没有选择连续出腿，否则贝洛伯格今日会多一个脚指头粉碎性骨折的人。
E: Thank goodness you didn't kick it more than once, or there would be one more person in Belobog with comminuted phalanx fractures on the toes.

C: 光是什么？例子是什么？科普是什么？
E: What is light? What is par-day-kal? What's a baysick?

C: （这里应该就是路灯下面了…但好像都挺「正常」的？）
E: (This is beneath the streetlamp... but everything seems "normal"?)

C: 听起来有点忽悠人…
E: That sounds a bit fake...

C: 今日份的食材已经准备好了吗？
E: Is today's set of ingredients ready?

C: 特殊礼品已为您寄出！如果您还想购置更多特产，可以咨询酒店员工，我们同样提供上门送货服务。
E: Your special gift has been dispatched! Should you wish to acquire additional specialties, feel free to consult our hotel staff. We also provide delivery services.

C: 当然，等您做好准备再来找我吧。
E: Of course, come seek me out when you're all ready.

C: 我们出去拼凑现有的线索吧，{F#小姐}{M#先生}。
E: Let's piece together the clues we've got, {F#miss}{M#mister}.

C: 给它点教训。
E: (Show them what you've got.)

C: 给它点教训。
E: (Show them what you've got.)

C: 我留在这里，就是为了帮助它们稳定情绪，恢复到原本的模样。这是个漫长的过程，如果问题得不到解决，它们会重新陷入狂乱。我不想看到这种事发生。
E: I stay here to help them stabilize their emotions and restore them to their original form, which can be a long process. If the issue isn't resolved, they'll revert to the frenzied state, which is the last thing I want to see.

C: 呜呜…至少脾气坏点，自私点，就能过得开心，你还会多和我聊会天……
E: *sob*... At the very least, if I behave badly, more selfish, I can be happy. At least you'd talk to me more...

C: 原来如此。 随着梦境加速坍塌，怪物的情绪越来越不稳定，类似的冲突也在逐渐增加，不知道以后会不会有更麻烦的事。
E: So that's what happened. As the collapse of the Dreamscape accelerates, the monsters' emotions become increasingly unstable. Similar conflicts will only keep growing in number. Who knows, maybe we'll have a bigger headache to deal with later.

C: 是么？但…说实话，这或许只是你的看法。
E: Oh, really? But... to be honest, maybe that's just your opinion.

C: 你也知道，舒翁是个很厉害的人，然后我们就在想……
E: As you know, Siobhan is an amazing woman, so we've been wondering...

C: 开始吧。反复辩论没有意义，只有事实才能指明方向。
E: Let's get it started. There's no point in repeated arguments, as only facts can guide us to the path.

C: 如果你站在道路的分岔点，又会如何选择呢？
E: What would you choose if you were the one at the crossroads?

C: 你打算做什么？
E: What's your plan?

C: 汪…那我们偷偷过去，听听她们在说什么吧！
E: Woof... then let's sneak over and eavesdrop on their conversation!

C: 他们…他们打算把我们全部抓走，还说…我们就是群被抛弃的废物……
E: They... they wanted to capture all of us, and they said... that we're just a bunch of worthless trash...

C: 我可以证明。
E: Yeah, I can prove that.

C: 你是跟他们过来的「惊梦剧团」？
E: Are you members of the Dreamjolt Troupe who came here with them?

C: 你…你耍滑头！…哼！
E: You... You're being sly!... Hmph!

C: 嘴上说着不好奇，但你还是走到了包裹前面帕。
E: Your lips are saying you're not curious, but your feet have taken you next to the package.

C: 怎么是「鹤运物流」的快递箱？
E: What's a Heron Express courier package doing here?

C: 那就好解释了。
E: Then this will be easy to explain.

C: 万一我拒绝呢？
E: And if I refuse?

C: 这个时候就稍微假装好奇一下嘛～
E: How about you just feign you care a bit this time, okay?

C: （…不对，这好像不是「银河强手棋」？）
E: (...No wait, this doesn't look like Cosmodyssey?)

C: 哦呦，这不是我们尊贵的名誉游客吗？终于等到你了。
E: Huh. If it isn't our esteemed guest. I finally found you.

C: 我的片酬可是很高的！
E: My services are expensive!

C: 贵客，你怎么还在这里？就算你是家族的恩人，我也不能让你一直干扰我的工作。
E: Why are you still sticking around? Even though you've done The Family a favor, I can't allow you to keep interrupting my work.

C: 对于那些认为钟表小子别有深意的观众来说，这样的内容或许会让观众产生不必要的猜测和臆想。
E: For the viewers who believe the animation carries an underlying meaning, this kind of content might encourage unnecessary speculation and conjecture.

C: 呸，你还有脸提这个名字？「钟表匠」先生把你养大，你居然投奔他的敌人！
E: Tsk, can't believe you have the face to mention his name! Mr. Watchmaker raised you, and yet you sided with his enemies!

C: 胶卷…我想起来了，是原本准备拍成《美梦往事》的胶卷吗？
E: Film reels... Oh, I think I know what you're saying. Are those for the Dreamjoy Memoir series?

C: 皮斯和我说过，你参与了它的制作。
E: Pisce told me you were involved in its production.

C: 「——永远爱你的拉格沃克•夏尔•米哈伊尔……」
E: "Love always, Mikhail Char Legwork..."

C: 贵客…在一帧帧画面流过的时候，我仿佛看到了伏案工作的「钟表匠」——我能看出来，片中的一些故事，是他按照我过去的想法修改的……
E: As the movie scenes played before my eyes, I could see the Watchmaker poring over his work before a desk — I could tell that he amended some stories in the movie based on my past suggestions...

C: 要趁着石头老板回来前，找到所有苏乐达才行…
E: We have to find all the SoulGlad before Boss Stone comes back...

C: 你得用<color=#dbc291ff>用镜头拍摄指定演员</color>，不能多也不能少。
E: You have to use <color=#dbc291ff>the camera to shoot specific actors</color> — no more, no less.

C: 「在几位剧团成员的帮助下，钟表小子走出了困境。」
E: "With the help of the troupe members, Clockie frees himself of his predicament."

C: （离开）
E: (Leave)

C: 能够漫步的苏乐达地板已经全部消除了，快打开宝箱吧！
E: The moving SoulGlad floor has been completely removed. Open the chest now!

C: 您可以去找我们的动画师一同完成这部外传——这些痴迷于动画的艺术家都戴着角色的头套，您应该一眼就能认得出来。
E: You can find animators to complete this extra story. Those animation-obsessed artists are all wearing various characters as headwear. You should be able to identify them immediately.

C: 有点好奇导演是谁，不会是那位传说中的钟表匠吧！
E: I wonder who the director is. It's not the legendary Watchmaker, is it?

C: （广告拍摄顺利结束，该回去找皮斯继续<color=#f29e38ff>剪辑影片</color>了……）
E: (The commercial shoot has ended swimmingly. Time to find Pisce and continue <color=#f29e38ff>editing the film</color>...)

C: 「石头老板也不敢肆意妄为了，只能……」
E: "Boss Stone didn't dare play up anymore. All he could do was..."
...Hmph.

C: 第二个呢？
E: What was the second one?

C: 有兴趣聊聊吗？
E: Wanna chat?

C: …啾？啾！那工期岂不是马上就要到了！？
E: ...Tweet? Tweet! Isn't the deadline for that coming up real soon!?

C: 妃色夫人、草绿经理、赤红大哥、黄金公子、湛蓝爵士…其他人的外传里都只有一个角色，但我的外传里有五只小鸟！太不公平了啾！
E: Lady Vermilion, Verdant Manager, Boss Red, Young Master Gold, Dr. Blues... everyone else only has one character in their extra story, but I've got five of these little birdies! That's totally unfair!

C: 有兴趣聊聊吗？
E: Wanna chat?

C: 哈哈，有笑声的地方自然会有{RUBY_B#「愚者」}我{RUBY_E#}的身影。何况我原本就在匹诺康尼投了一个新项目，正巧回来看看成果如何。
E: Haha, wherever there is laughter, there {RUBY_B#Fools}I{RUBY_E#} will be. Besides, I invested in a project here in Penacony, so I wanted to check in on how it was doing.

C: 噢，看看这对妙人儿，多有明星相啊！既然你们是双人组合，那我就为你们准备一个双人对戏的场景吧！
E: Oof, just take a look at this pair. Such star quality! Since you've come as a pair, I'll prep a two-person scene for you!

C: 你发出了一声很酷的*哼*。这么酷的*哼*只有这么酷的你才能发出来，完美。
E: You make a cool *hmph*. Only someone as cool as you could produce such a cool *hmph*. Perfection!

C: 特别鸣谢\n †加拉赫†\n苏乐达™集团
E: Special Thanks\n†Gallagher†\nSoulGlad™ Enterprises

C: 经由你产生的变量，它们会呈现出怎样的形态，我很期待。
E: I very much look forward to the variables that you will generate, and the shape or form in which they may present themselves.

C: 哈——？！我只是作为一名普通消费者，向小老板娘抱怨这茶水不行，你们云骑军连这都要管，以后全银河的游客还有谁敢来你们仙舟喝茶了呀？
E: Trouble? Hah! I'm just giving some feedback as a regular customer. The tea here is terrible, and now the Cloud Knights want to stop me from complaining about it? At this rate, who would want to ever come here for tea in the future?

C: 哈——？！她说要过上两招？哈哈哈哈哈哈。既然三月七小姐发起了挑战，我必须接受呀！
E: Huh...!? A fight, you say? Hahahahaha! Now that you've thrown down the gauntlet, March 7th, I feel I'm obliged to accept your challenge!

C: 你说的那是拳法…不过，理解得也没错。
E: That's boxing... but close enough, I guess.

C: 无名客学剑的进度汇报完毕。斯科特专员，现在没有什么别的工作要做了吗？
E: The progress report on the Nameless girl's sword training is complete. What should I do now, Specialist Skott?

C: 错，我要复仇的是整个金人巷！
E: Right person? No, I want to enact revenge on the entirety of Aurum Alley!

C: 我忍了这么久，就是想等一个机会！我要争一口气，不是要证明我有多了不起，我是要告诉金人巷里的所有人，我失去的东西，我一定要拿回来！
E: I've been patient for so long, just waiting for the right moment! I don't care about proving my greatness — it's about showing everyone in Aurum Alley that I will reclaim what was taken from me!

C: 唔…说不出来，就是感觉不够痛快。
E: Hmm... I can't quite put my finger on it, but it just wouldn't be satisfying enough.

C: 姬子、杨叔、帕姆：见信如晤。我们在罗浮一切都好，请各位放心。你们的旅行还顺利吧？
E: Dear Himeko, Mr. Yang, and Pom-Pom, We're all good here on the Xianzhou Luofu, so no need to worry! By the way, how's your trip going?

C: 你少看点幻戏，多接触点现实吧！
E: Cut down on your immersia addiction and touch some grass!

C: 我可能还是会拒绝吧。
E: I might still have to decline.

C: 你还好吧？
E: Are you alright?

C: 爸爸……
E: Dad...

C: 父亲，我谨遵教诲。
E: I'll do as you've taught me, Father.

C: 塔塔里昂？那是边境要塞舰啊，你这段时间的工作也没出什么差错啊？
E: The Tartarion? That's the frontier fortification vessel, isn't it? You haven't slipped up at work lately, have you?

C: 放心吧，身体会提醒你速战速决的～
E: Ah don't worry, your body will remind you to finish the fight quickly.

C: 三月小姐…下次还是用些堂堂正正的办法吧。
E: Miss March... maybe we should try something more honorable next time.

C: 去…去个卫生间！再见！
E: I... gotta go to the bathroom! See you!

C: 识别到更高权限指令，进入备战模式——
E: Higher authority command recognized. Entering combat mode...

C: 斯科特专员，我们的机甲被控制了，根本没办法打败他们！
E: Specialist Skott, they're controlling our mechs! There's no way we can defeat them!

C: 我在给星穹列车写信。出来这么久了，也该报个平安才对。
E: I'm writing a letter to the Astral Express. It's been a while, and I thought I should let them know that I'm safe and sound here.

C: 好家伙，这是什么赛博剑法……
E: Whew, this cyber swordplay is amazing...

C: 他之前的狗叫也不是真的道歉。
E: Remember when he barked like a dog? He definitely wasn't sorry then.

C: 按照我的工作哲学，我其实也不想说「你不重要」，相反我会说「你很重要」。打工人，你要为自己好好生活而骄傲，而不是其他的任何事情。
E: You know, based on my work philosophy, I don't want to say "You're not important." In fact, I'd say "You are important." As an employee, you should take pride in living a good life for yourself, not just work.

C: 放弃挑战并结束本次习剑流程。
E: Quit challenge and end this sword training program.

C: 这道菜的色泽之所以如黑冰墨玉，是我怕你入不了口，多加了黑糖。
E: This dish's color is black as ink and ebony jade, so I added rock sugar in case you got grossed out.

C: 我、我这就去处理禁书！
E: I—I'll handle the forbidden text now!

C: 简单来说，我需要人手去「拍摄」，或者说定位漂游在仙舟人群间的「离散忆质」。
E: Put simply, I need people to help me "photograph" — or should I say "locate" — the scattered memoria floating amongst the Xianzhou people.

C: …开玩笑的啦！来看看六月十姑娘的实力。
E: ...Kidding! Let's see what your true power is like, Miss June <unbreak>10</unbreak>th.

C: 你掏出了一沓信用点，这是你心中最适用于桑博的打交道方式。
E: You pull out a stack of credits. In your mind, this is the most appropriate way to interact with Sampo.

C: 就像幼儿园的小朋友一样，或者…像是小猫？
E: Like children in kindergarten? Or... like kittens?

C: 如果事情都像开头那么顺利就好了……
E: If only everything were as smooth as when it started...

C: 是一个英雄辈出的城邦。
E: It's a city full of heroes.

C: 我没做过教练，为什么找我？
E: I've never done this before. Why me?

C: （但我对公司里那些有手腕的高层有一种本能的畏惧。不行，不能让恐惧压倒我！）
E: (But I have a certain instinctive wariness of those bigwigs from the IPC... No, I can't let that fear control me!)

C: 嗯？
E: Hmm?

C: 我不是很擅长聊天，不过好在咱们都是战士，不必用语言交心。
E: I'm not great at conversation, so it's a good thing we're both warriors — we don't have to use words to understand each other.

C: 你比我年轻，比我阳光，也比我更能代表贝洛伯格的形象——别忘了，我们参加演武仪典，也是为了向银河各方宣传雅利洛-Ⅵ。
E: You're younger and more upbeat than I am, a far more appropriate image for Belobog. Don't forget that the reason we're participating in the Wardance is also to promote Jarilo-VI to the rest of the cosmos.

C: …也许伊戈尔抵达过仙舟？所以他们才给咱发了邀请函？
E: ...Maybe Igor had been to the Xianzhou? That's why they sent us an invitation?

C: 可是……
E: But...

C: 喂！{NICKNAME}，这边这边！快点！
E: Hey, {NICKNAME}! Over here! Quickly!

C: 你们也来参加演武仪典呗？
E: You're also here to participate in the Wardance?

C: 老子准备动手了，可以吧？
E: I'm going to start, that good?

C: 她叫玛吉，是我的一个粉丝。每次比赛她都会来看。后来逐渐熟悉了，我们也会聊聊天。但自始至终，我都不太了解她的情况。
E: Her name's Margie, a fan of mine. She always came to watch all my matches. We got to know each other later, and started chatting. But in the end, I still didn't really understand her situation.

C: 人生就是一场必败的擂台啊。衰老病痛，求之不得，嘿嘿，每一样都能把你干趴下。死亡再来给你补上最后一拳，叫你…呃不是，叫你的亲朋好友哭唧唧。
E: Life is a fight in a ring you're bound to lose. Aging, disease, unattainable desires — each one will knock you out. Death just lands the final blow, making your friends and family cry.

C: 银枝认可了卢卡选手的「美」！这也就意味着！
E: Argenti sees Beauty in Luka! That means...

C: 我现在可以站在演武仪典的擂台上，像他一样为自己的家园而挥拳，这就说明他没有失败。
E: The fact that I can participate in the Wardance to fight for my home today shows that he didn't fail.

C: 史瓦罗大佬，你没放水吧？
E: Svarog, you didn't go easy on me, did you?

C: 那她也和我一样弱吗？
E: Is she as weak as me?

C: 您的意思是…莫非您听说过伊戈尔•哈夫特？
E: Do you mean... Have you, by any chance, heard of Igor Haft?

C: 不要惊慌，奢摩。提议：我将向你们展示我的历史内存，希望仙舟联盟能够在研读这份数据后，重新考量丹轮寺的请愿。
E: Do not panic, Samatha. Suggestion: I will show you all my historical memory. I hope that the Xianzhou Alliance will reconsider Claretwheel Temple's petition after reviewing this data.

C: 智械大军曾点燃银河，要将有机生命的存在尽数抹杀。
E: The Intellitron army once ignited the cosmos, desirous of completely erasing the existence of all organic lifeforms.

C: 诸位生于猎群，正如蛙困于井中，只瞧见井口有杀戮的选择。正所谓「从善一念起，刹那天地宽」，跳出去更有广阔天地。
E: You are all born of the wolfpack. Akin to frogs gazing up from the bottom of the well, you only see the choice of bloodshed that towers above you at the mouth of the well. As the saying goes: "A moment of kindness broadens the horizon in an instant" — leap out of the box, and you will find an endless expanse of opportunities.

C: 提问：奢摩，完成请愿这一目标，是否高于任何个体？
E: Question: Samatha, is the completion of this objective more imperative than any individual entity?

C: 结论：每个人都有做出选择的权力。
E: Conclusion: Everyone has the right to make their own choices.

C: 好啦！我要准备上场了！我们得好好教教他们——冒充别人是不对的！
E: All right! I'm gonna get ready to step into the arena! We need to teach them a good lesson — identity theft is not a joke!

C: 你看看你们…为什么非要冒充别人呢？
E: Look at you guys... Why are you impersonating other people?

C: 接下来的对手叫做…「神奇植物在哪里」。听起来又是个很奇妙的对手呢。
E: The next opponent is called... Fantastic Botany and Where to Find Them. Sounds like quite the character we have here.

C: 很遗憾，虽然我们都希望卢卡选手能够重新站上赛场。但事实上，这次失败对他的打击很大，他给我发消息说，他已经买好了返程的船票。
E: It's a pity, since we all hoped that Luka would be able to get another chance in the ring. Honestly though, this defeat was too much of a blow to him. He sent me a message saying that he has already bought the return ticket home.

C: 我的问题是…卢卡选手在赛前吃了什么？
E: My question is... What did Contestant Luka eat before the match?

C: 我的教学方法并不适合每个人…
E: My teaching methods aren't suited to everyone...

C: 卢卡选手化解了对手的攻势！
E: Luka efficiently neutralizes his opponent's attack!

C: 可…可可利亚大人？
E: M... Madam Cocolia?

C: 你怎么会来「罗浮」？
E: What are you doing on the Luofu?

C: 哟，这不是最受学生欢迎的大明星——知更鸟小姐嘛？既然你在集会上力排众议，坚持要举办音乐派对，那就给大家出个主意呗？
E: Whoa there, if it isn't the superstar that the kids like? Miss Robin, was it? During the assembly, you were vehemently outspoken on your insistence to organize the music party. Do you have any good ideas?

C: 玩COSPLAY不带我是吧？
E: Are you excluding me from the cosplay party?

C: 我也喜欢！看来我和乱破小姐有很多共同语言啊！
E: I like rap too! Looks like we share a common language!

C: 多亏了你们先前带来的演出，才能有令观众们满意的新作。
E: It's all thanks to the show you guys played that made the new piece such a favorite.

C: 来，跟着我认真唱啾！
E: Come on, sing along with soul, tweet!

C: 交给我们吧！
E: Leave it to us!

C: 嗯，我来帮你全都整理好！
E: Yeah. I'll help you get everything organized!

C: 但…说白了，我现在有点腻了。彩梦校庆上那么多好玩的东西，为啥非得在排练室里耗着呢。演出嘛，随便搞搞就行！
E: But... honestly, I'm a little bored. We had so much fun at the Dreamlight school anniversary. Why should I waste all my time messing around in the rehearsal room? It's a performance, so just do what feels right in the moment!

C: 乱破忍首答应过会接纳我，因此，我也愿意追随您，去往任何地方。
E: Head Ninja Rappa once promised to take me under her wing, and for that, I too am willing to follow you to wherever you wish to go.

C: 并且…负责舞台工作的蒙塔娜同学也是熟人，应该会帮我们。
E: And... I'm also familiar with the stagehand, Montana, who will probably help us.

C: 感谢虾蟇•忍者相助…我等的音忍流派有一位忍徒神隐，在下正在找寻她的踪迹。
E: Thank you, Ninja Gama, for your help... An initiate of our sound ninja school has gone missing. We're trying to find her whereabouts.

C: 呵呵，这次就让我当回观众吧，祝你们能够带来精彩的故事。
E: Heh-heh, let me be a spectator this time. I hope you all can weave an exciting tale.

C: 没有没有，「缭乱乐团 / 缭乱众 / 缭乱号飞艇 / 缭乱忍徒旅店 / 缭乱流派对」的风格那么独特，乱破同学的舞台表现力也很强，正常乐队都不会想要和你们竞争的吧。哈哈。
E: You're too nice. Dazzling Band / Dazzling Collective / Dazzling Airship / Dazzling Initiate Hotel / Dazzling School Party's style is really unique, and Miss Rappa has an excellent stage presence. Ordinary bands wouldn't dare think of trying to compete against you, haha.

C: 嗯，当务之急是保证演出正常进行。我就留在舞台附近，防止对方使用强硬手段。
E: Yes, it's imperative that the performance is successful. I will stand guard near the stage to prevent the aggressor from getting violent.

C: 感谢诸位倾力相助！如今主公归来，登台的时限又将至，我等「缭乱」不得不分兵作战，想办法将强敌逐个击破了。
E: Thank you, everyone, for all your help! Now that Sound Master has returned, and our time on stage is about to end, the Dazzling Ninja must split into groups and beat our rivals in the contest.

C: （排练室里…怎么好像有说话的声音。）
E: (In the rehearsal room... I think I hear voices chatting.)

C: 好耶！
E: Yeah!

C: 咳咳。现在我来公布选拔结果啊。
E: Ahem. I'll be announcing the selection results now.

C: 经理{F#小姐}{M#先生}，请问…你在寻找作曲灵感的时候，能不能带上我？
E: {F#Miss}{M#Mister} Manager, when you're looking for inspiration for your music... can you please bring me along?

C: 难道你没有手机吗？
E: Do you not have a phone?

C: 导演
E: Director

C: 街机算移动游戏吗？
E: Are arcade games considered mobile games?

C: 哈哈，谢谢夸奖。这就是多年行商为咱积攒下的智慧。
E: Haha, thank you for the compliment. This is the accumulated wisdom of many years of being a traveling merchant.

C: 你不要痴心妄想了，给我好好做值日帕！
E: You should drop your daydreams and be a good little duty-to-doer!

C: 哼哼，不管什么理由，既然迟到了，就必须履行昨天约定的赌约！用你的「列车基金」请我们吃早餐！
E: Heh-heh, anyway, since you're late, you have to pay the consequences of the bet! We're using your Express fund to treat ourselves to breakfast!

C: 有几位登场人物，看上去颇为眼熟…瓦尔特先生是参考了现实原型吗？
E: Some of the characters have familiar faces... Did Mr. Yang reference their real-life counterparts?

C: 没有加入反物质军团的面试秘诀，这含金量我不是很信服。
E: The Antimatter Legion interviewing secrets aren't included — I'm not totally convinced of its worth.

C: 就是就是。为了能让星穹列车在各方势力之中周旋，我们应该一起撒过不少谎吧？
E: Yeah, what he said. In order for the Astral Express to tread a thin line between various factions, we've probably spun quite a few lies, no?

C: 先去太空漫步。
E: Go space walking first.

C: 重申一下，我没有偷吃。我是被你们牵连的。
E: Just to be clear, I didn't steal a bite. I was implicated by you two.

C: 丹恒！我们三个人可一直都是同进共退的，你可不许在这种时候搞神圣切割啊！
E: Dan Heng! Our three hearts have always been united as one! You can't start sowing discord at a time like this!

C: 哇，这难道就是传说中的「绝对音感」？
E: Woah, could this be the legendary perfect pitch on display?

C: 另一份请托则来自「星空生态学派」，他们希望我们将<unbreak>70</unbreak>只鼻行兽运输到要塞都市「赛耶斯」。
E: The other one is from the Astral Ecology School: They hope that we can transport <unbreak>70</unbreak> Nosewalkers to the fortress city of Sayers.

C: 汪汪汪汪，汪！
E: Woof woof woof, woof!

C: 检索：黑塔女士指令。
E: Search: Madam Herta's orders.

C: 就是它吃了我的易拉罐！它的嗝是易拉罐味的！给我吐出来！
E: It ate my cans! Its burp smells like trash! Spit it out now!

C: 那倒可以考虑一下。
E: That's worth considering.

C: 唉…我们是怀揣演艺梦想的「出道的桶」，为了追逐登场机会，最终误入歧途。今天落到你们手里，也算死得其所……
E: *sigh* ...We are the Debut Trashcans bearing with us dreams of showbiz. To pursue this chance of debuting, we eventually wound up on the wrong path. Now that we have ended up in your clutches, it's at least a fitting end...

C: 「星穷列车」。
E: "Arstral Express."

C: 你和三月七一路紧追，终于在朝露公馆将它逼上绝路。
E: You and March 7th give chase, eventually cornering it at Dewlight Pavilion.

C: 睡蕉小猴闪身躲过了你的袭击，你一头扑到沙盘上，眼前一阵天旋地转……
E: The Slumbernana Monkey dodges your attack, leaving you catching air and a mouth full of sand. Your eyes see nothing but stars...

C: 咱们拍什么，写字桌，入梦池，放映机，还是舷窗外边的景色？
E: What should we take? The desk, Dreampool, projector, or the scenery outside the window?

C: 模仿居然还在继续！
E: You're still doing it!

C: 唔，神秘兮兮的，不知道又在谋划什么鬼主意…早点回来哦，待会儿还需要你来掌镜呢。
E: Mm, so secretive. I wonder what scheme you're plotting again... Come back early. I still need you to help with the camera later!

C: 登记报名、沟通行程，你忙里忙外，终于打点好了一切……
E: Registration, communication itinerary... You've been busy all over, and finally get everything sorted out.

C: 不过，我有种不祥的预感。要是镜头把藿藿变成步离战狂什么的，可就糟糕了……
E: But I've got a bad feeling about this. If the lens turns Huohuo into some battle-lusting borisin, it'd be bad...

C: 等等，尾巴大爷…藿藿好像有点奇怪……
E: Hang on, Mr. Tail... Something strange is going on with Huohuo...

C: 「列阵」
E: Form up!

C: 也带我的球棒练练。
E: Train my bat too.

C: 而三月七 / 赵相机小姐用组照对比的形式，将时间的维度也囊括于作品之中，可谓别出心裁。
E: And Miss March 7th / Say~Cheese~ used the contrast in her photographs to embody the dimensions of time in her work — breathtakingly unique.

C: 可惜没有佳人在侧，更没有飞机可以击落，因此稍显落寞。
E: Unfortunately, it has neither a beauty by its side nor airplanes to shoot down, making it seem a bit lonely.

C: 这是用脚投票！
E: This is voting with your feet!

C: 提前完成！灰宝和小奇美拉都辛苦了，待会给你们买点好吃的~
E: Done in advance! Good job, Grayie and chimeras. I'll buy some delicious food for you guys later!

C: 你说的这个啊，我都明白，但是呢，做不了。至于为什么做不了…你瞧瞧现在的成员数量，够吗？提产能是要靠人手的，光吹是没用的。
E: I get what you're saying, but we can't do that. As for why not... Just take a look at how many we have in the squad, are we enough? Increasing workload relies on increased headcount — it's not just all hot air.

C: 竞争愈发激烈，要想获得更高的团队名次，就需要全部成员的共同努力……
E: Competition's getting stiff, so if we want to achieve a higher squad ranking, everyone has to work together towards that goal...

C: *我们*知道的，小灰爱说大话，所以不怕。都要加油哦。
E: We know that Little Gray loves to brag, so we're not bothered. Let's all do our best.

C: 谢谢缇宝老师！事不宜迟，灰宝，我们这就开始比赛吧！
E: Thank you, Tribbie! No time to lose, Grayie! Let's get this match started!

C: 嗷呜？…嗷呜嗷呜？
E: Awoo? ...Awoo-awoo?

C: 摆到其他地方！
E: Move it somewhere else!

C: 这也是意料之中，大哥我设置「超级变态关」的意义，就是让大家探寻自己的变态极限，再来试试吧！
E: This is expected. The reason I set up the Super Insane Stage is to let everyone find their own insanity limit. Try it again!

C: 谁问你了！
E: Who asked you!?

C: 请马上走开，不要回来！
E: Please leave the premises and don't come back!

C: 不…不需要。
E: No... I don't.

C: 嗷呜嗷呜，我也跟你豹了！
E: Awoo-awoo, let's get this fight started!

C: 经历了小小的波折，我们重新回到淘汰赛中，现在站在浴池两边的是臭名昭著的「贼灵」巴特鲁斯选手和{NICKNAME}选手！
E: After that little hiccup, we're back to our Elimination match! In the bathhouse arena today, we have the infamous "Spirithief" Bartholos facing off against {NICKNAME}!

C: 可缇宁…缇宁只是待在生命花园，除了宣读神谕，能做的事情，很少……
E: But we... we just stay in the Garden of Life, doing nothing but delivering prophecies...

C: 绷带海豹伤势太重，昏光庭院已经尽了全力。然后，它也带着「求胜的怨念」，变成了一只幽灵海豹回来了……
E: Despite the Twilight Courtyard's best efforts, the Bandaged Seal's wounds were fatal. Now it's back as a Ghost Seal, carrying its "obsession to win"...

C: 泡泡还会继续追求「胜利」，直到可以和{NICKNAME}再次站在赛场上对决的一天。
E: I will continue to pursue victory until I can stand across the arena from {NICKNAME} once again.

C: 好！希望你们俩都能得偿所愿！
E: Well! May you both get what you want!

C: 嚯，你这记性也太好了嘛，算啦！我就给你再表演一个，小小的魔术，看那里——
E: Whoa, your memory's on point. Fine, fine! Let me show you one last thing — a little magic trick. Look over there.

C: 我想近距离交个手，探一探这位{NICKNAME}到底是个什么样的人，怎么就搅和到了你的逐火大业里，让你不惜花重金也要找我出手帮忙。
E: I want to fight {NICKNAME} up close and find out what kind of person {F#she}{M#he} is. How did {F#she}{M#he} meddle with your Flame-Chase cause and get you to spend a fortune for my help?

C: 可恶！我们撤退！给我记住了，「预言之子」{NICKNAME}——
E: Curses! Fall back! I'll remember this, {NICKNAME}, Child of Prophecy—

C: …要不是我无暇抽身，我也想亲自参加的。
E: ...If I wasn't so occupied, I would've loved to join in myself.

C: 我开玩笑的，我必须参加。
E: I'm kidding. I must participate.

C: 既是如此，*我们*也不方便细问，如果有可以讲出口的，请一定要告诉*我们*。
E: If that's the case, then we won't pursue it. However, if there's anything you can share, please do tell us.

C: 这…这预言听着很真啊！
E: This... this prophecy feels too real!

C: 别放弃啊，让我们再想想。
E: Don't give up just yet, let's brainstorm some more.

C: 我对电子游戏没那么擅长，但也能感受到创作者的一些巧思。
E: I'm not great at video games, but I can pick up the brilliant ideas the creator incorporated.

C: 作为青年才俊们的聚集地，折纸大学自然也是我们游戏的主要投放场所。如今《银河球棒侠传说：魔王篇》的游戏机就在眼前，不打算来体验一下吗？
E: As a hub for young talent, Paperfold University is naturally one of our primary launch locations. Now, the console for Legend of the Galactic Baseballer: Demon King is right in front of you. Don't you want to give it a go?

C: 毕竟，一款优秀的游戏从不惧怕意见与批评——恶意刷差评除外。
E: After all, a great game never fears feedback or criticism — except for maliciously negative reviews.

C: 好，你的意见我都认真记下了，时间不早，我得赶回去和开发团队进行总结评估。
E: Got it, I've made note of your feedback. It's getting late, I need to head back and do a wrap-up with the dev team.

C: 顺带一提，那辆「巡海大鲨鱼」号发动机过热，我们已经帮您送修了。
E: By the way, the engine on the Sea Hunter Shark overheated, and we've already sent it in for repairs.

C: …对手？下一关会有什么对手？
E: ...Opponents? Who am I facing next?

C: 当然，您参不参加挑战赛，全凭您自己决定，请您不要有任何心理负担。
E: Of course, whether you participate in the challenge races is entirely up to you. Please don't feel any pressure about it.

C: 哈哈！我们的冠军年纪还小，也有点激动，不过我想大家都能听懂——大家听到了吧？记得在赛道上享受比赛的乐趣，赢得开心，挑战也要快乐！
E: Ahahaha! Our champion is young, and a bit too excited, but I think you can all get what {F#s}he meant — Did we hear that? Remember the joy you feel on the racetrack and win happiness for yourselves! You need to enjoy the challenge!

C: 匹诺康尼在家族管理下，梦境可是绝对安全的，青雀小姐，你说的这诅咒是…？
E: The Family ensures Penacony's Dreamscape is <unbreak>100%</unbreak> safe, Miss Qingque. What exactly is this curse you're talking about?

C: 啾啾…啾啾啾！
E: Tweet tweet... tweet tweet tweet!

C: 行了行了，他宝贝的，搞那么麻烦做什么——喂，那什么小鸟，你能听懂我说话吧？
E: Enough, enough, you muddle-fudger, stop making this so complex! Hey, bird, you understand what I'm saying, don't you?

C: 让他宝贝的试试吧。
E: Yeah, the horsefeathers can try!

C: 在《钟表小子》动画里，五只折纸小鸟是美梦小镇学者猫头鹰老师的学生。
E: In the Clockie series, the five Origami Birds studied under Professor Owl in Dreamville.

C: 那现在我们还救不救啊？
E: So, are we still saving her or not?

C: 差不多得了，叫「岁阳」也罢，叫「神圣呜呜伯」也罢，本大爷根本不在乎，现在咱们只用管怎么处理它——
E: Whether you call it "Heliobus" or "Holy Wubbaboo," I don't care. All that matters now is how we deal with it—

C: 消这个，对…不是，旁边那个！
E: Use this one, yes... No! The other one!

C: 谁知道呢？多半是冗余的魔力和「战斗续行」的能力导致的。大家都消散之后，单单把我留了下来。
E: Who knows? It's probably the result of some excess magical energy and the "Battle Continuation" ability. After everyone else vanished, I was the one left behind.

C: 请先品尝调饮吧。
E: Please, enjoy your drink.

C: 快快，看看第二个宝箱里是什么！
E: Quick, check what's in the second chest!

C: 就决定是它了！
E: I choose you!

C: 开始指导前，先来杯调饮润润嗓子吧。
E: Before we get started, let's have a drink to clear the throat.

C: 哼，不过，人偶最想成为的人，除了我黑塔，还能有谁？只怕最后会变成两个我面面相觑吧。
E: Hmph. But the person the puppet most wants to become? Who else could it be but me, Herta? We might just end up with two of me staring awkwardly at each other.

C: 要不要再试一杯？
E: Ready for another glass?

C: 至于调出什么样的饮品，<color=#dbc291ff>就交给你自己选择。</color>
E: As for what kind of drink to prepare, <color=#dbc291ff>that's for you to decide.</color>

C: 「石心十一人」！
E: Eleven Stonehearts!

C: 很可惜，叽米先生的申请被婉拒了。许多同事不能接受一只鸟有比自己有更高的职级。
E: Unfortunately, Mr. Owlbert's application was regrettably rejected. Many colleagues couldn't accept a bird having a higher rank than them.

C: 黑塔女士，给我倒杯水来。怎么，我黑塔人偶说话不管用了是吗？
E: Madam Herta, bring me a glass of water. What's going on? Did my authority as a puppet lose effect?

C: 不会是用我来做实验吧？
E: Wait, I'm not going to be your test subject, am I?

C: 直接说明来意吧，我带来了一次新的合作机会，或者说，一次特殊的典押。
E: Let's cut to the chase. I've brought you a new business opportunity, or rather a special pawn deal.

C: 哎呀，最后不是盈利了吗？盈利不就好了～
E: Come on, didn't we end up making a profit anyway? As long as it's a net profit, it's all good~

C: 我果然没看错{NICKNAME}，刚才的表现真不错。
E: I knew I wasn't wrong about you, {NICKNAME}. That was quite impressive.

C: 不要小看公司的情报搜集能力，虽然公司暂时还无法进入一些顽固市场，但是当地的市场洞察工作可是从来没有松懈过。
E: Don't underestimate IPC's intelligence gathering capabilities. Although the IPC hasn't yet penetrated some stubborn markets, we've never slacked off on our market insights in those regions.

C: 听说你重新开张了？
E: Hey, I heard you've started back up again?

C: 你不是说吃了丹药就行吗？
E: Wait a minute, didn't you say taking the elixir would be enough already?

C: 抬头看看罢！我就在你身前！毋要视而不见！
E: Up here! I'm right in front of you! Don't turn a blind eye to me!

C: 注入催长剂，龙尊随即存想默念，运起云吟奇术。
E: After injecting the growth booster, the high elder sat in meditation as he performed his cloudhymn.

C: 这叙事扣子，你们觉得我回收的怎么样？
E: How do you like my little callback for this mini cliffhanger?

C: 你让我喘口气缓缓…
E: Let me catch my breath...

C: 至于最后一样，则是铸造神剑的工序。幸亏我依然存有前生回忆……
E: As for the last condition, it's about how we forge the weapon. Fortunately, I still have memories from my previous life to serve us...

C: 嗐…这我可是完全按照您的描述设计的！背后长着植物、身形非常巨大、看起来特别凶恶……
E: Hey... This was based on your descriptions! Plants on the back, monstrously huge, ferocious...

C: 是的，她人可好了。
E: Yeah, and she's super nice.

C: 请指导我！
E: Please enlighten me!

C: 无论是相声还是说书，都是得面向观众不断训练。这就跟云骑军的日常训练一样，得多跑多练。
E: Whether it's crosstalk or storytelling, it's all about constant practice in front of the audience. It's just like the Cloud Knights' daily training.

C: 资格徽章已识别
E: Mastery Mark identified

C: 这是…次元扑满？
E: It's a... Warp Trotter?

C: 让我再想想…
E: Give me another minute...

C: 就决定是你了！
E: Nah, sounds fine to me!

C: 你们都在这儿埋伏我呢？
E: Is this an ambush?

C: 你要是实在不情愿的话…就当陪陪我，好嘛？这种庆典还挺难得的，我真的想好好体验一下……
E: Well, if you're not into it, could you at least keep me company...? Pleeeease! It's not like we get to celebrate these kinds of festivals every day...

C: 没问题，我们走。
E: Sounds good to me. Let's go.

C: 正如我刚才所说，我对二位绝无恶意——我以这副面具发誓。
E: As mentioned, I promise both of you that I harbor no malicious intentions — I swear upon this mask.

C: 大不了就是提醒你们加快点进度呗，或者是在挑衅你们——以他的性格，所谓的「高手玩家」指的说不定就是他自己呢。
E: Maybe he's just trying to get you two to move faster, or he just wants to provoke you... Given his nature, this "elite player" might even be him.

C: 所以…次元扑满 / 扑满 / 泡泡 / 毛球 / 白色恶魔 / 肥大 / 扑满侠 / 扑神为什么会产生自己的性格呢？
E: So... why do Warp Trotter / Trotter / Bubbles / Puffball / Ivory Menace / Chunky Chops / Turbo Trotter / Trotterlord has their own personality?

C: 正是如此。
E: That's right.

C: 这就是…<color=#dbc291ff>向导</color>吗？
E: Is... this the <color=#dbc291ff>guide</color>?

C: 喂——喂喂——
E: Hello? Hello, hello?

C: 你们——拿到三重凭证了——对吧——
E: You've got all three passes.

C: 孩子们现在玩的游戏还真是难懂呢……
E: The games you kids play these days really are complicated...

C: 咳咳——喂喂喂——每次都要黑进来一次，真麻烦，公司就不能允许线上参赛吗？
E: Ahem... Hey hey! I have to hack my way in every time, it's getting annoying! Can the IPC just allow online battling?

C: 请选手回到准备区——准备入场——！
E: Will contestants please make their way to the prep zone and prepare to enter the arena!

C: 在「游戏」的过程中，人们可以专注于精进自我，或是与他人携手共进。这种无害的竞争对于消解敌意和纷争来说很有意义。
E: This game allows people to work on themselves, or form strong bonds by teaming up with others. Harmless rivalry is a great way for people to settle their differences.

C: 为什么又是你？
E: How come it is you again?

C: 到这里就结束了吗？
E: So... is it all over now?

C: 虽然我始终对公司的产品保持谨慎态度，但置身于这样欢乐的氛围中，我倒是感觉自己的神经也被调动起来了…这种体验真是让人难忘。
E: I'm always wary of the IPC's products, but there's no denying they know how to put on a show. The atmosphere here is magical, I have to remind myself it's just a game.

C: <size=36>托帕！托帕！托帕！</size>
E: <size=36>Topaz! Topaz! Topaz!</size>

C: 难道还有庆功宴？
E: I wonder if there's a celebratory feast for us?

C: 哈哈哈…你想要我帮助你们，出卖同类？
E: Hahaha... You want me to assist you and betray my own kind?

C: 所以，今天吹的是什么风，让几位聚到神策府来找我？
E: So, what wind has brought you to the Seat of Divine Foresight?

C: 你输了，浮烟。
E: You've lost, Cirrus.

C: 不过，怀疑的对象，倒也不是没有。比如阿灼……
E: Of course, I do have my suspicions. For example, Luxie...

C: 多谢将军，咱们这就出发吧！
E: Thank you for your help, general. Let's get going!

C: 老成，我可是连地衡司都没给通知啊。这事儿透着邪门，报告了人家都当你哗众取宠呢。不是，云骑是怎么知道这事儿的？
E: Report? I haven't said a word to the Realm-Keeping Commission, let alone the Cloud Knights. People would think we were crazy if we reported this... There's something fishy going on — how did the Cloud Knights find out?

C: 我不是这个意思！我只是信任你的能力。
E: Mm... be careful not to hurt yourself.

C: 嗯嗯，这回除了运动量大了点，倒也没有到让人心跳停止的地步。不过要是多跑几圈，我得申请工伤了。
E: They sure made us run, though. If I ever have to run like that again on the job, I'm filing for worker's comp.

C: 而今这支小队伍，也需要您的帮助。
E: And now this small team needs your help, too.

C: 是啊，感觉不是很靠谱……
E: That's what I'm worried about too — doesn't feel very reliable...

C: 轻描淡写反而会让青雀小姐意识不到眼下的状况有多危险。
E: I want Qingque to have an idea of the gravity of the situation.

C: 登上列车，与谁为敌，去往何处……这些你以为自己可以听凭心意自由做出的选择，不过是命运的道路上终将汇合的支流。
E: What day you boarded the Express, who your enemies are, where you go... These choices that you think you make freely of your own accord are mere tributaries... that will eventually converge on the path of destiny.

C: 帮助仙舟击败幻胧的这次旅行，想必你深有体会吧？所有的结果早被那位隐于幕后的奴隶书写成了剧本。
E: Your journey to the Xianzhou, the defeat of Phantylia — all these were written into a script long ago by that slave to destiny, hidden in the shadows.

C: 我都想好了，我要用这笔钱去开个牌馆，然后雇几个小工，终日食利，不劳而获展开新生活，哈哈。
E: ...and I already planned what to do with all the money — I'm gonna open a gaming parlor, hire a couple of workers to run it, and spend the rest of my days living off the profits. I'll have started a new life without having lifted a finger, hehe.

C: 符玄强撑精神四处检视，不用多时，太卜司勉强恢复了秩序。
E: Fu Xuan brings herself to inspect the commission, and order is soon restored.

C: 这一次沙盘的路径虽有稍许变化，但一样简单得很。我想，太卜大人一定会说——
E: The path changed slightly, but it was just as simple. I'm sure the Master Diviner would say—

C: 进入沙盘
E: Enter Sandpit

C: 在宇宙这场只有输家的牌局里，她不停选择不停挣扎，只为了能让罗浮仙舟多向前航行一秒。嘿嘿，她真是我心目中最棒的牌手。
E: In this vast universe — a game where there are only losers — our Master Diviner is making endless choices, fighting against the odds just so the Luofu can safely travel for another day. Hehe, in my book she's the best player there is.

C: 兄弟，冷静啊！
E: Hey, calm down!

C: 我这才发现，身边不知什么时候多了个佩剑的孩子，正盯着我瞧。
E: It was only then that I realized — there was a sword-wielding child beside me, staring right at me.

C: 眼下彦卿小哥就在祈龙坛上，{NICKNAME}，咱们走吧。
E: Yanqing is at Dragonprayer Terrace. {NICKNAME}, let's go.

C: 其实啊我的斤两我心里清楚得很，如果不是彦卿小哥分神抗拒了那个岁阳的蛊惑，也许我就撑不到你们搬来救兵了。
E: Actually, I'm well aware of my own limits. If it weren't for Yanqing resisting that heliobus, maybe I wouldn't have been able to hold on until you brought reinforcements.

C: 嗨呀，每个被岁阳蛊惑的人怎么都那么热爱道歉啊。明明都是受害者，明明这一切都要怪那些到处乱跑的坏家伙。
E: Why does everyone that gets "heliobused" love to apologize for it? You're the victim here. They're the ones stirring up chaos.

C: 不行，它坐在绥园中，却将我们一步步引导到如此境地。在没有搞明白它的意图之前，我们不能再听之任之了。
E: No, we shouldn't do what they expect us to. They've been manipulating us from Fyxestroll Garden all along. We need to find out what they really want before we go any further.

C: 对不起，藿藿，我和你父亲只能将你送入十王司。就当你从没有我们这样的父母……
E: I'm sorry, Huohuo, your father and I had no choice but to send you to the Ten-Lords Commission. It's best if you pretend we never existed...

C: 镇妖塔内封印新的岁阳也许能够获得全新的驱邪术，这对各位大人降妖除魔必有所助益。既然我已经完成藿藿大人的交待，在下就告辞了。
E: New exorcismics might be obtained when new heliobi become sealed in the suppression towers, which will greatly aid you in suppressing demons. Now that I'm done conveying Judge Huohuo's message, I shall take my leave.

C: 随你怎么说吧，彦卿是来拿岁阳归案的，又不是来陪你玩小游戏的。
E: Whatever you say. I came to bring a heliobus to justice, not to play silly games.

C: 谢谢您成全我们。
E: Thank you for helping us.

C: 你们既然出现，就说明这事儿确有可疑的地方了。
E: As you're here, that means there is indeed something suspicious about this.

C: 这还是我认识的那个青雀吗？
E: Is this really the Qingque that I know?

C: …我、我要还清我三百年的房贷！
E: ...I, I want to pay off my three-hundred year mortgage!

C: 连青雀这么与世无争的性子，都被它困在了名和利的漩涡里啊。不过说到底，这些不过是欺骗宿主的幻觉罢了，一戳就破。
E: Even an aloof young girl like Qingque has been trapped in the vortex of fame and fortune. Although when it comes down to it, these are nothing more than fantasies used to deceive the host. One push and they come crumbling down.

C: 你只要去过，就知道大师所言不假。
E: Once you're inside, you will know that the master was telling the truth.

C: 小桂子，我看还是回去吧。
E: Little Gui, I think we should just head back.

C: 嗷嗷嗷……
E: Awooo, awooo...

C: 那个还在发出声响的快递箱肯定有问题……
E: There's definitely something not right about that courier package making noises...

C: 没想到「探访凶宅」的结果就是，那根本不算是「凶宅」。
E: I never thought the results of our "haunted house investigation" would be that it wasn't "haunted" at all...

C: 我们分头行动，我们去和发帖人见面问清楚，藿藿你就去查查「恐怖通话」的来源。
E: Let's split up. We'll meet up with the thread's OP; Huohuo, you can go investigate the source of the "scary call."

C: 依我看，这次估计也是岁阳作祟——你们记得浮烟最后爆炸变成了漫天的火雨吗？
E: In my opinion, a heliobus should be behind this incident too — do you remember how Cirrus finally exploded into a rain of fire down from the sky?

C: 没关系，我会等你准备好的。
E: It's fine. I'll wait for you to get ready.

C: {NICKNAME}，你怎么说？
E: What do you think, {NICKNAME}?

C: 我想把它放归天外。
E: I want to release it somewhere among the stars.

C: 我看到还有朋友问「以后还会直播吗」，会呀会呀，为什么不呢？
E: I see one friend here has asked, "Will you keep streaming in the future?" Sure, I sure will. Why not?

C: 没看出来啊，年纪轻轻就已经经历了这么多情感沧桑……
E: I didn't realize that. Someone so young already experiencing all the trials and tribulations of love...

C: 休眠舱状态检测完成，云端同步成功。
E: Cryosleep pod status test complete. Cloud synchronization successful.

C: 我这次来，目的并不只是为了见你。
E: I didn't just come to see you.

C: 还有别的事。
E: Something came up.

C: 况且再怎么说，这些羽毛可是实打实的好东西呀～
E: And besides, those feathers most assuredly are REALLY good~

C: 再讲一个故事吧！
E: Tell us another story!

C: 尊、尊贵的嘀嗒嘀•嗒嘀先生，饮用这杯特调前，请允许小女子再次为您介绍它背后的丰富含义。加深对饮品的理解，相信对您的品鉴会大有帮助。
E: V—Venerable Mr. Tick-Tock, please allow me to re-introduce the profound significance behind this special beverage. I firmly believe that deepening your understanding of the drink will enhance your tasting experience.

C: 新人，好好看，好好学。真正优秀的酒吧该是这样。
E: Watch and learn, new blood. This is what a good lounge should be like.

C: 「记住：景象或许是虚假的，但你看到的所有事都真实发生过。」
E: "Remember, the sights may be false, but everything you're about to see did happen before."

C: 你是要选「真心话」还是「大冒险」哇？
E: So, "Truth"? Or "Dare"?

C: **。正好我心情糟糕，就拿你们几个出气好了。明明是造出来给人消遣的工具，正经的事做不好，吃的喝的倒什么都不少，挨揍就是你们最后的用处！
E: Bah. I'm in a bad mood, so I'll take it out on you. You were made for entertainment, but you can't do anything right and keep wasting my money. You're good for being my practice dummy!

C: 「失去自由、任人摆布是件很痛苦的事，你想要逃离这样的生活吗？」
E: "Losing your freedom and being at the mercy of others is painful. Do you want to escape that kind of life?"

C: 赔赔赔——你赔得起吗！你们的那点工资，连一个系统时的房费都付不起，还好意思说赔偿我？
E: Compensate me? Can you even afford it? With your measly salary, your compensation wouldn't even cover the room bill for one system hour. And you have the nerve to talk about compensating me?

C: 要是它找不回来，就换你去找！我不管你是趴地上，还是到处摇尾巴求人，反正我要……
E: If the dog can't find it, then you do it! I don't care if you have to beg, borrow, or steal, I'm going to...

C: 走咯！
E: Yeah, let's go!

C: 但和我们共同生活，你会拥有「家人」。
E: But if you join us, you'll have a "Family."

C: 是哦。那我再想想。
E: Oh, right. Let me think again.

C: 越是出自真心，话儿便越难说得动听！
E: The more heartfelt the words, the harder they are to say out loud!

C: 尝试表演个甩杯子。
E: Attempt to do a flair with the glasses.

C: 有这时间干嘛不好？来跟我玩把骰子，试试手气，碰碰运气！
E: Why not enjoy this time? Let's play dice. Come on, test your luck!

C: 你确定要选小的？小的小的小的…噢，我当然同意，就该是小的！
E: Sure you want small? Small, small, small... Oh, yes, I agree. It should be small.

C: 你清楚看见骰子的每一面都被砸出了规规整整的六个深坑。
E: You can clearly see that each side of the dice has six deep, neat holes punched into it.

C: 再给我来杯饮料！这次我要…<color=#dbc291ff>大杯！苦的！超强烈！</color>小的能喝，大的也能喝！大小都一样！没毛病！
E: Give me another drink! This time, I want... <color=#dbc291ff>a large glass! Bitter! And super strong! </color>Small or large, I'll drink 'em all! They're all the same! No problem!

C: 你知道吗，你给我一种疏离感。很孤独的感觉，若即若离。
E: You know, you exude an air of detachment, evoking a profound solitude as if you weren't really here.

C: （真有意思，还是第一次遇到这么在乎装饰物的顾客。）
E: (Interesting. This is the first time I've met a customer who cares so much about the decorations.)

C: 想必你们聊得很开心吧，不觉得那位的气质很特别吗？就是那种…疏离感，若即若离的氛围，才华横溢的孤独，实在太迷人了！
E: You had a nice chat, right? Don't you find his demeanor special? I mean, the kind of... detachment and iffy vibe! The kind of solitude you'd expect from a genius! It's just fascinating!

C: 嘻嘻，这是秘密。要是人家再和您更加亲近点的话，说不定就全说出来了呢。
E: Hee-hee, it's a secret. However, if we get to know each other better, I might spill the beans.

C: 请再给我杯饮料降降温吧，这次想要<color=#dbc291ff>梦幻风格，超级浓郁的类型！还是要多放点冰块，</color>不然人家的电路板要烧坏啦。
E: Give me another drink to cool me down some more. This time, I want something <color=#dbc291ff>dreamy and super thick! And like before, I want more ice,</color> or my circuits are gonna fry.

C: 味道真好，您还是这么懂人家的心。真希望您能永远在这里工作呀，永远都在人家身边。
E: This tastes amazing! You still understand me so well. If only you could stay here forever, by my side.

C: 你记错了。
E: You've got it all mixed up.

C: 那些怪物原本都是「美梦剧团」，工作认真，训练有素，服从家族的管理，为来往宾客提供消遣和服务。对，都是乖孩子。
E: All those monsters used to be part of the Sweet Dreams Troupe — hard-working, well-trained, and obedient to The Family, providing amusement and service to the guests. Yeah, they were all good children.

C: 说是我的客人就行，家族的守卫不会拦你。不过是群服从命令的猎犬罢了，别太给他们面子。
E: Just tell them you're my guest, and The Family's guards won't stop you. They're merely obedient Bloodhounds following orders. Don't take them too seriously.

C: …怪物的真实情况？
E: ...The true nature of those monsters?

C: 汪…好像和我预想的不太一样哇，亲爱的调饮师，你是没认真工作嘛？
E: Woof... It's a little different from what I expected. My dear drinksmith, are you sure you're serious about your job?

C: 呃…您是不是太累了，发挥有些失常。没事的，您调出来的饮料，我都能喝！
E: Err... You don't seem like yourself. Are you too tired? It's all right. I'll drink anything you make!

C: …是因为您的心乱了嘛，调出来的饮料好像和人家的需求不太符合呀。
E: ...Is it because your heart is unsettled? The drink you made doesn't seem to match my requirements.

C: 差不多该走了，要是对这份工作还算喜欢，就多待段时间吧。
E: It's time to go. If you're enjoying this job, then stay a while longer.

C: 汪！虽然我很想帮你，但我只是狗狗，什么都做不到哇！
E: Woof! I'd love to help you, but I'm just a dog. There's nothing I can do!

C: 汪  汪
E: Woof  Woof

C: 难度变高了，先尝试记住佩佩的叫声节奏吧。
E: The difficulty has gone up. Let's try to remember the rhythm of Peppy's barks first.

C: 我站在里面疯狂嘲讽，他们气得直冒烟呢，只能灰溜溜地走了。你说有意思不！
E: I stood inside and started wildly mocking them. They were so mad that smoke was coming out of their ears. All they could do was walk away with their tails between their legs. Pretty interesting, right?

C: …宾客，玩吗？
E: ...Hey, want to play a game?

C: 你将流萤小鸟摆放在街机上
E: You place the Birefly on the arcade machine

C: 你猜我猜不猜？
E: Take a guess if I'm gonna take a guess?

C: 不过你这家伙操作意识倒还不错，下次要不要和我一起来打……
E: You seem pretty good at handling yourself in games, though. Next time, why don't we play...

C: 我和{NICKNAME}正在对这游戏进行测试，你要是没什么事，就也一起吧。
E: {NICKNAME} and I are testing the game for them now. If you don't have anything on at the moment, why not join us?

C: 当然，我正巧知道一家不错的咖啡厅，环境优美、而且非常清净，或许你会喜欢……
E: Of course. I happen to know a decent café that is spotless and overlooks some beautiful scenery. Perhaps you'll like it...

C: 嗯…心情有点复杂。
E: Hmm... my feelings are mixed.

C: 合作愉快，托帕小姐。
E: Pleasure doing business, Miss Topaz.

C: 嘿嘿，遇到了也不怕。「无敌的磐岩冠军」才不会被同一招击败两次哩！
E: Even if I do, the peerless Boulder Champion won't be defeated by the same move twice!

C: …事实上，这的确是现存的最佳解决方案。
E: ...Honestly, this is the most optimal and immediate solution.

C: 很高兴能看到你们安全地回来，推论：这或许是此次课题最大的一项收获。
E: I am glad that you are all back safe and sound. Deduction: This could be the greatest information haul gained from this research topic.

C: 未来是确定的，还是混沌的，这道难题依然无法解答。真正的战争，从来都没有结束。
E: Is the future destined or chaotic? This conundrum remains unsolvable. The true war has never ended.

C: 你是列车组的一员，当然有自己的房间了！
E: Of course you have one. You're part of the Crew!

C: 咳咳…{NICKNAME}乘客，欢迎你正式成为「无名客」！
E: Ahem! You are now officially a Nameless, {NICKNAME}. Welcome to the Crew!

C: 吵吵嚷嚷的，倒让帕姆想起了以前的日子。这节车厢还被称作「会议车厢」的时候，乘客们就是在这里，闹哄哄地表决下一个目的地。
E: Hehe, all this excitement really takes Pom-Pom back to the old days! When this car was still known as the "Meeting Car," the passengers would gather here and eagerly debate over their next destination.

C: 让我再休息一下…
E: Let me rest a bit longer...

C: 我是「随心所欲学派」。
E: I'm from the Go-With-the-Flow School.

C: 也许不必那么严格，随心所欲一些就好。无名客的生活总是充满疲惫，在这种小事上，不妨就放过自己吧。
E: Perhaps it doesn't need to be so strict. A bit more spontaneity is fine. The lives of the Nameless are always full of fatigue, so it's okay to cut yourself some slack on these small matters.

C: 前不久，我在附近的旧城内发现了一座地下宫殿。只要能从里面挖些宝贝回来，你想在圣城住多久、买什么，都不成问题！
E: I found an underground palace beneath an ancient hypogeum around here a while ago. Just dig up those treasures, and you can stay however long you want in the holy city... Heck, you can even buy whatever you want here!

C: 有句话怎么说的来着？「最值钱的东西都埋在地里。」当然，陷阱和危险也少不了……
E: How does that saying go again? Ah, "the most valuable things are all buried underground." Along with a ton of traps and danger, of course...

C: 当天的幕匿时……
E: Later, at Curtain-Fall Hour...

C: 平稳的呼吸声传来，或许是因为有你陪着，它睡得十分安详。
E: Gentle breathing sounds fill the air. Your presence seems to help it sleep peacefully.

C: 记得那刻夏之前说过：有问题，找风堇。眼下正是需要她的时候！
E: You remember what Anaxa said: "If you need help, just find Hyacine." Now's definitely the time!

C: 你很快放弃了思考大地兽的一次发音中能包含多少信息。
E: You immediately stop trying to understand how a single dromas noise can contain so much meaning.

C: 「驮子」。
E: "Beast of Burden."

C: 就叫这个啦！
E: Yep, that's the name!

C: 只要有人细心呵护，它一定能成长到其他大地兽所不能及的高度——这项崇高的使命就交给你了。
E: With proper care and nurturing, it can grow to heights that other dromases could never reach. That noble task... now rests with you.

C: 贵客还记得当初，和白厄阁下等人初访奥赫玛时所乘的大地兽吗？它们就是旅团的成员。
E: Dear guest, do you remember the dromas you rode with Lord Phainon and the others when you first visited Okhema? They are members of our troupe.

C: 孩子的成长总是令人欣喜的，你阖上双眼，畅想着驮子 / 小地兽 / 大撕垃 / 地宝 / 开拓者二世 / 大奇美拉 / 乌拉诺斯 / 地大地大即将步入的美好未来——
E: A child's growth is always a joy to behold. You close your eyes and begin to picture the bright future awaiting Beast of Burden / Mini Dromas / Dromasilla / Dromy / Trailblazer Jr / The Great Chimera / Uranus / Dromasmas —

C: 呜嗡。（而且，这位奇怪的大叔大概不是什么坏人，只是不太像人。）
E: Grumph. (Besides, this strange guy probably isn't a bad person. He just doesn't seem very... human.)

C: 抱歉，我太投入了…（小声）拜托了，驮子 / 小地兽 / 大撕垃 / 地宝 / 开拓者二世 / 大奇美拉 / 乌拉诺斯 / 地大地大。
E: Sorry, I got carried away... *whispers* Please, Beast of Burden / Mini Dromas / Dromasilla / Dromy / Trailblazer Jr / The Great Chimera / Uranus / Dromasmas.

C: 风堇她什么都愿意做的！
E: Hyacine is willing to do anything!

C: 开始胡说八道！
E: Start to talk nonsense!

C: 现在，孩子想体验一下普通大地兽的生活，希望旅团不要辜负。
E: Now, the kid wants to experience what life is like as an ordinary dromas, so let's just hope the troupe won't be all too disappointing.

C: 嗯，明天见。
E: See you tomorrow.

C: 我太强了，只会让他笑不出来…
E: I'm too strong. They won't even be able to crack up...

C: 就是，像我们普通人，终其一生的回忆整合到一起，大概也就是现在的百分之一吧。
E: Exactly, for ordinary people like us, even if we combined all our memories from our lives, it'd probably only be about 1% of this.

C: 那么…测试的事就拜托您了！
E: Well then... we're counting on you for the test!

C: 没有更多问题了。
E: I don't have any other questions.

C: 该从哀丽秘榭出发了吧？
E: Shouldn't we head out of Aedes Elysiae already?

C: 不用进行光合作用吗？
E: Don't they need to perform photosynthesis?

C: 记好了，餐馆的新名号就定为「开拓者之家 / 迷境大饭店 / 哀丽秘榭社区食堂 / 黄金裔活动中心 / 自定义名称2」。
E: Got it. From this moment on, the restaurant shall be known as "The Trailblazer's Hearth / Maze Grand Restaurant / Aedes Elysiae Community Canteen / Chrysos Heir Activity Center / Custom Name 2."

C: 美食评审会将在今日营业结束后召开，此前，各位就先以提升餐馆营业额为目标吧。
E: The gourmet review will be held after closing today. Until then, everyone, focus on boosting our revenue.

C: 迈德漠斯？没想到新厨师是你。
E: Mydeimos? Never thought you'd be the new chef.

C: 这个有办法！还有很多小妖精想来餐馆工作，*我们*再去找点就好。
E: That's easy! Tons of little fairies want to work here. We can always recruit extra hands.

C: 你也令人忍俊不禁。
E: You do have a knack for cracking people up.

C: *我们*举手！
E: We vote for it!

C: 小小灰，谢谢你。但这种事，根本不是理由啦！
E: Little Gray, thanks for the support. But that's not a valid reason!

C: 小飞儿，你也在这玩！*我们*想做很甜很甜的菜，你手头有适合的食材吗？
E: Little Ciphy, you're here too! We want to cook something suuuper sweet. Do you have the right ingredients?

C: 乐子有了，就不打扰各位啦。回见——
E: Well, that was fun. I'll leave you to it. Catch you later!

C: 好。希望那刻夏老师不会因此大发雷霆……
E: Alright. Just hope Professor Anaxa doesn't get mad at me over this...

C: 赛飞儿，别太得意忘形了。
E: Cipher, you're taking this too far.

C: …轮到我了？
E: ...My turn?

C: 迷！都准备好啦，宴会可以开始啦！
E: Mem! We're all ready. Let the feast begin!

C: 三位老师准备的菜品都很优秀，通过美食评审也是理所应当。
E: All three teachers prepared excellent dishes. It's only natural that your restaurant passed the food review.

C: 近期客流量有显著提升，以甜食为主题的决议很正确。只是，经营压力增加，命运爵要忙的事就很多了。
E: Customer numbers have been on a sugar high lately, proving our sweet-themed strategy was exactly the right flavor. Of course, now Dux Fatorum has to juggle many more items on their daily menu.

C: 如此神奇的巨型果实，我也是初次见到。那位学者似乎对自己的成果很满意，正在加紧培育新品种。只希望别再闹出那么大的动静了。
E: I've never seen such extraordinary giant fruits before. The scholar appears satisfied with the current results and is working faster on new varieties. Hopefully without another fruitful disaster.

C: 两位农林专家，好认真啊！
E: You two agricultural specialists are taking this really seriously!

C: 下次再聊吧！
E: Let's catch up another time!

C: 和小妖精们玩得很开心…
E: I had a blast with the fairies...

E: "Cooking <s>Genius</s> No. <unbreak>123</unbreak>" cooked a full spread of good food.
