E: Trash Cake belched contentedly, ignoring the robocleaner that's about to lose its job.

C: 姬子从路过的行商手中购置了一批风味独特的咖啡伴饮，她单方面声称，这使她调制的咖啡口味得到了极大提升。
E: Himeko purchased a batch of uniquely-flavored coffee additives from a passing merchant. She unilaterally declares that it significantly improved the flavor of the coffee she brews.

C: 三月七种草许久的小众镜头品牌宣布开展史上力度最大的减价清仓，让她省下了一大笔信用点。
E: The niche camera lens brand that March has been promoting for ages declares the largest clearance in the history of their brand, and she saved a lot of credits.

C: 门径的圣子
E: Holy Child of Passage

C: 少女别离前的告白，\n依旧回荡在潮汐：
E: The confession the girl made before her departure,\nStill echoes in the tides' heaves.

C: 丝绸自织机涓涓淌出，\n柔亮者如晨，凄暗者如夜。
E: The silk pours from the loom,\nSome bright as the dawn, some dark as the night.

C: 晨昏交替，\n贼星在夜空几次徘徊，\n岁月令女孩成为少女。
E: Day and night flow,\nAnd the Thief Star makes circles across the sky,\nWhile time molds the girl into an adult.

C: 还有心系凡人的医师，\n祝愿你抬头就能望见虹光。
E: The physician who bears a love for mortals\nwishes for you to look up and behold the rainbow's light.

C: 「接下来…就交给我吧。」
E: "Now... leave the rest to me."

C: 真想找个地方，\n躺下来，一觉睡到明天呀。
E: It would be great to find a place\nwhere I can lie down and sleep until tomorrow.

C: 再后来，小小的人类诞生，\n他们在巨龙身畔飞奔，\n眨眼间又消失在各地。
E: After, the tiny humans came into being.\nThey dashed alongside the Giant Dragon,\nThen in the blink of an eye, disappeared across the land.

C: 地坼的灾厄，\n该由谁来背负？\n巨龙应声沉入大地。
E: The calamity of lands asunder...\nWho should shoulder such a duty?\nThe Giant Dragon sunk into the earth in answer.

C: 公民们笑谈此事，\n却并无几人当真。
E: The citizens laugh at this tale\nWith few accepting it as true.

C: 「杨叔科普说，这东西叫『手办』， 还给我看了一晚上动画片。」 ——三月七 「这可是他的最高礼遇。」 ——丹恒 「我也想要模型！」 ——{NICKNAME}
E: "Mr. Yang explained that it's called a 'figure,' and then made me watch anime with him all night." — March 7th "That's the highest honor he can bestow." — Dan Heng "I want a figurine too!" — {NICKNAME}

C: 「所以，到底发生了什么？」 ——{NICKNAME} 「我看见路边有颗球，就顺手射了一下。」 ——三月七 「然后它飞上天花板，砸穿了会场。」 ——丹恒 「还加了一百分呢！」 ——三月七
E: "So, what exactly happened?" — {NICKNAME} "I saw a ball by the road, so I just casually kicked it." — March 7th "And then — bam! It flew right into the ceiling, through the venue." — Dan Heng "And scored a hundred points too!" — March 7th

C: 「我们要永远、永远一起旅行下去呀。」 ——三月七 「这话有点眼熟……」 ——{NICKNAME}
E: "We'll travel together forever and ever." — March 7th "That line sounds familiar..." — {NICKNAME}

C: 「棋盘之上，王亦是棋子。」\n「王不为先，臣岂愿随之？」
E: "On the board, the King too is but a chess piece."\n"If the king does not lead, how would any dare to follow?"

C:
星风吹散敌军的残灰，
金血又汇聚成熟悉的碑文。
无限宇宙之王高举律法，
向无边无际的王土宣告——
E:
Stellar winds scatter the enemy's remaining ashes,
As golden blood once again congeals into familiar epitaphs.
The master of the infinite cosmos lifts the edict high,
Declaring to her boundless, ceaseless realm —

C: 传说，担负支柱者，\n终将回归支柱所在。
E: Legend holds that they who bear the weight of a pillar,\nShall one day return to where it stands.

C: 「灌与我吧，海列屈拉……」\n「无论是澄澈的蜜酿，」\n「还是那渎世的灾殃……」
E: "Pour for me, Helektra..."\n"Whether it's crystal-clear honey brew,"\n"Or that heretical calamity..."

C: 海妖曾奢望宴会永不终结，\n却见证了曲终人散。
E: The siren once longed for the banquet to never end,\nYet she witnessed the music fade and the guests disperse.

C: 她成绩斐然，\n却拒绝成为学者。
E: She refused to become a scholar,\nDespite her exemplary grades.

C: 可他的<color=#9e5738>悲伤</color>呢？\n诚然，男人不会流泪。
E: But what of his <color=#9e5738>sorrow</color>?\nIndeed, the man could shed no tears.

C: 相传在树庭深幽，\n学士留下一尊<color=#9e5738>授课机巧</color>，\n仿造己身，惟妙惟肖。
E: It's rumored that in the depths of the Grove,\nThe scholar left a <color=#9e5738>teaching ingenium</color>,\nImitating himself to the utmost detail.

C: 「…<unbreak>25</unbreak>秒，<unbreak>24</unbreak>秒……」
E: "...<unbreak>25</unbreak> seconds, <unbreak>24</unbreak> seconds..."

C: 知道自己嘴笨的披索赶紧跑来，从篮子里翻找出那枚五颜六色的面包塞进嘴里，眼睛嘴巴都皱在一起，吞咽了半天挤出了一句恭维话「…但是我最爱吃了！」
E: Piso realized his mistake and rushed over. He dug out the colorful bread from the basket and stuffed it into his mouth. His eyes and mouth were all scrunched up as he struggled to swallow. Finally, he barely managed to utter a compliment, "...but I love it the most!"

C: 车门打开，金光大放，率先走出的是一位灰发{F#少女}{M#少年}，{F#她}{M#他}环顾四周，一眼便瞧见了站在众人最前列的白厄，随后不由分说地冲上去攥住他的手。「啊，白厄大厨！我是你的偶像…啊不对，你是我的粉丝…啊不对！总之我终于见到你了！」
E: The doors opened, light spilling out, and the first to step down was a gray-haired {F#girl}{M#boy}. {F#She}{M#He} scanned the crowd, immediately spotting Phainon at the front, then rushed forward to grab his hand. "Ah, Chef Phainon! I'm your idol... no, wait, you're my fan... no, that's not right! Anyway, I can't believe I finally get to meet you!"

C: 「临时更改？」赛飞儿正要忿忿不平地站起来，被海瑟音锐利的目光一掠，登时又老实地坐下了。
E: "Last-minute change?" Cipher started to rise in protest, but under Hysilens's sharp gaze, she instantly sat back down.

C: 「本…本来就是这么设计的！它脱胎于一种名为『咸柠七』的饮品！」
E: "I–It's supposed to be! It's inspired by a drink called 'Salty Lemon Seven Up'!"

C:
星穹列车的无名客，「不朽」的龙裔。误入死循环的外部变量。

在第<unbreak>33550337</unbreak>次死循环中，接替了即将闭合的「大地」路径。
同为「不朽」行者，与SkoPeo<unbreak>365</unbreak>共鸣，接纳火种内约二百一十六万数据生命体，完成了「大地」的试炼。

最终循环，升擢为「大地」泰坦，与其余泰坦一同在权杖内核层迎战铁墓，并将其击败。
E:
A Nameless from the Astral Express, a Scion of Permanence. An external variable trapped in a recursive loop.

In the <unbreak>33,550,337</unbreak>th recursive loop, he took over the nearly sealed path of "Earth."
As a fellow pathstrider of Permanence, they resonated with SkoPeo<unbreak>365</unbreak>, embracing approximately <unbreak>2.16</unbreak> million data lifeforms within the Coreflame, completing the trial of "Earth."

Ascended to the Earth Titan in the final loop, faced Irontomb in battle in the core layer of the Scepter, and defeated it.

C: 保护措施
E: Containment Measures

C:
因NeiKos<unbreak>496</unbreak>自毁，第<unbreak>33550337</unbreak>次死循环的「负世」逻辑出现漏洞，由变量{NICKNAME}接替。

经系统评估，放任{NICKNAME}行动将极大概率使系统迭代进程停滞甚至倒退，有一定概率导致权杖演算命题趋于自悖。

为保障实验的正常运行，管理员以ID：LykoS介入运算。在驱逐变量{NICKNAME}、并着手毁灭文明后，数枚电信号对LykoS显露敌意，并采取系列攻击行为，致使管理员失联。
E:
Due to the self-destruction of Neikos<unbreak>496</unbreak>, a vulnerability appeared in the Worldbearing logic in the <unbreak>33,550,337</unbreak>th recursive loop. Assumed by variable {NICKNAME}.

A system assessment indicates that allowing {NICKNAME} to act unchecked will, with a high probability, cause the system's iteration process to stagnate or even regress. There's also a certain probability that it could lead to the Scepter's extrapolative propositions becoming self-contradictory.

To ensure the normal operation of the experiment, the Administrator intervened in the calculation with ID: LykoS. After expelling the variable {NICKNAME} and destroying the civilization, several electrical signals displayed hostility towards LykoS and launched a series of attacks, resulting in the loss of contact with the Administrator.

C: 第<unbreak>176232</unbreak>次循环，对电信号进行迭代，仅在功能上保留继承关系。基于电信号的神明崇拜出现，三颗模拟行星在电信号的大规模交战中灭亡。\n第<unbreak>3926183</unbreak>次循环，提高了神性的比例。在科技发展到达临界点后，出于权力和能源需求，人类开始讨伐神明，循环被迫中断。
E: In the <unbreak>176,232</unbreak>nd cycle, electric signals were iterated, and their inheritance was purely on a functional level. Religious worship of the signals appeared. Three simulated planets were destroyed in the ensuing large-scale war of electric signals.\nIn the <unbreak>3,926,183</unbreak>rd cycle, the ratio of divinity was increased. Once technological development hit a critical point, humans began hunting gods out of the need for power and energy. The cycle was forcibly terminated.

C:
未观测到「阿那克萨戈拉斯」的直接攻击，怀疑已采取其它行为。

光历<unbreak>4534</unbreak>年，「阿那克萨戈拉斯」将自身炼为高密度数据嵌合体，以内部骇入式程序提交多项针对性指令，部分生效。LykoS移动权限被卸载。

指令生效后，「阿那克萨戈拉斯」无法被检索。
E:
No direct attacks from "Anaxagoras" were detected. It is suspected to have taken other actions.

In Light Calendar <unbreak>4534</unbreak>, "Anaxagoras" transmuted itself into a high-density data fusion entity, submitting multiple targeted commands via an internal hacking program, with some taking effect. LykoS's mobility permissions were removed.

After directives took effect, "Anaxagoras" can no longer be located.

C: 昔涟！好不容易再见到你~我们先合照一张吧！
E: Cyrene! It's so hard to catch you~ Let's snap a group photo before anything else!

C: 怎么啦？看我不出手就怕了？
E: What's wrong? Afraid of what I might do?

C: 出师的时候到了！
E: Skills polished, ready to shine!

C: 智库的词条今日已更新，你可随时查阅。
E: I updated the data bank entries today if you wanted to look anything up.

C: 每次都要我主动出击，这个家伙是完全不会被激怒的对吧？
E: It is always me that has to make the first move... That guy never loses his cool, does he?

C: 有劳您亲自出面了。不用担心，协助的工作就交给我吧！
E: Thank you for showing up personally. No need to worry. Just leave the support work to me!

C: 还是老样子，如果遇着我没见过的东西，先借我玩玩。
E: You know the drill — send me all your new toys, and I'll return them later.

C: 你就是我的御主吗？我的剑将由你差遣。我会全力以赴，为你带来胜利。
E: Are you my Master? My sword is yours to command. I will give it my all to bring you victory.

C: 我也曾执着于「圣杯」，但如今已经理解——这个世界上不存在无需过程便能轻易实现的愿望。所以…不妨用自己的双手创造想要的未来，并承担一切收获与代价吧。
E: I, too, once pursued the Holy Grail, but now I understand — there's no such thing as a wish granted without effort. So... why not create the future you desire with your own hands and bear both the rewards and the costs?

C: 按照童话故事的说法，只有聪明人才能看到我手中宝剑的形象，{NICKNAME}，你能看到它的吧？
E: According to the fairy tale, only those who are wise can see the form of the sword in my hand. {NICKNAME}, you can see it, can't you?

C: 跟你搭档？哈…真难得啊，卢卡。
E: Pair up with him? Alright, Luka, let's do this.

C: 快点，让我试试这招。
E: Come on, I wanna try something out.

C: 克拉拉：帮帮我，史瓦罗先生！
E: Clara: Help me, Mr. Svarog!

C: 卢卡哥哥，喜欢吃肉！虎克也喜欢吃肉！所以，卢卡哥哥跟虎克是好朋友！
E: Luka loves to eat meat — just like Hook! That's why we're such great friends!

C: 虎克…虎克可不好欺负！
E: N—Nobody bullies Hook!

C: 哇…送给老爹吧！
E: Wow... Daddy will love this!

C: …我是玲可，贝洛伯格雪原科考队员。工作的事情麻烦工作期间找我，其他时间…我都不在。嗯，就这样，再见。
E: *sigh* So... I'm Lynx, a member of the Belobog Snow Plains research team. For work-related matters, please contact me during working hours. I'm unavailable at any other time. That's all, bye.

C: 客人嘛，岂有不招待的道理。
E: Customers are always welcome.

C: 想去哪儿，我来领路~
E: Got places to be? I'm your best guide!

C: 万一被卷入了麻烦事，自己的真心如何并不重要，重要的是如何找到适合自己扮演的角色…哎，经验之谈。
E: When in a difficult situation, it's not so important to maintain who you truly are, but to find the suitable role to play... Ah, that's just my own experience.

C: 我听云骑老兵说过「星火之狐」的传说，作为罗浮第一王牌飞行士，驭空大人留下的星槎纪录至今无人能破！没想到，见着面才发现，她说话还挺文文气气的~
E: I've heard Cloud Knight veterans talk about the legend of the "Starfire Fox." As the best ace pilot in the Luofu, Madam Yukong's starskiff records remain unbeaten! I didn't expect her to talk in such a polite way when I met her~

C: 白露…是那位「衔药龙女」吧？说是她一哭，患者的病就好了…听着够离谱！但说到持明嘛…越是这种离谱的事儿，越有可能是真的吧？
E: Bailu... I—it's that Healer Lady. I heard that her crying can cure patients... that sounds impossible! But she is a Vidyadhara after all... for them, the more outrageous something is, the more possible it becomes.

C: 虽然白露生来便被奉为「龙尊」，同她自身的意愿无关，但「衔药龙女」的称号，确确实实是由于她精湛的医术而得的。
E: Though Bailu has been worshiped as the High Elder since birth and had no say in this, her title of Healer Lady was indeed gained from her expert practice of medicine.

C: 以额间之眼观之…
E: The omniscia sees through you...

C: 我曾以为追求最纯粹极致的剑术只有一种方式…但她，将军，我…每个人最终都会走上不同的道路。
E: I used to think there was only one way to become a true swordmaster... but General, Jingliu, and even myself... we all ended up on different paths.

C: 不知不觉剑艺大有长进，该找个对手印证了。
E: My swordplay is ready. Time to put it to the test.

C: 拇指点点，好运连连~
E: Spread those positive vibes, and watch the good luck follow~

C: 我看还能抢救一下。
E: Your treatment's not done yet!

C: 在外头多待一会儿好不好？
E: Come on, can't we stay out a little longer?

C: 他不适合习武。但择徒非要看天分吗？那只是当师父的偷懒，想事半功倍，又或者想借徒留名吧。名声、传承…这些我统统不在意。我的剑，谁要学，我便教。
E: I wouldn't say he's a natural swordmaster... but being gifted shouldn't be a determining factor when choosing an apprentice. Mentors who place importance on natural talent either lack the skills to teach, or seek to take credit for their apprentices' easy success. Fame, background... none of those matter. I will teach my techniques to anyone willing to put their heart into them.

C: 往日种种，正如铭刻此身的伤痕。
E: There is a story in every scar.

C: 再警告一次，你，别靠近我的同伴。
E: This is your last warning. Stay away from my companions.

C: 我能感受到这股躁动…
E: I sense a storm...

C: 在幽囚狱的那些日子，只有阅读能让我逃离漫长的时间和过去的影子。
E: During my days in The Shackling Prison, reading books was my only respite from the long hours and the shadows of the past.

C: 我的责任是医好将军的身子，他的责任则是按住将军跃跃欲试的心。为此我要司膳烹药，他要刀锋见血——你看，我俩这手上功夫都闲不下来。
E: My duty is to heal the general, and Moze's duty is to suppress her eagerness. That's why I'm in charge of cooking and medicine, and Moze handles all the dirty work. You see, neither of us can slack off.

C: 我闻得您身上有烦恼的味道，因此用朱明的安息散、炎龙涎，混上沉霞烬，调了一剂焚香，取名「忘忧」。分您一些吧？
E: I smelled the scent of anxiety on you, so I used the Zhuming's sleeping powder and flame ambergris, mixed with sunset cinders, to make an incense called "Forget All Worries." Let me share some with you.

C: 冥顽不灵。
E: You're a stubborn one.

C: 风声所到之处…你无所遁形！
E: Where the wind whispers... you cannot hide!

C: 这一次，不会重蹈覆辙。
E: This time, I won't make the same mistake.

C: 不知为何，如今身体特别疲累，总会想起白露大人。下次回罗浮，我定要去她那看一看。
E: I'm not sure why, but lately, I've been feeling especially tired. I keep thinking about Lady Bailu. Next time I'm back on the Luofu, I'll definitely go visit her.

C: 我誓令「纯美」之名响彻寰宇，至死不泯。
E: I vow to make the grand name of "the Beauty" echo throughout the universe, till I draw my last breath.

C: 好运带来财富，一如既往。
E: Fortune follows luck, just like it always does.

C: 黑塔是最典型的天才——天纵奇材，目中无人。我毫不怀疑她的才智，但我怀疑她的才智对他人并无帮助。
E: Herta is a quintessential genius — a natural wonder who sees no one as her equal. I have no doubt that she is talented, but I doubt whether her talent is always helpful to others.

C: 知识既为万物尺度，定将穷尽真理、根除谬误。
E: Knowledge is the measure of all things. It reveals truth... and falsehood.

C: 来许愿吧。
E: Make a wish.

C: 没有肉身固然方便，但以「模因」的方式来去世间，却始终面临着失落「自我」的风险。
E: It's undeniable, being without a physical body has its perks, but when moving through the world in the form of a memetic entity, the danger of forsaking one's "self" becomes apparent.

C: 芮克先生是一位电影狂人。我难以理解他的一些行为，但完全可以理解他对电影艺术的坚持。如果以后再有机会合作，还是拍些和平温暖的题材吧。
E: Mr. Reca is a film fanatic. I find some of his actions hard to understand, but I fully appreciate his dedication to the art of cinema. If we ever have the chance to collaborate again, I think we should focus on peaceful and heartwarming themes.

C: 就像在拆解和声呢。
E: It's like analyzing harmony.

C: 能在知更鸟小姐的歌声中战斗，是我的荣幸。
E: It's an honor to fight to the sound of Miss Robin's voice.

C: 我可没说数到三！
E: I didn't say I'd count to three!

C: 看见没，这就是天才。
E: Take a look — this is pure genius in action.

C: 剪除祸端。
E: Cut away the heart of strife.

C: 狭路相逢，难免针锋相对。
E: In tight confines, a clash of wills is unavoidable.

C: 飞儿，不用担心缇宝阿姐，*我们*一定会追上你的！
E: Don't worry about big sister Tribbie, Ciphy. We will definitely catch up to you!

C: 缇宝：要来了么？
E: Tribbie: Is it coming?

C: 全力以赴，此地将见证荣耀！
E: Spare no effort, let this place witness glory!

C: 求索定是孤独的长路。
E: Intellectual pursuit is doomed to be a long and lonely road.

C: 能再次见证昏光庭院的医术，我很幸运。
E: I'm fortunate to witness the Twilight Courtyard's healing arts again.

C: 又是一位与记忆相关的粉发少女…这真的只是巧合么？
E: Yet another pink-haired girl related to memories... Is this really just a coincidence?

C: 我说灰子，最近在哪发财呢？
E: So, Gray Mystery~ Where have you been to fatten your wallet, hmmm~?

C: 谢啦，这下舒服多了。
E: Thanks. That feels way better.

C: 寒毛倒竖了，咱们要不往回走走？
E: My hair's standing up... Maaaybe we should go the other way?

C: 以新生的烈阳，撕裂长空！
E: With this newborn sun, tear open the sky!

C: 荧荧微光，也将汇成璀璨星河。
E: Even faint sparks can converge into a bright river of stars.

C: 悬锋王，让历史铭记这场伟大的战役吧。
E: Let history remember this glorious campaign, King of Kremnos.

C: 相比万马奔腾、狩猎恶兽时的酣畅，大地兽虽步履缓慢，但借此俯瞰四方，却更合我的心意。
E: The thunder of a thousand hooves and the wild joy of slaying great beasts are fine pleasures... but riding a dromas, slow and steady, with the world spread beneath my feet. That is more to my liking.

C: 话说在前，请你不要违背三月的想法。
E: I'll say this upfront: Please do NOT go against March's wishes.

C: 愿「大地」捍卫前路。
E: May the "Earth" protect the road ahead.

C: 我们联手，就是无所不能的~
E: Together, we can do anything~

E: I have to keep... going...

C: 能在列车的留声机上播放的碟片，是偶然所得，亦是他人馈赠。音律飞旋时，那些笑容、擦肩、触碰，还有战斗时激荡的心绪，都一一涌上心头。或许这就是时代飞速发展向前，却依然有人在收集碟片的原因。\n当前碟片中刻录着《神降》。
E: A record that can be played on the Express' phonograph. It might be a chance acquisition or a gift from someone else. All sorts of memories surge up when the music plays — the smiles, encounters, touches, and the excitement of battle. Maybe that is why people still collect records even as society rapidly advances.\nThe current record contains the track "Theophany."

C: 能在列车的留声机上播放的碟片，是偶然所得，亦是他人馈赠。音律飞旋时，那些笑容、擦肩、触碰，还有战斗时激荡的心绪，都一一涌上心头。或许这就是时代飞速发展向前，却依然有人在收集碟片的原因。\n当前碟片中刻录着《鸣蛀之梦》。
E: A record that can be played on the Express' phonograph. It might be a chance acquisition or a gift from someone else. All sorts of memories surge up when the music plays — the smiles, encounters, touches, and the excitement of battle. Maybe that is why people still collect records even as society rapidly advances.\nThe current record contains the track "Dream of Gnawing."

C: 《深魇噩兆》
E: Nightmarish Omen

C: ＊原始忆域的混沌中翻涌出的一叠追忆，停留在墨迹未干的一刻。＊ …… 知更鸟：         距上次来信，已有一个月有余。能再度遥闻弦音，我很高兴。         你信中提及的近况，我们在星际和平播报中也有所耳闻。不必为一次失败懊丧，只要巨恐鸟的翎羽依然装饰在那些俯瞰群星的冠冕之上，再多斡旋都无法使摩里伦斯的原住民与盗猎者间憎恨消弭。         匹诺康尼一切都好，我能感觉到它沉眠美梦中的呼吸依旧舒缓平和，不用过于挂念。         听闻你的下一站是卡斯别林亚特-Ⅷ。我深知不该干预你播撒谐乐的方向，也理解你不愿受家族支持的理由。但此次非同以往，冲突双方积怨已久，周边势力亦乐见它们不死不休，若有意外发生，务必求助于当地家族信众。 …… 星期日：         关于「谐乐大典」提议在家主会议上受阻一事，你了解奥帝•艾弗法，苜蓿草家归根结底不过希望家族借此大捞一笔，只要别让他把大典办成星际服务贸易展销会，一切随他去。         猎犬家系抱怨人手不足，无非希望借此扩张势力；隐夜鸫家对场地说三道四，也只是觊觎被封存的原始忆域。         你可以以让步换取支持，至于尺度，由你自己把握。现今你是橡木家系家主，终有一日你要自己做出抉择，我也乐见那一天的到来。         因此，不必事事询问我的意见。此事如此，事事皆然。 …… 知更鸟：         同谐的鸟儿，我听闻了你的消息，也已知晓你在卡斯别林亚特-Ⅷ的布道并不顺利。         你说，你假借演出之名为平民护送物资，但屡屡被关卡拦下；你说，你在如同废墟般的学校中为孩童歌唱天外的世界，但没过几日，学校便在炮火中被夷为平地。         你问我，同谐的颂歌歌颂美好、快乐与纯粹之物，那么弱者的痛苦和哭泣，又该如何让他人听见？         孩子，我能告诉你的唯有：当大地上的路途都已走尽，鸟儿便必须在天空留下自己的足迹。
E: *A stack of recollections that surged out of the chaos of the Primordial Memory Zone, frozen at that moment when the ink is still wet.* ... Robin: It's been over a month since your last letter. I'm delighted to hear your melodies from afar once again. We've heard about your recent situation through the Interastral Peace Broadcast. Don't be discouraged by one failure. As long as the giantmoa's feathers still adorn those crowns that gaze down upon the stars, no amount of mediation can dissolve the hatred between Morillons' natives and the poachers. Everything is fine in Penacony. I can sense its breathing remains gentle and peaceful in its sweet slumber, so you needn't worry too much. I hear your next destination is Kasbelina-VIII. I know I shouldn't interfere with your path of spreading harmonious music, and I understand why you refuse the Family's support. However, this time is different. The conflicting parties harbor deep-seated grudges, and surrounding powers are eager to see them fight to the death. If anything unexpected happens, please don't hesitate to seek help from the local Family followers. ... Sunday: Regarding the obstruction of the Charmony Festival proposal at the family heads' meeting, the Alfalfa Family is ultimately just hoping to make a fortune out of this, as you expect from Oti Alfalfa. So long as he doesn't turn the festival into an interstellar trade expo, let him have his way. The Bloodhound Family's complaints about understaffing are merely an excuse to expand their influence. The Nightingale Family's nitpicking about the venue is just their way of coveting the sealed Primordial Memory Zone. You can trade concessions for support, the extent of which is up to your judgment. You are now the head of the Oak Family, and the day will come when you must make your own decisions. I, too, look forward to seeing that day arrive. Therefore, there's no need to seek my opinion on everything. This applies not just to this matter, but to all matters. ... Robin: My dear bird of the Harmony, I've heard news of you and learned of your struggles in spreading the message on Kasbelina-VIII. You told me how you tried to help civilians transport supplies under the guise of performances, only to be stopped at checkpoints time and time again. You spoke of singing to children about worlds beyond the sky in a school that resembled ruins, only to have it razed to the ground by artillery fire days later. You ask me: If the songs of the Harmony praise beauty, happiness, and purity, then how can others hear the suffering and tears of the weak? Child, all I can tell you is this: When all paths on the ground have been exhausted, birds must leave their footprints in the sky.

C: 逝去之事永不复返，当他转身寻找认为正确的方向，为时已晚：他的举止本身就是绝望。
E: What's gone is gone forever. When he turned to seek the path he deemed right, it was already too late: His very act was itself an embodiment of despair.

C: 时间在灰烬中等待苏醒——去拨转命运的指针吧，为失却的记忆再度写下开场白。
E: Time lies dormant in the ashes, waiting to awaken. Turn the hand of destiny, and write anew the prologue for the lost memories.

C: 召唤【泰坦眷属】。

C: 拥有一定层数的【战甲】，使自身受到的伤害降低。受到攻击后减少自身1层【战甲】，减少到0层时，【战甲】被破坏，对自身造成大量虚数属性伤害，并使自身行动延后，使破坏【战甲】的我方单位恢复能量。【战甲】被破坏后，自身受到攻击时额外再受到少量虚数属性伤害。【战甲】在自身回合结束时恢复到最大层数。
E: Possesses a number of "War Armor" stacks, which decreases DMG taken. Loses 1 stack of "War Armor" on this unit after being attacked. When at 0 stacks, "War Armor" will be destroyed, dealing massive Imaginary DMG to this unit and delaying their action. The target that destroyed "War Armor" will regenerate Energy. After "War Armor" is destroyed, this unit will also additionally take minor Imaginary DMG when attacked. "War Armor" will be restored to maximum stacks at the end of this unit's turn.

C: 召唤【黑潮造物】，当【黑潮造物】未被全部消灭时，敌方全体目标受到的伤害降低。
E: Summons "Black Tide Creature." When there are "Black Tide Creatures" that are still undefeated, reduces DMG taken by all friendly units.

E: Primal Hunger

E: Heralding the Dawn

C: 诗人们并不常把瑟希斯和法吉娜联系到一起，而冬鱼夏草便是例外之一。极少数情况下，本应生活在海中的鱼会跃上河岸，吞下摩利树的一颗种子并活着回到水里；而后出于机缘巧合，这颗种子会在鱼腹内发芽，恰好被渔民打捞上岸——比用掷棒连续丢出四个六概率还低。正因如此，水手们都用「捞到了冬鱼夏草」来形容几乎不可能的事件。但总人认为，这种稀有的天材地宝应该有强大的保健功效。忒休斯王临终前就曾派人采来一株此药，并在服用后因食物中毒死去。
E: Poets rarely associate Cerces with Phagousa, with the Winterfish Summerherb being one of the exceptions. In extremely rare cases, a fish that should dwell in the sea would leap onto the riverbank, swallow a seed from the Mori tree, and return alive to the water. This seed would then, by pure chance, sprout inside a fish's belly and be caught by fishermen, with odds even lower than rolling four sixes in a row. That's why sailors use the phrase "catching a Winterfish Summerherb" to describe nearly impossible events. Still, many insisted such a rarity must be a potent tonic. King Theseus, on his deathbed, had sent for it, only to die of food poisoning after taking it.

C: 猎杀牛头怪
E: Minotaur Hunt

C: 时间会让它愈发浓郁。
E: Time enriches it.

C: 事件
E: Occurrence

C:
没有水手不曾听闻巨妖的传说。
那只怪兽潜藏于东方的深洋，庞大、多爪、愚蠢、残酷。
它用触须砸碎来往的船只，就连天空的飞鸟也不曾幸免。
有人说它是法吉娜的恶意，还有人说它是海妖的近亲。
唯一能确定的是，这种生物没有头脑。
比鱼还短的记忆，促使它砸碎眼前一切。
某日，海畔明珠的城主组建起船队。
猎手们应邀航向东方，誓要让那怪物血债血偿。
可当船队抵达时，东方的海面平静如镜。
人们只发现巨妖的尸体，和残渣鱼骨一同坠入深渊。
它没有死于狩猎，它死于自我毁灭。
E:
No sailor has ever been untouched by the legend of the Kraken.
The beast lurks in the eastern depths, enormous, many-tentacled, dim-witted, and cruel.
It crushes passing ships with its tentacles, not even sparing the birds in the sky.
Some say it's Phagousa's malice incarnate, others claim it's kin to the sea sirens.
The only certainty is that this creature lacks a brain.
With a memory shorter than a fish's, it destroys everything in sight.
One day, the lord of Pearly Shores assembled a fleet.
Hunters set sail eastward, swearing to make the monster pay blood for blood.
But when the fleet arrived, the eastern seas were as calm as a mirror.
They found only the Kraken's corpse, sinking into the abyss alongside fish bones and debris.
It wasn't hunting that killed it, but self-destruction.

C: ●初始获得方程
E: ● Initial Equations

C: 再施放<color=#f29e38ff><unbreak>#1[i]</unbreak></color>次天赋的追加攻击后，【致哀，故人】恢复战技点的效果可再次触发。
E: After using Talent's Follow-Up ATK <color=#f29e38ff><unbreak>#1[i]</unbreak></color> more time(s), the Skill Point recovery effect from "Lament, Lost Soul" can be triggered again.

E: When this target deals DMG to enemy targets, the DMG received by enemy targets is reduced by <color=#f29e38ff><unbreak>#1[i]%</unbreak></color>. This state is removed when the "Corrosion" state is removed.

E: You've written down a miracle, and the days of Trailblazing are just ahead.\nGo talk to everyone about the upcoming journey.

E: Salvage the memoria

C: 不过，能经历过去的记忆，有时也不算坏事吧？
E: But reliving old memories isn't always such a bad thing, is it?

C: …知更鸟？
E: ...Robin?

C: 我会登门拜访的，只是现在……
E: I'll come visit you properly, it's just that right now...

C: 「死亡」闹出的动静太大，那位{RUBY_B#「梦主」歌斐木}在美梦中无所不能的存在{RUBY_E#}，也将视线投向这里了。
E: "Death" caused such a huge commotion that the {RUBY_B#"Dreammaster" Gopher Wood}omnipotent being within the sweet dream{RUBY_E#} has turned its gaze upon this place.

C: 她最担心的情形并未出现。「死亡」自行退去，你们得以全身而退。
E: Her worst fears didn't materialize. "Death" retreated on its own, allowing you all to escape unscathed.

C: 「…他们躲入睡乡██但求安眠不被风雨搅扰…」
E: "...They sought refuge in the land of sleep ██, merely wishing for undisturbed rest, away from the storms..."

C: 没什么，继续吧。
E: Never mind, let's continue.

C: 不惜敲碎重如生命的基石，他以诡计骗过星期日，换来了押上一切的机会。
E: Willing to shatter the Cornerstone as precious as life itself, he deceived Sunday with his schemes, earning himself a chance to risk it all.

C: 不愧是「同谐」的宠儿，穿过如此浓稠的忆质，却没受到半分影响。
E: As expected of the Harmony's favorite... Passing through such dense memoria without even being affected in the slightest.

C: 谁让你是大丽花呢？我总要看看，你又要闹出什么乱子。
E: Well, you are The Dahlia after all. I have to keep an eye on what kind of trouble you're going to stir up next.

C: 况且…许久不见，又在我面前有了压倒性的优势，哪怕我仅有半分逃离的机会，你也会竭力阻止。
E: Besides... after not seeing each other for so long, and now having such an overwhelming advantage over me, you'd do everything in your power to stop me even if I had the slightest chance to escape.

C: 所以，别再自以为了解我了——我呀，只是不想错过活着的任何一种可能。
E: So stop thinking you've figured me out. I don't want to miss out on any possibility life has to offer.

C: …哪好了？
E: ...Which part was good news?

C: ——寰宇蝗灾会被困在这里，此刻虚弱的你也一样。
E: ...The Swarm Disaster will be trapped here, and so will you in your weakened state.

C: 你们？什么意思，你不跟我们一起走了吗……
E: What do you mean? Are you not coming with us...?

C: 第一次死亡，我曾自己决定了它如何到来，又将改变什么。接下来的两次，我也想尽力得到相同的结果。
E: For my first death, I chose how it would come and what it would change. For the next two, I want to try my best to achieve the same outcome.

C: 我曾死过一次，却又重返尘世。若你也能如此幸运，我们还是否会行向殊途？
E: I died once, yet returned to the mortal realm. If you were as fortunate as I was, would we still walk different paths?

C: 站在抉择前的你我，无论重来多少次，也只会作出同一个决定——彼时彼刻，我们早已被过往塑形，认为那才是唯一正确的道路。
E: When we stand at the crossroads of choice, no matter how many times we start over, we'll always make the same decision. By that moment in time, we've already been shaped by our past, believing that choice to be the only correct path.

C: 但从那一刻起，你便杀死了自己，虽生犹死。
E: But from that moment on, you will have killed yourself... alive in body, but dead in spirit.

C: 世人皆以为，那是「毁灭」的造物，因其常与灾异同行同至。
E: People believe it to be a creation of the Destruction, for it always arrives coupled with calamity.

C: 又为何苛求真实
E: Why press so hard for the truth

C: 我们都相信你。
E: We all believe in you.

C: 如此，你们一定能在阳光下相聚。
E: In this way, you will reunite in the warmth of the sunlight.

C: 你不禁思索，她的拒绝，真的像是表面上那样决绝吗？
E: You can't help but wonder... Was her refusal really as determined as she made it appear?

C: 我相信，有一天你会自己找到这来的，不够好奇，就不可能成为无名客。
E: I believe that one day you'll find your way here on your own. After all, you can't become one of the Nameless without enough curiosity.

C: 还记得吗？在对抗「太一之梦」的时候，我抱着你飞上天空。那时，我不知道自己还能否醒来，但我却很开心。
E: Remember how I held you and flew into the sky when we fought against Ena's Dream? Back then, I wasn't sure if I would ever wake up again, but I was happy.

C: 你向那声音提出要求。浓云褪去，柔和的月光倾泻而下，一些东西出现在你的脚边……
E: You make a request to the voice. The thick clouds part, and gentle moonlight pours down, revealing something at your feet...

C: 书桌的一角的各式年鉴、典籍、杂志下，压着各不相同，甚至自相矛盾的身份证明。
E: Pinned beneath various almanacs, classic volumes, and magazines in a corner of the desk were multiple identification documents. All different, and some even self-contradictory.

C: 这种「相似」现象至今都没得到合适的解释，只能说…瑟希斯的祝福，很神奇吧？
E: This "similarity" phenomenon still hasn't found a proper explanation. Let's just say... the Blessing of Cerces is quite mysterious, isn't it?

C: 嗯…或许，灰宝在花园的树下多许几次愿望，属于你的小奇美拉就会掉下来呢？
E: Hmm... Maybe if you make a few more wishes under the garden tree, your little chimera will fall right down from it?

C: 「律令•其四•子夜」
E: "Divine Law (IV): Midnight"

C: 负载生命值
E: HP Overload

C: 咕噜鱼儿的能力很强，可以为你帮不少忙。
E: The Gurgling Fish is very powerful and can be of great help to you.

C: 哦呀，是我的<color=#f29e38ff>专属奇美拉</color>！
E: Oh! It's my <color=#f29e38ff>exclusive chimera</color>!

C: 当前
E: Current

C: 在流光忆庭共处的那段时光，她那危险的行为倾向让我印象深刻，成为「焚化工」…也并不令人意外——毕竟，她的未来就像命运的乱流，从未有一刻平息。
E: Her dangerous tendencies made a strong impression on me while we were working together at the Garden of Recollection. It's... not surprising that she became a Cremator. After all, her future is like the chaotic turbulences of fate... It never rests.

C: 在别人的记忆里，扮演一位根本不存在的「小姨」…是不是很有趣呢？人们是如此轻信，连最后望向我的眼神，仿佛都以为自己经历了一场惨烈的背叛。
E: Isn't it fun... to role-play in someone's memory as an "Aunt" that had never existed? People are so trusting. Even in their final gaze upon me, they seem convinced they've suffered a tragic betrayal.
